# IS KETOSIS A CURE OR TOOL FOR A BROKEN MITOCHONDRIA?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fketosis-cure-tool-broken-mitochondria-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 6, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fketosis-cure-tool-broken-mitochondria-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I got asked a question by a LCHF foodie and I wanted to share my insights for him here with you here. He said, "Hey Jack - what do you think of the prognostic power of hi LDLp? Always bad, or only for IR, emf-ridden, low light peeps?"

MY ANSWER: 

WHEN CELLS ARE STRESSED THEY LOSE LIGHT IN THE FORM OF ELF-UV light. (Roeland Van Wijk 101) Anyone with a bad lipid panel needs a lesson in basic physics to get the gist of what their numbers are telling them about their local environment. The information is not what you're experts are regurgitating today. 

Any lipoprotein marker that shows up in your blood plasma that has a higher atomic mass in your blood plasma is an excellent marker for poor decisions made by the person about how the electrons from your environment have been given their marching orders. Why do I say that? Energy and mass in Einstein's equation for mass equivalence are fundamentally the same thing.......energy. This is very counterintuitive for food guru's to understand, but it is reality. Energy in the form of light, has all the energy and momentum nature can harvest so therefore, it is not encumbered by mass. Anything that shows up with a mass increases the inertia in blood. This slows flow and makes it more sluggish than it would be. Viscosity rises. As blood flow slows this has an unintended side effect: It slows delivery of molecular oxygen to mitochondria. Oxygen is the only gas that is paramagnetic. This means it is drawn to things with large magnetic fields, so it is drawn to magnets. Mitochondria are fundamentally small nano magnets. Your brain and heart have the most of them in cells and this is why blood flow is drawn to these organs more so than any other organ at rest. So anything that slows this transfer of data down is predictive to aging. Why?

The signals are designed to be coherent within a cell. This is how a cell is designed. It is a repository of all forms of waves that our environment can manifest. The sensor of these waveforms is your respiratory proteins in your mitochondria. If oxygen is not accurately delivered to a cell what is the graded response in mitochondria? It slows electron chain transport (ECT) speeds. The redox potential collapses, and we lose the electric charge on our inner mitochondrial membrane. NAD+ falls and NADH rises at cytochrome one. Pseudohypoxia is always the result at this mitochondrial level. This is David Sinclair's research now done in December 2013. Do you see the connections yet? What is the collateral damage of these actions that manifest in your blood plasma as they all occur? Every time the speed of electrons slows on ECT, disease is the only outcome. This makes disease a signal to the organism something is amiss in their environment. What else changes in cells as ECT speeds slow? Free radical signaling from cytochrome 1 occurs is the incident light is solar. It varies if it is artificial. Free radicals =ROS or RNS.

This region (NAD+/NADH) sits adjacent to the key 13 genes in mitochondria DNA that code for the key proteins in our respiratory proteins. Mitochondria have 37 genes but these 13 are the key to life in humans. ROS and RNS can alter mitochondrial DNA in this region. If they are disrupted, mitochondrial respiratory proteins are spread out and enlarged in size and distances. Their distance between one an other increases. Every increase in one Angstrom of distance on the ECT slows electron tunneling speeds by a factor of ten. Nick Lane spoke about this unusual aspect of mitochondrial function in his latest book, called the Vital Question. Food guru's have no idea how to explain why this makes us sick, but I think I can. 

**SO DOES FOOD MATTER OR DOES LIGHT MATTER MOST?**

Now this nonsense meme about food "**_you persist with_**" must be addressed. To learn new material you have to unlearn old outdated information. All things in the cosmos are controlled by electrons and electrons are programed by photons of light using the photoelectric effect. Chemistry in the entire universe is controlled exclusively by the physical state of valence electrons in atoms, and this includes all known biochemistry in cells. 

As environmental changes occur with light, this can change the physical and energetic state of electrons. Normally electrons act as "identical interchangeable parts" in the matter in our cells they are akin to particles with different quantum information embedded in the light frequencies attached to these electrons. We call this process electron excitation.  This is why seasonal foods grown undersunlight have different biophoton footprints because of how sunlight varies during the seasons.

This is how "change without change" occurs EVERYWHERE photoelectrically in the universe using ALL chemicals. This is not subject to a discussion of food guru's current beliefs, it is a well known universal physical fact linked to photosynthesis. That fact, is completely abused by LCHF/ketogenic food guru's. Why am I being so forceful now with this reply? 

I want you to get the details right because I respect you. All foods break down to electrons and are fed into cytochromes for processing. Mitochondria are designed to read the energenic state of the electrons from food to process them into free radical signals to optimize function.  How they are sorted is based upon their photon excitation. 

For example, if they are a carbohydrate electron or branched chain amino acid they get fed into cytochrome 1 specifically for a photoelectric reason. If they are from a fat they feed into cytochrome two. Here is where the food guru's lose all credibility with me, because they don't have even a basic understanding of physics built inside our colony of mitochondria.

How are all things made from the same thing fundamentally, become all the different things we see in the cosmos?

All electrons are exactly the same everywhere in the universe, Ivor...........so how can different things that made from them, like foods, that look so different to us on farms and in markets? Simple, because electrons can be changed ever so slightly by light frequencies that "excites" them. Excite = energy increase and information from that light changes the matter in the food to appear differently. Food is essentially a bar code of light energy and information.  Light can do this photo-electrically to the matter in foods. Mitochondria read that data.  Those frequencies that excite them should come from the sun and not a fake light in your house, computer or cell phone, or from a farmer's growing lamp. Excitation only come from the light sources that excite them. This is why eating outside in nature does not equal eating in a cafeteria under LED light. This is why Weston A. Price found ancestral people how he did. All ate under sunlight and not indoors like modern man.

This is why organic sun grown food exceeds GMO foods in nutrient density. Not only are electrons changed in GMO foods, but so are the protons because they contain no photosynethic controls like natural foods do. Mitochondrial pay attention to the spin state of the hydrogen protons it processes. Both of these aspects of subatomic particles contained in food are changed by properties of the light they are affected by and the light they contain from photosynthetic processing not the nutrients. GMO foods are grown under and processed with blue light and their electrons are not as highly powered as ones in the sun planted in Earth. They also have an altered level of deuterium in them.

Because of this, you have to eat more electrons from these foods to get equivalement amount of light for the cell. This is why people who eat processed food really get fat.  **It has nothing to do with the electrons or protons fundamentally, it has all to do with the lack of light those electrons have and the amount of deuterium they contain.** 

Fritz Popp proved this with his photomultipliers in the late 20th century. GMO food has less light contained in them and he proved it with testing. This unfathomable small change in light frequency confuses the food guru into believing that food macros, and not light, is our biggest issue. Its a half truth my friend. Poor light confinement in food electrons leads to massive changes on a big scale that our 5 senses are attuned to. This increases our awareness that something is wrong is sensed in our respiratory proteins, and it becomes a signal for us to change our environment. The deuterium content is also a signal many of the things in our cells pay attention too. Our 5 senses use many other sensory pathways for waveforms, other than mitochondria to make this information available to our brain in our thalamus. Our thalamus is where our alpha waves found on the EEG begin. They are supposed to fire at 7.83 hertz which matches the Earth natural resonance. That frequency comes a connection with the Earth Ivor. Circadian signals are tied to the alpha wave generation in EEG. Your thalamus, in this way, is a giant tuning fork used by the thalamus to compare frequencies embedded on your electrons from the environmental source from every mitochondria and every sensory relay in your brain.

This is why a tomato and pineapple look quite different but they are made up of entirely the same things, electrons and protons. The programming of the spin state of the particles is what varies. We call that process quantization and we use Jablonski diagrams to show the effect (below pic). 

Nothing is more accurate. To do it optimally, your mitochondrial respiratory proteins have to be in their most condensed or shrunken form. This shortens the distance of the inner mitochondrial membrane. This is why cold thermogenesis helps people with bad lipids 100% of the time. Food guru's cannot explain how cold build wellness, but I can. Cold condenses our respiratory proteins so a mitochondria will release heat. Heat is red light. Red light causes the water around the mitochondria to shrink. Heat shrinks water and cold makes ice. Ice floats on liquid water. That is good news for fish at the poles. It is also magnificent physics for mitochondrial proteins. Red light also causes cytochrome 3 to shrink directly most. Ketosis has no effect on the respiratory proteins size or distance, but it plays a role in sheer number of electrons and in speeding up ECT flow. 

**This is why ketosis can help, but cannot solve any disease process.** It is a tool for the smart clinician to use to help a sick patient making poor light decisions within their environment. It is also why ketosis is a partial solution to disease management because ketosis only increase ECT speeds it does not address the excitation of electrons. Cold and light are fully capable of shrinking the respiratory proteins, but the number of electrons has no effect on shrinkage. This is a key point. UV light alone, can increase ECT speeds and IR light red light in sun shrinks the respiratory proteins. Blue light from modern technology expands them. Non native EMF from tech gear also expands them further slowing ECT flow. The light in your house, job, your car, your train have had an altered spectrum of light now for 150 years. Modern lighting has no UV or IR frequencies, but has 4 times the amount of blue light compared to the color temperature of normal solar light. That is why we see lipoprotein mass increase on almost everyone's lipid panels today, while their Vitamin D level drop. You say, wait.........how can a change in light from our environment do this to our blood lipids, Jack? It's quite simple when you understand the physics of E-mc^2. 

Anytime light is lost or slows because of its interaction with matter anywhere in the cosmos, mass has to manifest as light is transformed by the mass equivalence equation of Einstein. This is why Einstein said light and mass are essentially the same things when light slows down.  Anytime light slows down, it acquires a mass. This might offend your current beliefs but it is true. These are natural physical laws that destroy the current biologic precepts of the truth that food guru's continue to sell to the public. This is why it never starts with food and why the LCHF/Whole 30 is useless program when we are really ill with a circadian disease that ruins our mitochondrial colony functions. **It is a helpful tool and should never be sold as the optimal Rx for any reversal.** It is half truth based upon the ignorance of the physics of light. Food electrons and protons needs sunlight frequency and sorting ability to make the environmental data in food make sense to the respiratory proteins in our colony of mitochondria.

**UNLEARN TO RELEARN**

Now for the real truth bomb that no one wants to even consider today, but I will drag people to my level of understanding..........because I know it will help you once you divorce yourself from your current perspectives about food macronutrients. 

There is a lesson we all can take from modern technology to cement my point here. Moreover, I believe medicine and biology must take and consider carefully. The big difference between "big data and information", is that data and information only leads to a change in a systems inherent symmetry by altering our action if both are connected to that system in some way. Data today is being created at enormous speed by technologies for the sake of itself, and we try to understand the information it contains but we cannot. Why can't we? 

We cannot decipher it well enough, because humans have disconnected the data from its original source, THE SUN. This is why the promise of "big data" in medicine has produced little fruit for us in medicine. Electronic medical records have done more to hurt patients than help them in my view. They have done nothing in healthcare or in biology to effect patient outcomes. They are ineffective strategies because the data they collect no longer has any "connection" to its original source. Patients are being disconnected from the sun by our advice related to practice. Patients are constantly being disconnected from their nurses and doctors in ways we just do not appreciate by these devices. This environment has cut off the data from its "ex-formation", its point source, and therefore the only benefit big data has brought to medicine is that it can only be copied and pasted in haphazard fashion. This is why we do the same treatments for the same diseases even if the disease manifest in a different sense from a different environment. In information technology and in biology this operates as the local physical laws allows it to; thusly, it is interpreted in many different ways that have lost their fundamental meaning. This is how cancer manifests in people who live indoors around nnEMF and away from the sun and Nature. Why is obesity a warning that cancer could be next? Obesity is a sign that the patient lives in or somehow has created a disconnected world to live their life based upon their choices around light.

My perspective is a different perspective for disease modeling than exists today, but far more coherent and discernible to understand when you examine the simplicity of the idea. Biologic information from the environment must have its connection to its source in cells; this makes connection to the sun and Earth paramount for wellness. Only then can the data from nature remain reliable and pliable for life's uses through all these physical laws I have given you over 5 years. Only living things themselves, as a whole, sense and seem to knows about its connection to "ex-formation" by the mechanisms built into how a mitochondria can sense our connection to Mother Nature. That connection is hard wired into every cell by its mitochondrial genome, and it is copied and pasted into the maternal germ line of all the genomes of life. In this way, mothers have to remain very connected to nature to accurately pass information on. Disease can manifest in children when mother's do this. The child does not need to sense this to get a disease because all mitochondrial DNA comes from our maternal line. This is child hood cancer, depression, and suicides are on the rise since 1900. No one sees what I see, but they will. **Bad mitochondria should never be put with a good nuclear genome in making a child. This is why leptin resistance in a mother is a sign to avoid pregnancy. It is also why infertility rates are skyrocketing in the western world where technology use rises. The kids born to these parents are now facing mitochondrial diseases like depression and suicide at unparalleled rates.**  

This is akin to putting an Apple computer into a Windows server. Putting bad data from mitochondrial DNA into nuclear genomes that is not coherent leads to all diseases categories. That is conditions of existence and natural selection working in order. They are the Ying and Yang of epigenetics. Modern life is now genetically engineering changes to the mitochondrial DNA using excessive blue light and nnEMF to expand their distance, which in turn ruin our cells data processing ability. In this sense, our modern civilization is genetical engineering us to extinction; and the biologic information cells continue to receive will get more and more misunderstood until the genome responds with nonsense code. **Nonsense code = illness.**

The best example of nuclear genome nonsense coding = cancer. This is how expansion of the cytochrome proteins over time can lead our cells to oncogenic change. **The implication:** Might mutations in mitochondria be actually needed and required from an evolutionary perspective, to get us to change what we are doing to remain healthy? Yes, is my answer. Thusly, the most useful answer for life, today is to stay in direct contact with its "ex-formation" at all times to avoid this situation where disease has to warn us to change our environment. This is why wild animals migrate. They are in tune to nature because they are connected to the sun and Earth properly. They do not live indoors like man does. Light...........never food first. **_When you know better you simply do better._**

**THE TAKE AWAY:** 

Electrons are like glue to light as words are to their meaning. Electrons can catch light like words capture meaning, to create the world we experience. We can only hope that the words we use, can capture what we mean, but we know they can't possibly capture that much joy, or grief, or wonder.......or can they? Ivor, I've been telling you for some time spend less time with food guru's and way more time with the bio-physics........because that is where the treasure is buried.

# Is light turned into matter in your cells? Yep.

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Flight-turned-matter-your-cells-yep-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 8, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flight-turned-matter-your-cells-yep-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Controlling UV light with nano-technology and electric charge is a big deal in the future of my blog and webinars for people. When light is confined to a semi conductor like DHA, it can only act as a particle and not as a wave = quantum mechanical rule 101. What else can confine light? Large electric charges and magnetic fields = says Maxwell law's for light. 

It is also appears to be something nature has perfected in every living cell on this planet. 

Take a look at this [hyperlinked study](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2016/03/160307105529.htm). Now open your mind in a way you might never have thought to look for wellness. A perspective change might be needed. All things are made from light energy in the cosmos. This idea is based upon my last linked post on my linked in page here on this site.  

**Translation into Jack Kruse formalism:** light can be turned into mass by matter. When it happens something has to control it. What did the Ubiquitination series say? Light controls the flow of carbon and nitrogen. Light controls the photons frequencies added to and released from the electrons of these atoms making those atoms quantum dots. Is a computer program not just made up of a **binary** system? Electrons can be programmed by many different light frequencies which contain tons of different light energy and they have two possible spin states. The spin state of protons also varies on Earth and is effected indirectly by light too. The two spins states mimic the binary system in computing making them the ultimate quantum dots for the quantum computers in your cells called mitochondria. All electrons can be programmed by light and light alone according to QED. Richard Feynman 101. 

As environmental changes occur with light, this can change electrons from the "identical interchangeable parts" they are to particles with different information embedded in the light frequencies attached to them. Electrons are like glue to light as words are to their meaning. Proton spin is the syntax of epistemology. Electrons can catch light just in the right way to make things life needs, just like words capture meaning of our thoughts and ideas, to create the world we experience and share it with others. We can only hope that the words we use, can capture what we mean, but we know they can't possibly capture that much joy, or grief, or wonder.......or can they? 

**_The day before a breakthrough..........that breakthrough is just a crazy idea to others._** 

**_To the mind we perceived and observed the implications of the effect, crazy is a limited state of mind due to a lack of confinement._** 

Being locked up is one thing for a person, but to have no concept of what confinement might mean for life on this planet, to be wholly ignorant of its terms in physics and never having understood that struggle is unfathomable for a person of science. Man's five senses can capture the vastness and the immensity of our cosmos and confine it to the limited real estate of the sensory organs to understand all the complexity of the universe. No one sees the symmetry of confinement. Every artist on this planet is a master of some aspect of confinement. Even a writer, an author, a simple blogger can harness the vastness and the immensity of the cosmos and confine it to the limited pages of the paper or a computer screen. This perspective of nature makes it much easier for me to surrender my life to the being confined by nature. Anything not forbidden by nature will certainly happen; the question is when and where and how..............a cell seems to have figured it out. 

Electron spins are changed and ordered in mitochondria, and this is the mutation that defines how we change light into matter in a cell. When this occurs it changes the electrons actions in a magnetic field to act like the binary code of you software. The fractionation of proton spin is a function of your environment.  This is how your quantum computer works fundamentally. Your mitochondria generates a magnetic field because of its large electric currents and its spinnign Fo head of the ATPase as 1500 protons spin it per second in your matrix. Your planet Earth spins too. The planets spin gives us seasons and circadian light signals. Both are needed in this processing of electrons and protons in the matrix of mitochondria. Seems like that cell is awfully smart at confining particles with specific quantum spin characteristics, huh? Are you beginning to wonder why nature uses confinement yet in the matrix? You should. My members will know soon enough.

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHY ARE MITOCHONDRIA HUNGRY FOR CALCIUM IN STRESS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-mitochondria-hungry-calcium-stress-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 10, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-mitochondria-hungry-calcium-stress-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Melatonin is a biogenic amine made by the interaction of UV light and tryptophan. In vertebrates, like humans, melatonin secretion is regulated by norepinephrine another catecholamine called noradrenaline (synonymous with norepinephrine). It is the main neurotransmitter of the sympathetic nervous system. This system is driven by the PVN in the hypothalamus. It is responsible for tonic and reflexive changes in cardiovascular tone. Here again, we see how a nucleus in the brain stem is linked to the retina where light interacts with the circulatory system where the photo-proteins in RBCs are, porphyrins and hemoglobin. WBC's in humans make huge amounts of melatonin in the blood.

These connections are important for the collection of light frequencies from the surface skin where the circulatory system can reach the surface when incident light hits it. Here you can see how melatonin in the eye, WBC’s, and skin are coupled to the circulatory system. Norepinephrine is a cold-mediated catecholamine hormone. It needs Vitamin C as a co-factor to be made. The same thing is true with cortisol and dopamine.

Cooling skin temperature stimulates plasma norepinephrine release and allows us to absorb more UV light. UV light also stimulates norepinephrine release when the sun hits our skin and blood plasma. When noradrenaline is released, calcium is released into the cytosol in a quantized fashion to the proportion of UV light assimilated by the cell. The cytosol of a cell is where our mitochondria are located. 

This process also controls the flow of magnesium from the cytosol to the matrix via MRS2 transporter. Mitochondria are battery-pack organelles, or cell units with specific functions, that fuel the energy of almost every living cell, and they have an insatiable appetite for calcium. This dehydrates the cells and because magnesium is water-loving, mitochondria get a relative depletion of magnesium. This depletion cannot be repaired with a supplement. We have to lower the heteroplasmy rate so mitochondria can make water as a by-product of glucose metabolism or beta-oxidation of fats like the picture below shows.

It appears UV light assimilation on our skin limits calcium flow into a mitochondrion deep in our tissues. No one appears to know why fundamentally a lack of UV light increases calcium flows, but I have a sense it is used as a signaling molecule and one that might be involved with inverse beta decay reactions in the matrix. It appears that blue light and nnEMF also stimulate calcium flows into the matrix to destroy the inner mitochondrial membranes delta psi. Right now, it is clear when calcium enters the matrix, ELF- UV light and IR light are liberated from the matrix while the voltage on the inner mitochondrial membrane falls. As this occurs the mitochondrial size expands and the distance between respiratory proteins increases. MICU1 is essential for calcium uptake in mitochondria to control its effects in the matrix. MICU1 however, doesn't span the entire membrane. It needs another protein to do that. MCU, short for “mitochondrial calcium uniporter" is its partner protein.

Calcium is toxic to mitochondrial size and the inner mitochondrial geometry when UV light is not exciting electrons, and this is why all cancers seem to be associated with an insatiable appetite for calcium. This calcium release increases the amount of ELF-UV light from fluorophore proteins and respiratory proteins (NADH). In cells under stress, they begin to use the IP3/DAG signaling pathways when mitochondrial proteins are expanded on the inner mitochondrial membrane. This raises calcium and lowers magnesium egress into the matrix while many fluids rush into the matrix to destroy its ability to make electrical energy from chemical substrates.

ELF-UV exposure of the skin and cooling both increase catecholamines and this, in turn, helps increases melatonin secretion in WBC’s to modulate inflammation in the skin and blood plasma. This is why a Warburg metabolism is signaled because all the aromatic amino acids make biogenic amines with UV light due to the photon traps they contain in their benzene rings.

The aromatic amino acids' interaction with ELF-UV light is what makes things like the biogenic amines from ELF-UV. Every biogenic amine is made this way.......and in a cancer state, there are no biogenic amines being made in high enough quantities. This is why aromatic amino acids are up-regulated with calcium and magnesium drops like a rock in a Warburg metabolism. 

In stressed cells, cancer cells, and most illness states there are always abnormal hormone panels. Why? What controls pituitary hormone release? Dopamine and prolactin. Both of them are biogenic amines as well. Solar light builds our hormone panels by building dopamine in our eye, retina, and frontal lobes using aromatic amino acids that absorb UV light. That light is used to power up electrons before they fall back to the ground state. 

The excited electrons can then be properly assigned by acquiring an electron spin in mitochondria at cytochrome 1, where NADH contains massive stores of UV light energy in its proteins. NADH is a fluorophore protein (340nm). In this way, UV light from the sun via our eye acts as the currency in the protein backbones of our compound pharmacy that contains our hormones in our pituitary gland every day to make things we need from solar light.

When a Warburg metabolism is engaged, a cell is maximally stressed, and the cell is trying to create things it needs to retain the light it has absorbed from its surfaces. We’ve known for decades now that neurons in the brains of people suffering from the neurodegenerative disease are often marked by mitochondrial calcium overload and a falling magnesium level. We still have no idea why it really happens if you read the literature. I think I do have an idea of why it happens because of something I learn about photons. 

Large electric and magnetic fields are capable of confine light. This happens in the sun. It also happens that mitochondria make both electric and magnetic fields too. In this way the matrix mimics the physics of the sun. It also turns out that lowered electric and magnetic fields allow for excessive light release. This is used in the sun and it appears this is how mitochondria release ELF-UV biophotons for signaling. 

The flow of electrons is tied to the voltage of the mitochondrial membrane. This explains why ketosis is a great tool in any disease with stressed cells and colonies of mitochondria. If you're really interested in understanding the physical mechanisms of the Warburg metabolism, you must know that the electric and magnetic charge on eukaryotic cell membranes by itself, can contain light by QED principles. Modern medicine's problem is that no one in biology realizes this bio-physical fact. And that is why biology struggles with explaining the physical basis of the Warburg metabolism. Ketosis helps this situation but cannot reverse the disease because the power plant remains defective. The matrix has to be replaced and melatonin controls the two change programs in mitochondrial biology.

This is why ketosis helps in many diseases, especially neurodegeneration, seizures, and traumatic brain injury. Ketosis increases the voltages because it increases the sheer number of electrons from fats to boost the electric charge. This boost in voltage improves the tunneling of electrons on the respiratory proteins of ECT. But this increased flow of electrons **_does nothing_** to lower heteroplasmy, to decrease the size and shape of mitochondria, and that is the key physical ability that must be restored to reverse an illness. Ketosis is ONLY a tool, not a panacea.

If the electrons from a ketogenic diet are imprinted with light information in the UV range to become excited, then the situation is improved and melatonin is made to get rid of the poorly functioning mitochondria. Excited UV electrons increase NAD+ at cytochrome one (pic above) while also increasing oxygen delivery to the distal end of ECT since oxygen is the terminal electron acceptor. These things act to help shrink the respiratory protein shrinking and condensing the cristae, while endogenous melatonin production rises. 

I teach my patients and my members how to do that first before I employ nutritional ketosis. A ketogenic diet comes second because the size of your mitochondria is linked to your zip code. Your zip code is linked to the light you live under. Where you live dictates your quantum yield of sunlight. That is what excites our ketogenic food electrons. Those excited electrons are what make free radicals at cytochrome 1. Free radicals have unpaired valence electrons that have either a spin up or spin down. The two spins states mimic the binary system in computing making them the ultimo quantum dots for the quantum computers in your cells called mitochondria. The sun makes very specific free radicals.

Blue light and nnEMF make deadly free radicals via the Fenton reaction and peroxynitrite pathway.

We also know that the secretion of many hormones, like insulin, is triggered by calcium spikes in the cell’s cytoplasm. This clearly makes the case that insulin really is a solar hormone. Insulin is anabolic when it is created and released under the power of terrestrial sunlight stimulus and makes things when it is married to UV light from sunlight. This situation varies when you live under ALAN = artificial light at night/day. 

When insulin is released, and no UV light is present simultaneously to excite the electrons from ketosis, we wind up with a Warburg metabolism. Non-native EMF and blue light exposure at night both cause massive increases in calcium flow to the cytosol. This also favors a Warburg metabolism and cells begin to lose ELF-UV. By clearing cytosolic calcium and raising magnesium, mitochondria can shape these photonic signals to control the light it releases. Scientists studying the nexus of energy metabolism and cellular signaling will be particularly interested in MICU1 and MCU and how circadian biology controls these mitochondrial dynamics. **A Warburg metabolism is a light-mediated issue, not a food story. Nutritional ketosis cannot solve a quantum problem tied to ALAN or nnEMF.**

Melatonin is a free radical scavenger and it is acting to alkalize the blood plasma in the circulatory system to affect the size of the exclusion zone in the water in blood plasma as well as the lowering the lipoprotein particle size and phenotype in the plasma. This is why altered lipid panels are found in cancer states. The lower melatonin is in WBC’s, the lower the EZ is in blood, and the higher triglycerides are in the blood and one would expect higher levels of inflammation in the blood markers. This is why HS-CRP, ferritin, low Vitamin D3 levels, and lowered sulfated cholesterol are all linked in inflammatory states where stressed cells are absorbing massive amounts of calcium into their mitochondria, which dramatically lowers magnesium in the matrix lowering delta psi, and this causes lower electric and magnetic fields in our colony of mitochondria and as a result, they leak too much ELF-UV which ruins cell signaling. All of these things are associated with the physical decoupling of processes with light and water. This ruins the bio-physics that control the size and shape of the respiratory proteins to lead to disease by raising heteroplasmy rates. 

Our quantum yield or the light we choose to live under is REALLY what determines our light zip code and our disease footprint in the modern world. Our light zip code is more important than our nuclear genetic code when you understand how mitochondria are operating in our cells. This is no joke. It is the basis of 40 years of mitochondrial research by people like Doug Wallace, Nick Lane, Jodi Nunnari, Vamsi Mootha. People laughed at me 3 years ago when I said this publicly .........they won't much longer when they finally read the data from these researchers. Follow the data not the meme of modern genetics. Genes are not the dictator of the genome they respond to it using the senses built into our respiratory proteins. It is clear that mitochondrial mutations appear way before any nuclear changes occur in all diseases including cancer. 

**Common sense no longer grows in everyone's garden because no sun = no dopamine or melatonin = poor thinking = worse insight = no understanding of evolutionary physics built into mitochondria.** 

This is why cancer therapy's that have been directed at the nuclear genome since 1971 have failed miserably. You'll never find the buried treasure if you're looking under the wrong stone. Stop looking under stones and begin to look under rainbows. Light, not food, and certainly not the nuclear genome is where the problems lie.

**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/you-entangled-your-kid-via-morning-sickness-jack-kruse>

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ARE YOU ENTANGLED TO YOUR KID VIA MORNING SICKNESS ?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fyou-entangled-your-kid-via-morning-sickness-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 17, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fyou-entangled-your-kid-via-morning-sickness-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

When you eat = more important than what you eat.........who told ya that 5 yrs ago?

I did. That is the basis of [My Leptin Rx](http://www.jackkruse.com/my-leptin-prescription/). Light is what the Rx was built around to lower heteroplasmy rates in your mitochondria to slow down epigenetic expression of your DNA. Every time we copy things from our genome to replace proteins in us that no longer are capable of capture excited electrons we release light. 

Today's PSA is to teach you about why women and men get morning sickness when a couple is pregnant. You need to research your own experience, but realize the issue links back to your environment. With this article, absorb what is useful, reject what is useless, add what is essentially your own.

This post is quantum hint for parents……..nausea and vomiting comes to you both at time because your baby is trying to shrink the respiratory proteins the fetus received from mom. When this happens in mom expect the child to have jaundice and colic when it is born too! You may not know this but all mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) is inherent from mom and so is the babies microbiome. The microbiome and mitochondria share a bacterial lineage. That mtDNA must connect to the nuclear genome made from both parents like two gears in a transmission to work properly. The egg that is selected from a women ovary is based upon the best fit to the current environment that mom is experiencing in her own mitochondria. What if there is not a great match between the two genomes? Then we get a zygote that will turn into an infant with increased rate of heteroplasmy in their mitochondria as they baby develops. That is where the colic and jaundice come from. Increased heteroplasmy = mito-nuclear co-apaptation = more childhood illnesses should be expected due to the higher heteroplasmy rate. This can altered when the child make a proper wireless connection with the sun and Earth or has mom and dad hold it while they are making the connection for the baby.  This is where the research from Nick Lane and Dr. Doug Wallace marries together the science of mitochondrial energy flows. 

So how does the fetal cells get this message? The egg and sperm form a zygote and its mito-nuclear match is then compared to the mothers current state of her blood plasma. The water chemistry of the environment is coded for in light frequencies collected or mising from the cells and water that makes up our blood plasma. From here the fetal cells mitochondria can sense the environment and that information is encoded in the geometry of their respiratory proteins they just inherited from Mom. So what happens if the match is good? Nothing but good things should be present. What happens if the match is not ideal? 

The baby sends light signals to mom via her blood plasma, RBC's and WBC's that makes her nauseous during the pregnancybecause this is the signal to Mom that her child's cells sense the geometry of the respiratory proteins are too spread out to match the nuclear genome the child is sensing in its own cells. The mitochondria is a transducer and emitter of this electromagnetic information. Fetal RBC's are unique because they have mitochondria in them and this improves the communication from mother to child. Soon after birth these fetal RBC's are replaced with RBC's that have no mitochondria because the child needs to sense its own situation to make energy adaptations based upon the environment it is now in. So if a child is born into a poorly lit environoment devoid of a good connection to the sun or Earth the problems in the child will be compounded and not helped. This is why colic, jaundice, asthma and atopy are all key signals to pay attention to in this transgenerational quantum switchboard between mom and baby. Recall that WBC's have a lot of melatonin made in them when specific light frequencies are absorbed from our skin into our blood plasma. 

Most people who have kids with problems post birth report severe morning sickness and no one seems to knows why? What happens if mom does not get much sun exposure (high latitudes), might this alter her WBC's melatonin level? We now know that mtDNA is controlled by local melatonin levels. Why might the fetus make mom sick to her stomach on purpose?

Your babies cells are wise beyond their years. They seem to know, what [Dr. Doug Wallace](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KwbIR2yUziw) has been preaching for 40 years, that one of the best ways to reduce the geometry on the respiratory proteins is to fast, to stimulate autophagy/mitophagy. Naseau makes eating less appealing. And fasting has huge mitochondrial benefits. Fasting is capable of lowering heteroplasmy rates in mitochondria. Since the baby gets all their nutrition from Mom, if mom does not eat, neither does the baby and the baby then can shrink their own respiratory proteins to avoid getting illness postnatally.  When you get nauseous you don't feel like eating much, and this allows the baby to perform some heteroplasmy reduction in its own mitochondria. Nature is pretty slick when you understand what she is doing. This is how your baby telegraphs to mom the her parents light environment is not optimized. Since the child only can inherit its mitochondrial DNA from the maternal germ line, this signal is most powerful in her. She is able to sense it in her vagus nerve of the area postrema of her brainstem. But can this quantum signal affect Dad too? Yes it can; but how you ask? 

**What explains the husband getting morning sick as well?**

You don't think your husband is somehow entangled to his own kid? Men provide half of the nuclear genome to their children, but no mitochondria. Their connection is made via the nuclear genome and those 23 chromosomes they share. They are filled with light and magnetic data.  In epigenetics, mitochondria must be machined properly and PRECISELY to function with the nuclear genome to make a healthy child.  Nuclear genome functioning is related to light confinement by the two helices of DNA that come together from each parent.  This means the environmental light communication in his germ line is also part of "his morning sickness story" as well.  Men are sensitive to this phenomena because they have different mitochondrial DNA from their own mother's. Their heteroplasmy rate often is not like the mother's or the child's therefore they tend to have a different heteroplasmy in their own cells. This is why not all men sense or get this effect. The one's who sense this best are doing a better job with light in their own lives so the difference is noted via the bio-photons released between them and the baby. Yes, all human cells release light and we are able to sense it via our mitochondria. When men sense a bad match they too will become and ill and no one will want to eat. Those who have high heteroplasmy rates tend not to have this experience or sensation. 

**HOW DOES DNA CONFINE LIGHT FROM OUR ENVIRONMENT?**  

Food confines light using excitons in photosynthesis. Chlorophyll has very high electric and magnetic potential when it is hydrated. Physics tells us that high electric and magnetic fields are fully capable of confining light from escape. So if you have a bad mitochondria, by definition you have poor electric and magnetic fields coming your cells.  This means you will leak more light in the form of bio-photons.

Each helix of DNA has a huge dipole moment. Dipole moment is another way to say it has a high dielectric constant. This protects cells from losing light. Regular bulk water ha s dielectric constant of 78. Water illuminated by the sun has a dielectric constant of 160!!! This means the sun can recharge the water batteries in cells. This cell water surrounds all mitochondria and all DNA and RNA in living cells.

So a high dipole moment = all nucleic acids = high dielectric constant = massive ability to retain light in nucleic acids = when two helix join their dipole moments cancel = Light is confined between the two helices = light remains buried in DNA when ubiquitination is controlled and epigenetic expression is limited. When a helix is unwound during replication the dipole moment increases from zero and changes abruptly and light is released from our nucleic acids. That light is in the ELF-UV range and has been capable of inducing mitosis in other cells. Alexander Gurwitsch found this effect first in 1923. This has been conformed many times over in the work of many people over the last 50 years in bio-physics. 

When mom's DNA from her mitochondria is not a good nuclear match, the child's cells leaks more light than normal because DNA is being copied too much and this leads to more epigenetic expression of her own and her child's DNA. When DNA is copied, it has to be unwound and this process of separating the two helices of DNA is when the confined light is liberated. We learned this from Fritz Popp and Mae Wan Ho's research in the 1990's.

When Dad's respiratory proteins are shrunken geometrically by a good external sun lit environment, his mitochondria reacts favorably to his child, because the child's cells are entangled by light photons to his nucleic acids. Because his respiratory proteins are functioning well, he becomes able to sense that light release from the child's cells. This is why shrunken geometry of mitochondrial DNA has now been linked to [circadian biology in mammals.](http://neurosciencenews.com/mitochondria-circadian-clock-3866/) It also explains why every mammalian gene has a clock gene in front of it in our DNA and RNA. 

Everything is quantized in life even if we don't make the connections initially.

This is why morning sickness is a signal to clinicians about Mom's light environment and a dialed in fetus. It is a sign to parents to do a better job getting sunlight during the day and darkness at night. If not a caesarean section might be in your future. By hacking your environment during the first trimester of your pregnancy you can improve how your child's mitochondrial DNA works with their nuclear DNA. This is an entangled message from the fetus. Your connection to light, water, magnetism in your environment has to be improved to get a good infant with ideal mito-nuclear coaptation to lower heteroplasmy rates. Your baby is capable of this communication even if your doctor does not believe it. Welcome to quantum biology. 

**CITES:**

Light Scultping Life, Roeland van Wijk

The Rainbow and the Worm, Mae Wan Ho

The Fourth Phase of Water, Gerald Pollack 

Popp, F. A. "On the Coherence of Ultraweak Photoemission from Living Tissue. In Disequilibrium and Self- Organization (C.W.Kilmister, Ed pp. 207-30 Reidel, Dordrecht, 1986.

http://neurosciencenews.com/mitochondria-circadian-clock-3866/

# Article: HOW DO PLANTS AND ANIMALS TEACH US ABOUT HOW TUMORS, CHOLESTEROL, AND THE SUN CONNECT?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-do-plants-animals-teach-us-tumors-cholesterol-sun-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2016-03-23T01:20:48.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 2819
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# HOW DO PLANTS AND ANIMALS TEACH US ABOUT HOW TUMORS, CHOLESTEROL, AND THE SUN CONNECT?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-plants-animals-teach-us-tumors-cholesterol-sun-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 23, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-plants-animals-teach-us-tumors-cholesterol-sun-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I recently was asked a question by someone why it seems that plants are not as affected by modern artificial light as animals seem to be.  It is a great question and its answer is tied to how the frequency of light is quantized to the atoms plants and animals use to transfer the sun energy.  

We must remember plants and trees are 100% connected to the Earth magnetic field, while animals are built to move across the tectonic plates of Earth.  When a living thing can move, it can disconnect for a period of time from the Earth's magnetic field and it can also get outside of the sun's rays at will.  This means evolution had to build a new program for energy transfer in animals because of this unique ability.  Plants and trees are 100% connected to the Earth's magnetic flux, and its energy, by their roots to soil so this is why they use Magnesium in chlorophyll over Iron.  Chlorophyll is a magnesium porphyrin ring.  Hemoglobin is an iron porphyrin ring.  All porphyrins are known to absorb all frequencies of UV light.  Iron is used as the atom that animals use in hemoglobins in their blood cells to decipher and collect the energy of the sun.  

Magnesium has a lower atomic number, therefore it has less electrons, so plants do not need to use as much UV light as their main source of light power to run their quantized photosynthetic program. In fact, UV light only is present at certain times of the day for a stationary plant.  So it would make a lot more sense to use light frequencies that are present 100% of the time during the day.  Blue light is present from sunrise to sun set on Earth everywhere.  Plants use blue-green light for this reason and use magnesium in their chlorophylls to make energy flow via photosynthesis.  

Iron has more electrons, because it has atomic number 26.  Having more electrons is a big advantage when you can move.  Why?  Hemoglobin uses UV and IR light in the sun.  IR light is always present in sun light, like blue light is, but both colors completely balance each another in terms of the color temperature from the sun's light.  UV light is only present at certain times of the day, and the amount of time it is present is tied to latitude and altitude of the animal.  UV light contains way more power than blue light.   This is why animals use hemoglobin, and not chlorophyll in their blood plasma to harvest its energy.  Animals use iron in the porphyrin ring because UV light only interacts with electrons by the rules of Quantum electrodynamic theory (QED).  The specific effect in QED that determines this interaction is called the "[photoelectric effect](https://www.jackkruse.com/time-7-photoelectric-effect/)". The more electrons an atom has, the more likely, or probable it becomes that light photons from the sun will interact with those electrons to capture the sun's light. In this way the sun excites these electrons with photons.  This also is the same reason why eukaryotes  use DHA on their cell membranes.  DHA has a huge pi-electron cloud.  This is why DHA has never been replaced one time in 600 million years in evolution.  It is one of the most impressive facts in evolutionary history.  You cannot have eyes without having DHA.

**THE LIGHT EYE LINK** 

Did you know that complex eyes appear to have first evolved within a few million years, in the rapid burst of evolution known as the Cambrian explosion  that occurred 585 million years ago?  Currently there is no surviving evidence of eyes before the Cambrian Explosion.  What changes were happening in the ocean that allowed eukaryotes to use sunlight at 600 million years ago?

Photosynthetic algae where beginning to make DHA in the sea for the marine chain to consume.  Do you really think these facts are not connected in some way?  

**THE LIGHT SKIN EYE LINK TO BLOOD**

Yesterday, I heard a bulletin from the Irish Blood Transfusion board calling for donations of blood. The reason given for the shortage given was that over 40% of the blood collected in this last month had to be thrown out due to low hemoglobin content of donors. People in Ireland live at a high latitude, and have  a very poor UV index.   Simultaneously, this winter, something happened to the sun's rays this year to make the situation worse. This all occurred right at winter's end, and it was at the end of the worst winter on record over there; they had over 10 major storms and CONSTANT dark gloom from their weather data. Do you reckon this lack of sunlight could be responsible for the epidemic of low hemoglobin from donors? Erythropoetin is the solar hormone that humans  need it to avoid anemia.  Erythropeotin is stimulated by UV and IR light to carry the information from our skin and eye to our kidney deep to our interiors.

Anemia is a low hemoglobin state.  Anemia is exacerbated by a low UV environment.  The Irish blood banks reality is a deep lesson about how important subtracting the sun can be.  Hemoglobin has 4 key frequencies it absorbs in; what does that tell you? Light is really our best tool to build wellness and always has been.

Hemoglobin’s peak light absorption occurs at 4 specific frequencies: 280 mm 420nm 540nm and 580nm and has a very sharp cutoff at 600 nm. This points out why blue-green light spikes in modern artificial light might be behind many blood disorders, like anemia, blood cancers, and cancers in tissues with a reliance on brisk blood flow.  The brain has the most brisk blood flow and has the highest mitochondrial capacity in our tissues.  

This is why green and yellow wavelengths of krypton ion lasers which are used in surgery on humans peak at 531 mm and 568 mm respectively.   They almost perfectly match the absorption peaks of hemoglobin so these laser colors are used for coagulation of blood and blood vessels. These absorption peaks in hemoglobin are ideally match the spectral absorptions of the aorta and arteries where diseases like atherosclerosis predominates. These quantum relationships go way past diseases like atherosclerosis. They reach all the way to neurologic diseases like tumors, neuro-degeneration, circadian mismatches because of the effect on the suprachiasmatic nucleus (SCN) and the retinal pigment epithelium (RPE) in the eye where sunlight interacts initially.  This builds both dopamine and melatonin cycles in the eye initially,  that get generalized to the brain parenchyma, as I laid out in [Ubiquitination 24](https://www.jackkruse.com/ubiquitination-24-are-myopia-light-and-aging-linked/) and in the [Time 9](https://www.jackkruse.com/the-dark-knight/) blogs.

Plants are optimized for different light frequencies than animals because they are not as mobile and they harness energy constantly from the sun and magnetic filed via its flux.  Plants also do not have complex systems to run so they don't require as much power to run their programs.  You might be interested to know that both animals and plants use a DC electric current to regenerate themselves.  UV light has the highest power to be converted to a DC electric current.   DHA makes that conversion.  Animals are different.  Because they move, they have many more complex programs that need more energy.  For example, let us consider the use of sterols.  Plants and animals both use them.  

Consider another protein that animals and plants use to innovate life.  Cholesterol is a polar molecule.  When a polar molecule, like cholesterol, is in isolation stripped of its rich ‘cytosociology’ on a cell membrane we can examine its true function.  Today, medicine continues to look at cholesterol out of its native environment in tissues,  and just looks at it in our blood plasma.  More often the blood is drawn in blue light and not protected from the fake spectrum wither in transit.  When you do this, and subtract the context of its environment, cholesterol acts very differently and can forms a shadow of its real identity.  

When the environment around cholesterol in a cell changes it affects how electrons move within it.   This make cholesterol or sterols an optical redox sensor of light frequencies.   When electrons are added to cholesterol from the DHA in blood vessels,  it is called its "reduced state", and this makes it more water soluble or hydrophilic.   When something becomes more water soluble it can than use other quantum mechanical means of light energy transfer. RBC's are suspended in blood plasma which is made of 93% water.  Water is the ideal chromophore for UV and IR light.  This is why animals use water and hemoglobin, cholesterol, and sunlight to transfer energy.  

Proton tunneling is behind this molecular action in water. This is also a quantum effect made possible by how light interacts with electrons to control protons in water.  Remember "reduced" cholesterol is good for our cells because reduction = more electrons.  More electrons = its more likely that sunlight will interact with it when blood vessels rise to the surface as sunlight hits our skin or our RPE in our retina.   This is why RBC's and the retina are rich in DHA.  DHA likes cholesterol for this reason. This attraction is what we call its cytosocial context.  The science of DHA and other lipids is called sphingolipidomics. I call it cytosocial behavior of DHA because DHA loves electrons because of its pi electron cloud. More electrons in DHA and RBC's are more capable of add sunlight's UV and IR energy in these frequencies to allow animal cells to disconnect from the sun or Earth's magnetic field to do the things they can do.  In other words, it allows the molecules in animals to do more physiologic work and signal properly.

Oxidized cholesterol means the molecule has less electrons, and therefore it is hydrophobic. This means it does NOT work as well with water, DHA, or sunlight. Considering where cholesterol is found in cell membranes, and in our vascular tree in skin, you would think we would understand better how the cholesterol polar molecule really works with sunlight.  We don’t, because we do not understand how the physics at surfaces dictates the physiologic abilities of the molecules below. Cholesterol is more reduced when a person is in sunlight and more oxidized when someone is blue-green light.  Today, modern light is made with 4 times the amount of blue light as the sun has.  This lowers the amount of [dopamine](https://www.jackkruse.com/time-6-time-and-dopamine/) and melatonin we can make locally on our surfaces, like the RPE and our skin.  Artificial light also has no UV or IR light in their spectrums.  They have been subtracted out to save money and energy.  No one seems to realize that this cost savings can lead to major biologic risks.  The same risks are not present in plants because they use blue green light with chlorophyll.  Animals are not as fortunate.  

The major difference between these two states of cholesterol, can be further understood in its spectral emission of light. Cholesterol that is in its reduced form works like a semiconductor would.   It can absorb excited electrons from the sun, and can emit that photon from the spectrum of sun light to other molecules in the circulatory system.  That is the key feature that determines its physiologic abilities in different tissues.  Oxidized cholesterol loses this ability to absorb excited electrons because there are no electrons present.  Sunlight can only interact with electrons because of the rules of QED.  This is governed by the photoelectric effect.

That is the “_clarity_ "Mother Nature builds to fully understand  how cholesterol works in animals. This clearly is not the science that is being advocated by modern medicine or food guru's.  The advice being "fed to people" today in books and in research is missing the bio-physics of how light and electrons work in polar molecules.   Cholesterol melanin, and hemoglobin are the animal proteins we use at surfaces, with the presence of DHA in our cell membranes to build complexity in many organ systems.

Plants use chlorophyll and magnesium in photosynthesis,  hence, this is why they have remained simple compared to animals on an evolutionary basis.  It is also linked to why they are planted in the ground and do not move across the tectonic plates as we animals do. Magnesium does not have as many electrons to capture light because they don't need it, because they are always connect to the Earth and sun.  When you are a complex life form capable of disconnecting from the sun or Earth,  you need more electrons to interact with UV light to make energy.

**So how does this scale to a disease I treat as a neurosurgeon?**  

This brain tumor, GBM linked below,  is one I take care of way too often these days. Its incidence and prevalence is now explosive in the modern world and most people with the diagnosis are dead within a year. Today, people think our genome needs to remain active for life's game to play out well...........I think that the real answer is 180 degree opposite this idea.  Nature's recipe involves geometric changes on our respiratory proteins.  This is controlled by local melatonin levels.  This links melatonin cycles to mitochondrial function because of how a mitochondria loses energy efficiency when % heteroplasmy rises. Natural light assimilation from the sun keeps the genome quiet, while artificial light causes our cells to lose ELF-UV to lead to diseases.   Plants do not face this same set of circumstance because they are wired differently than we are.  Moreover, todays' artificial light provide the specific frequencies that plants are designed to harvest most commonly from the sun's light.  The "ghost in our quantum machine" is light, specifically a lack of sunlight, because we have buried our cells from UV and IR light.  This is why people who are [sunbather's have a higher longevity](http://www.msn.com/en-us/health/wellness/sun-worshippers-rejoice-sunbathing-may-actually-increase-your-lifespan/ar-BBqNlA8?ocid=spartandhp) than those who lead an indoor existence.  

We need to begin how to learn sunlight is capable of controlling our nucleic acids to control epigenetic expression.   Vitamin D is made only from UV light in the skin and then transformed by the kidney after it rides to the kidney in our blood plasma.  Vitamin D3 activates 3 % of the human genome.  It is low in people with cancers. Moreover, there is a direct correlation between high LDL-C (oxidized cholesterol) and low vitamin D status on blood work.  Lack of sun exposure is that link.   Low vitamin D status on a blood draw correlates to just about every dysfunction you can imagine in the body. Vitamin D is synthesized from cholesterol in the skin by UVB sunlight.  No other frequency can build it from cholesterol.  A lack of environmental exposure to enough sunlight causes lowered Vitamin D levels.  High LDL appears to be an intelligent quantum reaction in the body to get more cholesterol to the skin so as to harness as much sunlight as possible for vitamin D production.  Lowered solar exposure also links to lowered dopamine and melatonin cycles which lead to cellular circadian mismatches = stress on the body = inflammation = more protons and less electrons = low UV and IR light assimilation = low dopamine levels = causes pituitary hormone dysfunction = hormones are not released when the proper light frequencies from the sun should be present in the environment we live = increased % heteroplasmy in mitochondria = low melatonin cycles = control of mtDNA =  dysfunction as well as every other tissue that has mitochondria.     This causes more stress and inflammation in the body which can cause more elevated cholesterol.  

Cholesterol is needed to activate our genes and their epigenetic switches using light, that turn them off and on. If reduced cholesterol is not present in our cells, if UV light is not present simultaneously, the mitotic spindles that control how chromosomes divide cannot work properly.   When chromosomes cannot be controlled, cancer and tumors are more likely.  ELF-UV stimulates mitosis in cells.  If genes get turned on and off at the wrong times, chaos would result, inflammation is that result, and a lack of cholesterol and sunlight are part of this problem.

UV and IR light control [dopamine](https://www.jackkruse.com/time-6-time-and-dopamine/) and melatonin cycles locally in animal cells with cholesterol and DHA. [Dopamine](https://www.jackkruse.com/time-6-time-and-dopamine/) has to be linked to [melatonin cycles to work properly](https://www.jackkruse.com/the-dark-knight/).  When they are not, tumors become much more likely.  It appears this paper is finally looking at the right things for my future patients. When will people stop using artificial light indoors,  that can activate diseases like GBM, by changing the geometry of our respiratory proteins on mitochondria in our brain?

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DOES SPACE HAVE A MESSAGE FOR US?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fdoes-space-have-message-us-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 29, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdoes-space-have-message-us-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Many people do not know that bacteria and Archea undergo explosive growth in space. This was well known when an America astronaut, Dave Wolf spent 4 months in space on MIR for NASA before the USA planned on building the ISS. When Wolf opened up the hatch where all the water and wiring were found he found the are filled with microbial life. This shocked NASA and they knew this could mean trouble for the space program if they were going to try to colonize space.

Little did they know it was the calling card for what ails modern humans on Earth. Confused? Let me explain some evolutionary history to you. 

The next trip into space, NASA made sure this experiment was fast tracked to prove that bacteria do undergo massive growth in space. They had to prepare the ISS for this issue for health issues for the astronauts. It was performed on the ISS quickly. They did the seminal experiment that showed when you put a bacteria into a place with no connection to Earth or to the sunlight bacteria undergo explosive growth.

Why is this a critical piece of evidence in my Quilt document? What is our mitochondria, fundamentally and where did we get it? It is a bacteria we stole 600 million years ago at endosymbiosis. We controlled its growth on Earth by surrounding it with water and deleting most of its genes to 37 in number. Only 13 of its genes remain which code for the proteins that make the respiratory proteins which tunnel electrons from food, magnetic flux, and the sun. After the eukaryotic cells absorbed the bacteria it surrounded it with water and cell membranes loaded with DHA. Why did it do this? Bacteria are known to release 5000 times as much light as eukaryotic cells. Heat is a form of IR light. Heat and light do special things to water. Heat shrinks water. This controls the size and shape of the mitochondria below. This is why bacteria in space grow like mad. When they swell this is a stimulus to divide. Since our mitochondria used to be a bacteria we control its size and shape to use it as a powerhouse of quantum energy production. All frequencies of light affect cell water but UV and IR light build water into a battery by making something called the exclusion zone of water. It has a net negative charge and excludes protons from it. This EZ become a perfect battery to run the [ATPase of the mitochondria as a quantum torque engine](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4701522/). In space, we lose these effects in our own mitochondria and this is why astronauts get unusual medical conditions.

Today we live an indoor life, out of the sun and disconnected from the Earth magnetic field. A blue lit world that is microwaved simulates space from a mitochondrial perspective. 

So what disease in humans since 1893 has shown explosive growth? 

Cancer. Why might this be the case?  

What is explosive cellular growth called in humans? CANCER. Humans now have explosive growth of cancers don't they? Might it be that our mitochondria faces the same situation that bacteria face in space? This implies that as mitochondria become disconnected from the exclusion zone that bathes our mitochondria that it allows explosive growth of our cells? When mitochondria become disconnected from the natural forces found on Earth, this simulates changes we see in bacteria in space? I think so. 

See, on Earth when our cells and body are connected to Earth's magnetic field and to the sun's rays, it created a sea of EZ water in our cells that surround our mitochondria to shrinks their sizer to control what they can and cannot do. We learned what an exclusion zone does with sunlight from Dr. Gerald Pollack. Might the cancer explosion since 1900, be from the human civiliazation creating things that "mimic a space environment" here on Earth?

I will remind you yet again that Tesla and Westinghouse used AC current for the first time in 1893 world's fair in Chicago and pissed off Rockefeller and his kerosene lamps; this aggravated JP Morgan who was financially backing Edison DC current and the plant in NYC and Niagara falls. Westinghouse and Tesla won the World's Fair contract with their AC current, but did our species win this battle 135 years later? In my opinion, this is where our modern problems began. My members got this info packaged into webinar's on two modern diseases called Kawasaki's Disease and electromagnetic sensitivity. Both of these diseases are related to this same mechanism. Both diseases are not well understood like cancer is today. All of these diseases clearly link to the disruption of energy flows from the sun and Earth to the water bathing our mitochondria in our cytoplasm to change mitochondrial functioning. This is how the space environment can show modern biology these effects in detail, if they were willing to look. Few are. Cancer researchers are currently looking in the nuclear genome when the changes there are driven by what occurs first in the mitochondria. Sad, but true. Now my members are beginning to sense they have the third and final nail in the coffin about what is really going on in our world when they see this article about space and bacteria. This maybe a big clue at what is really going on in our blue lit microwaved world today. When you know better, you really do better. 

Do you still think technology is 100% positive for humans? 

Ask your mitochondria, the one who used to be a bacteria if they think so.  

[HYPERLINK](http://www.upi.com/Science_News/2016/03/24/For-bacteria-life-in-space-is-better-than-on-Earth/4651458830699/?spt=slh&or=11)
