# HAVE YOU BEEN "FLOXXED" BY DRUGS? WHAT TO DO?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhave-you-been-floxxed-drugs-what-do-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 6, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhave-you-been-floxxed-drugs-what-do-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Heard from Gail: "Hey Jack, I have many things going wrong but never rejuvenating is the worst. Do you have any suggestions or know of any successful treatments for "ciprofloxacin toxicity" or the best way to raise my redox potential? The damage is so multi-faceted with no known cure.

Thanks for your time, Dr. Kruse."

Answer: Well, Gail there is a lot here to chew on here on this controversial topic. One of the more important things is that you must understand how Cipro inflicts its damage. The drug, like many drugs now used in medicine, contains halogens that act as dielectric blockers for water. The reason for this is that low molecular weight halogens are very electronegative and they love to capture electrons. A loss of electrons from collagen to halogens is a big problem. Why is that? Well, electrons are excited by light released from collagen when it is in a cell. When collagen its helical structure due to a loss of electrons it loses its structural ability and its ability to carry energy using piezoelectricity. In technology that uses silicon semiconductors, electron loss can also happen due to something called "gate leakage".

Now here is where the story of biological semiconduction (melanin) gets interesting. Biologic gates are designed not to be leaky. They need constant renovation by light stronger than 380nm. All technology and indoor lighting that also uses blue light/nnEMF which makes our biological semiconductors leaky by destroying the dielectric constant in cell water.  Melanin charge separate water to create massive amounts of hydrogen, oxygen, and electrons to refill the electronic state of collagen in our bodies.

Brownian motion was discovered in 1827 in plants. What does it mean? = statistical motions of atoms. This implied that the second law of thermodynamics was not an absolute, but a statistical law. Maxwell proved this mathematically in 1867 and then came up with a term called Maxwell demon to describe its ability. In essence, what the math described was a rectifying current in a modern semiconductor. So how did we go from atomic plant motions under a scope to Intel? Einstein realized 38 years later this the demon Maxwell was talking about in 1867 could actually be seen in the world. You just had to know where to look for it. Do you know, of Einstein's 4 miracle papers of 1905 that the one on the Brownian motion is the one most cited? Yet, he won no prizes for it.

Maxwell was the first to show that the second law of thermodynamics had to be statistical. Einstein showed Brownian motion was the observation of the statistical event predicted by Maxwell. In the 1950's science really upped this game when transistors and semiconductors were found. Why? Any trap door that opens in one direction only and requires a specific amount of energy to open it is essentially a Maxwell Demon. This idea alone is what gave birth to solid state devices we use today in all tech gadgets. What are they and how do they relate or disconnect cells from their life force?

Rectifiers let current pass in one direction and not in reverse, thereby converting AC currents to DC ones. In the 1960s Dr. Robert O. Becker showed bone had a rectifying current built by light from the sun in the periosteum. Most centralized MDs still don't know he did this that long ago. Shameful. The implication of these "light and electric gates" is that these semiconducting gates can randomly convert a fluctuating current of electrons in a membrane into a DC current that can be used for physiologic work. When we eat food and go out sometimes or remain connected to the Earth here and there we develop an alternating current in our cell membranes and mitochondria in a similar fashion. 

The electrical potential of the cell membranes in eukaryotic cells stores the light energy in the electrons it captures photoelectrically. Captures light "excites" the electron. Any time an electron is captured by a semiconductor and it becomes a particle only and loses its wave ability.

These facts idea lead us to one conclusion: the electrical potential difference between two sides of a membrane can be harnessed and used to perform cellular work whenever it is needed. Why can energy be harvested in life, anytime it wants it? The photoelectric effect is instantaneous, therefore time is no longer an issue for energy transfer. We cannot observe light's speed so for living things this is not part of our reality, but we know it is true. The speed of light in a tissue is the rate-limiting factor for a cell. What else is key to this understanding?

You begin to see why all eukaryotic membranes are loaded with DHA. They contain pi electron clouds that are waiting to be excited by incident light from the sun to store this energy for the cell's uses later on. This explains why DHA has never been replaced one time in 600 million years of eukaryotic evolution, even though evolution is about change over time. Why is it a constant? It is the only lipid capable of turning sunlight into a DC electric current and a DC electric current back to light. What does it release its stored energy to in a cell? Water. What is it's photo-electric adaptor or connector water? Potassium ions act like glue to make water molecules act differently than they do in a glass.

K+ is s special when it is married to water and light from the sun hits it. It is a dopant atom that creates light inside of us. This is called wide bang gapped semiconduction So how does this link to technology? 

In the silicon integrated circuits, there is a metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistor. It is a transistor used for amplifying or switching electronic signals. When the gate in this set is leaky, semiconductor engineers fix the problem by adding an insulator to the semiconductor to overcome the energy loss of the leaky gate. This insulator has to have a high dielectric value to work well and stop the leak.

In cells, water makes up 99% of the molecules because it is a small chemical. At birth, by weight humans are 75% water. If they get to their 8 decades their weight is 50-55% if they are healthy. This makes the point that cell water and health are inextricably linked. Water links to sunlight to build a huge battery. The better the battery is the longer and better you live.

Water has a very high dielectric constant at 78. K+ is a metal ion inside the cell filled with redox chemicals. This makes it very similar to the semiconductor mentioned above. When you use fluoride or bromides in modern products, this lowers the dielectric constant of water everywhere in the cosmos and in your cells. This is not the only way to destroy the dielectric constant of water. 

In floxin toxicity, specifically, it is precisely this molecular action on the water that means you develop a faulty/leaky/ less efficient semiconductor just like the leaky gate mentioned earlier. In human cells, we have two types of semiconductors, positive (P) and negative (N) semiconductors. When someone is "floxed" he or she develops a leaky gate in his or her cells that affect his or her collagen. There are many types of collagen in cells. For example, bone can develop a leaky P (apatite) and/or N semiconductor (collagen) because both collagen and water (the high dielectric insulator) is altered by the halogen atoms in the floxin antibiotics. This loss of energy at the gate position of your semiconductors causes huge energy losses. It lowers the exclusion zone in water. This reduces the electrons in water and does not allow it to absorb as much light. Light interacts with water photoelectrically. Photons can only interact with electrons according to quantum electrodynamics. 

On short timescales, you can not overcome the electron loss in intracellular water (EZ) because of how halogens reduce electron density in water chemistry. This is why chronic fatigue is always part of the syndrome. In other words, your cells have lost to the ability get the energy stored in their semiconductors whenever they need it. Without energy, fatigue rules a person's existence when they have been "floxed". 

Water makes up 99% of molecules in every cell, so it is akin to driving a car constantly with a discharged battery due to a bad alternator. The battery just cannot recharge. In order to overcome the increase in energy loss in tech gear due to gate current leakage in silicon, a high-κ dielectric is used instead of silicon dioxide for the gate insulator, while polysilicon is replaced by metal gates. We can not do this in carbon-based semiconduction in cells. But you need to be aware that blue light exposure at night and non-native EMF day or night exacerbates this problem of electron loss. This is why "floxed patients" need to be very careful with modern gadgets. I have a sense this is why patients who are anesthetized by fluoridated anesthetics also have trouble with recovery and often report worsening of their neuro-degeneration. This is one reason why [isoflurane](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isoflurane?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) is no longer widely used in medicine during surgery. In surgery, we have an environment that creates the perfect storm for mitochondria and the exclusion zone of water, namely, the use of fluoridated drugs in a strong blue-lit and nnEMF environment. 

When we use these drugs, we need to avoid blue light and non-native EMF like the plague because of both un-zip collagen and break down the water-MINOS layer around the mitochondria even more. This further lowers the dielectric constant of water in a cell. This affects how all voltage-gated channels act within the cell. No drug can fix this type of mechanism because it alters the electrostatics binding affinity inside the cell. Only slow replacement of proteins and cell water with the addition of natural sunlight to the system can slowly help aid in recovery. Sunlight can affect the viscosity of water inside a cell to alter the ATPase function.  [Hyperlink](http://www.nature.com/articles/srep12029?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

This situation can also cause you to lose water inside the cell via dehydration. When we are born humans are 75% water but each decade we lose our % of water inside a cell. This lowers our tolerance for fluoridated chemicals as we age. Anytime you lose water you lose the ability to add light back to the system to create the battery that a mitochondrion uses to drive the ATPase inside a cell. This really limits the light energy that water can carry in your cells. In case you don't know, Dr. Gerald Pollack has shown definitively that water is a repository for all electromagnetic radiation. Electromagnetic radiations = light; all light is not the same. Sunlight always is better than artificial light when it comes to biology. The reason for this unusual finding is that water inside a cell adjacent to our proteins likes some frequencies better than others. Our proteins are all fluorophores or chromophores. This implies they like purple (UV) and red IR light. Water specifically has a molecular love affair with UV and IR light and hates microwaves and blue light frequencies. Loss of electrons or water allows collagen to unzip in all places of your cytoarchitecture. This can lead to tendinopathy and tendon rupture, chronic fatigue, neuropathy, and exacerbation of CNS and neuroimmune function because your mitochondria are losing electrons, dehydrating, using more calcium and magnesium, and the respiratory proteins stretch out. 

This slows electron chain transport. Any time ECT is slowed, diseases manifest because we need the excited electrons to store their light energy in our cells for use when we need it. This is called an increase % in heteroplasmy. If this happens sequentially over a few weeks of taking a prescription while you're inside watching TV or on a laptop, your cellular architecture can be damaged badly in tissues where the halogens concentrate to disrupt mitochondria and cell water. The reason chronic fatigue stays around is that no one realizes how the environment worsens and protracts the condition of water inside of cells. One of the best ways to limit the effect is getting AM light with UVA and IRA light to lower heteroplasmy rates in your mitochondria. In fact, IR-A light and cold thermogenesis can really help those who got "floxed" because it increases ATP.

This does not allow you to make as much energy from the water around the MINOS in mitochondria. You need to carefully read OSF #6 blog to get the full effects of what can happen. This is why being "floxed" can have many symptoms that seem disjointed to the clinicians who see these patients. Water chemistry is a big problem in "floxed" patients. To make repairs to the ecosystem in your cells, you need to replace the bad collagen, and dramatically improve the dielectric constant of intracellular water using the correct light frequencies. Water has a naturally high dielectric constant (78). In "floxed" people it drops like a lead weight.

In this case, when water can not carry the right amount of energy cells cannot signal properly to function. Think of a plant in your mind to make this point. If it has little water and not much sun will it grow and live well? No. 

Realize water inside a cell, and the level of potassium ions (K+) in a cell are linked. Energy is tied to K+ and K+ is coupled to ATP levels. Melanin creates the difference that is needed when someone cannot make the ATP from being floxed. ATP converts mechanical energy to chemical energy. Light is what activates ATP. Red light has explicitly been shown to increase ATP due to its effects on cytochrome 3 because it shrinks the geometry of the respiratory proteins. K+ ions also link to water molecules and in turn to ATP molecules stochastically. Stochastically = statistically. Here we are back to Brownian motion, Maxwell, and Einstein's papers mentioned earlier.  What is the circle of life? 

PHYSICS GEEKS: For every 0.3 mEq below 3.8 mEq that potassium is on a standard blood lab draw, means there is a 100 mEq deficit of potassium INSIDE a cell. This deficit causes mitochondria to consume more calcium and it swells. This slows ECT because it increases the distance of the respiratory proteins. The atomic size is linked to the redox potential in a cell because it is linked to the electrostatic attraction in a cell. This is huge for potassium ions (K+) ability in “gluing of water”. Potassium ions are able to glue water because the ion's atomic radius allows it to polarize in sunlight. When somebody is "floxed", the polarization of the ion becomes smaller than cell water. This causes a huge electric problem in the cell because the polarization energy of K+ is subtracted from Coulomb energy. Normally K+ is more polarizable than water, so polarization is added to the Coulomb energy in a cell. When fluoride or bromide is added to a cell for any reason, dielectric collapse occurs. This is precisely how the dielectric constant in water is destroyed in "floxed patients". 

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Chaos and the butterfly effect in the pharma industry.

Carlos Rodriguez-Caso 9 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/chaos-butterfly-effect-pharma-industry-carlos-rodriguez-caso)

[

The Enemies of Pharmaceutical Innovation, Pt 2…

Mike Rea 4 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/enemies-pharmaceutical-innovation-pt-2-updated-2026-mike-rea-1wohe)

[

$35 Billion in Losses. What If That's the Plan?

Kirk Sudheimer 3 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/35-billion-losses-what-thats-plan-kirk-sudheimer-fwl0e)

In the normal state of affairs when a cell is working and the patient is not "floxed", potassium can function as the optimal "photo-electrical adapter" to transfer energy throughout the cell coherently. It is also massively important in "floxed patients" because intracellular dehydration from EMF completely ruins this relationship and this is why they find it so hard to get better fast.

ATP is designed to unfold proteins fully to open their carbonyl and imino side chain groups on all amino acids to intracellular water. All proteins only function in a cell when they are surrounded by a hydration shell. This action allows binding and polarization to separate water into subatomic particles that are positively and negatively charged. This action is called building or expanding the exclusion zone (EZ) of water. Dr. Gerald Pollack's experiments showed these effects. Dr. Gilbert Ling proved this by experiment that each molecule of ATP in a cell controls 8,800 water molecule binding sites and 20 potassium ions to allow water to become structured inside every cell of your body.

How does all this link back to life and you? The first step in photosynthesis and in mitochondrial oxidation/phosphorylation of electrons is to charge separate water. One wonders where a person or animal or plant begins and ends when one realizes this linkage. The reality is that life is really a continuum of physics built upon the sliding scale of geometry on our respiratory proteins, to create amazing diversity. Ling was the first to realize K+ ions were linked to water chemistry and eventually to ATPase. Ling was the first to point out that the water created by mitochondria was really a semiconductor.

This is the sliding scale a "floxed patient" needs to pay attention to. When the ATPase slows proteins remain unfolded and water cannot bind to them to transfer energy throughout the cell. So when you have altered poor K+ ion and you're dehydrated by our modern world, your cell's interior becomes pseudo-hypoxic and NAD+ levels drop. This cause mitochondria to swell and calcium homeostasis is lost. Cells begin to leak electrons and light in the form of ELF-UV light. This causes a redox shift of the mitochondria cytochromes and increases the distance between the respiratory proteins. In other words, your mitochondria down-shift electron tunneling speeds, by slowing their ECT flow, to protect themselves from short-circuiting. They do this because of the lack of electrons and water. This is why ketosis is a partial fix in "floxed" patients.  This becomes energy costly to a cell. Every stressed cell releases ELF-UV light. When this happens chronically in many tissues sequentially because of how drugs are prescribed your cells that need energy are starving for it. 

This is what chronic fatigue is, fundamentally. It is a loss of energy transfers in a cell and is associated with a light loss in the UV range and IR range. When light is lost, matter in a cell cannot be made properly. If substrates for biochemistry cannot be made cell function grinds to a halt. Cortisol is one of the hormones we need to work with collagen in our body to do many things. One of them is to unzip in the AM to wake us up. This is why many "floxed" people have sleep problems. AM sunlight is designed to make re-zip collagen in cells. It also helps make matter in cells. 

Light builds hormones, like cortisol, by first building dopamine in our retina using aromatic amino acids that absorb UV light from the sun. People who are floxed and too tired to go outside get more ill. Staying indoors under blue light and using nnEMF compounds the illness. We see the same thing in Lyme disease and hypothyroidism. AM sunlight is used to power up electrons. What happens if no electrons are present to excite? You get tired and ECT slows. In our body AM sunlight is designed to power up electrons and they get assigned a spin in mitochondria to make free radicals. This process is also ruined in floxed patients. So sunlight acts as the currency for the compound pharmacy in your pituitary every day to make things we need from light. This process is usually broken in floxed patients. 

The electromagnetic spectrum has 73 octaves. Visible light only makes up one octave of the spectrum of light. If you understand factorial math, that means within our one octave, our retinal cells are capable of controlling many biochemicals substrates. Our one octave of visible light in the electromagnetic spectrum can handle 8,683,317,618,811,886,495,518,194,401,280,000,000 different frequencies.

Each frequency of light can control one chemical. It is well known that when chemical bonds are excited, they will vibrate at characteristic frequencies. Any two or more bonds that have the same intrinsic frequency of vibration can resonate with one another. This idea is how a tuning fork that is vibrating can make another non-vibrating tuning fork vibrate through the air to resonate. 

What most doctors and few researchers seem to know is that the energy of vibration can be transferred infinite distances theoretically, if the energy within the chemicals or tuning forks is radiated at the speed of light! Above I showed you that Becker showed the photoelectric effect is active in collagen. That means the chemical vibrations in your floxed cells are slowed because the water around them slows the speed of light in your cells. What are the key fixes? New water, more sunlight, fasting, and ketosis to limit deuterium intake. This must be the order of repair and the reason is simple. You have to shrink the geometry of your respiratory proteins down before you can add backlight energy or you will fry your mitochondria with too many electrons too early.  In my experience, this takes 18-36 months and the main variable is how much technology a floxed patient is addicted to and how little sunlight they get daily. 

Let me say this again; there are 8,683,317,618,811,886,495,518,194,401,280,000,000 different frequencies of light in the visible light spectrum from 250nm-3100 nm of the sun that comes to Earth daily. Each frequency of light has the ability to control one chemical by resonant energy transfer mentioned above. This is a staggering level of power and control that sunlight has on a cell. A floxed person must realize this at once and drop all pills and supplements. Sunlight is your most powerful Rx in this condition. So when you open up any biochemistry book and realize that biochemistry only uses 100,000 chemical substrates in all biochemical reactions we know about in our cells, you realize light is a critical factor for energy management in a cell. When you factor in that the photoelectric effect acts instantaneously on our skin, with no time delay, then you begin to see how 100,000 biochemical reactions can occur per second using light frequencies from the visible spectrum easily. It also makes sense how these light frequencies match the frequencies of the vibrations of chemicals to offer this level of organization. 

All sunlight is unpolarized, and unpolarized sunlight interacts with K+ ions inside of your cells to turn water into a "glued sea" inside your cells. that sea controls the speed of light in our cells using something called Fermat's law. This allows cell water to act like a colloid plasma would in space. When you are "floxed" you lose the ability to make this glued sea of energy, and as a result, the speed of light in your tissues lowers. when it lowers your tuning fork proteins inside you can no longer connect well to the incoming light fast enough. The result is you feel terrible. Your cortisol is usually ridiculously low and your sleep is destroyed. 

It takes time to recover because the damage was done. Recovery is usually based upon how much "cellular real estate" of the cytoarchitecture is involved. It involves ubiquitination pathways that mark damaged proteins for removal and they only work during autophagy. So intermittent fasting, sleep, and water-based exercises to increase external pressure and cold thermogenesis are some of the best ways to help someone with this condition while they are increasing RO water and iodine intake via seafood. Supplemental iodine is usually not effective. Once your mitochondria begin to heal and lower their heteroplasmy percentage, then ketosis can be introduced to increase ECT speeds. Using ketosis when your respiratory proteins are expanded and swollen will cause you to develop a more chronic lifelong condition. Removal of the halogens will happen naturally when you replace the collagen with autolysis and autophagy. You need to read my blog and my book, the Epi-Paleo Rx. If you follow these ideas consistently 5-7 days per week for at least 2-3 yrs, you will begin to make a dent because you will recover your heteroplasmy ratio in cells. Heteroplasmy = smaller mitochondria = smaller geometries on the respiratory proteins. 

You need water and DHA to replace the lost electrons so you can capture more photon power in light to heal your mitochondria. Heteroplasmy repair is really a sunlight story. To absorb it best you need water replacement and you should be grounded to the Earth. When you add back DHA to most of the cell membranes in your body it becomes energy efficient once again at the electronic level to make the hormones like cortisol and biogenic amines like dopamine and melatonin. This process is controlled also by the gene that makes melanin called POMC.

When you are "floxed" you need a lot of electrons to get better. It would help if you also had a sizable dose of natural sunlight. You should avoid blue light and technology too! There are no supplements or therapies that will be your magic bullet, I am sorry to say. It is a terrible disease because of what it does and how healthcare treats patients deepens the insult because few people understand the biophysics of the condition. This really frustrates patients with the condition and leads to serious anxiety and depression. Your body has to recover from the halogen insult, which worsens by technology use, and you need to give it the natural substrates to do the job to lower heteroplasmy rates. The use of red light, avoidance of blue light at night, getting daily sunlight on your skin, and your retina, and massage/reflexology can be helpful if it is part of your budget. 

The big elephant in the room is your use of blue light devices that also use non-native EMF exposure because it destroys intracellular water which is the critical part of recovery; the disease becomes worse because of the addiction to silicon-based technology causing electron leaks in our cells. The leakier we are, the longer the recovery will take because you can only absorb sunlight if electrons are present. If your body is filled with box cars in biochemical pathways that are in their oxidized state because you live under the wrong type of light/EMF, the more dehydrated you become, subsequently, the worse autophagy operates because of altered calcium homeostasis; this is the process you need to consider to activate to get better Gail.

CITES

http://www.rxlist.com/cipro-drug/warnings-precaut...

The Fourth Phase of Water, Gerald Pollack 

Life in the cell and below the cell level, Gilbert Ling.

www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1383571815002296

# CAN MICROWAVES TURN GOOD FOOD TO A GMO?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcan-microwaves-turn-good-food-gmo-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 26, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcan-microwaves-turn-good-food-gmo-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

What we see is not the truth, it is an opinion of the truth. What happens during day time and night time is radically different and hides nature’s recipes. Science is ever changing, and incomplete, but it always maintains its own resistance to new and better ideas.  I want to share with you some ideas you might not get anywhere else.  

Metaphors reign large in modern biochemistry, where quantum mysteries lurk just below our perception. Electrons from food contain energy and information of light imprinted to them and circadian cycles set the redox potential (NAD+ and pseudohypoxic levels) in a mitochondria in a very complex dance of local geometry change of the respiratory proteins. When you know how these variables interact on the proteins and how the physical aspects depend upon each other, then you begin to see how nature is fundamentally organized biologically. Then, and only then can you begin to learn how to bio hack your diet considering the variables at play below your perceptual ability. Diet is a function of your quantum yield in your local environment. If you don’t consider these variables, you effectively have only one oar in the water, and when you use it unopposed, you go in circles and you wonder why your labs are altered and you have to do things others do not. When you go in circles, you start to form beliefs that are not true, they are your opinions of the truth. It becomes dangerous for an audience to listen to those beliefs when they do not understand the context from which they arose.

You need both oars in the water to move forward in your understanding so that it develops into wisdom. Mother Nature’s wisdom is the recipe we all need to be shooting for. Nature uses couple cycles at all levels of organization to store energy.  DHA and water are the most important part of how mammals have constructed their battery to  make life have energy at any point of time.  

Hashimoto's thyroiditis is an example of a thyroid disease with a localize defect in energy transduction in the thyroid.  I see it often in people who like to eat fast food that is processed and cooked in a microwave.  We now are seeing good food being microwaved.  We have many people in ancestral health [sharing the meme that microwaving paleo foods](https://chriskresser.com/are-microwave-ovens-safe/) is fine.  How might these behavior lead to a shut down of your thyroid gland?   The cycle of destruction is tied to living in a state that allows a low quantum yield top persists in your environment for some reason.  When microwaves are used it causes things to lose electrons.  This decreases the photoelectric energy possible in a food.  People are enamored with their "version of certainty", they only see what they believe and do not believe what they observe. nnEMF and its associated microwaves are everywhere even though you cannot see it your mitochondria do sense it. This is akin to your radio's ability in your car. You cannot see the waves that it sense's but you sure can hear the results of that collision. nnEMF colliding with your respiratory proteins is a crash your cell's mitochondria should always avoid.

Microwaves can also effect living things by altering life's ability to use magnetic flux and turn it into a DC electric current using the [inverse Hall spin effect](http://phys.org/news/2016-04-inverse-hall-effect-electricity-magnetism.html).  With thyroid disease it usually links to food electrons at some level.  Why?  Lowering the light frequencies on electrons discharges the mammalian battery too soon and energy cannot be stored in this tissue.  As a result the gland swells and becomes nodular before shrinking.  Reverse T3 rises and thyroid hormones crater.  

This uncouples cycles in us and energy dissipates in the form of light (ELF-UV).........This means your cells cannot store light energy well in water or in DHA. Hormesis is a fine edge between positive and negative reactions that are coupled by energy flows. And on that edge quantum probability exists. Beyond this edge there’s a space/time where emptiness and substance neatly overlap, where past and future form a continuous, endless loop. Hormesis only works with this loop when the positive feedback loop is properly coupled to the negative feedback control. When it is not hormesis becomes extinction for both sides of the equation.

[Hyperlink](https://scontent-dfw1-1.xx.fbcdn.net/hphotos-xtp1/v/t1.0-9/12805643_10207363944955623_5222565612228085933_n.jpg?oh=31ca480fbe982eb8ef928ac0a8397af7&oe=57530788)

As a result they are losing light chronically and steadily = Stress response = lack of proper coupling of cycles in cells = all connected to light frequencies as water as its molecular adapter = all cycles must be coupled locally (Time 9 blog) = surface light drives mitochondrial distance on respiratory proteins = melatonin and dopamine cycles = loss of them results in chaos.  When melatonin and dopamine production are coupled energy flows into the storage battery perpetually, so there can be no return of energy back to the environment =  chaos or randomness of inflammation does not show up to stop the flow of energy. For when energy stops flowing in either the positive and negative feedback side of a coupled cycle extinction occurs = extinction of energy = % heteroplasmy rises = geometric changes on mitochondria = higher % heteroplasmy = disease = too high % of heterosplasmy = death = equilibrium = life to exists, must keep energy flows coming into an energy store house = water and sunlight = exclusion zone/DHA (EZ).

For all intent and purposes life is simple.........A collection of small closed spaces full of stored energy constantly fed by an open circuit of electrons = sun in the day = magnetic flux at night = In the day our cells are designed to die little deaths (ROS) and under go little re-births (melatonin an dopamine) as we metabolize biochemicals all connected to a water sea fed by sunlight. Life is an exotic flower powered by a water fuse box connected to the sun and Earth by way of a mitochondria. Anything that reduces the quantum yield in your food, you better believe it reduces the quantum yield in your environment. The net effect, in plain English: if you are living in a low quantum yield environment, you have to work harder/do more to be healthy.

Humans have embarked on a massive natural destruction because we are incapable of seeing our role in it. We are not observers of nature we are woven into her quilt. Microwaves lower the shear number ,and the light power contained in electrons which built foods, and thereby these food electrons deficient in light.   When foods lose photoelectric power, electrons have lost their light photons excitation = lower quantum yield = smaller nutrient density = thyroid diseases.  In that sense, microwave ovens are capable of creating GMO's in a ten seconds in your kitchen,  and yet '[paleo leaders](https://chriskresser.com/are-microwave-ovens-safe/)' says its OK for humans [to use them](https://chriskresser.com/are-microwave-ovens-safe/). A lack of understanding of physics hides the truth from regular Joe's and patients who follow them.  A half truth might even get you sicker than you can imagine.  It might turn your 'expensive paleo approved food' into a GMO if you prepare it in a microwave.  When you put an optical scanner on food pre microwave and post microwave you might find a huge difference  in the bio-photon power they contain.   Fritz Popp was one of the first scientists to study these ask things decades ago.  Physics truth says they are FOS. Caveat emptor.  Might your microwave = Monsanto.  Bio-hack it.  

Patients, bio-hackers, and entrepreneurs penetrate the “fog of the unknown” by testing their hypotheses through trial and error. Why do not we apply the same principles to our health? This is the core reason I am a bio hacker myself. Any expert on cognition and learning will report that practical knowledge is best developed by doing, not just thinking or planning. In the early days of my transformation, the plan was to use the tools I learned in medical school to improve my former self. I would cut calories and exercise. It did not work. Instead of getting mad I got smarter by thinking better. I went back to my neurosurgical training dictum, learn by doing.  Sometimes what we find in these bio-hacks changes our perspective on what we were taught.  

Food for thought.

# Article: LONDON CALLING...........2016
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/london-calling2016-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2016-05-23T10:56:45.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 4187
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Flondon-calling2016-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 23, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flondon-calling2016-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I am on the plane now returning from a quick weekend jaunt over the pond to speak an inaugural London bio hacking summit. I think the European bio-hacking community will outstrip their American and Canadian counter parts very soon based upon what I just experienced. This conference focused on science and not marketing.

I also have to say all American based airlines need to take a few pointer from Virgin Atlantic. Their staff on the planes I flew were just marvelous. All with smiles and cheerful.

The bio-hacking venue was beautiful; it was held in the British Academy of Film & Television Arts center (BAFTA) which is where the British version of the “Oscars” for film is held yearly.

I have to say I was quite surprised initially at the response when I entered the building. I was told no one here had a clue about quantum medicine and within 5 minutes I realized this was not true. I also so this magnificent painting out of the corner of my eye that I loved. When Ruben Salinas was approached by one of the organizers of the event, Jamie Ward, to have us come over and speak about light water and magnetism he told me very few people were talking about quantum biology and medicine in Europe. His “hook” to get us interested to come was that the landscape was ripe for a “solar light invasion” from the states. He told both Ruben and I, that many people would likely be unfamiliar with our work. So as I arrived, I expected a blank canvas with which to work with. Initially, I did not want to come to London because of the long flight, over a weekend and all the circadian disruption it would cause. Not to mention the circumpolar radiation from the two flights in three days. Ruben convinced me it was a worthwhile risk so I decided to do it. My intuition told me as soon as I arrived in Heathrow it was a wise decision. I was “collected” at the airport by one of my members on my website, Sarah Hogdson, and we connected with one of my best friends, Jeremy Thomley. Jeremy was a late addition to the excursion because the movie makers of SuperCharged, the movie, wanted him there for the world premiere. Sarah Hogdson is just pure awesome human being. I had no idea she was a “water insider” in the UK!! Who knew that she knows the scoop on UK water!!!!

As soon as Jeremy and I got in her car she began to entangle both of us with her wit, wisdom, and chit chat. She taught us some slang British terms that I would put to use in my talk during the bio-hacking event. It took me an hour to get through customs, and over an hour to get to London from Heathrow, but with Sarah’s company it seemed like the time just flew by.Jeremy and I checked into the hotel and we had to come to grips with a European 4.5 star hotel. The room was about the size of a walk in sauna. There was one very small bed and two men who just looked at each other and laughed. We laughed even harder when we remembered that Ruben and Ben Smith were on their way to London from Czech Republic to stay in the same hotel. Ben is close to 6 foot six so seeing him sleep in this bed was going to be a hoot. We joked that he might have to bend his knees to fit length wise in the bed! Jeremy had the brilliant idea to make a Facebook live video of the hotel room, so we did. We called ahead to warn Ruben and Ben their room might be no bueno, but Jeremey was starving by this point. We had not eaten in a day during travel. We had both used my jet lag Rx and we remained completely ketotic for 24 hours on the first leg of the flight so we went a few blocks away and found a French Bistro named Cote Brasserie at 50 St Martin’s Lane, London. Here we sat on the street and low and behold the clouds parted and the sun began to shine on both of us. We sat outside and at a feast. We began with cheese tray and olive tray and a bottle of Champagne. We met an older British woman next to our table and we chatted her up and found she was a teacher and was teaching an Asian student English. She was so pleasant to speak with we sent her and her student an glass of champagne to celebrate the sun’s appearance with us. Her face glowed after this. Jeremy and I looked at the menu and our face glowed. He had sea-bass and I had pork-belly and we decided to go large and drink some Margaux Bordeaux. It was the best wine on their list and the funniest thing happened when we ordered the wine. I was about 11:30 AM UK time, and when we ordered the wine our Hungarian waitress asked us both if we were sure we wanted that wine. Jeremy and I got a charge out of her reaction to our selection, and we asked her why she said that. She said most people won’t pay up for a great bottle of grape juice for lunch in this establishment and then we explained to her we had not eaten or drank on the plane for 24 hours and it was really 7PM for us. She laughed with us and opened and fabulous wine. It was so good we ordered another bottle and she did it again! This time we told her to get a glass and we shared our wine with her. Her smile just exploded at this point. I was now confident that London was going to be “special” in ways I did not expect.Sarah returned to collect Jeremy and I and bring us to meet many of the EU’s members on the Quantum FB group and people from my forum at an oyster house. It was at the oyster house I got to lay eyes on Mr. Phil Escott for the first time. I have been friends with Phil on facebook and had an ambient awareness of him. He just struck me as a guy I would hang out with in New Orleans if he lived there. He also had incredible story packed into his journey and he was very kind to share that on the Optimal Journal sites. I was so moved by what he wrote that I felt honored to write the forward for his book about his journey back to wellness. Phil came from quite along way to see me in London and he had no ticket to the Biohacker event. We got run out of the oyster house and then the Brits took us to a roof top club where we saw a spectacular sunset together of the London skyline.  That pic is above.   The energy around us was so great that nearby people just wanted to hang out with us to tap some of what was happening. It was palpable. We ordered more Champagne and Malbec and our party grew further. It truly was entanglement on display and it here that London changed for me. I told Jeremy and Phil I had an idea for my talk. I wanted both of them to be part of the talk in interactive fashion but I did not want to tell them everything I was thinking.

They both graciously agreed and Phil took a quantum leap of faith and showed up at the event with no ticket as promised and the event organizers came and got me to confirm this was Phil and they gave him a badge. At that point, I just blew up all my previous talking points because these two men were living breath canvases of quantum biology at work. Ruben’s talk so so good on the basic science, I did not have to get too in depth at all. He set the table like a 5 star restaurant would. The depth of my talk was made by the fabric and threads of these two men’s journey’s. Nothing is more powerful that to see how failure can be turned to victory when your listen to the program’s Mother Nature put inside of you. Jeremy always says profound things when he speaks. His inner philosopher always comes through we he speaks about his journey.

Phil sat up on the stage and said so many things that were powerful for the audience to hear, but one thing he said stood out to me. He said, “the whispers of truth are always in our head but we never listen to them until they become shouts.” His point was clear. We don’t change until it late in the game. This is a powerful idea for a biohacking community because it points out that we need to biohack our intuition to save time recapture wellness, When you think about it, wellness is merely slowest form of death we create in this life. Both of these guys were living breathing examples of the results of this kind of self introspection and query. I loved their contributions to my talk. One of the bio-hackers in the audience told me that his wife mentioned that I had the biggest smile on my face as a stood back and listened to these two guys tell a new audience what is possible when you are facing the impossible.

I think man has had the most dramatic impact of any animal on earth; but his current state of mediocrity of species is testament that evolution is going to make him pay by visits to doctor and allowing him to never see optimal if they continue on the path that runs orthogonal to the owners manual built into each and everyone of us. The science of our earth will swallow us before we swallow it, and on that I will stake my life.

Immediately after my talk, I went to the lounge and here I met an artist who was from Finland. In the exhibition room, when I first arrived I saw and met many new faces from all over Europe. But one face in particular caught my eye. It was a gorgeous painting of women covered in colors of paint blended into the back round. The picture was done on acrylic and I was spellbound by it. It was because of this picture that I got the idea of using people as Jeremy and Phil as a human canvas for the biohackers in attendance. What better way to paint a picture of biohacking really is about than two people doing extraordinary things to reclaim what was lost. The artist name was Vesa Kivinen and his work can be found ay www.artevo.org.

My last day was spent surrounded by most of the members from www.jackkruse.com. We went to dinner and shared stories and build friendships live. The pic is above.  Nothing tops meeting people and sampling their being live. Lisa Raspopovich is an ex-pat of the USA who now lives in the UK but you can still sense her Chicago and New York roots in her driving and her creative use of expletives. She and I share those qualities. She volunteered to drive me to Heathrow in this AM. It was at this time we had 6 of us in out tiny hotel room at the end of the night and I had forgotten I bought two bottles of vintage Moet Chandon for the movie premier. We got thrown out of the hotel lobby because they have no liquor license after 2 AM. I was shock to learn it was 2 AM when Manuel the night guard told us this. We went up to the safety of our room and we popped the two bottles. I declined any wine because I found out I had to rise at 6:30 AM to get to the airport for a 10:30 AM flight home. We all had eye protection on and Jeremy turned the lights off and decided to do acro-yoga with Ruben after this long day. Let’s just say I wish Ben had his camera rolling and it recorded the conversion. PRICELESS, seeing Mr. Limitless almost do the reverse plunge handstand!!  The people there will laugh when they read this. When we all left it after 4 AM. I got a wake up call for 6 AM packed up and Lisa “collected me” and drive to Heathrow. During the drive she and I had a stimulating discussion and I told she reminded me of NeilBB on the forum. I think I said to her, “Lisa, you are Neil with a vagina.” We laughed we got to the airport fast on Sunday AM and we got lost trying to get out of the parking garage. She made sure I got through the maze of the place and I got on the flight. I was bored on the flight so I wrote this as I crossed the pond.

I just wanted to jot down some more of my take aways from the bio-hacking conference in London to share with all of you.

1\. The SuperCharged movie was shown at this event. I was not privy to the previews. So this was my first time seeing it. I thought this movie would be good for kids all the way to older folks looking to change their life. The two most powerful sights I had from the movie was seeing Kate Towler with her family and seeing how she changed herself and her family with new ideas.

It was beautiful and got a few tears out of the corner of my eye. Thank god the lights were off.  Seeing Jeremy on film is just magnetic.

You’ll have to see it, to understand. He missed his calling. His words are deep, cutting, and powerful. I thought the movie did a great job focusing in the new ideas quantum biology brings to the table, but I wish some of the participant biohackers in the film could have focused in on the science message and not their marketing brand. I was not the only person who felt this way based upon the discussions we had later that night. It seems the biohacking fans fall in love with personalities more than the accurate production of ideas that resemble evolutionary truth and the production of real effects we observe. Every time I see and and hear Ben Greenfield speak I come away with a new respect for Ben. He walks the walk and talks the talk and his authentic. Ben I will send you the link on the micronuclei in the blood with PEMF, I promise.  He presented that authenticity in the movie, and this stood in stark contrast to others. In my opinion, he represents what the bio hacking community should strive for in how they do business. I think the movie was more about selling pills than bio-hacking. An opportunity was lost by the filmakers. I hear they have editted the film for re-release in September 2016 to suit the supplement buying public at American bio-hacker events.

2\. Can you spot elegance within the chaos? As the event was closing there was another epic Q &A with me surrounded by people. In the chaos, I met elegance. Her name was Sarah Morgan. She happens to be a CEO of a lighting company that is striving to do something we all desperately need. Her company name is Nano-Lit Technologies and she has a plan to build light sources that work with biology and not against it. I don’t want to go into details of what we said to one another, but it was deep and powerful and her passion to help people is what I sensed. I believe she is going to be a part the solution and not an additional problem for us. The "real world" of modern science is such a hard habit to break though for modern humans. It's so seductive in so many very subtle ways. The only way to see through it is to reconnect with nature. Sarah seems to get that message.

3\. During my talk a slender red head raised her hand and asked and question and told the room that she was a medical student in training and she completely got the gist of what I was saying about mitochondrial function and light, but she wanted to know why wasn’t this being taught to her in school. We had a good back and forth during this time. I told Ruben later that night that there is always one special person who I connect with at an event that I think can become a starfish and touch people I have no chance of touching. I think she is going to be that person based upon her words to me after the talk. Any time we can get a physician in training to realize just how much we have wrong, we can begin to ask question that will provide answers we all need.

4\. One biohack we all need to do at these conferences is that we need to talk to as many people as we can and we need to tough them with our ideas, thoughts, or words. Once you have that connection you can see the effect in their face, their non verbal cues, and in their hands. Once you get to that point………then touch them with your hands. It is a powerful small thing we can all do to raise our dopamine levels and lower our cortisol levels.

5\. I challenged the entrepreneurs in the audience with an idea I had for the global Bio hacking community. At the closing of the event I am confident that one bio-hacker, Teemu Arina is going to welcome the challenge. We spoke few words about this topic but his smile when we spoke those words said volumes of his intention. He seems to be creating a massive global brand free of marketing nonsense, deeper on real science than this community has experienced before. Several attendees told me his 2015 bio-hacking event in Helsinki was outstanding.

6\. The volunteers that Jamie Ward and Jake Stott his team assembled was fantastic. Many were students and they kept coming up to me all day for knowledge bombs. It was fun doing this. I felt like I was back in residency doing grand rounds with physicians in training. It made me feel younger, even when I knew the travel was killing me quicker.

7\. Dr.Tommy Wood/Ragnar talk was quite informative for the audience but his slides were so spot on for bio-hacking advice. He is a physician and the top recommendation he made to the group was to get your circadian cycles right before you do anything else. I was so happy to see his talk because Andrew Scarborough was in the audience and I know him from facebook and his own journey with a glioma. I have privately told him he needs to understand much more about light, nnEMF, and pulsed fields. Ketosis is definitely part of his template but it is not enough for brain tumor surveillance in my opinion. It was great meeting Andrew in person and it certainly was a pleasure putting some words down in a copy of my book for him.

8\. One of the most interesting things I heard was from Max Gotzler of the company Flowgrade. He is a massive German beast shredded up and quite an engaging character. He told me a story of when you used to own a blood testing company that he thought would interest me. They had a client who had some sort of fatal disease and she was coming in for routine 3 month testing. They drew a lot of tubes of blood the key tube they lost. It turned out they found the quartz tube a week later on the window sill. Max told me that the window was always kept slightly ajar and the tube of blood was run through processing and his lab could find no evidence of her fatal disease characteristics in the lost tube. I smiled and he asked me to explain what might have been the cause. I found out later they redrew this lab on her and the disease did show up in her blood work this time. Max did not know what the disease was because he was not a treating clinician but he said he would try to source it. It sounds like I might have another disease to biohack when he gives me that information.

9\. Two of the volunteers where a married couple who actually follow my work at the blog and they are both British. I won’t use their names here because I did not clear it with them but I want to tell how moved I was by their story. Both of them have hacked their low quantum yield and they know implicitly that what I am telling the world about a lack of sunlight due to poor latitudes and population density has some merits. They have house in London up for sale and they are looking for a large property in the Yucatan to make a sustainable farm for their family. I told them after they move closer to the crater and sun they need to send me an address so I can go visit with them. They both were super people and quite passionate about not settling for mediocrity.

10\. Last but not least, I have to tell you about Jan from Poland. He was the first guy I met at the conference, and he stuck to me like glue, showed me his labs, told me about his life and all the things he was doing. He was doing just about everything wrong with his construction of bio hacks and his use of labs and I told him before this conference was done he would have the answers he wanted. I observed him during the conference with the laptop on his lap and the blue light shining in his eyes in an artificially lit auditorium; and he wondered why his labs were screwed up? He was a stubborn guy but extremely curious so that is why I liked his tenacity. After Ruben and my talk he came to me and shook my hand and told me now understood fully what I was trying to teach him on day one of the conference. The irony of it all………they gave away a free sauna at the event and guess who won it? Jan from Poland. As I left the event at about 11: PM and was crossing the street, I told him it was pure quantum entanglement that he won that sauna. No person I met at the event needed some red light in their ATPase more than this cat……………Ruben and I taught him the depths of red light in our talks: A typical human eye will respond to wavelengths from about 290 to 700 nm. Does absorption of photons from red light light at 1538.5 nm increase the probability of proton transfer in cell water to affect every enzyme in our body? We water does this and light we don’t use as part of the eye camera mechanism is the gears that run the eye clock mechanism of the retina to control all growth and metabolism pathways. This implies that light outside of normal human visual perception of our retina has the greatest affects on biochemistry the most. It is hard to see, much less observe the effect, of what you don't know is even there. So Jan plight is very similar to most people who stumble into my website. This relationship between light and water shows you why QED has eluded and stumped biologists. The eye cannot see what the mind does not know or perceive. If the mind does not perceive it, we do not control for it in any experiments, much less bio-hacks, because we don’t appreciate the effect it is having globally within the cell’s terroir. The interesting thing is now that a few of us know these effects exist, we should now develop experiments to see the effect and how cells respond. We can see how water affects and surrounds mitochondria, the respiratory proteins, and ubiquitin rates. Real human discovery consists of seeing what everybody has already seen many times over and realizing that you’re now thinking what nobody else has every thought to think about the same very issue.

Gratitude to Ruben for convincing me to go, to Jamie for planting the idea in Ruben, and Teemu for executing on their suggestions. People, are transmitters of a bigger message. We are supposed to broadcast things to other detectors. I think I have done my job for this weekend, have you done yours?

# Article: VERMONT 2016:  CHANGING MY FOCUS
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/vermont-2016-changing-my-focus-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2016-06-07T19:09:09.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 2179
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# VERMONT 2016: CHANGING MY FOCUS

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fvermont-2016-changing-my-focus-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 7, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fvermont-2016-changing-my-focus-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

When I was asked to speak for Dave Hollenbeck at Nourish Vermont a Weston A. Price foundation chapter in Burlington, Vermont and I was surprised.  This is a "food forward group" and I am not a believer that food is even in the top three of importance to wellness in our modern world.  Light, water, and magnetism top my list.  

I was very happy to learn from Dave that this is exactly what he wanted me to talk about.  Dave's family's foundation generously sponsored this event and it was spectacular.  People need to come to Vermont and participate in this yearly event.  This year was year 5.  This group is seeking truth and wants to destroy the dogma that holds our species back.  Dave explained that he felt the food dogma was getting old in the published data and on social media and people needed to hear a new perspective of how food fit into a bigger framework that ties to nature's laws.  Little did I realize the line up that Dave brought to Vermont would be littered with disruptive speakers bringing new perspectives on health and wellness.

I asked Dave three times before I spoke exactly what he was looking for this audience.  I told him that I believed all the modern food movements, namely WAPF, Paleo, LCHF, and the Standard Western diets like veganism and vegetarians were all just form's of religious dogma.  They were all regurgitating somebody's precepts of the truth and not a natural concept anchored to nature laws.  That key law that underpins all food webs is photosynthesis.  It is now known to be 100% quantized to light and food electrons.  Dave told me he just wanted to get a simple view of how quantum biology should alter our modern perspectives on food and the badly injured nutrition paradigms.

The first talk I heard was from a fellow disruptor named Beth Lambert.  Beth is trying to change the landscape of perception in a disease very few people understand.  She is dealing with Autism.  As soon as she began to speak, my speaking partner Ruben Salinas and I looked at each other and we both agreed what we had come to say had to change.  Beth's talk was electric and inspiring to Rub and I.  She took my thoughts immediately to one of my own members, Kate, who has fought this autism battle herself successfully and rebuilt her family with her own tenacity.  I told Beth about Kate in some detail.  Beth wants to connect with her.  It was at this point, I decided to change the focus of my talk on the science that underpins what most people miss in modern chronic disease management:  The latest mitochondrial science and how it links to bio-energetics.  

Ruben and I went on for three hours and filled in the blanks that Beth is looking for.  Later that night we met with Beth in the pitch black of night in Vermont and talked about what we could do to join forces.  Beth is trying to do some amazing things for people with this diagnosis and we want to help.  Beth understands that these kids all suffer from environmental issues that destroy the energy generation in their mitochondria.  

I went on to explain to her why these kids all crave the carbohydrates because of how the frequency of oscillations changes in certain cellular compartments in their cells.  There is a major influx of two paramagnetic ions, calcium and magnesium, and this is due to altered mitochondrial function for fat oxidation.  I also explained to her and the audience during my talk how light can augment poor mitochondrial function.  I told her and the audience about the work of Dr. Doug Wallace and the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia and how his work can be used to help people with both mitochondrial diseases and genetic ones.  I used a film of two bio-hackers with the fatal disease cystic fibrosis to cement the point that if mitochondrial science can help them it certainly could help reverse a mitochondrial disease linked to an altered environment.  

The key point was that no one can use food to get well in the same environment they got sick within when you understand Wallace's work on heteroplasmy rates.  This work fits perfectly into the new work on water and hydrogen bonding networks and we also got deep into this and red light's effect on the ATPase in mitochondria.  I think Beth, Ruben, and I came away from this event feeling like we gave our audience a fresh perspective on why the healthcare system fails to help these kids.  

**MY TOP TEN VERMONT MOMENTS:**

1\.  Right before my talk Dave told me to make an announcement that he had purchased blue blocking glasses for the entire audience and that he had them Fed-ex'd in.  Not all the types of glasses (UVEX) were present but they could expect them before the event ended.  Dave and Tre delivered on that promise.  That show of support for the work Ruben and I are doing with respect to altered light spectrums, just floored us.  We are grateful that he asked us to speak.  That is the kind of action a true "starfish" who is trying to help the world does. 

2\. Tre McCarney works for Shelburne farms and she was our liaison and she is a spectacular person.  She bent over backwards to make this a pleasant experience and she is a great person.  She is pictured above with Beth.

3\. I finally got to meet and personally hear Magda Havas speak.  She is a wonderful speaker and very kind hearted.  I really enjoyed her lecture and she and I are on the same team for sure.    Magda also spoke about the recent NTP study that I mentioned on social media and in London and she believes it is going to be a new lever that will force governments to come up with standards. We spoke about why blue light really is the number nnEMF we all need to worry about and Magda wore her blue blockers after we spoke!

Evolution is physics in motion. Any time we slow light down we compress time and health manifests.  From the mixing of motion and quantum mechanics emerges the a new emergent concept we call evolution. Light frequencies are the levers that turn the gears of water to make life possible. They key it appears in cells is to slow light down. When we slow light down the circadian clock genes in front of every human gene can become synched to act as the ideal metronome for creation of life.

Cells are transparent for one reason in animals. Optics. All stressed cells emit uncolored ELF-UV. All transparent substances show some dispersion in the visible spectrum, and, if uncolored, have a higher index of refraction for purple (UV) then the red light. This difference implies that higher visible frequencies are slowed down more by the medium than are the red frequencies. This explains why cells are designed to release UV light, it also explains why they EZ has a higher refraction index than bulk water, and why red light penetrates tissues 10-30 cm’s to work directly on the ATPase to run it as a quantum torque nanomachine. As light is slowed down it can be transformed to other forms of matter with mass because energy and mass are equivalent in Einstein’s equation. The key to their transformation is found within the size and shape changes the energy undergoes in the respiratory proteins of our mitochondria.  I feel I have an ally in Canada in Magda.  I think she knows she has a few of us now down South too now!  

4\.  Beth Lambert is the executive director of Epidemic Answers.  She is going to help many people with spectrum disorders.  Right now she needs to raise a ton of money and I hope each one of my members would consider her cause.  She is located in Connecticut and I would tell you to reach out to her.

5\. Melinda Kinzie is a sound healer.  She played her quartz bowls before our talk and I got to see her do some private work on Ruben before we went on to speak.  Ruben and I really enjoyed her work and found it stimulating.  After our combined talk we put her on the GDV camera to check her bio-photons and also used some other frequency modalities on her and she learned something new about her physiology.  

6\.  Melinda's son was present during her bio-hacking session with Ruben and as his mom was being educated he was very inquisitive about what we were doing.  I taught him a bit about light and how it works in mitochondria and then I shared with him some maneuvers he could perform on this mom every day to improve her.  He was intrigued to say the least.  He asked that I perform it on him and I did.  He responded that it felt really good.  He asked me what it was called and I told him that we just performed brain surgery without a scalpel on him by increasing electron flow through his occipital ligamentous complex to deliver free electrons to the floor of his fourth ventricle.  He remarked that he felt quite calm after the maneuver.  I told him to do it to his mom every day to help her de-stress.  He was a very bright kid and very eager to learn how he could help his Mom.  

7\. The chef's and servers at the event were 5 star.  The food was unbelievable.  Shelburne Farm itself is magnificent and the grounds and Inn are gorgeous.  If you have not been there you should consider a visit.

8\.  The Cold Thermogenesis discussions in the Lake Champlain in 55 degree water with some of my old members who drifted away and came back for this talk and my new members who drove from all parts of New England to spend some time with us was outstanding.

9\.  Getting to meet with many of the WAPF members after our talk and all the great questions they asked was wonderful.  I enjoyed meeting and speaking with Jeff Leach and the Dr's. Wolfson.  

10\.  Spending a bit of the last night of the event with Joel Hansen.  Joel works at Olympia Meat Collective and Nutritional Therapy Association.  Joel is a self professed food guy who told me he was a bit put off initially by what my message was but after spending that last night talking with me he realized that the science I am bringing to the table expands the discussion and is not exclusive to the food paradigms.  It actually strengthens then but removing their reliance on bad nutritional science and teaching people that all foods are fundamentally tied to quantum processes in light that underpin photosynthesis.  This made me happy.  He is pictured above with Beth.

The one moment during the entire visit that made me realize that Ruben and I had an impact was at the end of one of the talks someone was making the comment that if we used a code we could save 20% off a supplement that was being sold.  The lady standing right next to me at the window who was a food guru for Weston A. Price leaned into me and whispered in my ear, "Dr. Kruse do you give 20% off a Rx for sunlight too?"  She had a big smile on her face when she said it, and told me she got my message loud and clear.  I was not sure when I arrived in Vermont this was going to go well, but I had a wonderful time connecting with an audience I normally do not get to speak too.  Ruben and I left Vermont very grateful that we came and shared this message.  Reconnection to nature is the key missing ingredient in the story about food.  The sun's light is what powers food electrons with light information, data, energy, and seasonal data to deliver to our mitochondria.  That message was received loud and clear.

Quantum mechanics is clear for biology. It's an N = 1 game because each micro environment is measured differently by each mitochondria in each cell and the results of each one must be accounted for by that quantum computer in our head.  It uses the SCN and the peripheral clock genes in front of each of the 25,000 genes in our nuclear DNA to do this.  These mitochondrial flows of energy create our life and health or illness result are averaged.  The energy flows in a tissue determine our true health index and the higher that number is the more energy coherence in tissues.  This leads to high level optical communication to optimize cellular communication.  Without this network passing on good data, illness results.  This is why, health is the slowest form of death we create in our cells.

# IS SUNLIGHT COUPLED TO PROTEINS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fsunlight-coupled-proteins-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

Blue light from artificial bulbs and LED screens uncouple electron spin from ECT flow speeds to release massive amounts of light. What is the linkage to these coupling events? Loss of redox power because of an increase of heteroplasmy of mitochondria in tissues. The redox potential is the critical linkage of the first two biologic cycle of energy conservation, namely ubiquitin and the cell cycle. These two processes are control by the central retinal pathways to couple to growth and metabolism cycles. The coupling of the mitochondria to the nucleus how light controls biology at all levels. Do you understand how coupling works? The coupler of the two is called an ' interactive controller'. When a system loses negative feedback control you uncouple cycles from one another. Let me give you a clear example of a LOSS of negative feedback control: in this type of coupling mechanism two components of the system have opposite effects on one another. Consider prey and predator as a couple. Consumption of prey by predator has a positive effect on the eater, and a negative on on the eaten animal. The negative effect on predators on prey prevents uncontrolled growth of the predator's population. This stabilizes the population sizes of both groups when they are coupled. This is precisely how light from our surfaces couples cell growth via ubiquitin rates via our surfaces. Blue and Red light in the sun are like predator and prey;  they each perfectly balance one another.  But modern artificial light has 4 times the amount of blue and no red.  This creates and asymmetry in how blue light is balanced.  When you also consider that modern light has subtracted our nearly all purple and red light the problem is even steeper. This destroys the coupled cycle. Why is this series so critical to understand? Because ubiquitin is the major stabilizer of negative feedback control on cell growth by affecting proteins for replacement in cell and it works via melanopsin which is the key opsin of the central retinal pathways. Melanopsin pays deep attention to the amount of blue light between 435-465nm.  Ubiquitin is the proteins that is akin to an actor in a play.  The director of ubiquitin is LIGHT!!!! This explains why light is the most powerful drug we have on Earth and why humans need to better understand the implications of our modern behaviors. When you uncouple blue light from all the other frequencies you create an asymmetry that can be used to help or hurt you based upon the use of that blue light.  If you like this quick hitter please show me by sharing it in your networks.  Thanks!

# Article: WHAT REALLY IS ADRENAL FATIGUE?
