# WHAT REALLY IS ADRENAL FATIGUE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-really-adrenal-fatigue-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 6, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-really-adrenal-fatigue-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The take home point:  Adrenal fatigue is a disease create because of the altered spectrum of light our eye and skin sense.  

Nature contains a "medical-spa" of waveforms that alter life's processes by refinement, improvement, and enhancement of our design. These waves are "tutors" for our cells. I consider illness cells who have fallen behind in their learning and the more cells are taught to imbibe these waves the sharper they become. With this education when cells learn to coexist with others in tissues, the result enhances the whole function of tissues. We all have choices to make as we live, but in the end our choices make up the life we get.

Adrenal fatigue links to a lack of UV and IR light via our surface receptors. Adrenal fatigue links to the PVN. Light information is captured exclusively by the eyes using specialized retinal photoreceptors and transduced directly to the SCN via a dedicated neural pathway, the retinohypothalamic tract (RHT). Each day the light-dark cycle resets the internal clock, by using UV light to make cells more transparent to incident light which in turn synchronizes the physiology and behavior controlled by the clock. At night, with an absence of UV light are cells become relatively more opaque to sunlight because UV is absent. This is why neuropsin is a critical light illumination detector in the cornea and on the skin.

The major biochemical correlate of the lightdark cycle is provided by the pineal melatonin rhythm. Under normal light-dark conditions, melatonin is produced only during the night, by using sunlight captured in biogenic amine during bright sunlight during the day to power the effect. Moreover it provides an internal representation of the environmental photoperiod, specifically night length.
This pathway also helps yoke the Vitamin A cycle in the photoreceptors to the environment in this way. These two cycles become correlated novelties that allow the brain to predict the future by trend setting photo chemical cycles. The trend is predictable if dopamine is also also being created. Dopamine is made by UV light and aromatic amino acids first in the eye before it is made at deeper levels in the brain. This is why AF is associated with slow cognition and ignition of behaviors when it is present. This is why dopamine and melatonin are correlated by being biogenic amines. One should never be uncorrelated withoutthe other unless the light stimulus is very altered in some way tied to an unbalanced spectrum via the eye or the skin. The synthesis and timing of melatonin production requires an afferent full spectrum light signal from the SCN which projects to the pineal gland via the paraventricular nucleus and the superior cervical ganglion. This is why BAT is found over the posterior neck region where this ganglia exists. Light becomes able to turn on fat burning only because it stimulates mitochondrial membranes to oscillate at 100Hz. This is the key frequency that allows us burn BAT protons to liberate heat and energy for sleep energy to run the non linear optical programs in the brain of regeneration when the DC electric is designed to be absent when day light is absent. This helps explain why light exposure during the night also inhibits melatonin production acutely and provides an indirect assessment of light input to the SCN via the RHT. Light is a correlated novelty to the DC electric current in wakefulness as Becker found in all of hiw work on salamanders and mammals. This finding has been largely ignored by biology to human peril in our modern world.

LOW SULFATED VITAMIN D3 ARE PREDICTIVE OF ADRENAL FATIGUE

People who live in the subtropic's and tropics always ask me why even when they are in the sun they don't seem to be able to raise their sulfated vitamin D3 levels even while naked sunbathing? Why, you ask? The answer is simple when you understand how the photoelectric effect works fundamentally. Few do. Your environment is loaded with many types of electromagnetic waves that vibrate our cell membranes.   There are 3 main factors link to vitamin D3 synthesis in our skin. Two classical ones that most know about: latitude and altitude. This is low hanging fruit variables most can understand.  

The third is the most critical in our modern world because it is the biggest cause of the pandemic: population density is the main reason why we have a pandemic in D3 on Earth. Why? WiFi and cell phones use two types of waves to communicate. RF and microwaves shake electrons off cell membranes. Without electrons on cell membranes you cannot assimilate light because photons and electrons interact by the rules of the photoelectric effect. Without electrons you cannot make D3 at all from cholesterol even if you were naked on the equator........hence population density = obedient idiots using tech devices = each one now has 7-10 in their possession = the more people around you the less electrons you have in your cell membranes. You need sunlight to sulfate your cholesterol in skin to make sulfated Vitamin D3 to protect your cells by lowering molecular vibrations in cells. This creates a harmony of signaling within the EZ of cell water. So this third mechanism is very destructive.......and you have to change your environment to raise your D3. If it does not rise then you know by default the area you are in is a photoelectric black hole for sunlight.

The vibrations of RF and microwave devices is also why humans are losing the ability to fat burn because these devices chance the frequency of the inner mitochondrial membrane vibrations from 100 Hz.  If it cannot oscillate at the precise frequency fat burning is impossible.  Most people think fat burning is a function of the foo they eat.  It is not.  It is a function of how our inner mitochondrial is vibrating.  This explain why so many with Adrenal fatigue sense they do better with carbohydrate diets.  It is not a figment of their imagination, it is reality because they cannot fat burn because their local environment is toxic with nnEMF.  The smart move is not to eat carbs to repair AF, it is to clean up your nnEMF around you by learning how to mitigate it.

# Article: Dare you ask why supplements might be bad?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/dare-you-ask-why-supplements-might-bad-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2016-07-09T13:42:35.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1179
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Dare you ask why supplements might be bad?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fdare-you-ask-why-supplements-might-bad-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 9, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdare-you-ask-why-supplements-might-bad-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

You should. 

Louise asked me, "Dare I ask why supplements are bad? Thing is I'm seeing a bioresonance practitioner. Her treatment IS with supplements. And it's expensive!! Am I wasting time and money and downgrading water DHA and sunlight? I'm desperate to reverse my health problems. It's so hard to just live..........."

My answer: Why? Let me teach you with an analogy: When a log of wood is placed in a fire, it burns down until all that remains is the element Carbon, atomic number 6. But if a diamond is placed in a fire, which is also made of carbon, its structure is retained. The key lesson here for you is that it is not the atoms that retain life's ability but in how they are physically organized geometrically by the forces that surrounded these atoms when they formed. In much the same way, we can reduce life to all the elements in a cell but what do we have? A group of elements is the short reductionist answer. We don't have a living cell. In much the same way, taking a calcium or magnesium supplement offer no magical cure for a living cell. Those atoms have to be acted upon by the physical forces inside a cell at the small scales in order to be made part of the living matrix. Redox protein folding in a cell is akin to why carbon from wood and diamond burned are not one and the same way.

This is why exogenous calcium has been shown to increase cardiac risk and not help it. How a mitochondrion uses calcium is endogenously generated and cannot and should not be affected by an exogenous action. Why? All biochemical cycles are coupled. It is a predator-prey coupling effect.

Consider the following: You have a different battery than other life forms in your mitochondria and the rules it plays by are not simple and do not follow common sense. They follow quantum mechanical laws.

Quantum mechanics is all about contradiction and counter-intuitiveness. Western orthodoxy is why so many people run from quantum mechanics instead of truly understanding what benefits it holds for us. It teaches us that paradox and ambiguity is often where the truth really lies. Between impossible and unfathomable is the neighborhood your ideas need to go. It is not just a place where your imagination sets up shop. Your question is a great one, but my answer is going to offend your common sense. Are you ready to embrace a different viewpoint of how wellness is innovated yet? If not why not?

Mitochondria have a quantum design built in. Therefore it has redundancy "built-in" to its design when biologic cycles are coupled. Most people in the world and this site are uncoupled from light, water, and magnetism. All diseases are caused by uncoupling of a protein called ubiquitin from cell cycle.......what is the linkage? Loss of redox power = altered spectrum of light we sense. The redox potential is the critical linker of the first two biologic cycle of energy conservation, namely ubiquitin, and the cell cycle. The coupler of the two is called an ' interactive controller'. When you lose negative feedback control you uncouple cycles from one another.

Let me give you a clear example of a loss of negative feedback control...........in this type of coupling mechanism two components of the system have opposite effects on one another. Consider prey and predator. Consumption of prey by predator has a positive effect on the eater and a negative on the eaten. The negative effect on predators on prey prevents uncontrolled growth of the predator's population. This stabilizes the population sizes of both when they are coupled. This is how light couples cell growth via ubiquitin rates. Why is this series so critical to understand? Because ubiquitin is the major stabilizer of negative feedback control on cell growth. The actor of ubiquitin is LIGHT!!!! Light stabilizes the growth of cells and a loss of this negative feedback control stimulates the unfettered growth of cells. This is where cancer comes from folks. It is not a genetic disease. It is an epigenetic one cause by a loss of light coupling. It has little to do with food too. Food (third coupled cycle can assist.......but can't cure it.

**The first casualty in supplement marketing is usually the truth.**

One of the primary challenges with vetting a clinician’s recommendations or a businessman’s marketing material is that many of them or cherry pick research to validate their direction and beliefs. They do this so that their ideas, therapies, and products, or their success, in general, is pre-ordained.

If you reach a contradiction or dead end in your thinking, one of the assumptions you have made or accepted along the way has to be wrong.

At that point, you have a choice: (1) to revise your paradigm, and resolve the contradiction at all costs by any means available, or (2) to accept and integrate the contradiction into your thinking, and thereby limit the scope of your knowledge and voluntarily accept permanent mental detachment from some aspect of reality. (Which will eventually spread like cancer to affect other aspects, BTW.)

99.9% of adults will mostly choose option #2. That is why many move on from here. The rules of quantum mechanics them because it puts your environment over all other choices in health reversals. Few people choose option #1 requires epistemological courage. To maintain choice #1 requires methodological commitment. is more important than content.

I would say that this is precisely why method (epistemology) is more important than content (knowledge).

If you consistently employ the correct method, you will eventually expand your knowledge massively regardless of the content that you started with. You will be fully capable of incorporating new evidence as it becomes available and be able to "self-correct" as you go.

Conversely, if you start with a strong knowledge-base but employ a restrictive methodology, your brilliant content will atrophy over time and harden into rigid dogma because it cannot evolve. If you can't evolve you will eventually perish, as the ever-expanding story of "truth" will tend to threaten rather than enlighten an entrenched mind or movement.

This is happening to paleo now because its methodology and assumptions are quite limited, in my opinion.

The dogmatic tendencies that NeilBB spoke of in the cites below, apply in principle just as much to subcultures and ideological movements as they do to societies and governments.

Raise your quality standards as high as you can live with, avoid wasting your time on routine problems and routine thinkers, and always try to work as closely as possible at the boundary of your abilities. Attack your comfort zone and disturb conformity with curiosity. Do this, because it is the only way of discovering how that boundary should be moved forward.

**The invisible threads nature weaves are the strongest ties in the Quilt of our lives**

**CITES:**

1. https://www.jackkruse.com/tensegrity-3-epistemology-vs-social-dogma/

# Article: LAVENDER CAN RETUNE OUR THALAMUS TO IMPROVE CHRONOBIOLOGY?

# LAVENDER CAN RETUNE OUR THALAMUS TO IMPROVE CHRONOBIOLOGY?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Flavender-can-retune-our-thalamus-improve-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 29, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flavender-can-retune-our-thalamus-improve-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

A flower or spice can help us retune to nature? Really doc? 

Yes, but makes sure when you use it you use it in the sun's light for maximum benefit!

Lavender requires huge amounts of phosphorus to grow and this is the key to why it can retune your peripheral circadian clocks. It won't help the SCN, only the solar exposure to the eye does that so ditch your glasses, contact, and sunglasses for the most part. 

The effects of lavender oil have been studied on human emotional states, on our autonomic nervous system, and even on our brain's electrical activity. Lavender oil is alphagenic to waves in the brain. What does that mean? It improves the alpha waves on our EEGs. Alpha waves are destroyed by nnEMF and blue light at night and this is why our sleep fails when we expose ourselves to them in our local environment. Lavender oil is also an aldehyde. This makes it act like glucose and retinol in humans. Both of these things are critical in the circadian functioning of man because of melanopsin dysfunction.

[HYPERLINK](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Eresearchgate%2Enet%2Fpublication%2F225051306_The_effects_of_lavender_oil_on_emotional_states_autonomic_nervous_system_and_brain_electrical_activity&urlhash=GkPW&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) 

Lavender plants are hardy in U.S. Department of Agriculture plant hardiness zones 5 through 9, depending on the species. These plants like the zone where UV, blue, and red light are present in decent amounts. When outside, the aromatic lavender flowers attract bees and butterflies, and humans because they have many frequencies that can build biogenic amines from those frequencies. Since these plants prefer full-sun, indoor lavenders benefit from supplemental light, such as from LED grow lights. This kind of lavender has very little effect on the alpha waves.........the natural flowers in full spectrum light should be your target if you are going to use it. Why? Sunlight, phosphorus, and water become magical when married by nature.

 How can you tune this optical lattice clock in your cells? 

Add sunlight to phosphorus to EZ water. Phosphorous is a quantum dot. It is a dopant for wide band gap semiconductors in our cells. 

To be finely tuned, the molecular clock constantly has to receive feedback from the metabolic signaling in the cell. It gets this from cytochrome 1 in the mitochondria where fluorophore proteins predominate. The CLOCK/BMAL1 complex is known to be regulated by the redox status of the cell reflected by the NAD(P)+/NAD(P)H ratio, which is rhythmic. The "P" in those chemicals is phosphorus folks. That redox couple is linked to the Pentose phosphate pathways you heard about in the EMF series at jackkruse.com. NADP and NADPH are linked to the NAD+/NADH couple in mitochondria at cytochrome 1.

In cytochrome 1 where the NAD+ and NADH couple resides, they respectively inhibit and stimulate CLOCK/BMAL1 binding capacity to E-Boxes. NAD is a cofactor of SIRT1 and PARP-1. Each one of these things has a levee in the Quilt document at my website and now maybe you can see why. Both are key gears to the timing mechanism inside our cells.

SIRT1 interacts with CLOCK/BMAL1 and mediates BMAL1 and histone H3 deacetylation in order to modulate the post-transcriptional modifications (PTM) activity of the complex. SIRT1 also promotes PER2 degradation via its deacetylation. On the other hand, PARP-1-mediated poly ADP-ribosylation of CLOCK leads to the inhibition of CLOCK/BMAL1 DNA binding capacity. All of these things are mediated by changing light frequencies on our surface proteins.

PTM links to phosphorus and that is how it links to lavender.

How? Hold on to your seats..............

The element phosphorus on the periodic table is very active with respect to sunlight. Red phosphorus results when white phosphorus is heated or exposed to sunlight. Red is reflected off this atom when heat/IRlight or sunlight collides with it. That occurs during the 3 years lavender matures while undergoing photosynthesis in the ground. This has effects inside of proteins that are related to hemoglobin like cytochrome c oxidase in mitochondria. All heme proteins absorb red light like water does. I bet you did not realize some plants have mitochondria! The picture above shows them in the plant! 

Evolution seemed to have an intuitive knowledge to use phosphorus for a clean fuel long before the man caught up to her ways. The entire research world is on a quest for a source of clean energy, but living cells chose to use phosphorus to activate life's process. It does this using solar radiation using phosphorus resonant energy transfer that comes to Earth's surface. All a cell has to do to create energy from sunlight, without any fancy electric power grid is to simply expose water to sunlight in the presence of phosphorus.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Experience vs. Evidence: Why "Phlebosaur" Misses the…

Haroun Gajraj 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/experience-vs-evidence-why-phlebosaur-misses-mark-vein-haroun-gajraj-anb5f)

[

Scientific facts from the Quran will blow the mind…

Mohd Hamid 2 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/scientific-facts-from-quran-blow-mind-part-2-mohd-hamid-equjc)

[

“LUOS and the Rebuilding of the Soul Through the 78…

Luos Foundation 7 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/luos-rebuilding-soul-through-78-gates-luosfoundation-7ofbe)

Red phosphorous is the most stable and commonly found isoform of that element on Earth. In the sun, phosphorus breaks up water molecules to give off bubbles of hydrogen gas, a clean fuel. So phosphorus in the sun is a photocatalyst that mimics photosynthesis by burning water to liberate hydrogen and free electrons. Phosphorus is the universal most simple atomic photocatalyst. Mother Nature is all about the conservation of energy, so this is why ‘simple is beautiful' when using atomic phosphorus to get the energy life needs. This element is so abundant on Earth and in the sun, that it will never be used up until the sun dies. This makes it the ideal stable atom that a cell would choose to make energy thermodynamically. When things change color they are telling us something about their band gap.

A photocatalyst operates much as chlorophyll does in a plant like lavender, absorbing energy from light and causing a chemical reaction in water to charge separate it and liberate energy in the form of hydrogen and free electrons. The process of photocatalysis is simply a form of artificial photosynthesis. It appears to be "artificial" to modern humans but it is how abiotic atoms like phosphorus in soil work with sunlight in lavender plants. Cells became able to harness the power of phosphorus in all their proteins. This is conserved in plants and in animals. This is why lavender can affect our cells. This is why phosphorylation is found everywhere one looks in plants and animals in high-energy metabolic pathways in a cell.

In fact, it is the reason it is used in the peripheral clock mechanisms to fine-tune coupling and timing inside a cell. Both plants and animals use molecular clocks for night and day. Most of the known clock proteins are phosphoproteins and phosphorylation events play a key role in generating circadian rhythms in all living things.

In animals, AMP-activated protein kinase (AMPK) constitutes an interesting example of the interconnection between phosphorylation events of clock components and metabolism status. Indeed, AMPK, which is activated by an elevated AMP/ATP ratio, directly phosphorylates CRY1 and leads to the phosphorylation of PER2 via casein kinase 1 epsilon (CK1ε). In both cases, AMPK activation promotes the degradation of the negative feedback components of the coupled cycle.

Peripheral circadian clock systems based on post-translational modifications (PTMs), such as phosphorylation, exist and are well characterized in bacteria. This has not been seen in mammals and it should be obvious why it has not been seen. Mammals stole their mitochondria from bacteria 580 million years ago, so the mechanism remains buried in the circadian regulation of mitochondria in higher eukaryotes.

This is why [Dr. Doug Wallace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KwbIR2yUziw&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) has said that photosynthesis and glucose metabolism in the liver is directly linked to the sun. Mammals use blood to capture sunlight and plants use their leaves. Look at how similar the photopigments are below. Phosphorus is the most simple photopigment that life used 4 billion years ago before it got more complex at the Cambrian explosion. Wallace believes it is why the liver evolved in animals and it is covered in the link above. 

It appears it is our phosphorus power plant for augmenting mammalian photosynthesis. This organ is the ultimate peripheral clock regulator that responds to light frequencies from other surfaces than the retina. Multiple lines of evidence suggest that the mammalian clock in peripheral organs such as the liver plays a substantial role in optimizing the timing of the metabolic processes. Indeed, the expression of hepatic enzymes involved in metabolism robustly fluctuates during the day during solar light. This is why [insulin is a solar hormone.](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/insulin-solar-light-hormone-like-vitamin-d3-jack-kruse?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) Consequently, inactivating the liver clock decreases the number of cycling transcripts. This is why light at night destroys this mechanism and leads to many epithelial cancers, [like breast cancer.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ebiosciencetechnology%2Ecom%2Fnews%2F2014%2F07%2Ftotal-darkness-during-night-key-success-breast-cancer-therapy%3Fet_cid%3D4066343%26et_rid%3D652401564%26type%3Dcta&urlhash=rbQ4&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) 

The epithelium is always adjacent to a light source and it contains melanin. Sometimes the light source is obvious and other times it is from bacteria on that surface. Clock disruption in the liver or in the pancreas impairs glucose metabolism while keeping behavioral rhythms intact. Behavior rhythms are controlled by the frequencies the retina senses and not the gut. Moreover, the timing of the circadian clock in peripheral tissues like the liver is controlled by the timing of feeding rather than by the light inputs to SCN. Light inputs to the SCN however can alter the NAD+/NADH couple to slow ECT flow and cause obesity and increased heteroplasmy rates.

Lavender and its components can fine-tune us if our peripheral clocks are awry assuming we fix our light environment. How? 

All things in the cosmos are controlled and made up of electrons. All foods and spices like lavender are broken down into electrons when they are consumed. Chemistry is controlled exclusively by valence electrons, and this includes all known biochemistry in cells. The chemistry of lavender is also controlled by its valence electrons with respect to their excitation by UV, blue, and red light. As environmental changes occur with light, this can change the electrons in lavender from the "identical interchangeable parts" they are to particles with different information embedded in the light frequencies attached to them. We call this excitation. This is how "change without change" occurs EVERYWHERE photoelectrically in the universe using ALL chemicals.

All electrons are exactly the same everywhere in the universe...........so how can different things that are made from them, like foods, or things like the lavender look so different to us on farms and in markets? Simple, because electrons can be changed ever so slightly by light frequencies from the sun coming into your eye and skin that "excite" them. Excite = energy increased by light via the sun. Light can do this photo-electrically. Those frequencies that excite lavender should come from the sun to have its best effect and not a fake light in your house, computer, or cell phone, or from a farmer's growing lamp. Excitation only comes from the light sources that excite them. This is why organic sun-grown food exceeds GMO foods in nutrient density. Nutrient density is a property of the light they contain, not the nutrients that a food guru speaks of. GMO foods are grown under and processed with blue light and their electrons are not as high powered as ones in the sun planted on Earth, so you have to eat more electrons from these foods to get an equivalent amount of light for the cell. This is why lavender grown artificially does not tune people's thalamus to make alpha waves or help provide us with some phosphorus to fertilize our cells under solar power. This is why people who eat processed food really get fatter than we expect and are leptin resistant. We excite electrons best when we are in the sun and grounded to Earth which releases free electrons as sunlight hits the surface. 

It has nothing to do with the food or lavender electrons fundamentally, it has all to do with the lack of light those electrons have in them. Fritz Popp proved this point to us with his photomultipliers in the late 20th century. He found every GMO food/flower/spice has less light contained in them. This unfathomable small change in light frequency confuses food gurus into believing that food, and not light, is our biggest issue. It's a half-truth. Poor light confinement in food electrons leads to massive changes on a big scale that our 5 senses are attuned to. That attunement occurs because all of our cells have mitochondria. 

This increases our awareness that something is wrong is sensed in our respiratory proteins, and it becomes a signal for us to change our environment. Our other 5 senses use many other sensory pathways for waveforms, other than mitochondria to make this information available to our brain in our thalamus. Our thalamus is where our alpha waves are found to begin on the EEG. They are supposed to fire at 7.83 hertz which matches the Earth's natural resonance. That frequency comes from a connection with the Earth. This is why grounding with the sun is important. Circadian signals are tied to the alpha wave generation in EEG and people who are leptin sensitive (LS).

Your thalamus, in this way, is a giant tuning fork (another form of resonant energy transfer) used by the brain to compare frequencies embedded in your electrons from the environmental source from every mitochondrion and every sensory relay in your brain. Your food/lavender electrons need to be programmed properly to gain the alphagenic properties you're looking for to reestablish the brain waves that come from your thalamus. So if you don't use the product right don't expect equal results. Lavender needs to be mature and this means over 3 years old. The best lavender in my bio-hacks was at 8-10 years from a strong UV geography.

# Article: THE NEXT TERRORIST ASSAULT:  TETRA
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/next-terrorist-assault-tetra-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2016-08-09T17:45:41.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 3696
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# THE NEXT TERRORIST ASSAULT: TETRA

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fnext-terrorist-assault-tetra-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Aug 9, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fnext-terrorist-assault-tetra-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I recently received this email from a person with an interesting travel history. 

They said, "I'm 52 and I have realized I still have so many unanswered questions! Can a game like Pokemon Go be used to control me? I feel like something outside of me has effects on me. I know this sounds crazy but it feels this way. I never found out who let the dogs out........the way to get to Sesame Street.......why Dora doesn't just use Google Maps.......why we don't ever see the headline "Psychic Wins Lottery"........why women can't put on mascara with their mouth closed..........why "abbreviated" is such a long word............ why lemon juice is made with artificial flavor yet dish-washing liquid is made with real lemons........... why they sterilize the needle for lethal injections... and, why do you have to "put your two cents in" but it's only a "penny for your thoughts" where's that extra penny going to... why do The Alphabet Song and Twinkle Twinkle Little Star have the same tune... why did you just try to sing those two previous songs... and just what is Victoria's secret?..............and do you really think I am this witty??"

Most people will read the above and think it is just me being funny or nuts, but there might be something to this email-based on the person's recent travel history. 

What if I told you that I'd rather you engage your curiosity than try to make a joke for you today? Could something innocuous on its surface have a deep meaning to your life, in ways you don't perceive just yet?

Keeping your distance from an ignorant is equivalent to living a wise person's wisdom.

Could these thoughts in the first paragraph be used or placed in someone's mind and placed on social media/TV/radio to be shared to infect many minds just as a viral infection afflicts people? It sounds hard to fathom, doesn't it? Is there a point to this opening?  Yes, there is.

The person above lived across the street from an 80 GHz microwave antenna for 3 years and their family became concerned about a change in their behavior and cognitive function. This antenna array was used by the federal government in response to terrorism.

 In 2012, the FCC gave the green light to U.S. critical communications licensees will be able to use Terrestrial Trunked Radio ([TETRA](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Etetrawatch%2Enet%2Fnational%2Fconnections%2Ephp&urlhash=graK&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)) technology on a permanent basis, but the technology remains prohibited on the public-safety spectrum. TETRA is a European standard that is now ubiquitous and has some interesting features I want you to think about. These physical capabilities lead me to believe they soon will be a major focus of terrorist groups soon and most governments won't tell us why these attacks are truly occurring. The technology can be a conduit for population control by civilian governments and by the military. This is why terrorist groups want encryption keys to TETRA. Once these links become common knowledge they will potentially interest both domestic and foreign terrorists.

The benefit should be obvious to you: controlling your enemy without a population or government ever knowing that they are being controlled is a pretty powerful weapon. This is very [Matrix-like](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Etheguardian%2Ecom%2Fuk%2F2001%2Fmay%2F08%2Fstuartmillar&urlhash=2dVk&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in action.

If this sounds far-fetched to you, I want you to read this link from the literature. It turns out acute exposure to [Terrestrial Trunked Radio](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Etheguardian%2Ecom%2Fuk%2F2001%2Fmay%2F08%2Fstuartmillar&urlhash=2dVk&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) (TETRA) has effects on the human electroencephalogram and electrocardiogram, consistent with vagal nerve stimulation in a laboratory setting. [Hyperlink.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Encbi%2Enlm%2Enih%2Egov%2Fpubmed%2F27419367%3Fdopt%3DAbstract&urlhash=NK6s&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

So why I am concerned about this? In 1962 Franke described that the human heart generates electrical oscillations in a wide frequency range than was previously known. That range was 30 to 200 Hz. In the case of pathologic changes in the human heart, such as ischemia, the most pronounced changes were seen in the high-frequency part of the vibration spectrum in the heart. It was from this experiment that Heart Rate Variability technology was found and expanded on. It turned out that the high-frequency components in the 200-500 Hz range were also discovered in the electrical activity of the brain. In 1963, Trabka described that these components were appreciably altered by barbiturate anesthesia. 

It turns out that the Apollo [astronauts are now showing these unusual changes](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Enbcnews%2Ecom%2Fhealth%2Fheart-health%2Fdeep-space-radiation-caused-heart-problems-apollo-astronauts-n618116&urlhash=R_Ox&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in their hearts too. Did you know that TETRA is being used by NASA now? Do you think this may change the slope of the line for modern astronauts?

In 1963, an entrepreneur physicist named Dean Wooldridge worked at TRW and was an expert in magnetic theory. TRW was a technology company, and being an expert in magnetic theory is basic to modern electronics manufacturing. He retired in 1962 and began to focus on bio-magnetism and bio-electric fields. He wrote a book called "The Machinery of the Brain". This was a book written on his many experiments and biohacks of electromagnetic fields on animals. He found that the nervous systems of lower animals supply us with many examples of configurations of neurons that produce periodic signals for the control of rhythmic bodily functions. One example he gave was the neuronal oscillatory circuit found in a lobster. It has a ring of just nine interconnected neurons capable of generating periodic electrical impulses that control the lobster's heartbeat. He also showed that the song of the cicada originated from an oscillator in the insect's brain. 

TETRA is capable of controlling a lot more human functions via frequency modulation of oscillations in the human heart and brain. Why do I say this? Wooldridge showed the world that biology now had a new circuit refinement that Mother Nature added to living things: namely a sub-harmonic generator. TETRA can use RF/UHF/microwaves to be such a generator to control pacemaker cells in our tissues. 

Wooldridge found that the cicada centrally originating frequency was 200 cycles per second whereas the neuronal arrangement in the sound muscle drives them only at 100 times per second. He showed us in many lower animals, neuronal oscillators are directly responsible for the rhythms involved in walking, swimming, or flying. More work was done on this topic in 1963 by Wiener, He showed another phenomenon, known as the "attraction of frequencies" comes from the results of harmonic analysis of the alpha rhythms of brain bio-potentials in EEG. He proposed that the human brain contains neuron generators with frequencies close to 10 Hz, that within certain physical parameters, allow these frequencies to attract one another to change one another. Today we know that the alpha wave is generated deep in the thalamic grey matter in a similar fashion. 

This idea was tested by Harary, and he found that while each cell exhibited its own individual limit rhythm of pulsation, the assembly of cells around the highest pulsing cells began to pulse with the same frequency as a lead pacemaker cell. These higher pulsing cells then offered electromagnetic control of all the other cells around the pacemaker cell. Could this technology be used to control people? The short answer is yes they can.   

These experiments show us how TETRA could be usurped to control human cells that have electromagnetic pacemakers. The heart has them in our conduction system and the brain has them in the SCN. In fact, in front of every human gene, there is a peripheral circadian oscillator. If you become able to disorder the epigenetic expression of a large population of people in a democracy you could radically affect the trajectory of a nation.

 The history of mind control at a distance, remote mind control technology (RMCT) begins in America with the research of [Dr. Ross Adey](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ebibliotecapleyades%2Enet%2Fvision_remota%2Fesp_visionremota_9d_a%2Ehtm&urlhash=36WU&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) (UCLA) and his colleagues in the late '60s, working on the CIA-funded Pandora Project. Dr. Adey was frequently mentioned in many of Robert O. Becker's books on electromagnetic aspects of life. Adey found that ELF (extremely low frequency) signals in the region of 1-20 Hz (with 0.1 increments having different effects), had bioactive and psychoactive effects. The research was important to the CIA for they wished to find frequencies that could mind controlling humans from a distance (RMCT). Pandora researchers discovered that the 6-16 Hz region had drastic effects on the brain and on nervous and endocrine systems. This could enable major dysfunction in the target victim if research on cats and monkeys could be duplicated. The research on human victims done by Dr. Delgado still remains classified by the US government to this day.

A major problem for the military was that ELF transmissions need vast antenna arrays to gain their desired effects. In layman's terms, microwave and pseudo-ELF were more effective at mind control than pure ELF. RMCT, the means of mind control by neuro-degeneration can be employed by slowly killing victims using pseudo-ELFs. This ability comes from amplitude or pulse modulation of microwaves, UHF, FM, and RF radiations. This was recently also shown in the NTP toxicity data released in May 2015 in the USA. When this research was done by Adey, the biological effects of ELF frequencies were born and it was exploited by several groups.

TETRA imparts minimal interference potential to the RF spectrum which is why it is useful for civil utilizations for communications. This range is in the UHF band and the non-NPSPAC portion of the 800 MHz bands of the electromagnetic spectrum. The problem for biology is that the new NTP toxicity data show us that even small RF pulses are a problem for cells. What might TETRA do to cells if humans in power use it for communications for any reason? 

Utilities have expressed interest in using TETRA, and the FCC action in 2012 may encourage further interest from the sector for their smart meter rollouts. 

TETRA is a digital, trunked radio technology that operates with TDMA in four time-slot channels within a 25-kHz channel bandwidth, TETRA is the primary LMR technology used for public-safety communications in Europe. However, in the U.S.A., Project 25 (P25) is the public-safety standard. that is being phased out since 2012. The interoperability of both systems is critical for the current public-safety applications, so this is the reason why it has slowed. It has not stopped. 

This makes using TETRA in competing frequencies a potential target for a technological and biological useful weapon. The FCC was quite sensitive to the concerns that parties have raised about the interference potential of TETRA on public safety systems and the FCC clarified that TETRA cannot be used on 700 MHz public-safety narrowband spectrum in the USA because this could render both systems ineffective.  What the FCC has not disclosed is that it would be quite easy to modulate the frequency of TETRA to cause complete chaos if the decryption key to TETRA was found. Modern dimmer switches in your home are fully capable of modulating electromagnetic frequencies to alter the effect of light in your home and doing this would be technically easy if someone used the 700 MHz bands. 

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

If I look at the mass I will never act. If I look at…

Mukesh Vasandani, GPHR 8 years ago

More Shared Hybrid War Data on our 🇫🇮🇪🇪🇱🇻🇱🇹…

Amara Graps 12 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/more-shared-hybrid-war-data-our-eastern-flank-please-amara-graps-yhhec)

My concern is that the TETRA band can also be used to alter the cardiac and circadian pacemaker of all humans within range of the signal to cause massive biologic effects that would escape most medical practitioners. I believe the low end of the electromagnetic spectrum hurt our Apollo astronauts in a similar fashion and NASA is not making the connection to HRV data published today. Today we have recorded brain and heart ailments we cannot explain in medicine, while TETRA use is increasing globally. In Europe, this has likely driven some of the chronic mitochondrial diseases on different paths than they would make here in the USA. 

TETRA was designed for emergency situations, when almost instantaneous communication is required, both between individuals and within a group of an unlimited size. This is why first responders, the military, and NASA want this technology. Priority calls can be made using this band, backed by call pre-emption if required, and on urgent nationwide occasions, an all-informed communication can be sent out. This makes it quite valuable in many applications. 

Our pacemakers in the brain and heart work in the same coordinated fashion and interruptions in cellular functions are quite likely based on the biophysical effects already know about mentioned in this blog earlier. 

In the UK, microwave frequencies are defined between 300 MHz to 300 GHz; in the USA it is defined in terms of 1 GHz. Ross Adey's research at UCLA was done on 450 MHz carriers used to broadcast pseudo-ELFs via pulse or amplitude modulation, his colleagues carried out the same research at 147 MHz. In the USA, these frequencies have been defined as UHF and VHF. TV and radio frequencies use these bands. 

So what are my concerns about the use of TETRA with respect to this published science? 

The TETRA-2 software in some EU countries has now eliminated the 17.6 and 70.4 Hz interframe gaps that were used for mind control in the Pandora project. Most TETRA masts in Europe also now do not have any ELF pulsing. They do produce a lot of audio-band EMR in the range of 2 to 18 kHz and which can be heard on a simple AM demodulator as a loud-sounding hiss. These are frequencies that our cardiac and SCN pace at and could cause electromagnetic interference. I have a deep sense this is ongoing based on the epidemiology of heart and brain diseases. I think this is why electromagnetic sensitivity, Type 1 diabetes, and a variety of autoimmune conditions are more common in Europe than they are here in the US. The type of electromagnetic radiation is capable of changing the disease phenotype because of how it affects human mitochondria. 

I personally believe the roll-out of TETRA was not connected with the 17.6 Hz and mind control issues from the Pandora project in the 1960s because Motorola owned the encryption rights, and as they are an American corporation, all systems sold had to have their keys given to the USA's NSA branch. In turn, the NSA can then monitor the security services in any country using TETRA without anyone knowing what he or she is doing at any time. I think this is why Snowden is enemy number one in Washington DC now. He knows what the system is capable of because he worked with it. If one had access to those keys with a small adjustment frequency modulation back to 17.6 Hz could easily be achieved. I have a sense that is tied to the Snowden situation. That was why, here in the states, the UK was seen as an ideal key flagship demonstration country to help sell the TETRA system around the world. The recent attacks in Europe may be the perfect way to test for remote frequency modulation by any terrorist groups. The only proof this may be ongoing is if we see spikes of disease phenotype changes occurring in and around the attack zones. I doubt this will be studied because no one is linking terrorist events with public health, yet, with the known power TETRA has over pacemaker cells, the science is plausible.   

France has been a huge target for terrorist organizations, and I think the link may be tied to TETRAPOL. The French use the better and non-ELF pulsing TETRAPOL system. The French were the last "friendly" country that the USA and the UK governments wanted to have the decryption rights to this band. Terrorist attacks are a way to test decryption abilities because it stresses the emergency communication system used by first responders. 

The TETRA system originally used in the EU uses between 380 and 400 MHz, which is switched on and off at such a pulse rate that a pseudo-ELF of 17.6 Hz. This means 17.6 times per second a pulse wave is produced. This means the brain and nervous system are hit by pulses of UHF/microwave (nnEMF) every 1/17.6th of a second. Consider that all the recent terrorist events in Europe have mobilized emergency management using these frequencies over populations of cities. To understand this effect you need to understand scale. This is like throwing an electrochemical hammer blow to the head at a rate of 17.6 every second. Have you ever tried to sit and listen to a jackhammer chronically? Can you imagine what 17.6 hammer-like blows being delivered to the PVN and endocrine system are at the mitochondrial level? This is why variations were seen in HRV and EEG with TETRA use. The mitochondria need to oscillate at 100 Hz to fat burn, otherwise, it revises to a Warburg metabolism; do you think this might have a disruptive effect on the mitochondria of the organism? Might this be linked to many neolithic diseases that begin in the mitochondria??? Might this system's power be usurped by a terrorist or runaway government by a simple frequency modulation in a tower? Is this how the people in the US embassy in Cuba had brain damage? I think so.

I'd like to remind you that all human cells communicate with each other in the ELF range using both photons and solitons. I think you need to be aware of what is going on with the FCC and just what this technology is capable of politically, biologically, and in warfare. 

What controls us?

Light from the sun programs the atoms in us by exciting electrons in our tissues. Light from man-made things like TETRA has the capability of destroying us. Atoms are in everything that makes us, especially proteins. This is why DNA and RNA only code for proteins. All proteins have a "light signature" or fingerprint. This makes solar light the controlling arm of life. Every part of you is controlled by atoms right now that are programmed by solar light. When you live inside you are allowing a miss-programming of your atoms by man-made light. The same thing is true of WiFi, mobile networks, and geoengineering. All atoms are quantized by light and the evidence is on the periodic table. The laws of the universe scale from the quantum level to the macroscopic level. Quantum mechanics is foundational to everything in this universe. This implies that, in order to have a fundamental understanding of life, you must have a quantized molecular mechanism to prove your theory. Darwin had nothing to prove anything he wrote in the Origin of Species in the 1850s, yet we knew he was more right than the paradigm of the day. He provided us with observations that correlated to the morphologic change we saw in the fossil record and with living things. This is correlative data, not causative data. Lots of people forget that basic fault because of guys like Huxley in the past and like Richard Dawkins today. When you are dealing with atoms, you are dealing with quantum mechanics at some level. It is incumbent on you to figure out the message so you understand why some modern scientist position is skewed.

This is an area where Richard Dawkins has tricked modern man into fully accepting Darwin’s old ideas, without fundamentally understanding how the electromagnetic spectrum can use resonant control to affect the epigenetic programming of cells. Mitochondrial energy production controls genetic expression. The nuclear genome does not control energy flows to and fro the genome based upon [Dr. Doug Wallace's groundbreaking research](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KwbIR2yUziw&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in mitochondria. Nothing in Darwin’s theory talks about nature’s basic quantum language because it was not discovered yet in the 19th century. Darwin gets a pass on that issue from me, but Dawkins does not. Feynman famously said that if your theory does not match your experiment, no matter how elegant the theory is, it is wrong. I don't think we are run by a selfish genome. I think we are programmed by energy from mitochondria. That is what the modern science of [Dr. Doug Wallace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KwbIR2yUziw&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) is telegraphing us. I've been clear in showing you Darwin and modern science maybe, in fact, be dead wrong about many of their core beliefs because they were ignorant about how light can control cells in nonlinear ways. I've been using quantum mechanics to show you why we should consider this aspect of biology.

The key to understanding how evolution occurs is to understand the fundamentals of Einstein’s mass equivalence. Light can sculpt life using proteins as Mother Nature's canvas.

The mass equivalence equation (E=mc^2) shows us the wide-reaching impacts of failing to understand how small changes in quantum mass can create widespread changes in energy. You should consider this as proof of concept: Avogadro’s constant is the only scaling factor we have that allows us to go between the macroscopic world to the quantum level (subatomic scale). This allows us to link observations we make in nature directly to the mathematics of the quantum realm. Do food gurus tell you that? No, they do not because they fail to see the quantum mechanisms in cells as well.

Since the beginning, we know one thing for sure. There were quantum subatomic particles present in Genesis. First and foremost, this implies that a quantum evolution began as a by-product of some type of supernova blast from our past. Today, the phrase "let there be light" has massive implications for both science and beliefs. The controlling arm of both TETRA and epigenetics uses the electromagnetic spectrum via quantum mechanisms to affect other forms of matter. This mechanism can force a variety of changes in cells, to affect a chemical evolution by changing the structure and the construction of atoms to allow the pathways of biochemistry to exist. This did not occur the other way around. Light controls all biochemistry using molecular resonant transfers of energy. From this chemical, evolution emerged a biochemical evolution some 3 billion years ago. No one is following these clues back to how all things began, but I have.

### Jack Kruse

Published Sep 24, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fbio-physics-music-conversion-432hz-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

This protein symmetry in our bodies promotes randomness of movement of electrons in both systems of energy creation from sunlight or from music. Sunlight and music are both waves that move us in the same way, and in a slightly different way. So today I am going to give you peak inside my own head and show you why all my music is specific to my environmental deficits I allow with choices.  Read this hyperlink before going further.

[HYPERLINK](http://educateinspirechange.org/science-technology/heres-convert-music-432-hz/)

Once the light or sound waves excites the cytoarchitecture of a cell components of the cytoskeleton begin vibrate with complex but measurable harmonics. This affects the water around every part of collagen inside of you. Collagen is the most common protein in humans and it always hydrated unless you are dead. Harmonic transfers are also another non linear aspect of photocatalysis and vibration from sound. These waves are directly related to the electronic susceptiblity of the proteins in our cytoarchitecture. This is why Ingber's paper in 1993 is so crucial today in building wellness now than ever before. Every time a cytoskeleton piece vibrates it moves and those movement are capable of creating another "hole in reality" that a cell uses for life.

The hole is made in a biologic semiconductor like collagen. Collagen is an N-type semiconductor as shown by Becker in the 1960's. The P-type semiconductor contains the "hole" and because of the absense of an electron is has arelative positive charge, hence why it is the P-type semiconductor! When the wave form stimulus is music that vibration is called a phonon, and when it is light it is called an exciton like on photosynthesis that control all FOOD webs!!!!

Phonons act like waves on the ocean or like music to your cochlea. They travel throughout the matrix of the cells in your cochlea, to every cells nucleus and cytoplasm and then move into the extracellular matrix to deliver both information and energy to all parts of a cell and tissue. The system is high fidelity. This energy in musical waves can then tune or entrain the brain's alpha rhythms when your life choices create shit circadian mismatches because you use modern technology and man made light at night, or you are a neurosurgeon who has to operate at 3AM when you should be sleeping. So what are the bio-physics to this musical retuning of our brain?

In our brain the neocortex is on the surface and surrounded by CSF that orders itself in something called the exclusion zone (EZ) of water. It is ordered like polymers of thin sheets in this water. Cells are dominated by vibrations. Physics geeks like me can explain to you the coherence or structural order of life is capable of triggering a coherent electromagnetic field. In physics a coherent field arises because of the spatial variation of the condensation of something called Goldstone bosons. This is why levee one of my Quilt document is title as it is. The field of life is built by circadian day/night pertubations of light and magnetism. This playing field of life is critical to understanding how life works and how music can re-tune your dull sounding guitar life when mismatches act to de-tune you.

Detailed mathematical treatment of this system have lead physicists to the conclusion that all biologic systems will exhibit phenomena that is based around non linear (optics), and associated with superconductors (hydrated proteins). These will include the influences of weak magnetic fields (ATPase in your "shit mitochondria" from being on call) by something called Josephson effects. I've talked about Josephson junctions in many earlier blogs at my www.jackkruse.come website. These junctions are on the surface of your brain and are arrays of superconducting magnets separated by a thin film to create a SQUID. A SQUID is an ultrasensitive magnetometer that is capable of detecting the magnetic fields produced in the spaces around proteins. These Josephson junctions are used for information storage and information processing in cells. Every cells in your body produces magnetic field pertubations and we can use the SQUID on our neocortex to fine tune ourselves back to health when we feel like shit. This is why primative cultures bang on the drum all day and why I am listening to Policy of Truth by Depeche Mode as I type this in 432Hz. Bio-physics is amazing when you take the time to understand why nature provides all our cures if we 'd just get out of her way. Our big brain breaks most of her rules.

Within autism a spectrum arises because the senses are operational but have variable functionality so that the level of detachment from the environment relates to their energy production. # Article: GLUTAMATE EXCITOTOXIC DAMAGE IS A LIGHT PROBLEM.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Sep 27, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fglutamate-excitotoxic-damage-light-problem-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

##

Phosphorus is the key element in understanding how animals use photosynthesis in blood and in our cells. Phosphorus and phosphatase containing proteins control the flow of charges in blood and our cells. When you have a phosphorus issue or we have a lack of solar light we lose the charging ability in our cells. This allows us to lose our charges in our blood plasma and the cells suspended in the blood. So how are charges lowered? Inflammation is positively charged. Light radiation from the sun and magnetic flux from the Earth's core can enter hemoglobin from the blood plasma drives charge movements in RBC's and water. Remember that blood plasma is 93% water. This charge movements in cells and proteins suspended in water is able to generate secondary electromagnetic waves in these tissues which drive further charge movements for cells to use. When sunlight hits our skin nitric oxide is released and 40-60% of our blood volume migrates to the skin surface to absorb this light to alter the chemistry of the blood using phosphorus and phosphorous containing proteins to harvest the sun's power and to generate energy by splitting water to create hydrogen. When this process is interrupted the body must gain energy from other sources such as the TCA or beat-oxidation pathways.

_This raised a question on my forum:_

_Michelle said_, "The whole reason I found Jack Kruse was because I was searching for reasons why my son with aspergers almost had no symptoms during the summer. I believed a connection to sunlight and exercise (we swim everyday during the summer and he plays baseball and flag football in late summer and early fall.) every year after school starts & daylight savings time he changes into an anxious, depressed child. I wonder how glutamate ties into all these things?"

## Is glutamate a switch on cell membranes that controls voltage-sensitive phosphatase function?

Let us begin to look how far down in the connections where glutamate excitotoxicity becomes problematic. This effect is tied to the light environment we allow with our choices. The largest elemental components of the body, by mass, are oxygen (65%), carbon (18%), hydrogen (10%), and nitrogen (3%). The other elements in the body, such as calcium, _**phosphorus**_, iron, and copper, are known to physiologists as mineral elements and trace elements.

**PHOSPHORUS:**

Phosphate biochemistry drives the activation and deactivation of all proteins in cells. Phosphorus is very active photosynthetically with sunlight. So why do I continue to bio-hack the periodic table of elements? Because I know life is quantized, just like the periodic table is, and I am interested in finding out why cell biology uses specific atoms for its semiconductor materials. It turns out phosphorus is one of our base key semiconductors used in the circadian clock mechanism. When phosphorus is lost in the body it almost is always due to renal disease which adversely affects the RBC's mass due to erythropoeitin production. This once again re-enforces the connection of phosphate to sunlight and RBC mass in blood plasma.

I began examining a large group of elements that can act as semiconductors, which is a prerequisite for acting as a photocatalyst with sunlight via the photoelectric effect and found something interesting and not well known. This is where the picture above came from. I noticed immediately that chlorophyl and hemoglobin are nitrogen formed cages that have different metal ions in them. I found out that phosphorus was the ideal N- dopant for carbon based semiconductors. Things began to make a lot of sense when I made this connection. Since phosphorus is a key atom in life's post translation modifications of proteins, I knew it had to have specific advantages solar effects using its semiconductive properties to generate light emission. That key finding for me, was realizing that red phosphorous can act as an atomic semiconductor. This means this atom has a property most biologic researchers still have not recognized. The conventional wisdom in material sciences was that red phosphorus was really only useful as an insulator. 

A Japanese scientist, Akira Fujishima, performed the earliest work on splitting hydrogen out of water. He discovered that titanium dioxide could produce the gas, findings reported in Nature in 1972. A photocatalyst operates much as chlorophyll or hemoglobin do in a plant. They absorb energy from light and causing a chemical reaction in water to charge separate it and liberate energy in the form of hydrogen and free electrons. _**This process of photocatalysis is simply a form of artificial photosynthesis.**_ This is when I had my eureka moment. All human proteins are activated and deactived by phosphatase enzymes. These enzymes are also critical in the light reactions of chlorophyl and hemoglobin. What powers both of these proteins are the phosphorus reactions in the presence of absence of light in the local environment of the cell. In plants it occurs in water of the leaf and in animals it occured in water in blood plasma. This explained why chlorophyl and hemoglobin both are bathed in water in living things.

While modern biology may call the use of phosphorus an "artificial photosynthesis" the evidence of how phosphatases work in cells says otherwise. It appears phosphrous is used to turn light energy in our blood plasma into something to organism atoms in cells to allow life to manifest by ordering the processes in cells.

**THE CIRCADIAN LINK**

How did this photochemistry change from plants to animals? Cells have gained the ability to harness the power of phosphorus in all our proteins on an evolutionary basis to make our peripheral clock genes operate properly on a realtive basis with our SCN in the eye. When they don't work in unison we get disorder and this results in human diseases in that organ where the energy deficit occurs. This leads to mitochondria that become faulty, due to higher heteroplasmy rises. This is why phosphylation is found everywhere one looks in high energy metabolic pathways in a cell. 

In fact, it is the reason it is used in clock mechanisms to fine tune coupling and timing inside a cell. Most of the known clock proteins are phosphoproteins (G-proteins) and phosphorylation events play a key role in generating circadian rhythms. AMP-activated protein kinase (AMPK) constitutes an interesting example of interconnection between phosphorylation events of clock components and metabolism.

**EMISSIVITY AND PHOSPHORUS LINK** 

The character of a patient's tissues and cells is the key to understanding how light drives the process properly and how a spectral density deficiency causes illness. The emissive character of our tissues (blood and skin) is expressed by researchers by a term called “spectral emissivity”.  The blood cells have a large amount of phosphorus containing proteins in them. Objects with a higher emissivity radiate MORE energy than objects with lower emissivity. In other words, when our tissues and cell have a higher net negative charge due the presence of electrons they seem to be more energized by sunlight and grounding. We lose these effects when we lose this net negative charge. This means the tissues and cells around our skin and blood re-emit much higher radiation, and it is this secondary radiation, in the IR range that energizes the blood plasma, RBC's and WBC's and platelets to keep us well.

 This means that electrical plasma of the sun can easily simulate a red shift in water, tissues and our cells. This makes sense because our 4th and 5th cytochromes are photoactivated to work better with red light frequencies. This "emissivity mechanism" is why glutamate is so dangerous when humans bury the sun or insulate their feet from the Earth. It turns out the amino acid glutamic acid becomes highly charged when its side chains are altered by electric charges to form glutamate. This is why glutamate is considered an excitatory neurotransmitter in humans. Many researchers and people falsely blame its presence for many diseases, but this is short sighted. It turns out what is pathologic is when it is the secondary re-emission of light from water, cells and our tissues are altered that is the real cause of these diseases. Stressed cells release too much ELF-UV and this is the pathologic step in the process.

Because glutamate is highly charged protein, it draws secondary IR light emissions toward itself because of its moving charges. _**In this way, glutamate is like a light switch on cell membranes in all eukaryotes.**_  This means it can turn on and turn off optical stimulation solely related to the light frequencies and density that another adjacent cell emits. If a cell emits too much light, like cells do under duress, this causes too much excitation in the tissue.  It is not the presence of glutamate that is the problem as some (Russel Blaylock) have postulated, instead, it is the excessive light released by stressed cells that is the key to the etiology of the pathology. This is why glutamate exerts its effects in mammals by binding to and activating cell surface receptors. Recall that all cells liberate ELF-UV light. [Mitochondrial degradation of glutamate](http://www.cell.com/trends/endocrinology-metabolism/abstract/S1043-2760\(15\)00248-9) also contributes to insulin release when glutamate dehydrogenase is allosterically activated by solar light.  This is why high levels of glutamate and insulin can also be linked to many disease etiologies in humans because it is a sign that mitochondria energy production has to offset the energy losses from the sun or magnetic flux. If mitochondrial function is not up to this task the system undergoes energy failure. This is where we see the development of metabolic syndrome.

**LET US REVIEW THIS AGAIN**

A low quantum yield environment = leptin resistance = a modern world that uses blue light and nnEMF 24/7 = global low vitamin D3 levels = blue light increases insulin resistance in environments = low electrons and too many protons = electron density in tissues decreases = cells no longer connected electrically = tissues lose their polarization antenna function = the footprint is lower DHA concentrations in tissues = lowers probabilities of excitons and solitons in cells = lowers the EZ size in cell water = dehydration = higher positive charges (protons) in proteins making them less hydrophilic = low intracellular pH = low redox potential = cell and mitochondrial swelling (cyto c release) = lowered magnetic and electric fields in mitochondria = ATPase spinning slows = lowered ATP levels = a lot of carbs and protein electrons on ECT = altered serotonin, melatonin, and dopamine levels in the frontal lobes = second messenger calcium system altered = neurotransmitter release altered due to altered calcium signaling = altered seed germination due to alter calcium flows in seeds = Why Monsanto now has carte blanche in the USA/Germany = calcium controls voltage gated channels, NMDA, and glutamate excitotoxicity = glutamamte is a light LED optical switch for neurons = low DC electric current in plant and animals = low tissue DHA cycling in cell membranes = altered perceptions of reality = depression/anxiety = chronically lowered DHA in the brain and retina = altered melatonin cycles = destroyed sleep = lowered DC electric current = lowered regeneration potential in cells = small sized EZ in cell water = raised % heteroplasmy in mitochondria in neuroectoderm derivatives = neurodegeneration explodes = breast, prostate, and brain tumors rates explode = ADHD/autism/SIBO explodes. **So, Michelle this is how this process can affect your child's gut in a spectrum disorder like autism.** "

**SUMMARY**

When you do not connect to the Earth because of rubber soled shoes lose charge and this is disruptive to your mitochondrial function in some way. The levels of disruption all depends upon your grounding and solar light mismatch and % heteroplasmy rate at present moment. The key is if you cannot fat burn you need most protein and fat intake to keep TCA cycling low. It drives inflammation higher. When mitochondria are damaged for any physiologic or environmental reason they cannot utilized beta oxidation to burn fat so they have to revert to the older evolutionary pathways in the TCA cycle. This older pathway is not energy efficient. This older pathway is OK for simple organism like Bacteria and Archea but it is not good for chronic use in complex eukaryotic cells. If you rely on the TCA cycle for too long it will stimulate cell growth to try to amplify new mitochondria by mitophagy to try to offset the energy deficit. The reason for this is that simple life ability to make energy is limited by the geometry of their cell membranes. So they have to lean heavy on the TCA cycle to make up the energy deficit. Grounding can help lower this energy deficit. When you have no ability to fat burn you become more bacteria like in energy generation because our mitochondria reverts to its ancient bacterial past. This is why the Warburg metabolism occurs and why inflammation manifests. This amount of energy does not allow for FULL CELL function and this is why their disease phenotype manifest because the change in the mitochondria forces epigenetic changes in the nuclear genome to help offset the energy loss.

The depletion of ATP in cells causes them to lose their cytoskeleton architecture very quickly and red light frequencies from the sun can restore this without the need for any dietary changes because of its direct quantum effect of cytochrome c oxidase and the ATPase to re-establish ATP levels. Close to 50% of the light that falls to us from the sun is in the red frequencies and this explains why cytochrome 4 and the ATPase are tuned to these specific light frequencies. Cytochrome c is the 4th cytochrome and it is a heme protein! When ATP levels drop cells mitochondria can no longer function properly to act to eliminate bad power plants via apoptosis rapidly. 

It is not that hard to see when you understand Dr. Doug Wallace's work. This is why patients with high % heteroplasmy crave carbohydrates and seem to be addicted to blue light emitting devices while being rarely connected to the sun or Earth via their activities. Many of these things link to children with autism and their phenotypical behaviors too. Parents need forbid these things to occur in their child's local environment because it deepens the "energy deficit" for these kids to crawl out of. the longer the deficit remains the worse the spectrum of disease will be. This implies that spectrum diseases are on a light spectrum of treatment. These two environmental ACTIONS act in unison to keep their gut microbiome simplified (why autism and gut issues are linked) and allow for chronic rapid TCA cycling to make energy from carbohydrates. Excessive carbohydrate intake keep the microbiome simplified to lower the amount of SCFA being made for the brain. This causes some serious issues for disease generation in the gut and brain. The problem is the longer they stay in this cycle the deeper the mitochondrial defects get the worse their mitochondria get in these tissues. This is why an altered spectral density of light can lead to so many other diseases, like T2D and autoimmunity as more mitochondria are mowed down with time. Fixing neolithic disease is a mitochondrial Rx to regain fat burning, nothing else and nothing more. Blood glutamate and glucose are always higher in these people because glutamate and glucose are part of the metabolic pathways being overtaxed because no energy is being absorbed from the sun and earth via our blood plasma. We should expect that their is an excessive activation of the TCA cycle. This is not the cause of the illness but a symptom of the deficiency of solar light and magnetic flux to turn off mitochondrial pathways properly. The proof can be found in studies that have shown that increased oxygen consumption and N-acetylglutamate and urea synthesis are coupled to agmatine-induced stimulation of mitochondrial fatty acid oxidation.

**IMPLICATIONS:** So if you cannot use beta oxidation it means glutamate and glucose will rise in the blood plasma. This explains many disease processes because it is the common pathway seen in altered mitochondrial disease as laid out by Dr. Doug Wallace's 40 years of work in mitochondrial medicine.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 15, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-you-should-strive-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

As we grow older, and hence wiser, we slowly realize that wearing a $300 or a $30.00 watch - - they both tell the same time. Whether we carry a $300 or a $30.00 wallet/handbag - - the amount of money inside is the same. Whether we drink a bottle of $300 or $10 wine - - the hangover is the same. Whether the house we live in is 300 or 3000 sq. ft. - - loneliness is the same.

You will realize, your true inner happiness does not come from the material things of this world.

Therefore, I hope you realize, when you have mates, buddies and old friends, brothers and sisters, who you chat with, laugh with, talk with, have sung songs with, talk about north-south-east-west or heaven and earth - - That is true happiness!!

**A FEW UNDENIABLE FACTS OF LIFE:**

1\. Don't educate your children to be rich. Educate them to be Happy. So when they grow up they will know the value of things not the price.

2: Best awarded words: "Eat nature as your food. This is your species medicine. Otherwise you have to eat man's medicines because of false beliefs we've cultivated that will bring health

3: Those who love you will never leave you because even if there are 100 reasons to give up he or she will find one reason to hold on.

4: There is a big difference between a human being and being human. Only a few really understand it.

5\. You are loved when you are born into nature. You energy will be loved when you die out of nature. In between, you have to manage your energy wisely to gain time in this moment!

6: If you just want to walk fast through life, walk alone! But if you want to walk far, walk with people who get the essence of this post together!

7: FIND YOUR OWN DOCTORS: mine are simple.  

**BEST HEALERS I KNOW:**

1\. Sunlight

2\. water sans fluoride

3\. Earth/magnetism/grounding/Cold Thermogenesis

4\. Seafood because of DHA

5\. Self confidence in your choices to begin

6.Family & family

These healers all may vary their importance at times, but maintain them in all stages of life and enjoy a healthy life.

The older we get, the fewer things seem worth waiting in line for. This includes people. Sometime they need to be added and subtracted as well based upon how much energy they add and subtract from your life equation.
