-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fsmall-bio-hack-light-high-latitude-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 16, 2016

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fsmall-bio-hack-light-high-latitude-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Most people think that we get no UVB light above Jackson, MS latitude in the winter in the Northern Hemisphere. Is that really true? Take a look at Scott's citizen science project. He is one of my members who _smartly_ left Seattle and relocated to Bend, Oregon. He did a December 2016 bio-hack designed to open your eyes to the small amounts of UVB light present to help your wellness program built in to your eyes anatomy. **Bio-hacks allow us to gather facts about our physiology within our present environment in order to get ourselves thinking properly to get us directionally accurate in asking the correct question about things.** 

Sun harvesting, even in the winter's snow, is very much a part of my Epi-paleo Rx. We should live in the morning sunlight and harvest it. Sleep in the dark. Heal in the red. Repeat. **Nature doesn't sit down with you and start a discussion.........you need to remember how you were made to exist within her frame work and if you do not, disease is the result! Simple.**

CAN A LITTLE HELP A LOT?

Can a "very little bit of UVB frequency" matter a lot even at a high latitude in deep snow? If that light is impacting a "living non linear system" the answer is a resounding yes. Why? I have a few pictures below that prove the effect is massive. Also remember that UVB light undergoes a massive albedo effect so just standing on the snow under the clouds is decidedly an Epi-paleo Rx behavior of my members. **Can you get UV in the AM when it is real cloudy? What did the video above teach you?**

**Most of the UV light in winter above Jackson, MS is UV-A light in this instance. Neuropsin in the eye and skin work with UV-A. Those are the same frequencies in black lights used for parties. Clouds absorb a lot of UV radiation, reducing ground-level UV intensity but some always gets through. Clear skies allow virtually 100% of UV to pass through, scattered clouds transmit 89%, broken clouds transmit 73%, and overcast skies transmit 31%. Scott showed you even in a dreary Oregan winter day some gets through.**

And that little bit goes a long way in the retina and brain, says this picture:

So this picture shows you a small amount of UVB light is all the retina needs to create wellness in the frontal lobes and the SCN which controls all growth and metabolism programs in HUMANS.

This picture is not a cartoon. It is how your eye looks in axial section and how it works with UV light from the sun. **Your human photopic eyes mean your biology is not designed around scotopic eating of food or light. Simple quantum rule says Mother Nature's mitochondrial design.**

Today's thought to ponder: The left's political narrative is : "We have turned the earth into a giant microwave oven, no surprise the Earth is getting warmer."  

Then the report of the reality: It's not getting warmer, it's actually getting colder.  [http://www.forbes.com/sites/peterfe...-alarmists-the-earth-is-cooling/#656884621281](http://www.forbes.com/sites/peterferrara/2012/05/31/sorry-global-warming-alarmists-the-earth-is-cooling/#656884621281)

So let me ask you how we can have these two issues at once in our reality? Is one true and the other false or might all be true for a different reason? Think about how a microwave oven really works and ask yourself, "does the food get as hot as the air around the food you're zapping in a microwave or does the effect mainly happen to the food?"  

Now consider the situation on the surface of the Earth today: It sits within its cocoon of gases and the people live on the surface in a 24/7 ionosphere that is fileld with RF/microwave light communications photons all around us. We also cannot see these light frequencies because our eye was never evolved to see them. When your global economy is based upon technology and communiation and your stock market is built of technology giants might we need to cool the planet to offset our ability to use light to remain globally connected? Could modern humans in power be using geo-engineering to cool the Earth by blocking UV and IR light because they know the RF/microwaves heat up the ionsophere around Earth? Now consider, where would effects of this experiment be found?  Think about food in a microwave oven again.

Climate concerns itself with the gases around Earth and the food. The food is like living things on Earth. And all living things live within the surface of Earth within that sphere of gases, no? And the things within the sphere of gases also live on the surface have cavities in their body plans don't they?  

Would you be concerned that these cavities conditions and the conditions of the climate within that sphere might be affected by the microwaves in ways few others do? Could they be raising the temperatures inside the bodies of people because of the physics of RF/microwaves effects on cavities and water? In particular their organs like the eye, brain, the heart, and the liver would begin to sense a rising temperature just like your morning muffin does with the air spaces and water in the dough? Might our modern devices be raising the temperature of the ionsophere around the planet in some way we never see? Might some groups of powerful people know this? Might climate deniers be the cover for geo-engineering to cool the planet?

The narrative being pushed today by the media and governments is not as it seems. When you understand physics and the bio-physics of cells you begin to have an idea of what really is going on in the world around us. What seems obvious is not always true. Why? Light has many non linear functions that our counterintuitive to our common sense. The essence of a non- linear system is that a small stimulus of light can have massive amplification effect on thing it effects. The flip side of this concept is, if you block this small stimulus the effect can also be amplified on the suface of the planet. Seed growth and humans health come to mind. Might this be why Monsanto and Bayer have been given carte blanche by modern governments to alters the things where foods come?

SUMMARY:

Orthodoxy = radicalism + time. Sometimes it's better to walk alone than with a crowd going in the wrong direction. **The trick is to identify and remember your beliefs or assumptions whenever a new idea comes to your awareness is really a message fromnature that you should be building upon this new data. Your “scientific house of beliefs” should be plumb with the foundations things are built upon.**

UV and IR light and cold are a medical solution to a medical problem. Cold water immersion at 14°C increased metabolic rate by 350%, norepinephrine by 530% & dopamine by 250%. Wow!!! [HYPERLINK](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/10751106/)

Enjoy your Friday in December and ponder what you just learned before you think you know what you really do not understand well.

If you abide by your educational ignorance for a long enough time you hope you’ll stumble into wisdom. This small success makes you less fearful to ask the big questions about things at the boundary or circumference of our knowledge. This is how progress really leaps forward and improves the heft of our intellect. People who ask the big questions usually become innovators of new ideas. Rarely will you find them spending time worrying about their critics or skeptics in the temperate latitudes between the two spaces called good and average, where most people spend 99% of their lives. We must become more comfortable with probability and uncertainty and realizing the boundary of our knowledge and the wall of our ignorance is an easy way to do it. With nature and life it is a given that there's always the risk that we’re suffering because there are unknown unknowns. Don’t fear that……..chase them. 

**If you say don’t have time to do things correctly, what makes you think you’ll have time to do it over? Nature usually does not give do overs, so why don’t you make it a focus to stop cutting corners of Nature’s rules? Maybe then, you’re health struggles will stop?**

**CITES**

http://www.hcplive.com/medical-news/could-ultraviolet-light-treat-multiple-sclerosis

### Jack Kruse

What have I learned so far about my own mitochondria from ten years of bio-hacks?

I've learned that low carb high fat food guru's do not understand obesity and it is because they do not understand mitochondrial bio-physics.

Look at the picture below.

This picture above is a dagger in the heart of the LCHF narrative and those who follow "Taubesian/Teicholz view" of obesity. What do the LCHF guru's and journalist miss in their reviews of the data? The environment of modern humans is now filled with 24/7 exposure to blue light and nnEMF and it lacks natural solar exposure. These physical light effects create the EXACT SAME SITUATION using man made light AS EXCESSIVE CARBOHYDRATES DO EATEN OUT OF SEASON. Blue light and nnEMF raise blood sugar without any food being eaten. Given this situation modenr humans force upon our mitochondria, no human being itself should be considered impaired innately, instead there are environmental short comings that cause the impairment result in neolithic diseases like obesity today. This factor is completely hidden from food guru's because they have no light controls in any nutitional studies. The effect, however was seen in Weston A. Price's observations because he observed people eating under sunlight exposure in nature and not indoors. Metabolic ward studies should be thrown out because of no light controls. Thus, it is incumbent on the on the clinician to recommend treatment of the environment their patient is in. People react to an inferior environment, way before their genome is altered in most human diseases. That is what the science of epigenetics and ubiquitin rates are telegraphing us, but the modern paradigm and LCHF journalists are not listening to reason because they ignore what the sun does to mitochondrial physiology. You must.

Why are summer time high fat diets not a great thing to do chronically across all seasons? High fat diets force mitochondria to react differently than they would under strong solar stimuli. Solar light changes the free radicial signaling at cytochrome 1 to activate mitophagy and autophagy programs. When you force nutritional ketosis upon mitochondria, you wind up with long term sensecent mitochondrial that raise your heteroplasmy rates and lower energy flux. Nothing can change in a cell under this light situation. This raises an important link of solar light and mitochondrial haplotypes. Consider, for a moment what would happen if you are designed to be loosely coupled by your maternally inherited mtDNA haplotype? Food guru's and journalists never consider this aspect of signaling in humans.

If you have a Northern Europe haplotype, as I do, it means you are "loosely coupled". Loosely coupled means that there is quantized deficit between how the mitochondria and nucleus in a cell work to work at higher latitudes where solar light is not present to excess. This haplotype means grounding is critical to mitochondrial function and proper nuclear expression (epigenetics). People who are loosely coupled are set up to have higher levels of mitochondrial heteroplasmy rates by nature's design. Why? As heteroplasmy rate increases when one is grounded in a lowered solar environment (outside of tropics) this allows mitochondria to uncouple oxidative phosphorylation to create heat. Loosely coupled mitochondria burn carbohydrates and fats to make heat from the mitochondria. This heat affects the water layers adjacent to the respiratory cytochromes to shrink the respiratory proteins to improve electron and proton tunneling. The key to understanding tunneling efficiency is understanding that the closer these subatomic particels are the more energy a mitochondria creates. Food guru's forget water shrinks when it is heated and expands when its cold. Anyone who has put water in a freezer will know that the water container's explodes as water freezes. Heteroplasmy rates increase due to exogenous man made light because the respiratory proteins become pull further apart because nnEMF dehydrates a cell. This also occurs when someone is physically disconnected from Earth (rubber shoes or astronauts). When these situations occur, disease phenotypes morph dramatically because of a loss of mitochondria energy flow via electron chain transport due to lowered tunneling of electrons and protons within and around mitochondria.

But what if your mitochondria functionally are bad because of your poor light and grounding choices? This = high % heteroplasmy rate in tissues = poor energy flow in those tissues = obesity and with more time = organ failure! When tissue energy drops in that case you must first optimize the things a mitochondria uses to recycle via mitophagy. Heteroplasmy implies altered O2 levels called pseudohypoxia and UV light assimilation via our surfaces to maintain NAD+ levels at cytochrome 1 with the NADH couple. David Sinclair has published extensvely on this effect in Decemeber of 2013. What does that mean if you have a high percentage of heteroplasmy in your mitochondria? = real bad mito-nuclear coaptation = poor redox potential. Food cannot fix this problem alone and that offends modern beliefs. What does it mean for good mito-nuclear coaptation? It means you should be able to burn fat well while needing very little food to sustain yourself, because you are assimilating energy in the form of solar photons and electrons from the sun and the magnetic flux of the Earth by grounding simultaneously. If the connection is chronically maintained, it will naturally activate autophagy and apoptosis to improve energy flow in organs. _**This is the food guru and alternative practitioner failure, in my opinion. You need to be aware of their failed thinking.**_ [HYPERLINK](http://www.sciencedirect.com/…/article/pii/S0891584916310863)

High carbohydrate foods only grow in high UV environments, so electrons from carbohydrates should carry higher photonic power because the sun excites these electrons. Life's hydrated proteins are designed to capture the energy of an excited electron in our mitochondria and the various water compartments in our cells before the electron falls back to the ground state from this "excited state". So how does this translate to solution based biochemistry perspective? High carbohydrate diets provide more energy by fermentation because of these highly powered electrons by sunlight, without causing humans actually needing to use their badly functioning mitochondria. Fermentation is used extensively by bacteria. Moreover, bacteria tend to like this situation. Where are these bacteria in your body?

**WHAT THE FOOD GURU's FORGOT:**

MITOCHONDRIA WERE ONCE BACTERIA and these abilities remain in human mitochondria. BE AWARE THAT PLANTS ALSO STOLE THEIR ENGINE OF POWER GENERATION FROM A BACTERIA TOO! A CHLOROPLAST WAS ONCE A BACKERIA TOO! This means every surface where you assimilate light, bacteria are also present. This is true in the gut, skin, and respiratory tracts of humans. How do these bacteria and your mitochondria work in unison with the nucleus in a cell?

Here is clue: those with mitochondrial diseases who have "adopted, used, and advocated" long term ketogenic diets have been known to collapse into coma because their damaged mitochondria can't provide enough energy needed for a conscious state. When you have a high percentage of heteroplasmy in tissues, ketosis can actually hurt you in chronic blue lit environments filled with nnEMF!!!!! FOOD GURU's NEVER TELL YOU THIS (pic below). They often write books filled with half truth's because their stories are built around a false narrative of food macronutritents. They never take into account how mitochondria and water work in a cell together physically. This is not well appreciated by the other Low Carb High Fat food guru's either. (PM me for a list) In my opinion, there is a deep danger in what they are chronically recommending to ALL people with high heteroplasmy in their tissues. So, if you are young person who lives in the UK and have a brain glioma, this blog post was written for you. I don't care if you like me for saying this, because I'd rather be your wake up call!

Mitochondria actually cannot function physiologically to generate energy for us neurologically without help from fermentation when heteroplasmy is elevated. Environmentally broken paleo advocates (due to blue light nnEMF) use and advocate carbohydrates for that reason. Environmentally broken LCHF folks (pic above) just get sicker as time evolves because they cannot replace mitochondria and/or DHA fast enough to offset their environment toxicity because they allow their mitochondria to face unfettered nnEMF. Using twitter, FB, and snap chat to keep their empire running is actually the cause of their problem but that reality is tough to swallow when your living is tied to it. Many of you following this "brand of nonsense" need to be aware of exactly what signals you are sending to your mitochondria if you persist doing this for decades.

Could we hack heteroplasmy? Yep. I spent the entire last 24 months doing just that. It began in 2014 right before I gave a speech at a bio-hacking event in Pasadena. I told people at that event exactly what I was up too and that did not sit too well with the event organizers. Keeping ones distance from an ignorant man, in my view, is equivalent to making company with a wise man.

In 2017, I will attempt to reverse many of those bio-hacks to learn more. Some might begin to advocate temporary nicotine use when they are completely stalled and spinning their wheels. Why might nicotine work in this hack? What other co-factors would make nicotine work even better? Methylene blue (MB) could be a huge boost. Methylene blue is a MAO inhibitor and you learned about them in Time 6 and 7 blogs at my website www.jackkruse.com. MB can affect all the levels of endogenous biogenic amines, like melatonin, dopamine, serotonin, and histamine. So if you are taking drugs that interact with this axis you need to be careful in constructing your hacks. MB can therefore can interact with selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) and MAO inhibitors to cause serious serotonin toxicity or serotonin syndrome.

What about nicotine? Can we use this in a hack too? Nicotine works best with good oxygen consumption by mitochondria and strong natural full spectrum sunlight. When oxygen consumption is poor we call this pseudohypoxia. What else happens to mitochondria when this occurs? Mitochondria make less water as a by-product of oxidative phosphylations as this picture below shows. CO2 is also lowered in these cases. CO2 is used to cool surfaces as we breathe and in and out, in our sinuses, and in our gut lining. This leads to pH changes which affect the exclusion zone of water at these areas and affect the microbiome at both surfaces adversely. It also effects the amount of nitric oxide (NO) at these sites. I mentioned this NO effect in a recent podcast I did with [Ben Greenfield on redox potential](http://bengreenfieldfitness.com/2016/11/measuring-redox-potential-with-mri/) and MRI's. My part of this podcast begins about an hour in if you listen to it.

Most nicotine users smoke so they never see the optimized effect of nicotine because of co-morbid lung disease from smoking. We can use a nicotrol inhaler, gum or patches to offset that risk. Most people who are sick rarely go out in the sun because their doctors advocate avoiding the sun these days, or their modern beliefs keep them ignorant of basic physics of the physiologic benefits of smart solar exposure. Going out in the sun makes us feel well because it causes release of beta endorphin, _**alpha-MSH**_, nitric oxide from our skin naturally. These effects never occur in metbolic ward studies and in modern nutrition studies done in indoor labs under blue light. Runners get a high from this solar effect but the high is ONLY PRESENT in natural light. MAN MADE LIGHT provides no such benefit. So how might nicotine work when O2 and UV light are optimized in your own bio-hacks? Nicotine slightly increases glucose levels to give a small superoxide pulse that is absent with 24/7 ketosis. This pulse makes the perfect amount of singlet state ROS/superoxide to be the stimulus to lower the percent of heteroplasmy in our tissues to improve energy flux from mitochondria to become the proper stimulus for mitophagy and autophagy. This is how we improve organ failure in those tissues.

_**This small stimulus does two key things:**_

1\. The small stimulus from these free radicals stimulates regeneration programs in us.

2\. It stimulates mitophagy to recycle heteroplasmic poor functioning mitochondria to make new mitochondria and dig yourself out of the hole called mitochondria senescence. This is where most people find themselve after acute weight gain and weight loss. You have to do more to regain the power of your mitochondria that just using food as a tool. You need sunlight and a connection to Earth to maximize the effect.

You cannot get the superoxide pulse without the O2 or the UV exposure to make the proper free radicals to signal it. Did you know that DHA (fish oil in seafood) in your RBC's in skin arterioles 7-10 AM allows you to absorb even more UV light? This is possible because UVA light stimulates nitric oxide that vasodilators the skin arterioles to come closer to the surface so that UV light can be absorbed by porphyrins and hemoglobin in RBC's. The pic below shows the two way we get sunlight wirelessly from the sun. The pic on the left shows how sunlight stimulates a massive array of photochemicals like NO. This vasodilates the vessels below the skin to make them come to the surface to be irradiated by the sun's rays. Leaves move closer to the sun rays as well. The behavior is identical but uses different mechanisms to do it quantum mechanically. This is important because UVB light cannot penetrate our skin well by design.

When human skin is exposed to sunlight, ultraviolet (UV) radiation stimulates the production and release of a hormone from your skin and from your anterior pituitary called alpha MSH. Alpha melanocyte stimulating hormone, or α-MSH, is cleaved from POMC which is released by sunlight stimulus traveling from the retina to the hypothalamus and pituitary via the central retinal pathways. This is why I put the eye pic next to the skin pic above. You can thank Dr. Alexander Wunsch for these awesome pictures. Alpha-MSH is also secreted by keratinocytes, a specific type of skin cell, then binds to receptors on the surface of another type of cell, called a melanocyte. When α-MSH binds to the receptors, which are known as MC1R, it activates the melanocytes to produce the brown/black pigment melanin. Melanin is found in the skin and in he RPE of the retina. Melanin absorbs all frequencies of UV light voraciously as the picture below shows.

When this step is blocked in the skin or RPE, heteroplasmy rates in skin cells and the retina are altered. This affects optical signaling in your mitochondria in both tissues. Your dermatologists and eye doctors never seem to get this message. If heteroplasmy rates rise in these tissues, this is where skin and eye cancers really come from. The real problem is in the eye. When it occurs it ruins the curcadian timing mechanism in the central retinal pathways that linked the retina to the SCN and the leptin receptors in the hypothalamus to cause 80% of the disease's humans get today. Today's medical meme is that UV light causes cancer, but if one looks back on where that meme came from, it came from data on man made UV light sources and not the sun. **People forget a UV light bulb and the sun are not equivalent sources because the spectral density of both sources are radically different.** The narrative persists today that sunlight causes cancer in all cases. In my view, this is very suspect belief because of these findings with [how MSH works within the skin](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1182105/), eye, and hypothalamus. It would appear a lack of sunlight might be as big a trigger to cancer cases if these mechanism are inhibited or blocked. Today, we do that in many ways: clothing, sunscreen, and sunglasses being the top offenders. There is clearly a phsyiologic dose of sun. I am not advocated staying out all day in the sun. But, the modern meme of burying the sun entirely is a bad message for wellness.

Society and health sciences have become so synthetic and artificial that the truth now offends people. The social construction of reality within the scientific group which determines, not only what counts as a "scientific" problem or solution, but also what is accepted by the scientific community as a "fact." _In a fake world, built around blue light and RF/microwave communications, this presents a huge problem for patients of modern medicine._

The melanin created by alpha MSH is subsequently transferred back the keratinocytes, increasing the level of melanin within the epidermis, the outer layer of the skin. Humans vary >100-fold in their sensitivity to the harmful effects of ultraviolet radiation. The main determinants of sensitivity are melanin pigmentation and less-well-characterized differences in skin inflammation and repair processes. Pigmentation has a high heritability, but susceptibility to cancers of the skin, a key marker of sun sensitivity, is less heritable _**because it is related to mitochondrial heteroplasmy rates!**_ Melanin is a photoprotective to skin cells (protecting them from light/UV radiation) and the greater its density in the epidermis/RPE, the more protection is given to the layers of cells below them. It does this by absorbing, reflecting and refracting light (particularly UV radiation) and preventing it from penetrating to the nucleus of keratinocytes or to lower levels of the skin.

Melanin is also believed to play a key role in scavenging free radicals, which can injure skin cells and the Retinal Pigementum Epithelium (RPE) of the eye, and in facilitating UV induced apoptosis (programmed cell death), which removes the damaged cells.

You can see from the picture above you do not need a large UV stimulus to get this regenerative effect in the eye. The reason for this is because UV light has the ability to work in non linear fashion due to its intensity and high kinetic energy of its wavelengths. This makes it very powerful to alter signaling in our cells. If we do anything to remove this small stimulus it has massive implications based upon how the eye was created to work.

Thus, melanin’s protective role goes beyond providing a physical barrier to sunlight in our skin or in our eyes. If this quantum process is obstructed, cancer is more likely, not less likely. Why is this a big deal in a mitochondrial bio hack? What happens on the surface, lowers the redox potentials of cells below and it also affects the blood plasma's ability to carry the solar message to the rest of our mitochondria in cells. It has been suggested that the 2-3 fold melanin levels seen in darker skin types, compared to lighter skin types, convey up to 100-fold difference in sensitivity to ultraviolet radiation due to these protective functions (see Rees 2004).

In addition to activating melanin, α-MSH is known to have several other roles in the skin, although the exact mechanisms are not fully understood. Recent research has shown that α-MSH enhances the repair of DNA damage (such as cyclobutane pyrimidine dimers, or CPDs) – a process known as nucleotide excision repair, or NER – and reduces the generation of free radicals (particularly hydrogen peroxide) following UV radiation impact. Both of these factors reduce the overall damage caused by UV radiation; thus reducing the risk factors for certain skin cancers. One mitigating factor, however, is that α-MSH must be able to bind to the MC1R to achieve this function. [HYPERLINK](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1182105/)

The two pictures above show you that UV light is capable of getting to the retina as well. UV-B light penetrates only 0.1 mm as the pic of the skin below shows. The body has _**some amazing wireless technology**_ built into it to work with sunlight. Sun light controls the console of life, which is our mitochondria. _If you want to find the secrets of the life think in terms of energy, frequency, and oscillation of the different frequencies in sunlight._ All frequencies, waves, and information require a source of propagation of the light. In biology, solar exposure is that source. Its energy and information come to our cells wirelessly.

The picture below shows you two of life's main light antenna's. One is chlorophyll ad the other hemoglobin. When you look at their structure you can see how similar they appear. We have proteins in our cells that are light antenna's to receive this energy and information. My hacks have shown me just how interesting the matter in our cells responds to specific frequency input from the sun. Therefore the matter in our cells is responding to the source of light in wireless fashion. Your doctor calls this science biochemistry, but it is really a solid state semiconductive circuit we come built with to work with the sun and magnetic field.

UVA penetrates 1-3 mm so to get UV light RBC's have to move toward the surface and they do because of the solar/light nitric oxide couple mechanism.

This is also why sun light is a stimulus that makes plants move toward light too. In the skin our blood vessels move toward sunlight too because of nitric oxide (NO) release. **Hemoglobin’s peak** light absorption peaks at **280 mm (UV) 420nm (blue) 540nm and 580nm** and has sharp cutoff at **600 nm (Orange red).**

Sunlight is unpolarized, but when it hits our cells it becomes polarized. This small change in our skin is what releases nitric oxide from our cells to perform a quantum ballet with sunlight. **Sunlight shifts blood into the skin by changing polarization in tissues that allow for dermal pooling due to molecular resonance changes in endothelial NO Synthetase and NO.** More than 50% of your blood volume can change your skin surface when specific solar spectral density is present. This can lower your blood pressure by altering renin function via the blood, while raising your sulfated vitamin D3 and lowering your LDL cholesterol level and raising your HDL levels. Sunlight changes the anatomical structure of the skin by changing the optics of surfaces. It becomes a sensory stimulus for the interoceptive system to induce biochemical substrates via " a photosynthetic like mechanism". We see this in plants and now we have proof it alters animal physiology because of measured changes in the mitochondria's ATPase by using red light and water in animals. The Q-cycle frequency shift light to make red light to change cytochrome physiologic functions. Sunlight increases sulfated Vitamin D3, histamine, and sulfhydryl groups, while lowering ( via photolysis) adrenalin, steroids, testosterone, estrogen, thyroid hormone, DNA and RNA. 

**Sunlight induces biochemical reactions via photolysis and it induces coordinated endocrine adaptation effects in the eye and the skin surfaces. It affects the sympathetic and parasympathetic systems at the same time. Solar light is the stimulus for the circadian timing mechanism of the body clock via the central retinal pathways in the eye. All these effects are built into the electronics of your proteins under solar power and magnetic flux of Earth.** 

Proteins in solution absorb ultraviolet light with absorbance maxima at 280 and 200 nm. Amino acids with aromatic rings are the primary reason for the absorbance peak at 280 nm. Peptide bonds are primarily responsible for the peak at 200 nm and since this frequency of light cannot penetrate the ozone layer it fortifies strong carbon-nitrogen bonding in sunlight. Secondary, tertiary, and quaternary protein folding and structure all affect absorbance of specific frequencies of light, therefore factors such as pH, ionic strength, etc. can alter the absorbance spectrum of the proteins to affect the water around the proteins to change its density. It also seems that water is capable of changing the absorbance of proteins making it the ideal molecular mirror for light interactions optically. This is a part of the photo-electric effect completely ignored by modern biology. 

If solar UV light is so horrible for biology and cells ask your skin and eye doctors to explain how DNA has been shown in thousands of experiments to have a spectrum of fluorescence peak at 350 nm? That peak is 100% in the UV range, FYI. Then ask them why the two proteins that are tightly associated with DNA, called histones and chromatin, both have been found by experiment to delay this UV light release in DNA in all normal cells? You might see why I am now a skeptic of modern beliefs I was taught in medical school.

When the sun hits the skin, the vasodilation brings the hemoglobin closer to the sun to absorb its light. If you're anemic, hypoxic, or diabetic, your fighting an uphill battle because your % of heteroplasmy is getting larger than it was when you were younger. Diseases can manifest just from the slow increase of heteroplasmy in mitochondria that occurs way below your ability to perceive it. But we can reverse the process if we get the natural details correct of how light works with chemicals in our body. Few people have that discipline in their bio-hacks. This is why the food guru's ideas are all half truths. Some do have this discipline. That is why I'm sharing what I have learned these past two years because I think it is very important as we head into 2017. I no longer want people with only one oar of their wellness boat in the water, because if you only use that one oar you will continue to go in endless circles.

All people as they age, they acquire this same kind of mito-nuclear coaptation dysfunction because as redox lowers, mitochondria uncouple and get more leaky and heteroplasmy increases. Every decade it rises 10% naturally and this is why we age. The major difference in aging compared to disease generation is that an aging person has a slower timescale of the development of heteroplasmy compared to those who develop illnesses at a younger age.

Tissues with high energy demands, that are chronically light stressed suffer from a lower quantum yield. The skin is our largest organ. The eye is where our eye clock is buried to run all our circadian programs. They both have huge energy demands. So when you cover these organs with some modern nonsense, this is akin to placing a tarp over a tree, which acts to lower photosynthetic yields. In a plant does it grow as well? Do we see abnormal growth? In plants the answer is obvious. In us, it's not because humans see well but they are poor observers. In us, this occurs in tissues such as the brain and the heart, contain a large number of mitochondria. This is aging occurs in these tissues and it is why they kills us most. All of these tissues rely on wireless UV light exposure from the sun to drive RPE function of the eye clock and central retinal pathways that control all circadian regulators. These very active mitochondria-dense organs are more susceptible to reduction of the aerobic metabolism, as a result. Internal and external stressors, including cytokine up-regulation, pose a higher metabolic demand on the mitochondria to produce the necessary energy to maintain homeostasis. When the _allostatic load_ becomes extreme due to any form of extreme light stress (chronic blue RF/microwaves), the energy demands increase exponentially, taxing the mitochondria and resulting in mitochondrial dysfunction (heteroplasmy), which creates inefficient energy production and leads to energy deficit. This is how organ fails as we age. What we do not realize is that our modern gadgets can age us when we are young. That is where we are today. This in turn creates a disparity between very high metabolic energy demands in inflammatory states and the actual energy deficit resulting from mitochondrial dysfunction.

The % of heteroplasmy is slower in natural aging, but faster in neolithic diseases in today's modern humans 20-40 years old. Their modern environment, that is blue lit and filled with RF/microwaves 24/7, is driving the increased heteroplasmy rates in tissues. This is why human longevity is now on the decline. I'd also expect perimenopause and menopause to occur faster and and the symptoms be far worse. I think death rates will reverse and climb and be a canary in the coal mine. When is it going to happen? It already has. This is the first time in decades this trend has reversed. I expect it to continue this way going forward based upon modern human beliefs and behaviors. I hope you have a great 2017 and think about this post before you make any New Year's resolutions based upon food. Become a "mitochondriac" instead. [HYPERLINK](http://www.usatoday.com/story/news/nation/2016/12/08/has-us-life-expectancy-maxed-out-first-decline-since-1993/95134818/)

# Article: Obesity is an inflammatory brain disease
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/obesity-inflammatory-brain-disease-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-01-17T03:08:25.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 900
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fobesity-inflammatory-brain-disease-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jan 17, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fobesity-inflammatory-brain-disease-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

There IS a virus that causes obesity. Adenovirus-36 (Adv36) is a human “common cold” virus that is easily caught from an infected person who is coughing or sneezing, or if they do not wash their hands after having a bowel movement. 

The most important prokaryote (bacteria) to human life is not your gut microbiome, but the one inside of your cells called a mitochondria. Why? For 4 billion years bacteria function has been modified by viruses to conform and adapt to environmental change on planet earth. Viral DNA make up the largest majority of human DNA (98%). Our nuclear DNA takes all its direction from the shape size and speed of quantum tunneling that occurs on a mitochondria's respiratory proteins. Viruses play an integral role in shuffling the deck of our nuclear genes when the environment changes but those changes only occur after they are "sensed" by our mitochondria and by things made of bacteria like you microbiome. People forget that that mtDNA haplotype and the microbiome are predominantly inherited from mom by design. Viruses are dominators of particular niche's on Earth that bacteria frequent. They control local zip codes and as such become the change agent of the environment. This is why researchers in India (Nikhal Dhurander) and the USA have linked viral infections to changes in microbiome diversity and obesity and many other diseases. Obesity is not rocket science, it is more more complicated because its core condition is quantum mechanical and non linear because of its link to quanta of light. How light effects bacteria, mitochondria, and eukaryotic cell is not equivalent and this is why there are many modes to fatness. 

It is also why when energy production is lost in our mitochondria we also get fat. Losses of energy determine size, shape, and evolution of cells. We often lose site of these directions. Evolutionary biology has generally failed to consider the contribution of viruses to to evolutionary history largely because they do not understand the quantum interplay of how the mitochondria and nuclear genome work. This relationship can best be described as a quantum casino where the dealer only deals with probabilities. The cards are quantum tunneling of protons and electrons through our anisotropic structure. What holds the casino all together is sunlight and EZ water. That maintains the sea within us to gives us the life our choices in the environment we allow to happen. Our mitochondrial respiratory proteins change as our decisions about how we live and where we chose to live changes. 

Viral genomes can permanently colonize their hosts genomes, adding data and information to host lineages. Some will cause massive alterations to the host and its effect will be reflected in the ancestors genomes. Most viruses are co-apatative and adaptive to a new environment and now that we are in the ra of genomics, we have definitive proof that viral imprints and remnants are present all over the human genome.. they are present in all domains of life and the past evidence of viral colonization is the baseline of life and not an exception. All living things are built to be susceptible to viral elements for a quantum reason. The smallest things in life change proteins in us to lead to changes of our resident bacteria, our mitochondria. When this happens non linear changes occurs. Non linear change is when the smallest things in nature can lead to massive changes. What is so small that could change this?

YOUR LIFE IS RULED BY THE ELECTRON

Life is not a thing as most perceive it to be; it’s an iterative process. While most origin of life theories have focused on the molecules of information transfer, evidence is accumulating that life is primarily rooted in mechanisms for energy capture and storage. Life is clever. It has figured out how to transform electrons out of everything we eat and keep them under control in cells until we need their energy. Electrons must flow in order for energy to be gained elsewhere. Electrons can be stored in tissues in semiconductors, but when they are stored they cannot act like a wave. They only have particle like behavior. When the electron leaves the tissue its energy has to be thermalized to affect energy flows elsewhere in a cell. The electron, as it leaves our atoms, crystallizes out of Schrödinger’s mist like a genie emerging from his bottle; if that does not shock you, realize that the genie is capable of emitting light it carries when it wants to end the excitement in its life.

The problem with these "discoveries" is that they become systematized and programmed by paradigms.

The public needs to realize that "systems and programs" are for computers.... and they are not designed for living things like us. We are designed to be wirelessly connected to the sun and fully connected to Earth to work properly in nature to remain well.

We simply need to connect with nature and feel the zeitgebers and Mother Nature will take care of us. The Rx is simple but our brain's wants desires and nedds of society and culture obscure that perspective. 

Change without change is the reason behind this effect. This becomes the casino dealer inside of every cell for environmental changes that occur on this paleo blue dot.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jan 17, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Froundup-your-wine-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Some of my friends ask me: if Glyphosate is in say.... your wine.... is it safe to consume?

I sold all my California wine in 2014-16 because every bottle I tested in my mito-hacks including the organic stuff had glyphosate present in the wine. I started to drink my good French wine instead. See the picture above. I got this idea when I heard that most honey in the USA also has it present. That is when the citizen scientist in me got into action. Believe nothing until you test it yourself. Purple Angel is a great choice because it grows at over 12,000 foot altitude in strong UV light with no Monsanto pestacide included. This gives it a lot of resveratrol that vibrates at 312nm to lower your mTOR pathway. It can help you remain healthy in 2017!!!

What is the problem fundamentally with glyphosate? It replaces glycine in proteins and collagen is the number one protein in your body (71% by volume) that uses glycine. Glycine is unique among amino acids in that it is achiral. Chiral amino acids offer the ability of cells to polarize sunlight. Glycine is used in places in cells where we do not want to use the Faraday effect of polarization so this changes optical signaling. Glycine can fit into hydrophilic or hydrophobic environments, due to its minimal side chain that contains only one hydrogen atom. Glyphosate is chemically unusual and very different than glycine because of its "achiral ability" because glyphosate's nitrogen atoms chelate to surrounding metal atoms in proteins ruining their stereochemistry and tertiary and quaternary structure. When this pestacide's nitrogen binds to the copper ions in collagen then all versions of collagen's sterochemistry becomes fixed atomically even when sunlight hits it and the protein loses its ability to become piezoelectric and release light or a DC electric signal to water shells around collagen. This stimulates ubiquitin marking and lead to many problems in tissues. This bonding also affects the protein side chains electric fields and this ruins the Faraday effect in tissues and tissues loose their optic-magnetic coupling of growth and metabolism pathways. The amino acid glycine does not chelate metal atoms and this allows sunlight to be trapped in cells and have that light polarized in a specific way that cells use for signaling. Any food with glyphosate residue cause the colllagen in those cells not to transfer energy to the EZ and it loses its ability to remain piezoelectric. For those who do not know collagen is the major N-type semiconductor in humans, so when glyphosate replaces glycine all proteins where this replacement occurs under go dielectric collapse. This means energy leaves drop in these tissues because of the effect on the exclusion zone of water which is dielectric crystal. This causes you to have a lower redox evne if you were naked on the equator with no clothing on. This is something most food guru's whiff on. Too much physics for them to explain.

# Article: ARTIFICIAL BLUE LIGHT DEHYDRATES YOUR CELLS
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/artificial-blue-light-dehydrates-your-cells-jack-kruse/>
**Published:** 2017-01-18T20:28:14.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 591
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fartificial-blue-light-dehydrates-your-cells-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jan 18, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fartificial-blue-light-dehydrates-your-cells-jack-kruse%2F&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Wondering why your New Year diet and brand new gym membership aren't working as you thought they would? Are you fed up that the latest diet not working for you? 

Take a look at this video. A short 2 minute video on how artificial lighting is screwing the pooch for all of us. 

I hope everyone realizes that artificial light has only been around on our planet since 1893. Blue light right now at the 28th latitude only has 13% blue light. On June 21st it has 26% blue light. This means the sun varies its blue light seasonally. Sunlight has 42% IR-A light year round. This IR-A light is the natural antidote to blue light from the sun.  

Just so we are clear, chronic artificial blue light is equivalent to chronic excessive carbohydrates because both contain excessive photoelectric energies. This means that chronic fake blue light from technology and TV dehydrate your mitochondria just as a piece of steak is dehydrated in a microwave. Why? Blue light slows electron chain flow on your inner mitochondrial membrane and this lowers the spinning of the ATPase. Most people forget that glucose metabolism and beta oxidation of fats makes CO2 and water as a side effect in mitochondria. This is is a sign of healthy mitochondria. If your mitochondria are inefficient for any reason, by definition this means they have a higher heteroplasmy rate, you become dehydrated by definition as the picture below shows. Sun energy uses water and CO2 to make glucose by photosynthesis in a chloroplast. Mitochondria reverse the photosynthesitic process in animals. So when you are constipated, dry skin, eyes, or vagina, no saliva, hung over, have headaches, are prone to concussions, these are all signs of poor mitochondrial function in many disease states.

Mitochondria reverse what chloroplasts do in plant photosynthesis. This alters mitochondrial functioning after a period of time because our mitochondria evolved expecting a seasonal variation of energies in both photons and electrons.

Many people now get headaches when they go to gym for New year's resolutions and work out under modenr man made blue light that saves electric power. It saves energy because it subtracts out the purple and red healing portions of the visible spectrum. Most of those gym lights are made of fluorescent or LED lights. Do you think that light is the same as working out under the sun? So you might be wondering what exactly does artificial light do to a human brain? Look at the picture below carefully: Is you gym environment the same as the park at noon?

In a word, it destroys its ability to properly signal environmental signs to our cellular machinery. It affects this molecular machinery pretty quickly by fast forwarding our circadian chemical clocks to light. These clocks are all biologically tied to the cell cycle that controls growth. How does this happen? The first clinical sign is a change in a hormone’s secretion in the brain. AM blue light in sun turns on the flow of hormones. AM sunlight and the lack of blue light at dusk dramatically alters the surge of the pituitary secretion of prolactin and dopamine. This happens after 4 hours of darkness or after a really big release of oxytocin. Chronic fake blue light ruins this system and cause your hormone panels to be lowered tremdously after any chronic blue light exposure. This is why modern lights cause myopia, retinal diseases, and infertility in young people.

# Myalgic Encephalomyelitis: (ME) for short

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmyalgic-encephalomyelitis-me-short-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jan 19, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmyalgic-encephalomyelitis-me-short-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Before you read anything below watch the video to completion:

Question asked of me: Jack can you explain what is going on with ME/CFS? Fibromyalgia? I saw in the comments that you say its a tough fix but its possible. I'm sure it has to do with water chemistry and dysfunction of the autonomic nervous system and the gut. Because it causes such temperature dysregulation, is Cold Thermogenesis and sunlight something still to consider to regenerate the DC current and restore the flow of electrons? Thanks Jack!

Nature had the foresight to make decisions in hindsight using sunlight. Why? Because light has more non linear properties than anything in the cosmos. It should be both fascinating and humbling to scientists that the massless, timeless, and phenomenal manifestation of light are the irrefutable requirement for all physical structure on Earth and in the cosmos. It turns out these abilities are why ME is mis-understood. The only constant in a universe of relentless flux because of how light works in us.

The problem with these "discoveries" is that they become systematized and programmed by paradigms. The public needs to realize that "systems and programs" are for computers.... and they are not designed for living things like us. We are designed to be wirelessly connected to the sun and fully connected to Earth to work properly in nature to remain well. 

We simply need to connect with nature and feel the zeitgebers..........and Mother Nature will take care of us.

My answer: If you read the last few blogs in my OSF series of blogs at www.jackkruse.com you will see the reason a system goes south is because there is not enough electrons present within the cell membranes or the mitochondria of that system. Fibromyalgia is a loss of electrons in the muscles and collagen fascia of the entire body that dehydrates us (mitochondria) and lowers our piezoelectric current. This lowers the dielectric constant in cell water and it is become magnified when things like blue light and nnEMF dehydrate our cells. It usually starts in one cell type but it can spread fast if your base line redox is low. It also will alter proton recycling in the mitochondrial matrix. So if you are "young healthy 20 something" who works out in a blue lit gym, or a blue lit Harvard lab, you by definition, have a [lowered redox](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ejackkruse%2Ecom%2Fredox-rx%2F&urlhash=T_T_&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) potential. You also live at a high latitude and in a city with high population density when you were struck down. You likely have no idea how those two things dehydrate cells to set the stage for ME/FM/CFS. Dehydration of cells due to mitochondrial damage is the key initial starting point for ME. It can lead to a local loss in physiologic control over certain muscles too, just by a lack of red light from the skin above the muscles. The goal is not to avoid foods, molds, or toxins, with this issue, but to fix the structure of the tissues and gut by replacing the electrons lost to build the capacitor in cell water back. This turns your energy engine, the mitochondria, back on to protect your cells once again. 

Let me be clear: It is not about the offending agent (virus/fever/mold) or the organ affected: It is about the loss of electrons, loss of proton recycling, in the mitochondria of muscles and collagen that causes a loss of organizational structure and function in those cells. That is why muscles and fascia don't work properly in these patients to distribute energy throughout the body through the cytoarchitecture. You must renovated melanin, via alpha MSH, in your interior and exterior before you employ Cold therapy or grounding or you can "short circuit" your recovery.

You mentioned the gut and EM: The gut microbiota is not static over the span of the day in Boston. It is diurnal just like we are. People forget the gut is a giant tube from our mouth to our anus open to the environment and it feels electrical changes from your local environment. 

The sun’s light is a cathode ray. When it hits the Earth in daytime, the Earth acts as an anode in this cosmologic circuit and this allows for more evaporation of water on the planet's surface and inside the lumen of our gut to create more protons both in the air and inside the gut during daylight. The protons from Earth dissipate in the atmosphere and give it a more positive charge and in our gut the pH drops for mechanical food breakdown. Simultaneously the evaporation effect in the air will liberate more electrons from Earth that our tensegrity system (collagen/water) in our feet can harvest when they are connected to the Earth. As more protons flow into the lumen this makes the tissues of the gut more negative and hydrophillic and this increase the amount of the coherent domains in the water of cells of our tissues to increase their physiologic capabilities.

We collect and harvest these free electrons from the surface of the Earth and use their energy by storing them or use to do physiologic work. Either mechanism lowers the number of work mitochondria needs to do because it lowers the resistance of our inner mitochondrial membrane. This reduces the electrical resistance of mitochondria and this helps stimulate autophagy and not apoptosis in our tissues. It also changes the microbiome because mitochondria used to be bacteria.

During the daytime, the electric field of Earth is higher than it is at night when light is absent. Magnetic fields, however, are higher at night, and this is likely why sleep is linked to a loss of the DC electric current in diurnal animals. The change in the DC electric current changes the activity of bacteria in our microbiome as well.  What happens when you work in a lab with a 60 Hz power grid 24/7? What about the fluorescents and LED lights in that lab plugged into that power grid? Do you think these have no link to ME? Think again. This article may be hard for those with ME to understand so ask a family member or friend to read it for you slowly.

Perhaps these circadian cycle changes should have been expected in the microbiome by us physicians, but most scientists did not expect it either. Almost all life on Earth has an endogenous circadian rhythmicity that is genetically determined, but that also responds to changes in light and dark. I bet your job in that lab ruined that rhythm. For human beings, reliable changes occur between day and night in hunger, body temperature, sleep propensity, hormone production, activity level, metabolic rate, and more. AM sunlight resets the periodicity of the SCN clock in your eye that controls this process. Nothing replaces sunlight in this respect.

These findings on daily rhythmicity in the gut microbiota have really piqued my interest because disruption of our circadian rhythmicity by electric light during day or night has been my research passion for several decades. As scientists investigate the links between our internal daily patterns, electric light, and health, new information about the rhythmicity of our microbiome might hold clues about how this all works together.

The crucial question is whether the microbes simply respond to their host human’s circadian rhythm or whether they can actually alter our rhythm somehow. Does the electric power grid inside ruin your electric circuit in cells connected to your mitochondria? Yep.

So let's consider an analogy for you to consider: if you cannot deliver a DC electric current in your house does anything plugged into your wall sockets work when you try? If you never change this problem will your light bulbs go from dim to bright? Is it the muscle pain or fatigue you have right now as important as finding the real cause or the real problem today around us all? Do you know why people are "so acoustically sensitive" in ME? Ammon's horn in the cochlea relays in the human brain use more energy than any other sense we have!!!! So if you have a lowered redox for any reason doesn't it stand to reason that your brain will react like a dimmed light bulb in a bad power grid? Isn't your brain sitting in a sea of CSF in your skull? Might this be why sounds drive EM patients nuts when their MRIs are fine? Why didn't you find these answers? Might it be that you relied on experts in "Ivory towers like Harvard?"  

You know muscles and fascia are designed to work optimally in us on planet Earth. So what is the real issue ruining their ability to work like a thixotropic gel? Is it the lack of electrons that leads to the poor functioning of this power grid system? Yes, this is the big issue and it is why physicians struggle to diagnose ME. We have no good tests to follow the story of electrons from the environment to our mitochondria. Muscles and collagen deliver electrons well when the system is organized as it is designed. What captures electrons best in cell membranes and mitochondria? DHA is the only thing in evolutionary history that can do it well. It buries the energy from electrons it captures in collagen and water. When the light energy is stored it is not thermalized. When it is released it is thermalized and we can still capture it in cell water. What happens if you happen to be dehydrated due to blue light and nnEMF exposure? You get worse!!!!! What should you consider doing? You need to limit blue light exposure and nnEMF exposure while adding DHA to your system to improve the cell membranes to capture energy you now are losing back to your environment. Capturing and assimilating excited electrons by sunlight over your broken network is the job of DHA, collagen, and cell water. It is why physicians cannot diagnose the problem.

It will take 2-3 yrs to repair the damage once it occurs system-wide. Oxidation causes you to lose DHA and [become dehydrated](http://www.linkedin.com/pulse/artificial-blue-light-dehydrates-your-cells-jack-kruse?published=t&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in this situation. Not eating enough DHA, and drinking enough water to replace it causes the system to slowly decline in function. If your environment chronically dehydrates you below your perception level you and your doctors will be stumped. Do you really think that a lab at Harvard is a place that is healthy for mitochondria? What did that Ivy school education teach you?  

The loss of electrons and/or movement of protons is what causes these cells and their mitochondria to underperform.

What are muscles made of? Water and collagen. You need to Read Gerald Pollack's other book about muscle and his latest book about water. So how does DHA muscle water all join to make sense of this? Sunlight. Sunlight can acts like a particle or a wave in our tissues depending on weather the electron is bound to a semiconductor or if it is freed and able to delocalize. You know Boston does not get many photons 8 months out of the year. Do you think that might be part of your problem? Photons or electrons increase the cross-links of collagen to allow you to transmit electrons over its carbon backbone. The more cross-links you have the better your cell's piezoelectric ability the higher your DC electric current the better you regenerate tissues. It actually improves the cell water in your body as well to improve your muscle function and [cognition](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Enih%2Egov%2Fnews-events%2Fnews-releases%2Fneurons-absorb-release-water-when-firing-nih-study-suggests&urlhash=7FL5&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). People with ME live in a chronic low-energy state because they cannot regenerate their tissues due to a chronic lack of sun and poor water production from their mitochondrial matrix. When you have FM/EM you have very few cross-links in collagen by definition. Collagen growth in humans is stimulated by the red frequencies in sunlight via our fibroblasts.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

How The Rhythm And Blues Of Your Biology Rule Your Life

Bas Snippert 8 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-rhythm-blues-your-biology-rule-life-bas-snippert-stress-expert)

Energy, Vibration, and Cellular Metabolism: Bridging…

Luos Foundation 9 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/energy-vibration-cellular-metabolism-bridging-science-spirit-x4ipe)
