# Article: EARTHING = GROUNDING.  WHY DO IT?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/earthing-grounding-why-do-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-05-06T11:48:10.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 966
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# EARTHING = GROUNDING. WHY DO IT?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fearthing-grounding-why-do-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 6, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fearthing-grounding-why-do-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

This is from my good friend Ricky Sharpe in the UK: Lesson on Grounding

Now this is where it gets really strange, you get kicked out of all the keto groups, ire unbelievable and all your friends and family disown you, your neighbours call the police and your kids stop calling you dad

As we discussed in lesson #2 light increases EZ, so let's take that as read

But one of the key points was that the charge in the water is split, so you now have positive and negative

Why are we coming back to this?

Well the aim of the whole game is still cellular respiration and Oxygen carries a negative charge.

Why is a negative charge important to cellular respiration?

Well in the crudest possible way...

There are little electro magnetic engines in our cells that are responsible for 'attracting' all that we need from our blood.

How do they do that?

Magnetism (this sounds too simple)

So these little engines, like any other electro magnetic engine spin.

these ones spin at 100hz and create a cellular charge that attracts everything the cell needs... food, oxygen etc. Without this we are dead

The negative charges (as opposed to positive charges) are attracted to these little engines. So the more we eat food that has a negative charge or live in a way that create a negative charge the better.

I will explain more about negatively charged food later on, when it becomes relevant.

Anyway as a bit of back ground info for those that are not sciencey: 

Protons carry a positive charge

Electrons carry a negative charge

Acidic food carries protons/positive

Alkaline food carries electrons/negative

You might have already joined some dots: good for you

I could go through a list of foods that would be either side of this equation, but we can do that later when we get to food

For now I want to focus on what carries different charges besides the food we eat

Grounding is basically when someone has their bare feet on the ground... just like the green and yellow wires in your plug socket, as any half decent electrician will tell you. Connected to the Earth

The Earth carries a negative charge - and I want to help you steal this charge for you selves

As an electric organism, (which we all are) when you are 'connected' to the earth, you will pick up electrons, or negative charges from the Earth itself

Now imagine the only thing that is and has ever been wrong with eating cheesecake, is that it's full of positively charges called protons, these cause insulin resistance which causes diabetes.

This isn't the only thing that causes diabetes and cancer, but remember I'm trying to break it down into bite size segments you can understand

Now I'm offering sanctuary and an 'all you can eat, guilt free buffet' providing you remove your shoes and charge your body with negatively charged electrons for free, and direct from the Earth...

well there must be a catch right?

You've been on every diet under the sun, every gym membership known to man, killed your self I January every year since you can remember ...

surely it can't be this simple

The only thing is... it is this simple, and you just haven't been Paying attention to your body, the sun, the moon or the seasons

Time for a change

The downside in all his simplicity; there are many things out there which will make you put on weight that carry a positive charge just as quick 

you need to know what they are, or face the consequences

Wow... can you imagine your doctor getting this far in the 5 minutes he gives you after a 3 week wait??!?

Let's continue ... what carries a positive charge, tell me tell me

So now you've charged your body with the stuff that's paramagnetic (attracted) to the cellular engines (which are called mitochondria) and now you're like a well oiled machine, firing off all cylinders, or more to the point, in lay terms: you can eat and drink what you want without putting on weight, getting fat or getting cancer as quickly as you would have done before ...

you've just massively staked the odds in your favour and become the house rather than the mug punter. Good for you

I'm going to leave you with one problem to solve yourself... you have to suffer people thinking you're strange for not wearing shoes

A couple of options

1\. wear leather soles (conductive to electricity)

2\. Wear cotton socks (conductive to electricity)

3\. Don't give a Fock (like me)

If I saw 10 people, 100 people or even everyone put their heads in ovens, I wouldn't follow because I know better... if you need to be a follower in order to feel comfortable then come and stand 2 steps behind me... but I'd prefer it if you were your own person and did things by account of your own beliefs

Grounding... as massive freebie in a world full of disadvantages

Take off your shoes and get a hall pass ... thereismore coning, but not many easier that this

Personal perspective; I fasted for 4 days in Feb 2016 and spent day 2 and 3 in bed with flu like syptoms.

After a year of grounding every single day, I posted a video of me doing 2 sets of 50 burpees on day 3

Try and do one set of burpees right now, and while you're coming up with a list of excuses, remember I don't train either

All I do is train my cellular respiration the EZ route

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fpilots-story-lesson-you-nnemf-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 6, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fpilots-story-lesson-you-nnemf-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Sarah, one of my members relayed this story to me while she was on holiday. I think it contains an important lesson for you all. The sun is designed to power human mitochondria wirelessly, while we are connected to Earth. We are not adapted or built to handle how man has usurped the electromagnetic spectrum for communication and lighting uses on Earth or in a plane. And when we use the electromagnetic spectrum outside the safety net of the visible solar spectrum (260nm-700nm) in a plane we accelerate the risks for our mitochondria. The plane becomes a microwave oven for those traveling in it.

Health is resilience to adversity built by mitochondrial strength powered by circadian cycles.

The sun is the spark of all human illumination. It ignites the flame of every human furnace. We can overcome whatever is going on around us if we believe in the light that lives within us. It's hard to be the brightest light in this dim world that man has created with the misuse of the electromagnetic spectrum of light. We need to focus on the sun. We need that message to resonate loudly from our minds, ideas, and words to help light the wisdom lacking in others. Shine brightly, so you can help those who have not found their pathway through the darkness. The sun never dulls her shine for anyone else so why should you dim it for anyone?

The truth is rarely pure and never simple with respect the quantum aspects of nature. Nature builds her wisdom this way. Her facts do not cease to exist because they are ignored by the modern paradigm. Man claims his "facts exist" in his research and then scientists and clinicians try to explain them to people who rely on their advice. The wisdom of nature is that there are no facts, only interpretations that she shows us daily that people call reality. Here is a modern example happening daily in our skies with pilots.

Sarah said, "Hey Jack, thought you might find this interesting. I ditched my Cathay Pacific flight to Bali after finding out it had 'WiFry' on the plane and purchased a ticket with Korean Airways instead (no wifi). Arriving in Bali I met a Canadian female, First officer for........Cathay Pacific! She has been a pilot for 10 years and moved to a 30th-floor apartment in the center of Hong Kong with her promotion and became really sick. 7 months later (still off on sick leave) and nothing from the doctors she has turned to functional medicine and decided to fly to Bali for a recovery break as it was closer than flying home to Canada. And no surprise to us....... she felt good in Bali! She told me that her colleagues are experiencing the same thing as she and Cathay have clamped down hard on sick leave thinking that staff is taking advantage of the sick leave rules. They really are not seeing the connections at all to 4G and 5G at 35,000 feet inside a metal tube, or if they are, they are keeping quiet about what the company knows about the health of their people. She is now talking to her colleagues about this and also planning to move once her lease is up in a few months. She is also considering other areas she can move to within the business for the future and hopefully, if and when she makes the changes and recovers, she'll make some waves within the industry! Gotta love synchronicity and its ripple effects!!"

Sarah is one of my starfish and she is pictured above! There is a lesson here for you all. I wonder how long it will take before pilot associations and the crew associations will ask me to come to speak to them about the industry's risks for these workers.

"For the great majority of mankind are satisfied with appearances, as though they were realities, and are often more influenced by the things that seem than by those that are." -----Niccolò Machiavelli

I've told many people it is only a matter of time before people who fly often see immediate sickness as we head to 4 G and 5G. I expected more psychotic breaks, more bizarre actions on planes, more heart attacks, more pulmonary embolus, and deep vein thrombosis to afflict these people as we add electromagnetic radiation to the inside of a metal plane and electrify all the seats with devices. People think these are progressive industry standards but they will destroy mitochondrial heteroplasmy as people fly. People who do this often are basically the "steak inside another version of a microwave oven". Massive dehydration and increased ubiquitination can occur in a few short hours and if that flight is over the poles, the flight will be most dangerous because the lack of protection from the Earth's magnetosphere allows massive amounts of cosmic radiation to bombard the plane as it flies over the North Pole.

Random thoughts tied to this story Sarah is bringing to us:

1\. Go up in a big airplane. Go high enough, and you will see the radiation rainbow interference ring around the shadow of the airplane on the clouds below.

2\. Given the blatant deceit regarding the biologically harmful effects of antenna towers, cell phones, and WiFi radiation, one can only wonder what is going on with all of the other forms of radiation.

3\. USA schools know that computer electromagnetic interference (EMI) emissions, WiFi, and campus cell towers are radiation poisoning the children and the government is determined to keep on doing it by decree and laws ignorant of the biological effects of nnEMF.

4\. I think irradiating pilots with WiFi radio frequency (RF) radiation is really going to hit about five years from now as 'Delayed Radiation Complications' show up. I am expecting to see increased airplane accidents & crashes. I expect that we see more fliers lose their mind on planes to exhibit bizarre behavior, die of heart attacks, and PE's starting in 2020 onward.

5\. The electrical grounding system is the largest radio frequency (RF) radiation antenna system ever constructed in the history of mankind. You might want to move away from the grounding rods in your house when 5G shows up.

6\. Abnormal radiation exposure and mitochondrial oxygen starvation teach us that reality is just a perception that is derived from our immediate environmental conditions.

7\. Man-made blue light radiation does discriminate. If you are sedentary and eating processed foods and thoroughly addicted to technology then you will be more affected than a person that exercises and eats fresh organic food under sunlight.

8\. As a sea-level adapted human, I am more fearful about the radiation levels on top of high altitude mountains, mile-high modern cities, and inside jet aircraft than from nuclear reactors and bombs, as that is where I get the most radiation exposure in the modern world.

9\. There is a lot of willful incompetence in the wireless radio frequency (RF) radiation industry that is in the process of coming to light for many obedient idiots who are blind to these connections to the electromagnetic spectrum.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Clear Thinking when Clouds Gather

Jonathan Buck 4 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/clear-thinking-when-clouds-gather-jonathan-buck)

[

Southwest Flight 1120 Restored My Faith in Humanity

Curtis Ray Hill, MAT, M.Ed. 5 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/southwest-flight-1120-restored-my-faith-humanity-curtis-hill)

[

Darkfield "Flight" review

Matthew Lambourn 9 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/darkfield-flight-review-matthew-lambourn-b04zc)

10\. To understand how growth, aging, and death works, you must understand the radiation environment ruins mitochondria.

The last ten minutes of this video below explain where most modern human diseases come from. We must focus on energy and not anatomy in medicine. And energy is all about the study of physics. And biology is all about the physics of organisms. Sadly medicine is ignorant of this fact. Mitochondrial variation modulates the acute stress response to build disease phenotypes that are afflicting mankind. These diseases are created are linked to the uncoupling of the linkages between your mitochondrial haplotypes, SNP, and the environment you are choosing to live in right now. Until you change that environment the disease will remain because of how cells are organized by their physics. 

Have you ever seen the dawn evolve? Have you spent time watching a sunrise that you observe obsessively? Watch the sunrise degree by degree and allow it to ignite you. It is the most amazing moment of any day that most miss. You'll soon find out more than anything this time of the day can spur you to act on a new path. I spend every morning allowing my retina to be fingerprinted by these informing rays. Today is a new day. Don't let your past interfere with your present! Let today be the day you stop being a victim of circumstances and start taking action toward your destiny. That is the message in the new light that falls from our star every day that the human brain and body are supposed to get every day. If you are not getting it..........ask yourself why not, and change that circumstance quickly.

^^^^That is the circle of life you should be connected to.......................and not the internet. Flying in a plane is one of the most dehydrating things a modern human does.

MY TAKE HOME:

Nature searches for optical nuance built into the sun's rays and not electronic novelty in man's devices and electric power. Every time you plug into the AC power grid nnEMF is released from the outlet. That does not happen in DC power grids. Nature prefers DC circuits. Sunlight operates a DC circuit between the sun and Earth. The universe is, by definition, a single entity and in principle whose components interact. Our job is to figure out the threads of connection. The picture below shows the spheres of the Earth between the sun and the Earth. This creates the standing waves of the Schumann resonance. A sphere within a sphere can also create electrical tension. Schumann taught us this in 1951, and yet we still don't realize he was teaching us about how energy can or can't flow from outside in or inside out. The Earth is a sphere surrounded by the ionosphere. That tension becomes a pulse wave for things that lives within both spheres. When the tension changes in the environment the pattern of signaling changes between things in a cell. Blue light and non-EMF change the tension in that sphere to increase ubiquitination rates on all things that live upon its tectonic plates.

SURFACES are the key to understanding nature and energy transfers. Here are some a plane flies through. Light changes as it passes each one in ways few realize.

How "heavy or powerful" is falling light through our atmosphere and why do I ask? The shorter the wavelength the more powerful or heavy it is. This has huge implications for tissues where light strikes us.  We miss all that light in a plane that is flying.

Drop a stone from an overpass, and it will accelerate, but shine a laser beam down from that height, and its propagated speed is fixed. Still, Einstein's relativity theory predicts that the light beam will gain energy as it drops, not by speeding up, but by slightly increasing in frequency, which is the same as a tiny shift in color. UV AND IR light both come from the sun and interact with our atmosphere. Here the light is slowed down but powered up because the Earth has a gravity field and it gains power and the frequency is shifted to 290 nm. That is the highest power light that is possible on Earth for the last 4 billion years. This theoretical shift in frequency was too small to detect until 1959 when physicists discovered an extremely precise technique for measuring the frequency of short-wavelength light in gamma rays. Robert Pound and Glen Rebka of Harvard University set up a gamma ray source at the top of a tower in a Harvard physics building and a detector in the basement, 74 feet below. They detected a frequency shift of just a few parts in 10 to the 15th power and verified the so-called "gravitational shift" predicted by Einstein to be within ten percent of the expected value. Now stop for a minute and think about this gravitational shift issue with the light that is slowed but still gains energy when it hits our atmosphere.

The atmosphere is still 7 miles tall. That slowed light can then further be shifted to gain power according to Einstein's fundamental laws until it hits the next things in its path. Will it ever hit you in that plane? What parts will and what parts will miss you completely? Do you think this is inconsequential? Was it inconsequential for our pilot of Cathway Pacific above? What is the next thing the sun should hit? Leaves, skin, and eyes. What does this imply after my Ubiquitination 24 blog post on my website? How does this light scatter from there and what does Einstein's idea say might happen? The deep implications in this story are what I teach people at my site. Sarah knows them very well. Do you?

Surface interactions with light dictate the biochemistry below because of life's Jablonski diagram. Look at the picture below CAREFULLY. It contains the key to a healthy life.

What effect is on top? The Redox potential. How do we make that as humans? We destroy it on a plane.

What is on the bottom of the Jablonski diagram? Biochemistry. That means biochemical pathways take their lead from light frequencies that come from above that strike us. Can that happen on a plane? Nope. That means as you fly your mitochondrial battery is constantly being discharged and destroyed. Do you think this is a good thing if you are a pilot, stewardess, or frequent flier? How might the photoelectric effect work in thick or thin skin? How might it work in curved lenses or divergent ones? How is photosynthetic capacity affected by leaf shape and color and the layers of the atmosphere? How is light affected by pigmentation and the color of things it hits like leaves or irises? How about the color of your eyes, how does that work? Become a silver gold or platinum member at [www.jackkruse.com](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fl%2Efacebook%2Ecom%2Fl%2Ephp%3Fu%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww%2Ejackkruse%2Ecom%252F%26h%3DATMz_W-wO3euJGfP4I6BZd8BrepKn5sHoisJSKguSByUy_WToC_ymXixiVXHyHHqnZK7IxEknxghRk8lMD8fEkTxO3e3wgYgyL5mPUfr6GCyblBCFNy_yNaT_URJs-5kc2AJOOK5t5VvMJytSsk25E1ISA&urlhash=SfGw&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) and find out. Sarah did...........are you ready to change your life yet?

CITES:

The book "Going Somewhere" by Dr. Andrew Marino

# Article: WHY LIGHT, AND NOT FOOD IS THE KEY DRIVER OF REVERSING DISEASE.
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/why-light-food-key-driver-reversing-disease-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-05-16T15:44:19.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 972
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-light-food-key-driver-reversing-disease-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 16, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-light-food-key-driver-reversing-disease-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The central message of my blog is that if you don’t understand how light and water dynamically interacts with other componets of the cell, you cannot hope to claim you have a clue of how any cell really works in nature. To make large collections of proteins coherent and coupled you need to link them together electrically. Cells do this photoelectrically and then change the wave to an electromechanical one in water to control circadian cycles.  This idea implies that cells have some "photo-electric tuning" ability built into their protein structure that is stored in DNA. This tuning ability is linked to the visible spectrum of light from the sun. Sunlight hits proteins when the body's surfaces are exposed to sunlight. Proteins all have hydration shells otherwise they cannot work. This is why intracellular dehydration elevated ubiquitin marking in cells. Proteins, once hit by electromagnetic waves of light, re-emit electro-mechanical waves into their hydration shells. All proteins are surrounded by water in the living state. 

The waves are captured in cell water and their energy and information is sent to mitochondria. Sunlight contains deep information about daytime and nighttime contains a lack of information that is also a signal to a cell. Circadian clock genes pay attention to those electro-mechanical wave signals and how they vary. The ordering of water under solar light can actually move a significant amount from a few layers at night time into a few million molecular layers during noon via coherent domains in the exclusion zone in the hydration shells of proteins. This is how porphyrins work in blood plasma.  Water is disordered in the hydration shells when man made light is the incident waves and this leads to a different signaling of mitochondrial ROS/RNS.  

The pushing or pulling on the EZ layers in cell water in the hydration shell immediately transmit the energy and information of the collision to the tensegrity cytoarchitecture of the cell, to the mitochondria, and the nuclear DNA. Since collagen is the most common protein in mammalian cells, this interration between light and water is capable of changing the tension in the EZ of a cell. Moreover, we know anything that can change the tension in a cell is capable of altering the energy flow from mitochondria is capable of altering the epigenetic expression of genes in cells to make proteins in a cell. Proteins are light antenna's. Is this why protein synthesis varies from day to night? Yep. It is a circadian flux.  Is this why artificial light at night causes the diseases we see today? Yes, in my opinion, it is. It is also well supported in the literature. Altered light signaling on proteins changes the flow of calcium in cells. That flow of calcium is critcal to mitochondrial health as the picture above shows.

Twenty-three recent studies have confirmed the pathologic role of increased intracellular Ca2+, nitric oxide, peroxynitrite, following pathologic man made non native EMF exposure. When nnEMF is excessive, increases of ROS are leached from the mitochondrial membranes in the eye, skin, the gut, gut bacteria and lung barriers, the blood brain barrier all become leaky to inflammatory products. Normal physiologic ROS leak in mitochondrial are vital in optimizing ATP synthesis by stimulating mitochondrial biogenesis and mitophagy. When you leak more you become energy inefficient in processing electrons across your inner mitochondrial membrane via quantum tunneling.

In Nick Lane’s book, Power, Sex, Suicide, this view point is supported by the fact that antioxidants lower ROS leak, but also alter mitochondrial DNA copy number and eventual ATP synthesis levels. The antioxidant that does this is melatonin. Melatonin also controls heteroplasmy rate by controlling mtDNA. This native ROS leak in our mitochondria, in effect, signals we have low capacity for energy production in the cytoplasm, relative to the demand cells are calling for, stimulating compensatory mitochondrial biogenesis to meet the stress from the environment field. Remember, excessive man made EMF cause a massive stress response across the brainstem, as Becker, Parker, Wertheimer, and Savitz’s experiments have shown in the literature.

How does nnEMF minimize mitochondrial biogenesis in the brain? By forcing neuronal mitochondria to run its metabolism on glucose through cytochrome 1. I covered this in the EMF 4 blog. When this happens we get excessive mitochondrial leak over time. These things are well documented in the literature already. What people have not done yet, is connect this story to how excessive man made EMF increases this process to further stimulates ROS production in mitochondria, and possible extinguishes it. Supra-physiologic EMF also lowers superoxide generation when oxidizing polyunsaturated fatty acid (PUFA) in the mitochondria.

Remember I told you in my EMF 7 blog at my website that when PUFA’s are ingested under blue light in excess they lead to inflammatory changes that stimulate M1 macrophages. IR-A light from the sun reverses this effect as the video shows in the last 5 minutes.

PUFA, outside of DHA form inflammatory cytokines, and they act as dielectric blockers in cell water lowering the exclusion zone inside the cell membranes that surround the mitochondria. This changes the oscillations in the mitochondria and is the key factor in generating new mitochondria via biogenesis is to properly oxidize fat, and burn it well as a primary fuel source. This ability to burn fat is not a fuel decision it is tied to the geometry in place of the respiratory proteins to offset this field effect that the mitochondria is designed to sense. [Dr. Doug Wallace, PhD](https://www.eurekalert.org/pub_releases/2017-05/chop-cdw051117.php) has set the stage of why the Pentose shunt is important in altered environments. It is the simplest metabolic pathway to evolution built to get this desired effect, assuming the environment is not toxic to nnEMF or blue light.

# Article: TIME TO RETHINK YOUR TRUTH ABOUT THE SUN?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/time-rethink-your-truth-sun-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-05-19T11:38:42.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 2242
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TIME TO RETHINK YOUR TRUTH ABOUT THE SUN?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Ftime-rethink-your-truth-sun-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 19, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Ftime-rethink-your-truth-sun-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The winds of change continue to blow regarding sunlight..........are your sails up to take advantage of the new knowledge to build wisdom in your own cells? Look at this link about the sun: [HYPERLINK](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2017/05/170501102258.htm)

Never let your education limit you from learning new things. Just sayin'.

The world is changing and the clinicians in clinics and hospitals do not realize it. Patients are becoming more educated on the cutting edge of science because they are engaged with the reading new things out of curiosity and net research. Most scientists and clinicians like to deride the internet for the education it provides the curious because they believe it is populated with quacks and bad ideas.

There is no doubt that that is true in some cases, but when you have a blog and website dedicated to real science with cites to published research the truth becomes hard to deny. Believe it or not, some of them still do.

The dominant belief today in our medical paradigm is that UV light causes melanoma and skin cancers. For ten years all the data I personally reviewed led me to the exact opposite point of view. Faced with a paradox you have two choices. Examine the data for yourself and make an informed decision based on this new data. Two, just keep believing what you were taught is correct without questioning it. The paper cited struggles with their own data they collected. At the end of their paper, some of their own statements do not marry with the data they uncovered. Why is that?

Remember what I said above? "Never let your education limit you from learning new things." The authors appear to be shocked that they globally found UV FROM the sun shows no causative effect in melanoma cases. Let me say that again.........ZERO ties to sunlight. Does that statement marry to what you've heard from the skin and eye doctors? Does it marry to your beliefs about the sun? The meme that the sun is so bad for us now has government officials in Australia mandating sunscreen and sunglasses for children as part of the law. This meme that the sun is bad for us is going to hurt many people.

Researchers still do not realize UV light within the sun has other frequencies contained with it naturally that make it a different kind of stimulus for our cells for healing than UV light frequencies separated from other frequencies and that come from an artificial light source. Nowhere on Earth does man's light equal sunlight.

The picture above should make you begin to wonder what our government officials were thinking when they eliminated incandescent bulbs. I don't like to be a "tin foil hat" type guy but why did they ban incandescent light bulbs? Was it to save energy? Might it have been to keep us dumbed down? Lack of sunlight lowers dopamine levels and keeps a lid on curiosity and questioning. UV light from the sun increases dopamine levels in the eye and brain. Folks, this chart below begins to tell a different story that is hard to dispute when you become a light guru and understand mitochondria well.

Most of the data that links the sun to skin cancer comes from studies done indoors using UV light from man-made sources and not the sun. Now we have this GEM of published research performed by a group or respectable scientists who performed a global worldwide analysis of cutaneous malignant melanoma (CMM) below listed in the cites. This should cause everyone to rethink the truth about sun exposure.

They found that over UV-Radiation dose by sex, age group (0–14, 15–29, 30–49, 50–69, 70–85C) and Fitzpatrick skin types I-VI seemed to GLOBALLY play ZERO in the etiology of melanoma. This is cancer that has caused the ridiculous regulations to pop up in Australia regarding sunglasses and sunscreen. These results seemed quite surprising to the researchers and might be to most readers, but it was not to me at all. You have to understand the context when it comes to UVR from the sun.

The data show that increasing UVR solar doses, which represent erythema-weighted doses comprised primarily of UVB (290–315 nm) radiation, DID NOT significantly correlate with increasing CMM incidence for people with any skin type ANYWHERE in the world. That is a quite a statement what we are teaching medical students and the public today.

The world is changing..........when will the skin and eye docs get this message? Might the real cause of melanoma can be found in the picture below?

Many will look at the comic below and laugh and find humor in it. Some of us, however, will see something else more concerning and educational about sunlight. We might see a story of how nature built us, and why we have a massive opiate issue. UV-A has a big surprise function that is buried in this picture below: It increases a protein made in the brain called POMC. From this protein, many other proteins are cleaved by solar light to stimulate many important pathways, like dopamine and melatonin creation in the eye and skin. Another important one is β-endorphin release. Sunlight releases an opiate when we are exposed to the sun. Guess why nature did that? Could it be that she wanted us going in the sunlight often for its healing powers? I think so.

It also implies there may be some benefits to a paradigm to keep you out of the sunlight. Ponder that for a moment.

Let us consider the skin for a moment. Melanin is present in humans skin.

Melanin provides protection of structures in and below the skin against free, UV-induced radicals. Thus, melanin acts as a direct shield from UV and visible light radiation. UV radiation causes a "good light stimulus" to DNA damage in the nuclei of dying keratinocytes that are degenerating on the surface of the skin. This results in activation of p53 gene in the skin, which transcriptionally upregulates the expression of the gene encoding proopiomelanocortin (POMC) mentioned above. Most think solar radiation induces only bad secondary effects but here is an example of a positive regulation. Why do I say this is a positive stimulus? 

The POMC precursor polypeptide is processed into several bioactive products, including α-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH), adrenocorticotropic hormone (ACTH) and β-endorphin.

These all link to important systems. After secretion, α-MSH binds to the melanocortin 1 receptor (MC1R) located on melanocytes and activates melanin production and is tied to system tied to obesity production. Does this mean if we are in the sun often we are likely to lose weight? A picture often says a thousand words.

The leptin-melanocortin system is was behind the construction of my Leptin Rx blog I wrote 12 years ago. This is why a lack of sunlight is linked to obesity because of a lack UV-A and IR-A normally present in the morning sunlight. The anti-inflammatory effects of α-MSH and ACTH may help relieve irritation and local inflammation in UV-exposed skin acting as a calming influence. This situation in the morning increases histidine in the skin. Histidine is an aromatic amino acid that absorbs massive amounts of UV-A light. This lowers erythema production in the skin. So AM sunlight can pretreat your skin to protect it when stronger UVB light becomes present.

It turns out that the combination of UV-A and IR-A solar light humans are designed to get in the AM also pre-treats the skin to lower inflammation. The fact that UV-A light **_induces a small opiate_** response tells us nature is trying to get us to come out into the solar light in the morning. Maybe our work schedule is one of the key things we get wrong in the modern world? Can mood just be altered by sunlight at the right time of the day? Yes. The SCN inputs control mood. [HYPERLINK](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/28140399)

You can see above that sunlight frequencies are different during different times of the day. Why do we think out constantly emitting light bulbs equal the sun's stimulus? Is this wise? Could this lack of light controls in all modern research be the source of so many false beliefs? I think so.

The fact that UV-A and IR-A light in AM sunlight work in unison to create this circumstance says something very deep about sunlight importance. In fact, IR- A light looks to be a way to improve our "solar callus" and offset the risks of extended UV light on the skin that occurs later in the day. Might this be why Australia really has a problem?

IR-A makes up 42% of sunlight. IR-A light is dominant in AM sunlight. IR-A light is a way to induce hybrid tanning for more UV-A assimilation. If UV-A light increases B-endorphin, as mentioned above, it would explain why we feel good and have mood elevation in AM sunlight. Is this why depression and a lack of sunlight are strongly linked in the literature? I think so.

Could this be why people are drawn to opiate drugs with a chronic loss of AM sunlight exposure? Could it be why people with ME/fatigue feel as they do? Could it be the lack of highly penetrating IR-A light into the muscles be where the muscle pain comes from? I think so. 

The beta-endorphin effect is critically absent in cases where no solar exposure to the combo effects of UV-A and IR-A light should occur. This is why mood and pain are critically defective in this condition and in so many modern humans. Could this be why we have an opiate epidemic today in the states? I think so. Today we've built around making sure we chronically miss the sun at these times. When this situation occurs, POMC is not released from the brain as it should be on a circadian basis over decades of modern life. Could this be why opiate addiction is growing exponentially? Is this why ME is growing? Are you seeing a trend develop yet?  

β-endorphin released into the blood during UV exposure and has been shown to reach the brain in sufficient concentrations to induce mood enhancement and relaxation. This is actually published in the literature. Why do act like it is not present anywhere in the literature? Why does most modern medical advice want to bury the sun from human life? Other indirect evidence also that endorphins are released to blood to affect other distant tissues.

This evidence might be the etiology of the opiate problem we have today in humans brought out of the sun and placed in front of TV's, computers, and video games built around modern blue artificial light that destroys the retina and brain over time. It lowers dopamine levels. This means the human tethered to technology needs more food, more opiates, to maintain the same stimulus over time. Are you seeing a trend develop this blog yet?

It has been demonstrated that frequent tanners almost always choose sunbed emitting UV radiation when they are blinded to it. This study is easy to do because the human eye cannot see UV light. We have no photoreceptors for UV or IR light. In another study was shown that the use of the opioid antagonist naltrexone, used for the treatment of opioid dependence in medicine, REDUCED UV preference in tanners and even induced withdrawal symptoms in frequent tanners. That is quite a result don't you think? Why haven't you heard that from the dermatologist?

These tanners were blinded to which beds made UV light, but when they experienced the light on their skin, most of them correctly picked the beds that made UV light and POMC that made beta-endorphins in their body. This tells us that the body is wise to nature's solar rays and needs this stimulus for some reason. It is clear from this data that our cells can tell solar light because it can decipher the information and energy in that combination of waveforms. It is also clear we cannot decipher the codes in the manmade light.

In fact, the data shows chronical and frequent exposure to UV radiation may result in a tanning addiction and in a pattern of behavior similar to other types of substance-related disorder. Why would nature make us have a low-grade addiction to beta-endorphins when UV-A light is present in the morning? Could it be that nature wants us in the sun daily? I think so.

All these things happen from sunlight!!!! It is free and is always present if you allow it to be in your life. Most of you do not allow this. Sunlight is addictive because nature wants our species in it. I believe there is a powerful meme being buried by the modern paradigm. It also means when you are not in the sun daily you'll be more likely to draw to other sources of opiates due to the lack of POMC release. It means you'll need more food too. It also means that mood will be altered by a chronic lack of AM life. That is something that is nothing to laugh at.............Chase the AM sun folks. It appears nature built us this way. We all need to kill paradigms that need to die.

Sunlight is the only form of light that provides your cells with the wood for your fire.

**CITES:**

http://www.tandfonline.com/doi/pdf/10.1080/19381980.2016.1267077?needAccess=true

# Article: HISTIDINE IS A KEY TO SURFACE HEALTH
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/histadine-key-surface-health-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-07-19T19:12:08.000+00:00

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhistadine-key-surface-health-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 19, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhistadine-key-surface-health-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

My book above tries to teach people that your environment is the key factor in wellness. One of the key chemicals on your skin comes from normal solar exposure. Histadine is that bio-molecule. Histamine comes from the aromatic amino acid histidine. Histidine decarboxylase (HDC) is an enzyme responsible for catalyzing the decarboxylation of histidine to form histamine. In mammals, histamine is an important biogenic amine with regulatory roles in neurotransmission, gastric acid secretion and immune response in many tissues but histidine is incredibly important on the skin where sunlight interacts with it. People forget that all aromatic amino acids have benzene rings acts like photon traps for UV light that slows light down for specific reasons. 

Bacteria are also capable of converting histidine to histamine and a noninfectious form of food born illness occurs in spoiled foods, especially from old seafood. Fermented foods, like natto, cheese, wine, and kombucha have natural levels of histamine present in them to cause many of their effects from the bacteria and yeasts ability to change histidine to histamine. Most histamine is found in mast cells, basophils, and eosinophils which are cells found in the barrier tissues and the circulatory system. This shows you that they all interact with surface light frequencies. The picture below shows how aromatic amino acids all absorb UV light.

In the brain, histamine can act as a neurotransmitter and in the skin, histidine acts as a sunscreen protector. Another key place histamine is stored is in the gut in the enterochromaffin system of the stomach. Histamine causes many food allergies or sensitivities because it is released when the environment is filled with nnEMF. This is due to alterations of the calcium control mechanisms that work normally with light. RF radiation is associated with large surface currents and this can usurp the control of the process normally controlled by sunlight, which is a native EMF. People often forget that sunlight is natural calcium channel blocker and this acts to control the release of histamine in many tissues exposed to sunlight. It also points out why the frequency of light causes signaling issues in our tissue surfaces. nnEMF is tied to food sensitivities, gut symptoms, and bacterial/yeast production of histamine to great excess. Most people do not realize how these things connect to modern illness like eczema, allergy, and food intolerances and autoimmune development. I will cover this in my Patreon post this Friday. [HYPERLINK](https://patreon.com/DrJackKruse?utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=creatorshare2) 

Eliminating the food is not the wisest decision for a 'mitochondriac', but mitigating your environment is the key move for the wise person. Histamine is just another biogenic amine is affected by solar light. There are many others with specific quantum functions, as the picture below shows.

Histidine is also tied to the increase in the volume of the connective tissue stroma in the skin to make some unique chemical in the skin like **_filiggrin_**...........anything that gets larger in the universe is a sign of electron loss and electron loss = less light assimilation photoelectrically. This is when mast cells and eosinophils show up in swollen tissues with altered histamine ubiquitination marking. Itching and swelling = a lack of purple and red light in your life that you allow in your environment. If you change that and you change the slope of your life. Mast cell disease is really an allergy to nonnative electromagnetic fields.

All biogenic amines can be reprogrammed by the information contained in the changing isoforms of protons in the water that hydrates the amino acids in proteins. Every human protein is hydrated by water networks that are filled with different types of hydrogen bonds. In nature, we have three isotopes of hydrogen but only two of them are key to understanding how proteins get their information from our environment naturally. Those two are protium and deuterium.

Most people are unaware that we can monitor hydrogen/deuterium exchange by mass spectrometry (HDX-MS). HDX-MS has emerged as a powerful method for characterizing protein conformational dynamics in cells. The basis of this method is the fact that backbone amides in stable hydrogen-bonded structures (e.g., α-helices and β-sheets) are protected against exchange with the aqueous solvent. All protein structures become dynamic because of information protons bring or subtract from the proteins in question. This even plays a massive role in DNA helices. It is also clear from these protein studies, however, that eventually all of the protecting hydrogen bonds will transiently breakdown as the protein—according to quantum thermodynamic principles— via cycles that control folding. The redox power in the water surrounding proteins controls this process in protons. So if we change the fraction of H+/D around a protein we can see with mass spectrometry how protons impart information and energy to amino acids amine bonds by examining their partially unfolded states. These changes correspond to excited free energy and information levels. As a result, all of the backbone amides in biomolecules can and will eventually become temporarily solvent-exposed and exchange-competent over time as life is lived. The environment controls the fractionation of the surrounding water. This is how protein folding occurs in mast cell diseases and many other disorders of protein folding (AD, PD, ALS). Consequently, a folded protein in D2O will gradually incorporate deuterium into its backbone amides over H+, and the kinetics of the process can be readily monitored by mass spectrometry when we know where and what to look for. I expect this to be part of quantum medicine in the future.

**CITES:**

https://pubs.acs.org/doi/abs/10.1021/ar500194w

# Article: WHERE IS SPINE SURGERY HEADED?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/where-spine-surgery-headed-jack-kruse>

# WHERE IS SPINE SURGERY HEADED?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhere-spine-surgery-headed-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Aug 27, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhere-spine-surgery-headed-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

How is your weekend going? I just got back to New Orleans from Chicago. This weekend I was invited to Chicago to share some of my ideas about quantum biology with a healthcare corporation of where I see spine surgery headed this past Friday. I did just that this weekend. Eyes were opened in these meetings as innovative ideas were shared between myself, engineers, and biologic team leaders. I have no idea what their takeaway was from my input and ideas, but I know what my intent was. Both side have a different view point of who their real customers are. Are the targets surgeons or patients? I believe patients, and not spine surgeons, need to be focus of both physicians and industry going forward to focus on solutions to help them first by bringing spine care and research into the biophysical era. In my opinion, leadership is the activity of influencing people to cooperate toward some goal which they come to find desirable after they have been re-educated by nature. Lifespine is a global leader in spine care who seems very interested in new perpsectives in our field.

I introduced the LifeSpine team to "Kruse's theorem" this weekend. I believe that any significant technological advancement that man can design or invent has already been incorporated into living systems by evolutionary biology in some way. You just have to look for it carefully. In order for the biological and medical sciences to advance, its practitioners and partenrs in industry must realize that mother nature is not only smarter and faster than they are but also smarter and faster than our best physicists and engineers have ever been. And they are all painting on the same canvas to create their masterpieces and patents.

The leading edge of our technology today is where mother nature and evolution were operating millennia ago. So if you want to get a clue of how we work, you'd better start looking there first if you really want to innovate. When I opened the discussions about what I saw the future of spine care to be I could see the concern of the director of sales. He candidly asked me, "do you think the market is ready for that viewpoint", Dr. Kruse. My answer was simple. Mother Nature waits for no one and I don't we should either. I could see the concern on some faces at the table that market force might not be ready for this mindset, but when I met with them ten years ago to share with them where I thought spine care was headed their CEO was not sure I was right either. It turned out my prophecy a decade ago did manifest in reality. That conversation is a major reason why our relationship has remained viable this long. Click on the picture below and watch the video I have created about my mission.

Most of [my non member](https://www.jackkruse.com/register/) and [non Patreon followers](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse) at my social media outlets want my information dumbed down too. I reject it all the time. Most companies I work with want to know how this will affect their profits quarter to quater because the solutions I suggest are disruptive to their perspectives. My ideas always are linked to nature and how we work. I explained to the head of sales that my message is simple.......you can continue to keep selling into your current paradigm but you must add in the biophysical perspective into your engineering mindset. If not you will become a dinosaur when the market changes because of how patients begin to adopt quantum biology. The current surgeon centric focus of implant companies is not likely going to be sustainable in a world just tuning into the reality of bio-physics at play in the muscle skeletal system of patients.

In most spine implant companies their focus is on metal and plastic technology implantation and not on how biologics can be used on implants to make electricity from starlight to regenerate tissues that spine surgeons work on. My perspective is light years ahead of their current position but I want you to know companies like Lifespine are out there and interested in these ideas to see what they can do to help you the public as they advance in business. The last time I spoke to the Lifespine CEO, I told him I was radically changing my entire way of doing spine surgery by going away from metal and embracing even smaller surgeries that were less invasive and used more cutting edge technologies before and after surgery. I mentioned the use of light and cold in this meeting a decade ago, and this shocked him. My perspective about metal and the size of surgeries changed because of the changes in the acuity of illnesses in my patients, and how bone physiology reacts to the implants were had at our disposal. I also knew that cooling would have a massive effect strengthening bone, muscles, and discs in novel ways. I gave him specifics on why I felt as I did then and I also made a few predictions about what I saw for the next decade in my practice. Now, ten years later his team at Lifespine has created many devices that were married to those ideas I shared with them a decade ago. 

During this visit, I decided to step on the gas pedal even further this time when I visited Chicago this weekend. The spine care industry needs to consider the many facets of quantum biology and mitochondrial medicine for the coming spine implant revolution I see coming. The technology is already present and so is the data on optical liquid crystals, but few surgeons are advocating for these implementations or changes yet in the market place because they are unaware of the basic research from bio-physics on the muscle skeletal system of man. We can never settle in the journey for optimal. I knew this set of circumstance would be be a tough sell to a sales manager who is trained to focus on short term goals. Sales managers are most concerned about quarterly growth and year over year growth, but in my opinion, in order to sustain a high growth level for decades you need to foster and support innovative ideas that lead to new patents and new products to benefit future generations. It was at this point I mentioned that I took that first step without industry input when I developed the Quantlet with my own team at Quantum Dynamics.

**NATURE CANNOT BE SIMPLIFIED**

**Why is innovation tough for industry to accept? The science is cutting edge but just not well known yet. Most surgeons will want it watered down to understand why they need to alter their perspectives to create a new market to help the public.**

What is my take on simplifying the science for the sake of convenience?

**Do you want this simplified**…….????  Watch this video below:

Simplified science cannot and won’t happen on my watch because I want to educate and elevate people and not keep them dumbed down. This was the story of my trip to Chicago. I knew my message was going to be a tough pill to swallow. For those of you who also want science dumbed down” you have to go to another universe where the rules are more to your liking. I am not sharing my wisdom to become pleasing to anyone. I am doing it to uncover where optimal health really lies for mankind. Most people really don’t want the truth, they just want constant reassurance that what they believe is the truth. My mouth is not a bakery. I don’t sugarcoat anything. If you ask me my opinion I’m going to tell you the truth, no matter what you want to hear. There is a general difference between the physical and the social sciences that people ought to remember. In the social sciences, if you don't like “it”, often you have at least some space to change “it”. Some wiggle room. eg. if you don't like the language, you can change the language. If you don't like the political system, you change the political system.

There is nothing to measure it against how effective these things are, because the fact that people want them is itself the measure of their effectiveness. Nature gives a rats ass about your wants needs and desires and that is how I teach her brand of science. So it is important to remember that in the physical sciences, you DO have something to measure things against. I believe this is the sentiment a teacher ought to express to his students when teaching them about the physics of organisms in nature. I also believe it is something a corporation needs to pay attention to when a physician researcher bring it to their attention. People sometimes seem to think that they can negotiate how they want the physical world to be like, or the rules we are going to use to measure it. The fact is, we can't use what we 'want' there anymore. Whether it fits the world, if it's accurate or not accurate, becomes the only matter of importance. It is time you wake up to this reality and elevate your game to Nature’s rules. It is also time industry wakes up to these realities as well.

I loved my time in Chicago this weekend and I will continue to support companies like Lifespine while hoping they got my subtle message of how we need to proceed for our combined customers; you the patients need better ideas that mimic nature's designs over man's.

What are the implications for spine surgery based upon the picture below?

# Article: Eliminate the UN-necessary
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/eliminate-un-necessary-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-09-17T16:12:36.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 398
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Feliminate-un-necessary-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Sep 17, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Feliminate-un-necessary-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Why can I be so disagreeable with people? People invariably arrive at their truth, their beliefs not on the basis of proof but on the basis of what they find attractive. I abhor this bias in man. It is our kyptonite. Human insanity is the idea we've created that everyone expects us not to fall apart when we find out everything we believed in was a lie.

Man is the only animal who stands at the edge of truth and error and who knows what should be the next move, but rarely makes it the first time. Moreover, we are also the only animal capable of breaking the cardinal rules of the universe. We're ignorant of the toll we pay in doing this too. This is the paradox of our humanity. Most of our deadly errors arise from obsolete assumptions we inherited as beliefs from other poor thinkers we held in high regard for esoteric reasons. This is why I now doubt everything I'm told or taught, regardless of the source. I must find my own light to seek truth.

This makes me hard, and cold. Beliefs are our choices. First we choose our beliefs. Then our beliefs affect our choices and our life becomes set in stone. Never let that concrete stone set in your life. Evolution measures our wisdom in our ability to adapt. Nature is dynamic and this is why wisdom requires a flexible mind. Agile does not imply a laissez-faire attitude; flexibility and freedom are the basis of the well-defined principles of survival and thriving. With aging, you learn the truth is never fully explosive, but totally electric to your imagination. We're not designed to blow the world up with the truth; we're designed to light it up with our imagination and to shock us into motion to make our ideas reality.

**CITES:**

1.  http://www.nutrition-coalition.org/2017/09/14/nutrition-coalition-reacts-to-national-academies-of-medicine-report-on-broken-process-behind-the-u-s-dietary-guidelines-for-americans/

^^^^hippo's and lions do not need to betold what to eat in nature you do......because man controls his environment and breaks nature's rules. Stop breaking her rules and you too can be a wild animal and forget what anyone tells you about diet. This is an important report for the uninformed. It is the first-ever expert group to confirm that the US [DietaryGuidelines](https://twitter.com/hashtag/DietaryGuidelines?src=hash) are not and have ever been evidence-based, not the "gold standard".

# Article: How do you tap your inspiration?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-do-you-tap-your-inspiration-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-09-19T13:07:54.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 956
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# How do you tap your inspiration?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-you-tap-your-inspiration-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Sep 19, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-you-tap-your-inspiration-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Today is a special day on my Dr. Jack Kruse page.

I met a new friend this AM on Dumaine St, steps on the Missisippi River. Willie is just a dude who was interested in my process. I'm sitting here at 5:30 AM in New Orleans waiting on the sun listening to this song below and thinking. I've got thinking block today.......and then a homeless guy comes up to me and says, "man why are you here right now." I tell him I am waiting for the sun. I am waiting to be inspired. He looks at me and says," I live outside 100% of the time and never thought to look at the sun." I said to him, sit down. And I played this song linked below. I told him my mind was blank and I was waiting for first light to think of something to inspire my day at work today.

He sat down......and listened to the music play on my phone as I played it multiple times as we waited for the sun. At first light I began to text into my phone. He watched as the sun hit his face. He said, "Doc what are you writing right now? What got you to act?" I handed him my phone and said post it. He did. You're reading this live. What did the sun say to me today through the clouds? The answers you seek are only as good as the questions we ask the universe. If your questions suck, and we focus on the wrong things, how good is the life we'll get? If we want to change the world all we have to do is write our thoughts down and let it resonate with others. They do not need to be connected to you in any way to make a connection if thought is pure and true. When a thought or idea is makes an impact it leaves something in them. It is like radioactive fallout in an arable field. Certain things in us will grow and other cannot grow. An idea can be radioactive to change a plant into a growth that is something new that is good for us all. That is why I came here this AM on Dumaine St. To sit and wait for the sun with a homeless stranger, Willie, maybe to be changed in some way by the sun. For somebody who thinks they can make no impact in the world can see that it is not true just by observation.......it happens if we allow it. We can post it on social media and tell them all what we are doing while they all sleep, NOT waiting for sun.

That is why I came to step this AM before work today. To make a deep impact......even on someone who had no hope, to show them that it is possible. Willie, sometimes we don't choose our path.........it choose us. Nature is evil like that. When you believe in yourself , in your innate talents to do and to think, you know implicitly that anything is possible. Even the impossible becomes easy........This internal fire is in my gut now as the sun peeks between the clouds this AM. As it grows my words get easier.......The sun becomes my internal drive and is the fire in my gut that cannot be extinguished by circumstance. No one can take it from us. We' ve got to become fully invested and commit to these beliefs because I know assuredly in my heart we will meet success no matter what the world throws at us.......I want to be driven, motivated, ready, filled with passion, for good things, worthwhile things, things that make a positive difference in all lives. I want to add value to all living things no matter where they are right now. I want to them to sense the edge I live on in the light of the sun. It gives me this wisdom every morning I can breathe. My passion can ignite another pilot light. It can light many pilot lights. When our candle is lit there is no law I know of in physics that says sharing it diminshes the impact of that light one bit. So today, I decided to light my new friend Willie up, as he sat here on the steps of the River waiting with me to see what thoughts the sun put in my head to share with him.

Well, they flowed fast in me.......and I had tears in my eyes as they came to me and I did not know why. Willie just watched as I looked up many times to the sun as I typed this on my phone........It's time to talk to Willie over some breakfast now.....I know that from the reflection of the sun on the water as I see it now.........and to tell him to come to the sun every day he lives outside to see this. To get this wisdom he has missed. She speaks to her creatures. Listen to the music nature brings even when life is shitting on you. There is good in nature if you wait for her. I had this song on my head as I walked in the dark to the pier this AM in the French Quarter and I had no idea why it was calling me........until I saw the sun peek through the clouds as I waited for inspiration before work today. Sunrise at 6:48 AM. Post uploaded at 7 AM. Here is the song that spoke to me this AM. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?time\_continue=56&v=N\_zVS6ZHxR8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?time_continue=56&v=N_zVS6ZHxR8)

GO LIGHT SOMEBODY UP TODAY.

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Article: IS WATER THE KEY TO MORPHOGENESIS?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/water-key-morphogenesis-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-10-04T12:25:06.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1003
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# IS WATER THE KEY TO MORPHOGENESIS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwater-key-morphogenesis-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 4, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwater-key-morphogenesis-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

What gives a body its scaffold to form? What makes the brain look like the brain? Could it be something we take for granted? Water makes up 99% of the molecules in a cell because it is so small atomically. Could it be electric and magnetic polarity dervied from sunlight transfered to water in a cell? It is an interesting topic to study and now we have major researchers going back to look at [morphogenesis with bio-physical lenses](http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/bem.10104/abstract?systemMessage=Wiley+Online+Library+will+be+unavailable+on+Saturday+7th+Oct+from+03.00+EDT+/+08:00+BST+/+12:30+IST+/+15.00+SGT+to+08.00+EDT+/+13.00+BST+/+17:30+IST+/+20.00+SGT+and+Sunday+8th+Oct+from+03.00+EDT+/+08:00+BST+/+12:30+IST+/+15.00+SGT+to+06.00+EDT+/+11.00+BST+/+15:30+IST+/+18.00+SGT+for+essential+maintenance.+Apologies+for+the+inconvenience+caused+). This is good news for **_mitochondriacs_**. 

We've known for 20 years now that water below 1.4 nm does things we just do not expect. This is why water is confined in small spaces in cells and around organelles like mitochondria. All living things, plant and animal, are liquid crystalline because water changes its physics when it is confined at small scale and light shines on it. It sounds hard to fathom but it has been proven true many times now in experiment. Electric polarities manifest at these scales in water and determine the alignment of the body plan to give rise to the major body axes seen in morphogenesis. Anytime there is electric polarities there is an associated magnetic polarity present in a cell too. Dr, Robert Becker found this in his work on frogs and salamanders with limb regeneration.  

Light contains both electric and magnetic fields and it seems water is the key to separating them in light to use them in novel ways we are learning about now. Light is an electromagnetic wave whose enegies can be slowed down by proteins, its energy and information transformed and then subsequently trapped in water bio-physically. The sun's light gives water the ability to provide electrodynamical forces acting on the coherent liquid crystalline nature of cell water.

The type of light and its frequency seems to play a major role in pattern formation and morphogenesis of living things. Violet light and red light in sunlight do different things to water as this video below shows.

Water is the supreme stage on which life becomes possible because of how it "physically stores" light energy. Moreover, because it has a high heat capacity, water will not thermalize solar energy as heat. This is one of the key way life uses the statitistical nature of the second law of thermodynamics to side step entropy creation inside cells. Cells use water to return entropy to our environment so a cell can operate far from equillibrium to allow life to manifest.  Cells use mitochondria to create water from metabolism and use water to create circular thermodynamics of coupled systems of bio-molecules. This system's bio-physics could not be built without water's unique abilities when light energy is added to it.  It can be used to do physiologic work inside of cells. Water gives cells flexibility to proteins, reduces the energy barrier between reactants and products, and increases the probability of quantum tunneling of electrons and protons by transient compression of the energy barrier. This is especially true in between the respiratory proteins of mitochondria. Sunlight become quantum coherent in cell water at small scales to make coherent domains or what Pollack has called the exclusion zone (EZ) in his experiments.

Before Pollack, there were other physicist who realized water contained coherent domains that explained the bio-physics of water more completely (below). Coherent molecular motions are much slower than visible light spectrum vibrations from the sun, so that ordered alignment of the molecules in a cell will still be registered by the light transmitted across the cell using Fermat's law.

Water inside a cell appears to act like a liquid crystal. The water in a cell is layered and water in layers has a hexagonal atomic arrangment that makes it bio-physically different than the water from your tap. In fact, layer water is capable of being a massive battery as [this paper from NC State](https://news.ncsu.edu/2017/04/water-pseudocapacitors-2017/) shows us. In fact, when we look at a cell via a polarized light microscope (**_see the book "The Rainbow Worm" for pics of this_**), the most active parts of the cell will always appear brightest, and this indicates that the molecular motions are the most coherent. This area in all cells is the mitochondria in a cell.

Mitochondria is where water is made in a cell as a the result of metabolism. Both mitochondria and stars make water when they operate. It is clear to me that the universe is powered by electricity made by water and starlight. Stars provide the wireless charge for this process to cells. It is not clear yet what creates water in stars, but I bet it has something to do with electric and magnetic fields. 

Organisms are powered by water electricity too via chloroplasts and mitochondria. Hemoglobin is in animals RBC's and sits in an ocean of water in our blood. Blood is 93% water by volume. Note: blood connects animals mitochondria to the sun wireless. See the picture below how much hemoglbin and chlorophyl have in common atomically? Sunlight hits proteins in both bio-molecules, slows down, and is changed from an electromagnetic wave into an electro-mechanical wave that the water in blood captures for transport to our tissues. The light collision with water and creates billions of electrons in the coherent domains Preparta and Del Guidice found experimentally in a sea that is used as a redox pile to power all the metabolic reactions within a cell.

Giuliano Preparta and Emilio Del Guidice far predated Pollack's work, and as physicists, they extended QED field theory to condensed phases of liquids. This was done close to 20 years ago, and biologist have no idea about their work. All mitochondriac's need to know about it. Water is the means of life and the message of life because sunlight makes water the universal electron donor powered by sunlight to make electricity in cells to power life. 

**CITES:**

1.  https://news.ncsu.edu/2017/04/water-pseudocapacitors-2017/

2\. http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/bem.10104/abstract?systemMessage=Wiley+Online+Library+will+be+unavailable+on+Saturday+7th+Oct+from+03.00+EDT+/+08:00+BST+/+12:30+IST+/+15.00+SGT+to+08.00+EDT+/+13.00+BST+/+17:30+IST+/+20.00+SGT+and+Sunday+8th+Oct+from+03.00+EDT+/+08:00+BST+/+12:30+IST+/+15.00+SGT+to+06.00+EDT+/+11.00+BST+/+15:30+IST+/+18.00+SGT+for+essential+maintenance.+Apologies+for+the+inconvenience+caused+

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHAT A "MITOCHONDRIAC" DOES THE MORNING AFTER A HURRICANE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-mitochondriac-does-morning-after-hurricane-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 8, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-mitochondriac-does-morning-after-hurricane-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The morning after a storm is like an educational consult from nature for a mitochondriac. While standing outside looking at the change in the atmosphere you see the bio-physical changes in the ionosphere which acts like a plasma because it is a PLASMA!!!! During Hurricane Nate the amount of magnetic fields present was off the charts in the Gulf South. Nothing alive was in the sky at all for close to 10 hours. Now as the storm is dissipating the magnetic fields in the atmosphere are also going away and giving way to strong electric fields as the sun returns in the French Quarter.

During the clearing phase caused by the weaken magnetic field flux, and insects and birds are returning to the sky. Just walking on the levee of the Mississippi river you can get a lesson in plasma physics if your eye is trained on what you're actually observing. As skies clear electric fields become stronger and stronger because sunlight is more promient to energize the air. This creates an opportunity for a mitochondriac to make a new kind of water in our mitochondria.

Lake Ponchatrain between Slidell and New Orleans above.

Air near the surface of the River/lake/ocean moves slower than air at higher altitudes due to friction with the water. The albatross and pelicans can use the a north-south wind speed gradient to fly without flapping their wings when going east-west by moving downwind at higher altitudes to gain speed relative to ground and then moving to a lower altitude before going in their intended direction using the power and energy in the ionsophere put there by the return solar plasma. Everything in electromagnetic in life and we need to be better observers to understand the world we inhabit. I tried to get a picture of them but my cell phone camera could not get it done.

This situation post hurricane is an example of life's perpetual energy replacement cycle in Nature. It is enough to make a "mitochondriac" dance in the French Quarter.
