# Article: BEING A SMARTER HACKER = ASK GREAT QUESTIONS
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/being-smarter-hacker-ask-great-questions-jack-kruse/>
**Published:** 2017-10-14T13:44:26.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 449
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fbeing-smarter-hacker-ask-great-questions-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 14, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fbeing-smarter-hacker-ask-great-questions-jack-kruse%2F&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

There are no right answers to wrong questions. You know what my favorite thing to do is now? I hire young millennial with science degrees who know nothing about the old show called Candid Camera, and teach them in 3 hours what they need to know about this topic. It costs me less than 50 bucks of training at 15 bucks an hour. Then I send them to bio-hacking events, food guru's events, and anti-aging conferences to scout out the people pushing supplements, foods, and antioxidants to the lay public and hand them this paper below and ask the sellers pointed questions in front of their sellers.

When the kids are done asking these pointed questions it is clear from the reactions of both sellers and consumers they thought that they had the answers for the ills, but it was claer to all they had questions all wrong. To learn the truth you need to learn how to ask the right question of any seller. This mito-hack proves the uncreative mind can spot wrong answers, but it takes a very creative mind to spot wrong questions.

My new mito-hacking book will lay much of this out. Be careful who your experts are. Their experience and their degrees were worthless in this hack because in school, we're rewarded for having the answer, not for asking a good questions. My favorites were the west coast hackers from the technology industry my tribe met at an event in Pasadena. Many respondants to my tribe said, "well this is what our CIO pays consultants to ask"........and then my plants asked them if they knew of a guy named Peter Drucker. All said yes. They were then reminded of this famous Druckerism: "My greatest strength as a consultant is to be ignorant and ask a few questions."

We're filiming the responses and so far they video's are hilarious. Some of you will love the conferences we've hit over the last 18 months. One of the google executives at the California event going on right now as we speak this October said _computers can solve most of this; t_hen my young Stanford freshman reminded him that computers cannot think to ask any questions of us so how could they solve these problems? Computers are useless in this task because they can only give you answers. Dumbfounded was the face...............When you know how to hack better than others, your tribe crushes it. Wake up folks. There is a big world out there to conquer by asking the right question of people looking to sell you crap you don't need.

**CITES:**

https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3901353/

# Article: THE REAL DEAL BEHIND THE STORY OF FOOD = A PROTON STORY
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/real-deal-behind-story-food-proton-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2017-10-20T15:15:59.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1634
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Freal-deal-behind-story-food-proton-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 20, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Freal-deal-behind-story-food-proton-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Does anyone really know why saturated fat is actually GOOD for mankind? I doubt it. The latest data in nutrition research clearly is over turning the last 60 years of beliefs that saturated fat is bad for us. The reasons are not clear or elucidated yet by the food guru's or the researchers because the reason is wholly quantum and tied to the photosynthetic webs that underpin all food chains on Earth. The sun controls this process. The reason is simple: saturated fats made by nature has a special ability to recycle protons that are covalently bound to 5 and 6 carbon sugars that control DNA and water movements in mitochondria. Things that will make go go hmmmmmmm........but my members and Patrons will get it down soon with my coming blogs on Patreon. This has confounded researchers, clinicians, and the public for 75 years because the data of the food guru's had no quantum discipline. They never realized that light controls the programming of electrons and protons in ALL food stuffs. They never realized that this programming is deciphered in mitochondria as an electromagnetic sensor. What is sensed there, determines heteroplasmy and this determines your illness quotient. This is why eating processed food is really bad for us. For in depth blogs on the coming age of quantum biology related to this topic become a Patron of mine and I will teach you and answer your questions direct for the cost of a coffee a month. [https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse)

The higher your redox potential in your cells and the lower the heteroplasmy the more humans feel "a connection" to other living systems. What is is the connective force of this feeling we get as people? LIGHT. 

Light is called the force carrier for the electromagnetic force. This is what connects all life by touching electrons and protons in ways we're designed to observe to get the reality we live. So how does light of the sun effect the protons in foods we eat to get the results we expect in reality? According to nutrition researchers, saturated fatty acids in butter, meat or cream are ultimately NOT dangerous for health based upon the latest data. It has taken 75 years to get to this point. Now we know that margarine and other processed vegetable oils used in the agri-food industry is the cause of many problems in mitochondrial metabolism and physiology that all lead to a high heteroplasmy state. It turns out, the manufactured food have a "different version of protons" bonded to their carbons compared to foods built by the sun via photosynthesis. It turns out the foods in the animal fat portion of the food chain is where the benefit is buried for mitochondria to decipher. 

Inside mitochondria the first three cytochromes have enzymes called de-hydrogenases that are designed to pull off the protons off the carbon backbone of foodstuffs. So if those protons are not properly programmed by solar light frequencies, the mitochondria begins to lose energy and information from these protons and this results in an elevation in heteroplasmy in mitohondria. This invites human mitochondrial diseases. Most people have no clue how the wave function of the simple proton is linked in direct quantum fashion to mankind's current healthcare destruction. That will change this month on [my Patreon blog.](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse)

The man made protons in processed food are substantially different (_in quantum fashion_) than the protons programmed by sunlight. In light of this _fact_, butter consumption does not represent the risk of cardiovascular diseases which have been attributed to it for a long time. France has proven this in reality, because they refuse man made fats and they use massive amounts of animal fats whose protons are all programmed by the photosynthetic web of the food chain. The problem for science is no one has been able to figure out why the French Paradox really exists in reality at all. This will change, because the paradox is due to a quantum effect on the version of protons bound to foodstuffs. This also implies that the animal fat laden diet is NOT responsible for your high cholesterol or your diseases as you've been led to believe for 75 years either. Shocking huh?

To understand why your cholesterol is abnormal (in some way no seems to understand) you need to understand the thermodynamic connection between your blood plasma, the water cycle in your mitochondria, and the water in your extracellular fluids. All of them link back to the story of the proton.  A mitochondriac will get this nuance because it is critical in understanding why man's food chain does not equal nature's version of foods. Processed food is not made completely by sunlight. It's chemistry is altered by processing photo-chemically and this alters the proton signatures in food stuffs. Moreover, if you add to these ideas to the growing diabolization of palm oil for the "paradigm's public health belief's", but also of bio-ecology in relation to deforestation, we are witnessing a change in food habits at the global level. The problem is the food paradigm has no idea why this pattern or proton changes can lead to mitochondrial disease, but one thing is clear. There is a disturbing complex pattern that is emerging in human diseases that cannot be explained by simple macronutrient profiles ", explains Adrien Pierre, Dairy Market Analyst at Agritel. The funny thing about Adrien is that he seems clueless about many aspects of how the fats of palm and butter are similar and how they are different and what makes them optimal fuels for mitochondria. That answer links to DNA and RNA and the water our mitochondria makes.

Adrien Pierre (France) did not understand that palm oil contains the same (roughly) saturated fatty acids than butter! It is also clear he does not realize there is a difference between the protons of plam oil and butter and vegetable oils. That difference is why healthcare spending is out of control in the USA.

This lack of insight extends to professional school training in healthcare. Why is medical school really a waste today for a bright mind? It is now teaching how to collect $$$ for the bean counters over what really matters, quantum biology. See this [link here](http://authenticmedicine.com/medical-schools-new-training-emphasis/).  When you read this link, it would be hilarious, if it wasn't so sad for the public and for patients. Understanding how medicine is practiced now, and how we got to this point is the hardest part of learning for a mitochondriac. I believe that medical training is the essence of transformation in medicine. It must include quantum biology and the proton story buried into foodstuffs.  If we get the point of training wrong for our patients, the end result for the public will be devastating. Today, that is what we all see and no one wants to talk about why it is happening. I am and I have been for 12 years.  Patients will need to become more informed about their health if this trend continues in medical education. 

You need to know what is on the menu in allopathic medicine, alternative, medicine and in mitochondrial medicine. If the menu of Rx's is limited, so will your results.

What are the longer term implications of health insurance from the link above for physicians and patients? One of my fellow colleagues has a great analogy to explain the conudrum we're all in together. If someone else was paying for all your car repairs and maintenance, would it impact the way you drive and take care of your car or the way it is taken care of by the mechanic?

Imagine the mechanic got paid even if he didn't fix your car but as long as the correct gas and oil were prescribed by mandate?

Imagine the mechanic was penalized for digging deeper to investigate your concerns and solving them? What if they were fined for doing so?

Imagine your could only get service when your car parts were completely falling apart based on a third party criteria of what constitutes fixable?

Imagine everyone had insurance but no one had a driver's license, instead they learned how to drive from social media, billboards, television, or algorithms from a textbook published by the government?

Imagine all the street signs were purposefully incorrect and changing all the time?

Imagine all blame was placed on the car and not the driver or the road conditions/environment? What do you think the results would be? There is only one answer. **Patients need to drive their own car, own insurance, and become informed.** This is why I teach people to become **_mitochondriacs_**. In this way the public can become self sufficient expert for the healthcare decisions. A 2014 review in the journal Cochrane Reviews found that decision aids improve patients’ knowledge of their options, make them feel more informed and clear about what matters most to them, and lead them to participate more in decision making. The reviewers concluded that the aids reduce the number of people choosing elective surgery and have no apparent adverse effects on health outcomes or satisfaction. On [my website](https://www.jackkruse.com/register/) and my [Patreon site](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse), I teach people how to make correct decisions with their mitochondria and health in mind. It is time for all to become enlightened about the coming age of quantum biology and wellness creation. Read [this link](http://www.cochrane.org/CD001431/COMMUN_decision-aids-help-people-who-are-facing-health-treatment-or-screening-decisions).

The smart move now is to become a mitochondriac yourself. Now come join me and find out why this story all links back to protons at [Patreon.](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse) In October of 2017, I have already released 5 blogs at my patreon site tied to this story. Later today I will be releasing another one! When you know better, you do better.

Dr. Jack Kruse

# WHAT IS IT ABOUT THE SUN THAT MATTERS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-sun-matters-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 25, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-sun-matters-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Is there something special about how the sun creates light that is critical for a mitochondriac in training to understand? Do you know what it is? If the blood plasma connected the sun with our mitochondria by way of hemoglobin, what is it about the sun's light that makes it seem so cozy with our mitochondria? Could the sun be an object that uses magnetohydrodynamic equations to communicate directly with mitochondria and use our blood plasma as its conduit? It is a provocative idea for a convention physicist and biologist.

The interesting thing is, it explains many of the complex phenomena we see in life on this planet. The liquid plasma model of the Sun is a non-equilibrium approach to the problem of understanding how life came to be as it is. This idea supports the idea that the entire sun supports nuclear reactions and they are free to occur throughout the solar mass. The Standard gaseous model believes the sun is a layers of gas that looks much like the layers of an onion and uses "thermal emission mechanism" to explain how white light is created with a continual spectrum by the sun. How it happens on the sun is immaterial to the "mitochondriac in training", because we know definitively what frequencies of light are in the solar spectrum. The key is, why is this frequency important.

On 10/27/2017, [at my Patreon blog,](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse) you'll find out why this is critical for human biology.

**Nothing builds confidence in our tissues like live ammo. The sun fires bullets at us that are vaccine’s for mitochondrial diseases.** 

**CITES:**

# WHY DID NEO CHOOSE THE RED PILL?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-did-neo-choose-red-pill-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 28, 2017

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-did-neo-choose-red-pill-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

In the Matrix film, there is a scene where Neo is asked to choose between the red pill and the blue pill blue. Neo ends up choosing the Red pill. Today, modern humans have the same choice to make and few of them realize it. You must choose the red light or the blue light and this primer tells you why. [HYPERLINK](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2Fposts%2Freality-18-sun-14847705&urlhash=kiN7&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

Your solar callus not only offers protection but is an ideal way to absorb sunlight properly to get light into your system to build wellness and improve your immunity. Our skin tones are tied to our solar callus and are perceived as the most healthy and attractive to humans. We now know that red and yellow skin tones make you appear more attractive and send wireless signals to others that your immune system is optimized. Being pale is not a sign of wellness contrary to popular dermatologic beliefs. Pale skin is atrophied skin. Do you know what atrophy means? It means DISUSE. The skin is not being used as it was designed to with respect to sunlight. Even animals besides humans, use the solar callus on their skin to draw mates. The peacock should come to mind.

Folks who spend time in the sun can change their surface color by assimilating certain frequencies of sunlight to take red tones because IR-A light increases our RBC's production when our skin is hit with sunlight it undergoes dermal pooling to make our skin flush with blood. When the sun has powerful UV light more oxygen is found in our blood, this changes its color, and the frequencies it vibrates to a deep red due to the increased amount of oxygen in it. From a biological/anthropological perspective, this signals health and vitality and high redox potential to members of our species who see us in nature. The redox potential is a sign that the animals are the ideal fraction of hydrogen isotopes in their flesh to live well under the power of sunlight. So why is RED the choice by LIFE to run the most important programs in us? [Why did Neo really choose the red pill](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=InSv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)?????  [https://www.patreon.com/posts/13077291](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2Fposts%2F13077291&urlhash=hTft&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

WHY DIDN'T NEO CHOOSE THE BLUE PILL?

The corollary of why excessive blue light during day or night is bad as well: At sunrise, humans should face a solar spectrum that gives 1800K vs 16,000 K light = sunrise to sunset. Your tech screens tell the brain it is solar noon all day long because they are built to be at 5700K.

When light enters the eye it has to transverse many layers before the photons are sensed. The incident photons first pass the cornea, neuropsin in the cornea & skin, optic nerve fibers, and ganglion cells which contain melanopsin, amacrine cells, bipolar neurons, and horizontal neurons before they finally reach the rods and cones. This arrangement is bizarre to most who don’t understand how light really works with the liquid crystals in us that are hydrated. They are called proteins in our cells. To those of us who do, it makes complete "[mitochondriac sense.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=InSv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)"

Why is melanopsin located in the ganglion cell layer that is more superficial in our retina? Does it almost appear it is built backward by nature??? What might the reason be? I believe it is because blue/violet light bends most under a prism during dusk.

At dusk, there is no UV light designed to be there. This is why blue light creates the most visual blur on a retina when a man uses it. This sets the tone for cataracts, AMD, and retinal diseases because blue light unopposed by red light in the sun thins the retina. Blue light is NEVER without RED light in the solar spectra. This detail is why blue light is the most dangerous nnEMF to humans. It is also why blurry vision and headaches are the most sensitive cue to the astute clinician that blue light toxicity is present in a client's environment. This is why blue things in nature are so rare. Life controls the reflection of blue light because it is the most pro-growth part of the spectrum because of the energy its light has. Things that reflect blue light can be dangerous so nature limits their production. It must be tightly controlled to control growth. When growth exceeds regeneration potential we call that cancer in medicine. Blue objects are never sharply seen by life’s creatures.

Above you can see what light bends the most in a prism or when light is coming from the sun to the Earth. Life pays attention to this in how she built our retinas to work with blue light. Below you can see the bending of blue light puts its light rays more anterior in the eye. This is exactly where the melanopsin receptors are for blue light. The red light receptors are in mitochondria and water close to the fovea and macula.

Nature knows that blue light bends the most because of physics and has built the anterior chamber of the eye to take full advantage of it. This is why the retina appears to be built backward to our expectations. The photoreceptors are deep to the surface so this limits the blue light hazard to the eye camera function to keep the eye size perfect for refraction. When we get too much blue light the globe elongates and humans get myopia. This epidemic is now seen in Asian teens and nobody seems to know why? Their tech addiction is why it is happening. Their retinas are getting that 5700K signal day and night.

Blue light always reduces the sharpness of sight because of the picture of the retina above. The global lighting industry today recommends bright blue spectrum bulbs for the elderly when it is clear from eye physics that we should be recommending bulbs with lower color temperatures and incandescent bulbs to the aging eye. This is nuts when you understand the bio-physics of light. It is a great way to make grandma more alert, but she'll be more awake so she can drive somewhere and get lost because it will also make her senile with Alzheimer's or Parkinson's disease!!!! The fact is compounded when one considers that the federal government is now outlawing the general manufacturing and sale of incandescent bulbs to save energy since 2009! You'd be wise to stock up on the old bulbs and get rid of every LED light in your house with this information. This light allows you to be a [deuterium COLLECTOR](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=InSv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in your tissues. All you need to do is look at the picture below to understand why I say it.

We may save electricity with LEDs, but we are going to increase neolithic disease in all groups by altering the spectral frequencies of indoor light. LEDs cause mitochondrial swelling because of the effect of unopposed blue light and no red light for regeneration in the retina to control the swelling. This is why the astronauts are coming home from the ISS with [optic nerve swelling folks!!!!](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewashingtonpost%2Ecom%2Fnational%2Fhealth-science%2Fthe-mysterious-syndrome-impairing-astronauts-eyesight%2F2016%2F07%2F09%2Ff20fb9a6-41f1-11e6-88d0-6adee48be8bc_story%2Ehtml%3Futm_term%3D%2Ef311dac24624&urlhash=K7GD&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

Does any astronaut work in an Earth-like light environment? Nope, and this is why they get mitochondrial diseases very quickly. Most astronauts come home with heavy methylation defects in their genome. Space science still acts like they don't know where it comes from. Decentralized clinicians know when mitochondrial redox power drops methylation risks rise. Why?

Methylation patterns are linked to how light is transformed in a cell. When sunlight is absent for any reason mitochondrial redox drops. When there is blue light toxicity methylation defects rise. This happens when energy transformation drops in cells. As a result of a lack of energy methylation problems shows up in both genomes, nuclear & mitochondrial and that is where it comes from. Decentralized clinicians know what to look for in you. Allopathic and functional medicine clinicians wouldn't know what to look for because they still have no idea that light controls the enzymatic flux in metabolic pathways.  

Loss of mitochondrial redox power causes methylation problems to manifest in your labs without any SAP/SNP issues present in your MTHFR survey or nuclear genome. Very few clinicians know a lack of sunlight and/or blue light toxicity causes methylation defects to manifest.

It shows up in your labs in a very specific pattern of results as an accumulation of methionine and S-adenosylhomocysteine, with low or low-normal levels of S-adenosylmethionine (SAM) and homocysteine. PBM treatment fixes it. Proper solar exposure is a better option.

This raises an interesting point for humans on Earth who bathe in blue light and nnEMF while blocking the sun. What happens if your sun is an alien sun in an office during the day or night time? Could we be injured by our schedule because of the lights on in our environment? Yes, you can.

Fluorescent lights also flicker at 100 Hz because the light is modulated. You can use the Iris screen software to limit this effect, but it is still there because your cells can sense it even when you cannot. I refuse to work under any modulated light now because of what I know about light and the eye. I covered the details of this in my Vermont 2017 on youtube.

No one seems to realize that mitochondria need to oscillate at 100 Hz to fat burn properly. It turns out this frequency is also critical to help deplete our tissues of [deuterium to favor the H+ isotope of hydrogen](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=InSv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). The reason for this? It makes all of our tissues easier to control with SUNLIGHT's red spectrum. This regenerates us using an electric and magnetic resonance effect in the red spectrum with our mitochondria's crystalline red light chromophores in cytochrome c oxidase, the ATPase, and the water surrounding them all. This water is made in mitochondria and is also designed to be deuterium depleted so the sun can control the movement of protons in 3 main biochemical pathways in living systems. The reason we are designed this way is that red light is dominant in the solar spectrum. It makes up 43% of the spectrum.

Red light controls the movement and motions of all protons in us. Deuterium has double the atomic mass and a different quantum spin number so red light from our sun can not control its movements in biochemical pathways to foster regeneration in tissues and mitochondria. There is no molecular resonance of our sun's red light with deuterium. This is why all mitochondria contain 3 de-hydrogenases to pull hydrogen off the carbon backbones of foods. Not all food has the same level of deuterium. This is really why foods matter. It has ZERO to do with macronutrients and all to do with your connection to the sun and retaining the ability to control proton motion in cells and in your DNA and RNA. Without the sun's red light and light hydrogen, the body loses control over the circadian mechanism in every cell in the body.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

This causes more damage to the "eye clock mechanism" because it allows for more blue light assimilation to the ganglion layer to destroy the retina’s mitochondria in these cell layers. This is another reason fluorescent bulbs need to be removed from your indoor environments or just kept off. More bad news for the flickering effect is that LED light produces even more of it. Older people need to turn off all LED and fluorescent bulbs and only use incandescent bulbs, candles, or kerosene lamps inside. they also need more sunlight than anyone thinks because they need the red light to lower their heteroplasmy rates.

Heteroplasmy rates result from the LACK of control of protons in your cells. This traps D20 in your mitochondrial matrix to cause swelling. This is why the astronaut's optic nerve swells in space!!! I still cannot fathom NASA has not figured this out yet. Anyone in space does not get the same solar spectrum we do on Earth and they are never grounded. This is why it happens. It ruins their redox or electric charge in tissues. This means the body becomes a [garbage dump of the deuterium isotope](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=InSv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) and not H+. The older clients or more diseased eyes need to even consider the paint and clothes they chose for a room or wear. The light reflection is a problem when heteroplasmy rates rise. Only the red spectrum of the sun can regenerate it because it is what controls our optimal isotopic fraction of H+. That is the light the sun can control because of how light operates with atoms. Blue and pink light are especially bad in high heteroplasmy states.

If you do use indoor light that has a lot of blue light paint your rooms with complementary colors to blue such as yellow and orange and warmer earth tones. Try to avoid all shades of blue and white and reflective colors if you can. That can affect how the eye camera and eye clock function. It can also speed up all co-morbid diseases that the person may already have. Chronic blue light exposure wears out the integrity of our entire visual system and this causes time to speed up for the person whose environment is loaded with this color.

The evolution of eyes is not based on what modern science believes either.

Today's factoid: the eye is only weakly optimized to take full advantage of the available solar spectrum. The erroneous belief often arises from blind faith in the power of evolution to optimize absolutely, coupled with a misunderstanding of the nature of density distribution functions. That misunderstanding appears in a diverse range of scientific literature (see the enclosed links as points of fact). Other constraints upon the eyes’ evolutionary optimization besides the Sun’s radiance were also important, such as the historically significant influence of the transmission of water, the susceptibility of potentially available biological materials such as photopigments to Blue light damage, and the instability of possible infrared sensitive photopigments. Contemplating why we did not evolve to use other mechanisms to produce a broader band visual sensitivity, as for an unlikely example electron–hole pair generation, would seem to be a futile exercise in a counterfactual history of evolution. But the question of how and why our vision evolved to employ its equally unlikely photoisomerization scheme for vision still remains an interesting and open issue that I think quantum evolutionary theory will solve. I believe that mechanism is 100% tied to the control of PROTON motions. Mitochondria and water are loaded with them and red light is what controls their placement in the 2' position of glucose, glycerol, and 3' and 5' positions in DNA and RNA!!!!!!!

People have forgotten that a deficiency of Vitamin A in the retina leads to night blindness and to poor autophagy in cells. This means when Vitamin A is low in the retina and brain, mitochondria in the eye swell, and heteroplasmy rates will be higher. This means the person's red light environment is poor and they likely spend little time in the sun. This is the reason why all [astronauts develop optic nerve swelling](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewashingtonpost%2Ecom%2Fnational%2Fhealth-science%2Fthe-mysterious-syndrome-impairing-astronauts-eyesight%2F2016%2F07%2F09%2Ff20fb9a6-41f1-11e6-88d0-6adee48be8bc_story%2Ehtml%3Futm_term%3D%2Ef311dac24624&urlhash=K7GD&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) when they spend too much time in space disconnected from the sun and grounded to the Earth in the ISS capsule!!!!!

Now you know why Scott Kelly came back and all [his methylation genes were TURNED on compared to his identical twin!](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Eiflscience%2Ecom%2Fspace%2Fnasa-twin-study-shows-that-space-travel-alters-gene-expression%2F&urlhash=G8ZR&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) The same thing happens to humans on Earth who live a life in blue light and never connect to the Earth and the sun. MTHFR SAPs and SNPs are reactions of nuclear and mitochondrial genomes to poorly lit environments in our evolutionary history. Think about the K-T event, as an example. These defects are from light and grounding defects not a dire need for B12 or folate supplements. People need better advice about light from their experts. Red light has been shown to decrease inflammation in over 1 million studies on pub med, but when I go around the world to speak to people it is like I am speaking Chinese to my healthcare audiences. It is beyond crazy how medicine has disconnected its advice from Nature.

Interestingly, [autophagic induction by retinoic acid](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efupress%2Enet%2Findex%2Ephp%2Fijae%2Farticle%2Fview%2F16844&urlhash=XczX&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) has been shown to be critical for the removal of toxic proteins in diseases like breast cancer, leukemia, and progeria. Retinol is a Vitamin A analog and the circadian crystals in our clock genes all use a GTP-coupled protein system. Guess what controls the GTP mechanism? RED LIGHT. Getting rid of your bad protons is what we all need to be doing. How to do it is the basis of just about everything I teach the public and my clients. Most of the have no idea that is what is behind the best healing in the world. The circadian mechanism is 100% tied to how well or badly we recycle protons in our cells.

Deuterium absorbs more light radiation and this is what causes the changes. We still don't get it because we don't understand how atomic mass and spin control these physical factors to cause swelling.

This is why when the PER gene loses its periodicity, cells become hypoxic and HIF-1 rises. This causes NAD+ to drop in your mitochondria and as a result, the free radical signal that is created by our mitochondria changes. That signal is the "software signal" from mtDNA that changes our hardware (nDNA). The opposite can occur via the alteration of the CRY gene (less deuterium) which can decrease risk. One very complex and vital function in all cells is repairing DNA damage. This is why the 3' and 5' hydrogens seem so critical in human studies in Hungary on deuterium-depleted water in cancer victims. People need to wake up!!!! [Light is the most powerful drug nature provides.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Encbi%2Enlm%2Enih%2Egov%2Fpmc%2Farticles%2FPMC3643261%2F&urlhash=lxMl&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

It turns out proton location specificity is required to be activated, to increase mitochondrial biogenesis; moreover, it is needed to recycle protons at the SN-2 position of the glycerol backbone and the 2' carbon in sugars and lipids. This is critical in DHA and its entrance into cell membranes of the brain and PNS. This is broken in many CNS disorders. They also determine what type of protons are incorporated into the 3' and 5' carbons in ribose used in DNA and RNA. This is a huge hint of why cancer cells use the Warburg shift.

This [link below from the Ivy league school](<http:// https://www.health.harvard.edu/blog/seasonal-affective-disorder-bring-on-the-light-201212215663>) has a lot of bad data in it because it does not seem to understand how a combination of blue and red light is the key to AM sunlight that regenerates photoreceptors. It also downs UV light and pushed fluroescent lights in the AM. This is pure nonsense based upon what we know about the diurnal changes in sun light as the day ages. The cause of SAD is the blue light hazard and it is obviosu to anyone who looks at the data but too few do because there is no economic incentive to fund research that will point the blame at the technology industry and TV. Both are used to control the populace. SAD: In general, relatively high light illuminances ranging from 2500 to 12,000 lux (blue lights) are now used for treating winter depression, dementia, AM wakefulness, selected sleep disorders, and circadian disruption (Wetterberg, 1993; Lam, 1998).

There are many people out there telling people to use a 500-watt halogen light in the morning, to tell their body it’s time to wake up. It might wake up you body, but what these genius's never tell their target markets is that it might also create retinal damage, thinning, and chronic neurodegeneration. Many of these so called internet experts tell people halogen lights are the most like natural sunlight, which is complete nonsense. Not only are they not full-spectrum, many have flicker, and they have no therapeutic red light in them as the continuous spectrum of AM sunlight does. The red part of sunlight is the part of the sunlight that balances the effect of blue light toxicity and leads to regeneration of the photooxidation that the blue light in sunlight causes naturally.

A little bit of knowledge is all these on line experts give their readers, to sell their products and their affiliate products. The problem is light is the most powerful drug we have and if you do not understand all the details of sunlight and its spectrum and how it works you can cause some issues chronically. These online pill pushers who dabble in light will push AM blue light boxes and make sure they can sell them to you. You'd be wise to educate yourself why this might be a BAD idea. Have you ever heard of the blue light hazard? When you use blue light outside of the other frequencies in sun light you open the door to massive risk. This is something your internet guru's never tell you. The reason why is how photoreceptors in the retina regenerate. We have rods, cones, and neuropsin and melanopsin photoreceptors and how they regenerate is all tied to AM sunlight exposure. Not a light box.

Although these light levels are therapeutically effective, most patients complain that they produce side effects of visual glare, visual fatigue, photophobia, ocular discomfort, and headache because of the blue light hazard and the resultant Vitamin A disruption these lights cause. Once Vitamin A defects occur, eye and brain diseases manifest and many of the opsin regeneration pathways break down and the retina thins and melatonin levels drop. If you add in melatonin pills to the use of these AM blue lights the retinal damage is significant long term side effects for a questionable short term benefit. Many of your online supplement sellers will be happy to sell you melatonin pills too. If you put my name, bio-hack #722 and melatonin into a google box you might see what that creates "bullet holes" in your retina. The people at Harvard never give you the balanced side of the story tied to AM sunlight. Why? They have two departments in the medical school designed to keep their future patients out of the sun. It is good for future revenue streams.  If they did recommend a daily dose of AM sunlight, their opthomology deptartment RVU's would drop and that would not be tolerated long by the powers in the Ivy towers of academia.

Why has the NFL lost so many high profile star players to injury?

The owners and commisssioners in the league are just like any paradigms. Protect the shield at all costs.

Any paradigm that places profit before people is pure evil in my opinion. You can bet they deal in deception in their experiments and data collection. Teddy Roosevelt actually tried to stop foot ball in its tracks one time because of the excessive injuries. Most people do not even know that. This is why facades are deceptive and behaviors are reflective of what is really going on behind the curtain. For a soothsayer it is a double pleasure to deceive the deceiver.

**LETS TALK CTE FIRST**

CTE is chronic traumatic encephalopathy. How do you get it?

The NFL's routinely uses of RF and microwaves to communicate to players before and after each play and during the game is one of the major things putting all people in this environment at risk. It is not just the players at risk, so are the spectators. It is why I refused to stop going to games when I brought my devices to some games to measure the radiation in the stadiums. I was able to measure the QB and MLB helmets which are outfitted with a radio. This radio emits RF and microwaves and is on every play with coaches on the sideline right next to the players head. This is like a cell phone only worse, that emits bidirectional microwaves that dehydrates the mitochondrial matrix and players extracellular compartment which ultimately lowers their redox potential. You need water in your body to be activated by the sun to improve your redox.

The NFL is in decline and this is why it is happening at the core: Read this article before going on: [HYPERLINK](http://www.washingtonpost.com/sf/sports/wp/2017/12/12/ex-nfl-player-larry-johnson-grapples-with-violent-urges-and-memory-loss-he-thinks-its-cte/?utm_term=.7e20c12a3a6c)

Mitochondrial dysfunction plays a massive role in multiple trauma's that lead to CTE. CTE is a change in the grey matter of the brain that is akin to atrophy of cell mass. The atrophy leads to mis-folded proteins because the brain's ability to clear deuterium properly is lost in this case. This is why all cases of CTE are associated with poor sleep. Sleep is when humans clear deuterium and it is clear no one understands that. Most radiologist think you cannot see deuterium damage on MRI's. This is not true either. You just need to know what to look for on T1 weighed images. Players afflicted with CTE have associated mood and depression disorders which are also related to a ["deuterium" problem](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0166432814004884) in the neocortex and retina.

Deuterium depletion, sunlight, cold environmental exposure with extreme grounding will all help optimize your mitochondria if you have a TBI or suffer from CTE. The problem is no one is making these recommendations to these people unless they are clinicians who have become a "mitochondriacs". Only then can one explain how these thing are happening and can fully explain all the mechanisms in the matrix of the mitochondria. Currently medicine has no answer for these conditions so it would be wise for players, agents, and parents to become aware of what happens to the brain when the sleep cycles can no longer deal with the higher deuterium flows in the central nervous system that develop after multiple traumas. Trauma directly affects the mitochondrial permeability pore (mPTP) to cause molecular swelling and chaos in the TCA cycle of the matrix. With trauma the pore lets too much deuterium in because the exclusion zone around a mitochondria is reduced by their lack of solar exposure and the RF/microwaves these players are subjected too. It dehydrates their cells to cause the problem, much like a microwave does to day old steak.

Players travel excessively on planes to games. They are inside metal tubes with 250 other people using WiFi devices and they are the steak in the microwaves. When they fly they are disconnected from the Earth and lose the effect of grounding. When they are on the Earth they are wearing rubber soled shoes chronically because of the NFL shoe deals with Nike and Adidas.

Trauma is an acute form of mitochondrial damage. In my blog and website I usually deal with the chronic mechanisms that cause these conditions like obesity, diabetes, osteoporosis, and cancer, but today I want to explain why the NFL injury issue really exists. **TECHNOLOGY ABUSE:** It turns out blue light increases the risk for these traumatic injuries. When the pathological permeability transition pore (PTP) opening mediated by reactive oxygen species (ROS) and calcium dysregulation is central to mitochondrial dysfunction and neurodegeneration in CTE.

[Here is a video on how](https://vimeo.com/184495934?ref=fb-share&1) the blue light hazard destroys young men's brains via the blue light technology gives them in their eye.

This all begins in the mitochondria in glial cells when a slight ischemia stimulus is induced by the trauma. When this occurs, the TCA cycle forward flow is changes and its kineitcs are slowed because the matrix is filled with more deuterium (should be quantized) than it should have. This one small feature leads to seismic changes in how the neocortex will function because it rapidly increases heteroplasmy rates in a few years (not 10% per decade as it normally does) to destroy cognitive and emotional functioning. Uncontrolled and un-quantized deuterium flows lower NAD+ at cytochrome 1 and cause a relative pseudohypoxia distal to the ATPase in mitochondria of the brain. This causes a lower membrane potential and lower energy generation in the matrix via the TCA. Adaptive responses are built into many tissues that preserve mitochondrial function can blunt ischemia relatate injury (IRI) but the brain cannot tolerate or defend itself longer than 4 minutes from any ischemic insult. This is why CTE can manifest after an NFL career or multiple concussions for any reason as the story about Larry Johnson above shws.

Neurosurgeons see these injuries all the time but most of them are not mitochondriacs. The human brain does not tolerate any change in TCA damage or kinetics because of its high aerobic metabolic rate. Cerebral blood flow in the brain is tightly coupled to the metabolic rate of neurons. This is why any disruption of the TCA cycle is not tolerated and this is why chronic traumas cause CTE. The brain can only function with aeobic metabolism. This is why it tightly controls water flows and deuterium concentration in CSF. No one is studying mass spectrometry data of players CSF who are normal compared to injured but you can bet you'd see a problem if one looked. Trauma removes this control mechanism. Mitochondrial biogenesis is impaired in these patients too because of the trauma. You need decent functioning mitochondria to replace bad ones. This is not possible in chronic repetitive brain injury because they are lacking the pulse of superoxide for it to occur. The brain differs in its sensitivity to deuterium fractions from organs like the kidney or skin which has the innate ability to increases cellular aerobic metabolic capacity using mechanisms in red light and blood. _The brain heart, and bone are very similar because all of them have very high metabolic rates. The metabolic rate in bone is why the NFL has so many muscle skeletal injuries but none of their orthopedist seems to understand the TCA cycle._

The brain metabolic rate is tightly coupled to cerebral blood flow and TCA kinetics and there is no excess present in blood to offset any deficits. This is why deuterium in the matrix is so damaging to the brain. The mPTP is characterized by a complex network of transcription factors that regulate expression of mitochondrial proteins that modulate mitochondrial function in tissues. Their action is linked to the metabolic rate and the metabolic rate likely is tied to how much or little deuterium the TCA cycle in those tissues can tolerate. The brain and heart need to be run fully ketogenic to maintain the matrix of their mitochondrial matrix as deuterium depeleted as possible. THe more deuterium in the matrix the more likely seizures or demyelination becomes because of the effect on lowering NADPH in the PPP which control cell membrane reductive power for myelination via cerbrosides that control the lipid rafts in the brain. Lignoceric acid/DHA/and cholesterol ratio's and their deuterium content are likely highly controlled by the isotopic fraction present in the glial cells of the human CNS and PNS. Melatonin, Vitamin receptors, cholesterol synthesis and LDL all attenuates glial inflammation and deuterium content in the CSF, and this controls oxidative stress and mtDNA function and the TCA cycle by up-regulating antioxidant and anti-inflammatory mediators.When you add in the amount of tape they watch in the dark light during the daytime and consider all that blue light into their eyes day and night over 20 year careers it is no wonder that neurodegeneration is not more common in professional sports. Altered frequencies of light lower the brain's redox slowly over time and then a minor head trauma is capable of ruining the heteroplasmy rate within a brain and we get things like ALS, neurodegeneration, and CTE. No one sees these connections to an altered spectrum of light within the environment of sports. It grows everday. Today players are given ipads and laptops to learn their playbook. The playbook is gone. It is now a blue lit device with a screen that has a color temperature of 5700K. That color temperature tells the brain that it is solar noon every minute they are on the ipad. NFL teams now track the players study time on these blue devices. It's nuts when you understand the bio-physics. # Article: GEOMAGNETIC STORMS and EMF
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/geomagnetic-storms-emf-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2018-03-14T14:39:28.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 813
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fgeomagnetic-storms-emf-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 14, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fgeomagnetic-storms-emf-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The next 48 hours a G1 class solar flare is heading to Earth. A solar flare/CME typically takes 3 to 5 days to reach the Earth after it leaves the Sun. Observing the ejection of CMEs from the Sun provides an early warning of geomagnetic storms. Only recently, with SOHO, has it been possible to continuously observe the emission of flares/CMEs from the Sun and determine if they are aimed at the Earth. The one ejected today is headed our way. One serious problem that can occur during a geomagnetic storm is damage to Earth-orbiting satellites, especially those in high, geosynchronous orbits. Communications satellites are generally in these high orbits. Either the satellite becomes highly charged during the storm and a component is damaged by the high current that discharges into the satellite, or a component is damaged by high-energy particles that penetrate the satellite. We are not able to predict when and where a satellite in a high orbit may be damaged during a geomagnetic storm. A Chinese satellite is expected to fall from the sky and land in Southern Michigan during this storm. How can this situation teach the mitohacker a deep lesson about the coming 5G world? The heart and cardiovascular system have always been considered the main biological targets of geomagnetic activity. We now know that sleep is affected because of the link of the pineal gland to the superior cervical ganglion and the carotid system that I mentioned in two slides from my Vermont 2017 video. 

However, the damage inflicted by magnetic storms on human health has been found to be different because people with lowered redox are more at risk. Experts from the Institute of Space Studies of the Russian Academy of Sciences (RAS), Institute of Physics of the Earth (RAS), and the Sechenov Moscow Medical Academy have established that the biggest danger emanates from the micro variations of the geomagnetic field, which coincide with the heartbeat. They occur in about half of all magnetic storms and are most typical for a prelude to a storm with insignificant changes in the geomagnetic field (mostly affecting high altitudes), and for the recovery phase when the geomagnetic field is coming back to normal. So if you love above the 40th latitude in either hemisphere and have heart or brain issues pay attention.

Medical statistics for Moscow show that 70% of all micro variations, caused by geomagnetic disturbances, are accompanied by an abnormally high incidence of heart attacks (a growth of about 13%), and blood-strokes (7.5% growth). The low and extremely low-frequency electromagnetic fields destabilize the heartbeat, leading to a sudden death or infarction. Medical experts have finally explained why heart attacks take a heavy toll before a magnetic storm - because micro variations begin 24 hours before the storm. ER's always report their CCU is more active around solar storms. Tissues with poor mitochondrial function are at risk. Why? CPC #20 tells you why. 

"We have analyzed numerous data on the heartbeat of cosmonauts from all Soyuz crews, and the majority of missions to the Mir Station and the International Space Station," said Doctor Tamara Breus (Physics and Mathematics) from the Russian Academy of Sciences' Institute of Space Studies, who heads of a group of physics and physicians, studying this problem.

"We subjected 45 cosmonauts to examination during landing and flights of various duration, when they were exposed to geomagnetic disturbance, and then studied the same parameters in a neutral situation he said.

"The influence of a magnetic storm was obvious in our test subjects. It was manifest in a change of pulse and blood pressure, vegetative disorders, reduction of heart rate variability (HRV) and the power of respiratory undulations, and in a more irregular heartbeat pattern. Rhythm disorders spike. Blood glucose rises. Reactions varied depending on the duration of the flights and an ability of cosmonauts to adapt themselves to the new environment."

In the opinion of Dr. Breus, these effects were a reaction of the vascular tonus and heartbeat rhythm to magnetic storms.

It is perfectly obvious that the response of such a complicated system as the human organism to external factors largely depends on its condition. A magnetic storm is not dangerous for healthy people, but that might not be true for those with poor redox potential.

But there are risk groups with unstable biological status. These include people suffering from ischemic disorders or hypertension, diabetics, or children whose adaptation system is the process of formation. Newly born are, particularly at risk. This new blog is out about how a geomagnetic storm might lead you to make a plan on how to cope with a 5G world. The included video is quite educational. It is called CPC #20: WILL GEOMAGNETIC STORMS MIMIC A 5G WORLD and can be found here: **https://www.patreon.com/posts/cpc-20-storms-5g-17538105**

# HEMOGLOBIN AND CHLOROPHYLL AS DYE LASERS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhemoglobin-chlorophyll-dye-lasers-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 17, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhemoglobin-chlorophyll-dye-lasers-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The SAFIRE project generates the same energy densities as the sun’s photosphere and nuclear bombs …... in a laboratory on Earth.  The goal of the project is to build a model of the sun in the lab. Many call the project how to build "a star in a jar."

I believe most of the things I have uncovered about mitochondria has led me to believe the sun has an electric model and not a fusion model. One of the key features I have been looking for is the ability to slow the speed of light down while being able to vary electron density. while confining photons. These are all things I mentioned in my April 2016 webinar called, [What Is Life](https://www.patreon.com/posts/16904256), on how I see mitochondria working with the solar systems energy force. This source contains both energy and information.

Each mitochondrion can generate a 30 million volt charge along the inner mitochondrial membrane. Many of you might not realize that the neutrino is the most common subatomic particle released by our sun. This particle is the least understood particle in all of physics. If physics has no idea about the neutrino you can bet biology is beyond clueless about it. My work on mitochondria has shown me the sun must connect to each and every mitochondrion in every cell of our body WIRELESSLY. The only adult cells that have no mitochondria is a red blood cell. I believe this is by design. Chloroplasts also have none. This tells me that chlorophyll and hemoglobin are both liquid crystals that are connecting with something in the sunlight to create something "like a dye laser phenomenon" using hemoglobin in animals and chlorophyll in plants photodynamically.

Organic dye lasers have proved to be a high-intensity source of monochromatic radiation that can be 'tuned' to any desired wavelength in the visible range of the spectrum. Could this be why both have no mitochondria and have distinctive colors associated with them? The basic principles of dye laser operation can be understood within a model of a modified four-level laser, described by using the rate equation approach. The tuning methods can be based on dispersion by prisms, diffraction by gratings, interferometric effects and polarization effects. All of these effects have been found in both hemoglobin and chlorophyll. In addition, dye lasers are rapidly tunable and can emit simultaneously two or more wavelengths. This can lead to some interesting properties in ring lasers systems. 

So how does this link us to the sun?? There are ~65 billion neutrinos in the terahertz frequency passing through every square centimeter of space between the sun and Earth every second. Plants and animals are filled with proteins surrounded by DDW to act as quasicrystals within cells. With these interesting facts in mind, the notion of crystals vibrating of their own accord is seriously flawed. Might neutrino collision be the background source of electricity that runs life from these particles in the sun? The April 2016 webinar on what life is, lays out my ideas on that topic. 

Above you can see chloroplasts surrounded by cell water that is deuterium depleted to make a liquid crystalline matrix in a cell to interact with things in sunlight to create a timing mechanism. This mechanism is the basis of the circadian mechanism in all living things.

Even DARPA is catching up to the ideas I laid out in [Time series of blogs](https://www.jackkruse.com/time-1-is-our-retina-our-metronome/) at my website www.jackkruse.com. I knew it was just a matter of time before people would start synthesizing ideas already out in the literature. For all those who told me I was an idiot and should shut up, and just push any diet for wellness, I can laugh now.  Diets are just labels for a particular paradigm. I don’t and won't hide behind a label of dietary dogma. When a teacher does this, they'll tire of pretending that they're someone else just to fit in, just for the sake of having relationships within the dietary dogma. I see that today in vegans/paleo/and LCHF communities on social media.

**Orthodoxy = dogma = belief. Orthodoxy means not thinking, and not needing to think.**

Dietary dogma ignores our biologic history at our peril. Among the many lessons that emerge from the geologic record, perhaps the most sobering is that in life, as in the stock market, past performance is no guarantee of future results. Eating the way we did 1 million years or 10,000 years ago to is no guarantee for anything. Why? The environments our mitochondria faced at those times is no longer equivalent to life on Earth today. People forget food is a bar code for sunlight of varying power density of seasonal change.

Food is not what we present it as. It is not a story of macronutrients. It is not just a story of carbohydrates, proteins, or fats. It is a story far deeper than this with a greater meaning in Nature. **_Learning the nature food without a thought of how sunlight builds food is labor lost to a mitochondriac; thought without learning about the nature of light is perilous to mankind._**

We are designed to eat in the sunlight in food form because all foods link to photosynthesis; therefore all food can really be at its core is light information from the sun codified in some atomic way that nutrition researcher are yet to figure out. Our mitochondria decipher the energy and information in every electron, and proton in foods. Why do I believe that?  Let us start with hydrogen the first atom on the periodic chart. Foods contain two forms of hydrogen, protium and deuterium. Life forms in plants and animals favor light hydrogen over deuterium. In fact, your mitochondria have 3 dehydrogenases that strip hydrogen from foods to be used in energy and information building in cells.

The light from the sun is a mosaic. Anyone who has looked at the cover of the Pink Floyd album cover where a crystal glass prism separates visible light into 7 colors knows this is true. What you do not realize is that how the mosaic is used is sensitive and specific in living systems on Earth. Plants use one liquid crystal to do it and animals use another crystal. The key to the crystal is the mosaic created.

_There is a “revolution on the surface of the earth” called technology that is causing a new evolution in your mitochondria. Reality manifests from alien light frequencies colliding with your animal crystals to make a mosaic our cells have never experienced before._

**IS FOOD REALLY ARE PROBLEM TODAY IN A TECH WORLD?**

This provides you with another possible explanation for why observations don’t match predictions is that humans aren’t very observant about the **mosaic** of light around us and we 've changed it since 1874.

Beautiful **mosaics** are made of broken or torn material. Your ability to see is made from broken down colors in light to bring you a unique reality. In every sound, the hidden silence sleeps. Life is a series of adversities: It's a strong wind tearing away from us all but the things that cannot be torn and ripped so that we see ourselves as we are now. **Food is an electromagnetic barcode mosaic of seasonal power densities.** We're all **mosaics** of many things design to fall apart under the forces of nature so we do not come fully come undone. Pieces of light, love, history, stars; cemented together with love, music, and ideas.

_The key is transforming the environmental energies/information to something different and new._

We are all made up **of broken pieces** of light buried in the subatomic particles of food and our mitochondria are the glue that makes life work..........that is heteroplasmy in a nutshell.  Once you understand how heteroplasmy occurs you understand quickly why modern humans are getting ill from technology.

People think they need a balanced diet of food. What they really need is a balanced diet of light. We not only "eat" sunlight--we can actually digest it and break it into its component frequencies to power specific neural processes using light mosaics. It makes sense because food is really just a proxy for light in a specific subset of life anyway. Light is primordial to life on earth, not food. Life had to be built from light. There was no other choice. Even food's chemical bonds ultimately derive their energy from the sun.

There is no food we can't eat, but the other side of that coin is just because you can eat any food, doesn't mean you should because not all foods grow under the power of the sun in season. Food has a timing, a specific circadian timing because it is an electromagnetic barcode for a seasons power density. Humans might have survived from this flexibility, but an optimal diet is not basic survival when you divorce circadian biology from the photosynthetic process. Today, man has done that with his technology creations.

**SUMMARY**

I am not interested in groupthink, I am interested in discovering the wisdom of nature that life uses to do the things life is capable of. The Universe is working the mitochondriac way these days and that is good news for us all.  DARPA is now funding Time Crystal Research!!!! "Time crystals, systems of atoms that maintain a periodic ticking behavior in the presence of an added electromagnetic pulse (light), have now piqued the interest of the Department of Defense." [https://gizmodo.com/darpa-is-funding-time-crystal-research-1823745090](https://gizmodo.com/darpa-is-funding-time-crystal-research-1823745090)

### Jack Kruse

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdoes-obesity-begin-eye-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Let us start by disrupting your beliefs with an axiomatic statement: Every ten % higher technology spending goes obesity NHANES curves go higher. The more screen time you have = the risk of obesity rises. No shocker to any mitochondriac, but I bet most of you do not know it. It might shock those who always blame food for obesity that there is another possible cause.  This link shows you there is more to the story then you believe.

We are two months out from this years talk in Vermont I am giving June 1-2 at Shelburne Farm. This year's talk will be a continuation of this one here. If you have not seen it you should watch it. The information is quite eye-opening.

So the weekend review is this:.......if you missed this talk last June 2nd you missed out big time. This is the basis of how one becomes and stays a mitochondriac. Man's light beguiles nature's cells. The sun is incapable of enchanting any living thing in a deceptive way. Modern Americans have been beguiled by scientific dogma into believing the sun is toxic. Mother Nature knows there is nothing more to a low dopamine mind than an obvious fact. This talk begins to unravel that mystery wrapped in an enigma buried in the fabric of nature. When you are a unique thinker, you chronically put passion over profit and as a result, your ideas put you on the high tide that raises all ships.

Low dopamine and melatonin always walk hand and hand with poor sunlight exposure. Dopamine and melatonin levels are quantized to the light we live under. As a result low local and systemic melatonin/dopamine levels are present in the tissue in darkness because both are solar hormones made by UVA and IRA light combination found in the AM and later PM. Many papers have shown that glutathionylation (sulfates from cysteine think EE 12) of this enzyme protects proteins from unnecessary degradation by ubiquitination. So the sulfur is normally carried by melatonin, may limit protein degradation in the brain. This is why neurodegeneration is exploding as the last link on this page from the CDC shows. So if the melatonin is not present in high enough quantities, nothing get sulfated by sun exposure. What are the five main things sunlight sulfates? Cholesterol, heparin, platelets, DHEA, and Vitamin D3 amongst many others. This begins to tell you why clothing, sunscreen, and tattoos and low dopamine and melatonin are strongly correlated. It also tells you why all may lead to mitochondrial diseases.

When this quantum process is broken in the eye or skin, the result is low brain sulfate levels, while excessive amounts of metals precipitate out in our tissues. So when the functional medicine doc says you have heavy metal toxicity it means to a mitochondriac that you have a DEFICIT of sunlight for some reason and not a heavy metal issue. They don't get this relationship!!!!! That is how a half-truth leads you to a wallet biopsy for a chelation treatment. Luke Storey mentioned this topic at the end our podcast I did with him (linked in comments) and now you see how it manifests in LA now. nnEMF can do it alone! I highly do not recommend this because I am a person who understands how the quantized process works in the skin. Covering your skin or eyes with anything make this worse and lower the dopamine and melatonin levels innocuously as one age. Precipitation of metals in tissues has the atomic effect of speeding up our organ clocks in relation to the SCN. This ages you faster and makes mitochondrial illness more likely. This completely ruins circadian signaling and speeds up ubiquitination rates and increases epigenetic activation because you are lacking the solar light to run that software program in your cells. This implies all mitochondrial disease, like cancer, maybe simply due to excessive man-made light perception and/or loss of solar light assimilation for some reason to cause a lack of proper epigenetic control. This usually activates the p53 genome that opens Pandora's box to hell.

Sunlight is designed to keep our passenger bacteria, the mitochondrion, quiet in life to do the business of building the energy to allow us to construct the pyramids of wellness in our life. Sitting in your body right now is 100 TRILLION cells. Each cell is an independent living entity. Your ability to think of yourself as a single individual is really an illusion of this fusion event. You're really a colony of bacteria and viruses molded together by the catalyst of sunlight at the Cambrian explosion. The welding of 2 genomes was done by the unique non-linear aspect of UV light. The bacterial colony uses this artifice of "I"-ness as a way for all the cells to act coordinately to get more resources, to breathe, to get more energy and so on from the environment. It has its identity stolen by our nuclear genome via lateral gene transfer of key genes back to the nuclear genome to KEEP THE VIRULENCE of the bacterial origins of mitochondrion quiescent.

This is why the higher heteroplasmy gets, the shorter telomeres in the nucleus gets. At the same time, mitochondria recapture some of their bacterial biologies and cause inflammation in our tissues by capturing more deuterium than they did when they were controlled by the nuclear genome. Be careful what you read. You might be misled by the uninformed on deuterium by someone with half the story down pat. Sunlight is what keeps this controlled arrangement stable. When sunlight is absent the arrange become unstable and untenable. Deuterium is a big part of the reason why this happens. Sunlight is the ultimate vaccine for illness in the quantum model. Only 250nm-780 nm is capable of doing this in us. When the EMF is above or below this range in the spectrum of light the colony of mitochondria can morph back to its true bacterial origins. It becomes an infection within, that zaps of energy and creates inflammation in many systems where it occurs. Realize that right now that inside each of your 100 TRILLION cells is located a whole colony of ancient bacteria whose identity was stolen 650-600 million years ago....... This is why most diseases today look like infections because they really are. A mitochondrion is a bacteria in the witness protection program of eukaryotic life.

Autoimmunity begins to make a lot of sense when you have this perspective and it explains why low sulfated D3 is always seen in Auto Immunity. And that colony of bacteria has a totally independent life and independent evolutionary history and has its OWN objectives. They have been controlled by the power of sunlight because UV light has devasting effects on prokaryotes. Prokaryotes can tolerate high levels of deuterium. In fact, high levels of deuterium in bacteria improve ECT while making apoptosis close to impossible. This is very similar to the cancer state in diseased mitochondria. The increased UV light from the sun 650 million years ago on Earth caused prokaryotes to seek refuge inside of cells and adapt to the mid-life crisis of our G class star. And that colony (bacteria/mito) which is a "they" which is inside the "we" and the "we" generally thinks of itself as an "I" or a "you". But really it's all a big ILLUSION. Life is really an illusion at its core. Isn't that ironic? It was predicted by the uncertainty principle, but few people realize it. These are the ideas in between my words in Vermont last year. A mitochondriac will get the message loud and clear but have you? And this "grand illusion" results in how the eukaryotic cell generates energy from its captive slave bacteria and it is how we use 'energy and information' in all of biology. Genius always strives to answer questions the ordinary forgot to pose. This is why I love teaching people how to mito-hack life.........it is not easy but it rewarding.

# Article: CAN LOYALTY HOLD YOU CAPTIVE?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/can-loyalty-hold-you-captive-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2018-03-28T16:31:46.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 354
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# CAN LOYALTY HOLD YOU CAPTIVE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcan-loyalty-hold-you-captive-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 28, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcan-loyalty-hold-you-captive-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I am only loyal to nature these days. It was a tough lesson. Loyalty is often lauded in most circles but few people realize how it is a double-edged sword. While ostensibly loyalty is thought of as a positive trait, we are apt these days to hear about loyalty in the context of "sticky situation"—loyalty to a country, dogma or religion leading to fanatical acts of chauvinism or violence, loyalty to family or friends leading to nepotism and cronyism in government, or loyalty to co-workers or a profession leading to cover-ups of financial chicanery or unethical dealings. The commitment one shows using loyalty, as a tool, is often rewarded with a good reputation, success, and trust.

Loyalty is the fundamental element to trust and opportunities. The interesting thing is loyalty is like a coin. It has two sides. When a person commits to someone else with extreme loyalty selflessly, they often will experience a loss of personal judgment, insight and can be become a slave to poor thought and reason rather than remaining an independent thinker. In order to achieve success using loyalty as an asset, one must learn to stop when the negative consequences outweigh the positive consequences at the present moment. Loyalty cannot be bought. It needs to be earned. This is a two-way street. If the student knows a little and thinks they know a lot more without really doing the due diligence of research have they been loyal to the teacher or themselves? Haven’t they become a prisoner of their OWN CAGE?

Isn't this how the Dunning Kruger effect is born? The world needs people who think differently because that kind of thinking can eventually become the actions of a sniper. One shot, One Kill, minus their own biases to combat the collateral damage of being too confident when you are very arrogant on what you're missing. The teacher has to subtract their own biases so the student can grow once they understand how to research and think well.
