When cells shed electrons, they cannot absorb sunlight. That is why cancer is occurring in our technology world. This link below gives you the mechanism but how many of you will understand it if you do not understand the biophysics of the photoelectric effect? 

Hey there FCC…just gonna point out two things to the public that they should consider. The FCC is not a real government department. 1.The FCC grants the wireless industry’s wishes so often that it qualifies as a “captured agency. 2. It really operates as a private corporation for the CTIA that the government lets them use as a corporate shell. The payments for the user is found in the auctions for the electromagnetic spectrum licenses for us. They have adopted a perfect name for themselves. Federal Communications Commission = "The Federal Control and Command for CTIA Control" rather than "Commision for Communicating properly the risk of Disease." When you are a corporation that benefits from disease propagation are made sense you get behind control over a cure. It's quite clear after your track record, you mean what you say. You control the message and you sell doubt to people who do not understand the risks while being addicted to these products.

Olle Johannson states that the amount of radiation absorbed by our bodies today is a quintillion times (a 1 with 18 zeros) more than just a decade ago. Martha Herbert has done extensive research into the connection between electromagnetic radiation and autism and has concluded that while there are other factors, EMR is causal and/or exacerbating. U of Washington professor Martin Pall Ph.D. has written extensively on the psychiatric and physical effects of EMR on human biology. The French have banned wi-fi in schools for children younger than 14. Cyprus, Belgium, and Israel have also taken steps to eliminate or decrease school exposure and many US municipalities are also taking action. In many countries, it is illegal to advertise cell phones to children. 

**Is this the newest version of the medieval rack that we are all allowing our kids to be sacrificed on?**

Our FCC exposure limits are 1000 times less protective than most other countries including China and Russia. The Chinese have required by law that their women wear EMR protective aprons throughout pregnancy since the 1990's. Please include this pervasive pollutant that we can to a great extent control, in your list of toxins.

Have you ever wonder why China and Russia do not have an Apple, Facebook, Cisco, or Google equivalent? Many in America will believe it is because we are superior, but might the answer lie that their government actually listened to the warnings of using EMF to communicate in the 1950's? Might that be a different explanation?

**Regarding nnEMF and their deniers:** They usually work for the government or CTIA at some level. As long as the government (FCC) has the power to regulate business, business will control government by funding the candidate that legislates in their favor. A free-market thwarts lobbying by taking the power that corporations seek away from the government! The only sure way to prevent the rich from buying unfair government influence is to stop allowing the government to use physical force against peaceful people. Whenever the government is allowed to favor one group over another, the rich will always win, since they can "buy" more favors, overtly or covertly, than the poor or ignorant.

**The first casualty in technology and mobile telephony marketing is usually the truth**. You are quite wise to read the cite below. It might be the only thing you'll ever to need to know about EMF risk. You've seen this blueprint before. CTIA sells us , not progress, with their tech gear. Facebook, Google, Apple, Cisco, and telephony are all complicit. Even the Insurance industry has wised up, but you keep touting the progress of technology. **We are pushing ourselves to an extinction level event and calling it progress.........**

Be careful about the experts you listen too. Your decisions of life are only as good as the data you collect and accept especially in a technology-driven world. Civilized life, you know, is based on a huge number of illusions in which we all collaborate willingly. This implies that civilization is now firmly based upon the normalization of deviance. The trouble is we forget after a while that they are illusions and we are deeply shocked when is torn down around us. We see that now every day. If you don't believe it put on the news sometime. Clearly, normalization of deviance is something that we want to avoid in life, as it can lead to the misreading of signals. We lose focus on what matters and what does not. Today the cause of this normalization is the chronic unfettered use of technology. It is driving the process.

Guarding against this normalization requires deep analysis. Often, you need to consider whether you were successful because of what you did, or in spite of what you did. Culture requires deep care because it erodes life by decisions influenced by the waves of light used by technology to communicate and this process can be usurped to allow us to make horrendous recommendations for ourselves or the public.

This wall in Eygpt carries a lesson for us all. Solar photonics electronics is an ancient meme modern humans have ignored. **Human technology abrogates the wisdom of nature. The result is seen in modern human diseases.**

**Everyone knows we have an obesity crisis but nobody seems to know this:** Every 10% higher tech spending occurs in the USA, the obesity NHANES curves go higher!!!! The more screen time you have = the risk of obesity rises. No shocker to any mitochondriac because they know blue light destroys sleep, melatonin and leads to weight gain. It might shock those who ONLY blame food or a lack of exercise for obesity that there might be another cause. This is modern medicine's Dunning Kruger 101 moment.

The surer you are that conventional wisdom can solve most of our modern problems the more obvious it should become that something else is amiss because our longevity is now shrinking and we are getting ill faster. That link is to the non-native EMF technology uses. We are getting more ill as we use more technology and nobody wants to speak about it. Now ask yourself a tougher question, why are people in cities all of a sudden are dying faster in cities?? This data point just changed two years ago? Did you know the bulbs on the streets and TV screens all were changed in 2009 in the USA by government decree to save energy? Here is the [link.](https://theconversation.com/us-life-expectancy-just-dropped-for-the-second-year-in-a-row-lets-stop-the-trend-now-88608)

This is when Obama got rid of Edison bulbs and when big cities went to LED to save power. It is also when the entire USA TV networks went from analog to digital TV signal which mandated LCD screens be used. What did that mean? It meant more blue light exposure for humans. More irony is it also was the tipping point for mobile cell phone use in the USA. CTIA would have you all believe this is just a funny coincidence I guess. Do you believe them or the data? _Einstein once said, if you keep doing the same stupid thing over and over and get the same result that defines insanity._

Most of you know I do not like half-truths buried in evidence-based medicine or education. They always lead to 100% bad policy or poor community standards. In my opinion, most of the mankind misfortunes stem from countless untruths, both deliberate and unintentional, which people told as gospel because of haste or carelessness and poor thinking. It does not matter why it happens, just that it does. The lesson I have learned in my career is when we live or practice by other people's notions, they will be rammed down millions of people throats eventually and many more will suffer from it. **_Faith is cognitive bias in disguise_**, in my opinion. Faith in a system that fosters untruths is a faculty which enables us to believe things which we know to be untrue. Today you cannot have any faith in the FCC as the article below details.

It is a joke when you understand the depth of the science and the risk we are all taking and causing each other as we upgrade our phones and cable boxes. We need to reject the Internet of things buys not buying things with the name "smart" or RFID chip included in them. If you don't buy it and recycle your old "dumb products" your cells will benefit and the world might change back to some normalcy. **This post needs millions of shares…….will you be one?**

### Jack Kruse

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-atoms-become-biotic-from-abiotic-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I wrote the EMF 4 blog post long ago to teach you about the Pentose phosphate pathway (PPP). I did this for many reasons. I was trying to get you to realize that a cell has many trap doors or quantum demons it can use when the environment calls for them to be used. These are doors that vanish when they are not needed. When they are needed they can be massively amplified. The reason for the observed biochemical changes are always biophysical and way below a researchers ability to find them. It turns out the answer to the mystery is built into the isoforms of hydrogen a tissue can or cannot use metabolically. 

Cancer cells use the Warburg shift but some cells use the "Pasteur effect" without any problems and their growth is controlled. Two tissues in our body do this specifically. They are the retina and RBC's. What do they have in common? Both are involved in solar light transduction pathways. In proliferating cells, glucose not only produces ATP but also provides metabolic intermediates for biosynthesis. This is what the PPP really does for us. 

The PPP is upregulated in environments with nnEMF. When nnEMF is present it raises blood glucose levels without any effect from insulin or food (LCHF food guru alert). Intracellular glucose can also be directed towards biosynthesis: into the pentose phosphate pathway to generate nucleotides and nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide phosphate (NADP), or glucose can be reduced, making the amino acids, serine and glycine. I spoke about these two amino acids recently. This was the serine-glycine interconversion pathway I mentioned in the Reality series on my Patreon blog. 

Serine and glycine can link and jump from glycolysis at the phosphoglycerate step. The enzyme phosphoserine phosphatase is the final step in glucose-serine conversion. The PPP has to use NADPH. The **"H"** has to be H+ because it is the key "information qubit" life uses to teach a cell what pathway needs to be used. I believe the uncoupling proteins and haplotypes are the keys to that mystery. Cells are actually taught cells this information using LIGHT in a specific way from the sun. The lesson from fake light is quite different. The information they carry is not congruent with the suns message to our cells.

This is why certain enzymes in each tissue have isoforms themselves. they work with different isoforms of the hydrogen isotope.  Some respond to deuterium and others to H+ to open different metabolic trap doors to change the reality of a cell and alter your life. In metabolically active cells that have to use the TCA exclusively the story is quite different. These cells are trying to limit proliferation at all costs. The brain and heart are two such examples. NADH is the electron carrier that these tissues need working well in the matrix. Guess what the information quanta are there? H+. Now, you have to know how this all works. The details about the H+/D optical switch are critical to getting right to understand what is really going on below the cell level. The critics have no clue what they missed in this biophysical dance of the first atom on the periodic table that our matrix has had a love affair with. 

In this webinar below, if you choose to accept it, I will show you how life does "the mission impossible" to make abiotic atoms animated to biotic ones to live. If you don't want this webinar with ALA carte pricing you can become a full member of my website. When you know better you do better.

HERE IS THE LINK:  https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-1-quanta-17884591

# ARE CELLS SENSITIVE TO RF RADIATIONS?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcells-sensitive-rf-radiations-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 8, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcells-sensitive-rf-radiations-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Read the cite below before you read my own thoughts on it.

The following is my commentary on it. The proof already exists in the work of Herbert Frolich and Fritz Popp. We know that all living states emit light and now we know that living systems are a Bose-Einstein condensate. The last part is to figure out is the light that a living system emits have a spectrum that is monochromatic. We have proof of this now too. All cells emit ELF-UV light. In fact, when the eye or skin are illuminated by sunlight we can measure ELF-UV light emission from cells going slightly higher! Popp found most of the light cell emitted under a photomultiplier is ELF-UV light now called bio-photons. Right now modern physics "believes" that a BEC can only form in ultracold environments but the hints that it can form in a warm wet environment is already published in topology, topologic spintronics, and in photosynthetic data of the last decade.

Recent researchers showed that runaway stimulated collisions in Bose-Einstein condensates to cause the collective emission of matter-wave jets that resemble fireworks. What does this mean in English? It means we finally now can explain why all living state emits bio-photons for the first time. People forget light is a boson in physics. The researchers observed that the structures and atom occupancies of the jets stem from the quantum fluctuations of the condensate. This means that BEC’s emit light and do not flick off atoms as we previously believed and this now explains why Fritz Popp work with photomultipliers saw all living systems emit specific frequencies of light depending upon the state of he examined.

To be more precise, for the physicists out there these light jets emitted from cells are likely coming from the parametric amplification of the vacuum fluctuation in the BEC state of cells. Since we know this is true there is no doubt that cells react to RF in a big way and this will lead to massive changes in a 5 G world because that network using the highest powered RF frequencies in the electromagnetic spectrum. This is why if you live in a large American city you are seeing all these weird metal boxes show up on street corners, lampposts, and traffic lights. These are the small RF repeater antennas that a 5 G network need to work. The government already knows the amount of RF radiation a 5 G network will use because they use the TETRA network for first responders and military applications. What they do not know is how this level of radiation will affect the human system and they are doing these small inconspicuous studies hoping none of realizing what is ongoing. They are doing the testing after the FCC has fully approved the 5 G network roll out. If you search Tom Wheeler's National Press Corp talk on YouTube you can see this for yourself.

This video below is quite old and shows you that industry research cannot be trusted one iota.

In quantum biology, this means for the first time we have definite proof that these results reveal the quantum nature of matter-wave emission in cells. This grant is coming from DARPA. That should be a big clue who is interested in the data. You can bet the public will never hear about the results. The recent NTP toxicity study of May 2016 still has been largely buried by the government and by the cell Industry. in 2018, the data has now been made public and results clearly show cancer is very likely the result of long-term exposure to non=native EMF. Scripps is in San Diego and so is industry powerhouse Qualcomm. Their alignment is pretty easy to find if you read 10 Q reports as I do. The public is paying for this research so this is the reason I mention it here. You need to know where and how your money is being spent and demand to look at the study design and methodology. Often times industry/government sponsored data is created to muddy the science of understanding on purpose. The reason for this is buried in the 1996 FCC law on the electromagnetic spectrum used for communications. I would strongly suggest you read Dr. Andrew Marino's book, "Going Somewhere" to get a full flavor of this posts implications.

Scripps needs to read more on the physics we already know about and that is published on this topic to look for the nonlinear effects of the RF spectrum on the living state because "how the experiment is set up" will 100% determine if the cellular effect is found or hidden. This is why we have RF studies in the literature that shows the effect and others who don't. Corporations know how to pay for science and control the methodology to get the results they want to keep profits running in. For those of us who read across disciplines, we already have insights of the effect on cells and RF sensitivity. All bone growth stimulates us RF pulse to stimulate stem cells. We also use RF pulses in MRI to change the relaxation state of hydrogen protons in us. We just await your experimental proof provided the methodology picks up both linear and non-linear effects of light.

### Jack Kruse

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdunning-kruger-effect-cognitive-bias-real-physical-loss-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Wake-up call = poor sleep = poor autophagy/mitophagy = neurodegeneration. Alzheimer's disease (AD) starts as a circadian rhythm disorder. Don't believe me? sleep/wake cycles are off initially for decades and individuals experience nighttime wandering and agitation. Lack of sleep, as well as fragmented, non-deep sleep, accelerates the development of amyloid plaques in the brain because neurons lose their ability to undergo mitophagy and default to using apoptosis and this cause atrophy in the brain. How a lack of sleep can cause Alzheimer’s. [HYPERLINK](http://bit.ly/2GUj39f)

Out of curiosity are there more women than men that have Alzheimer’s? Women. why? They are the sex that transfers light information to the next generation so their systems are more sensitive to information loss. Jack, is this true? [HYPERLINK PROOF](https://news.usc.edu/108027/why-does-alzheimers-disease-affect-women-more-than-men/)

WOW, you say. Don't.

So we've established that poor sleep and AD are linked. Science has also shown us that exercise seems to help AD. If you are a true blue mitochondriac you might say.......hey that doesn't make sense. is due to a lack of energy and we exercise we are making the ATPase spin faster and this causes us to use more energy not less. Exercise should hinder the cognition of AD patients. Right? is a nonlinear disease of information quanta loss in mitochondria. When you only think about the energy you'd be correct. But is AD a disease of a lack of energy? Or is there is something else to the story everyone has missed that explains why exercise improves AD symptoms? yep.

**Clue:** Not enough sun = Low redox = inflammation = NRF2 = loss of information quanta and energy. Loss of Nrf2 exacerbates the age-related loss of skeletal muscle mass and contractile dysfunction. https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2213231718301745

So it appears from the article above muscle function and brain function are linked. Both tissues have a lot of mitochondria correct?

Sarcopenia and a cognitive loss are due to information quanta loss.......not just an energy loss. That is what the Quantum Thermodynamics Patreon blog series is all about. In this series, I have already taught my members and Patrons that the Dunning Kruger effect is not a cognitive bias as most small thinkers believe. It is a PHYSICAL effect caused by a loss of information transfer even in the face of decent energy transfer. So, now you might be beginning to realize why I refuse to dumb anything down. I have been asked by many people, "Do you think your simple message is going to help the small or high IQ people?"

High IQ can be a detriment in learning Quantum Biology, in my opinion, because their cup of knowledge is too full of facts that are immaterial to the keys cells use to process information. I know it was for me, and it has been a hurdle for many people in my community. Most do not understand my perspective and truthfully understanding of quantum theory isn't needed to gain the wisdom of nature. This is why hippo's and lions do not need physics textbooks to do what instinct teaches them. Instinct is built from information quanta in sunlight.

Hre is my epistemology on that topic:

Many people take a small bit of knowledge, when they are intelligent and go off on a tangent to confuse themselves and others. This is why you need to think for yourself. You have to understand how the small detail connects to the larger fabric of life and nature. If the skeptic cannot explain the connection with their premise you have just exposed where their true Dunning Kruger effect lies. This is instructive to the audience watching it all unfold before their eyes. This is easy for the low IQ person to see but much harder for the high IQ to realize like you to observe.

Many don't realize how we think forms the perspective needed to gain wisdom. In this blog above I showed you how is linked to a loss of information over energy in a tissue with a high mitochondrial density. Certainly both decline, but exercise increases information processing between the quantum spin of the electron, proton, and photon to improve cognition in ways that astound people when they learn about quantum thermodynamics. Quantum thermodynamics does not equal classical thermodynamics.

For in-depth blogs on the coming age of quantum, biology becomes a Patron and I will teach you and answer your questions directly for the cost of a coffee a month. In the QT series, I show you definitively that the Dunning Kruger effect is not a cognitive bias. It is a real physical thing built around a loss of information quanta. is a disease that manifests from a serious loss of information quanta on a relative basis from the energy loss that occurs in mitochondria. You can find the series here at https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse

# Transgenerational epigenetics is destroying Darwinian ideas. GOOD, IT IS ABOUT TIME. Patients deserve better than we've given them.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 2, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Ftransgenerational-epigenetics-destroying-darwinian-ideas-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Epigenetics is where modern systems biology intersects with quantum mechanics. It is a meta-discipline that cannot be understood without understanding how quantum thermodynamics has altered the classical thermodynamic laws because of information quanta. What does this imply? It means that to truly understand epigenetics power in biology, you have to embrace many disciplines of science that you're ignorant about. For me, it took going back to eight basic sciences and then layering in alternative medicine, convention medicine, convention research, material sciences, astrobiology, and geology. Then I learned about Quantum Thermodynamics. 

This is when things changed. I began to realize how nature drove evolution and it was not what I was taught about Darwin. The electric and magnetic fields of sunlight and darkness are coded for in our waterbased CSF hydrogen bonding networks. The information in water is transferred via protons and protonicity to every lipid, protein, and carbohydrate in our body to build the wisdom of nature in each cell to extract as much energy and information from the light of the sun that becomes physically possible using quantum thermodynamic LAWS. This implies that our zip code is more important than our genetic code because it is what programs your epigenetic code post-translationally folks. Epigenetics provides a new framework for the rules of heredity. When the rock band "The Who" asked you who you were in their music 40 years ago, few had the answer in biology, so they just guessed and filled in the gaps of who Darwin that we might be as a species. It was his best guess based on what he found on his trip to the equator. Today we know most of his ideas leave a lot of unanswered questions. He really got it wrong when you consider what epigenetics has taught us the last 20 years but few of you even know that. Dogma is a bitch like that to conventional ideas. Mitochondriacs never settle for any version of settled science. The result of the 20 the century showed us Darwin had to be wrong because that diseases of aging 1900 became diseases of mid-life in modern humans by 1950. In 2018, the blue zone in Okinawa has been completely flipped in ONE GENERATION. They went from having the longest lifespan in 1950 to the shortest today. Darwin's theories cannot explain that but quantum biology can and does. 

Be careful with paradigms of that have outgrown their usefulness in medicine. The picture below is instructive to the mitochondriac misfits I teach. You must think deeper and better than you were taught.

Our elder years are now spent on medical support, pharmaceutical support and much earlier life support. This is not the life most want to live. In QT you learn quickly that the smallest changes lead to the biggest alterations in reality we observe. This defines a nonlinear effect. Life is the most astounding nonlinear effect on Earth. What small changes alter proteins, lipids, and nucleic acids to drive evolution in us daily? Electrons and protons are programmed by the light we live under. That information is coded for in their quantum spin number and it can be SHARED with the angular orbital momentum of other particles inside of mitochondria to change our biology by altering small signaling molecules made in our matrix. **This all happens by light the from the sun you get, OR DONT get.** This is how evolution really operates and has very little to do with natural selection as the paradigm wants you to believe. The energy and information additions and subtractions are the key to how genes are changed epigenetically. Now we have the paper below showing how one small change can go 14 generations without needing any changes to our nuclear genome needed for this change. This is what happened in Japan to those Okinawans since 1950 too.

 **Artificial beliefs are what sustain a failing paradigm of belief. It is time we all realize it.**

As long as you are willing to ask yourself harder questions than the answers you currently have, you are breaking through; but the moment you begin to accept things as they are, you are psychologically dead. Do not pursue what should be, but understand what is present around you today. That is the question that epigenetics asks itself every second of everyday DNA or RNA are working in our cells. Become aware of the implications, your life and health depend on it.

Ultimately, we are who we are when we conceptually marry our relationship with neolithic diseases to our personal and societal responsibility for wellness. Modern healthcare does not understand this connectedness. Quantum Thermodynamics makes this the key business of future clinicians in healthcare.

Calcitonin hormone is involved in the homeostasis of calcium and phosphorous in the blood plasma. This is important in allowing the blood to create anions in the arterioles that come to the surface when IRA and UVA light hit the skin and lower firing from the melanopsin system of the skin. This lowers infection risk because it keeps deuterium in the blood plasma while fostering flow H+ in the skin to run the TCA and urea cycle. This helps stabilize cell membrane physiology throughout the organism.

Sepsis is a systemic inflammatory response syndrome (SIRS) that affects all organs because it destroys cell membranes everywhere but the destruction of mitochondrial membranes is especially dangerous because it leads to sepsis. 5G will increase these risks that are already substantial in humans. How big is the problem? During the course of evolution, our immune system has eventually developed to deal with infectious pathogen invasions by various host defense mechanisms. The inflammatory response is one of the primary responses to a viral/microbial invasion, which leads to systemic illness which is referred to as sepsis. Its severity correlates with mortality in a big way.  This was tested in the 1918 flu pandemic. My prediction is that will happen again. Why do I say it?

5G interrupts calcium and phosphorus function at our surfaces by ruining the topology and the topologic charge. Sepsis may occur as a result of infections acquired from community, hospitals or other healthcare facilities or other triggers in the environment like electropollution. There is an alarming number of 18 million new sepsis cases reported each year worldwide with a mortality rate ranging from 30–50%. 

Most people are unaware of these risks. I expect this number to double within 2 years of 5G release globally. Procalcitonin (PCT), a member of the calcitonin superfamily could be a critical tool for the diagnosis of sepsis because it tells the quantum clinician that an environmental stimulus is present ruining the cell membrane physiology of the person causing multi-organ system failure because of deuteration of Kreb's bicycle. You better become aware of this mechanism because you will hear a ton more about as 5G invades your surfaces.   The attack will be viral, bacterial, mold, fungi, and the rare bugs that affect animals will likely begin to affect humans in mass quantities.

# Article: WHY DO STATINS CAUSE DIABETES?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/why-do-statins-cause-diabetes-jack-kruse>

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHY DO STATINS CAUSE DIABETES?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-do-statins-cause-diabetes-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 22, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-do-statins-cause-diabetes-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Today's post here on Linkedin is related my new [Quantum Thermodynamics #8 blog](https://www.patreon.com/posts/qt-8-krebs-18925873) on Patreon on why understanding slowing the kinetic flux through the urea cycle affects how the TCA cycle can operate or becomes dysfunctional kinetically. Statins are one think that slow urea cycle kinetics and inhibit diabetics from fat burning via beta-oxidation. This blog is important to those who have diabetes and are on any version of statin. Could the statin make your diabetes WORSE being on a statin? Yes. Why Jack?

Statins affect the cataplerosis and anaplerosis pathways in the urea and TCA cycle (see pic above). That is what [Quantum Thermodynamics blog #8 on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/posts/qt-8-krebs-18925873) is all about. What are the implications for the T2D on a statin? Together, the findings from many recent studies I have read indicate that clusters of metabolites involved in multiple pathways not directly connected with cholesterol metabolism may play a role in modulating the response to simvastatin treatment because of the effect of gluconeogenic amino acids. How?

Metabolomics studies of the urea cycle intermediates is an eye-opener for the mitochondriac. what do statins do? They alter cholesterol metabolism. Did you know that cholesterol metabolism links to [4 amino acid catabolic pathways](https://www.diapedia.org/5105758814/rev/37) in humans? Most have no idea it is true. It turns out one of them is a really big deal. Methionine links to the TCA by way of succinyl-Co-A. I get into those details in the cites below. Metabolites whose changes correlated big time with LDL-C lowering response to simvastatin in the patients who are full range responders included **cystine, urea cycle intermediates, and the dibasic amino acids ornithine, citrulline, and lysine.** These dibasic amino acids share plasma membrane transporters with arginine, the rate-limiting substrate for nitric oxide synthase (NOS), a critical mediator of cardiovascular health of the microcirculation related to the exposure of the skin and eye to UVA light. This should really open your eyes if you are following the story carefully.

^^^^Most diabetics have poor microcirculation because they never get enough UVA light via the skin and eye. This is why they heal so poorly. This light frequency actually inhibits ECT and protects faulty mitochondria to be marked by autophagy or apoptosis for replacement. This "quantum signaling message" is broken in diabetics because of their lack of solar exposure.

Most T2D are deficient in exposure to this type of light on their skin as the picture above shows. Note the penetration of UVA light into the dermis. This means a patient with T2D on a statin has a slow kinetic flow through their urea cycle which makes their disease process worse because anytime the urea cycle kinetics slow, so does the ability of the TCA to spin for beta-oxidation of fat. This means a statin makes you less likely to burn fat normally. This means that the T2D on a statin is being forced to use glycolysis and the PPP for all bio-synthesis. This is why physicians "think" carbs are fine for a diabetic and they just chase their glucose with insulin. That idea, extrapolated over the years, leads to amputations and complications in the eye and skin tied to hyper-proliferation.

Baseline metabolic profiles of the good and poor responders have been carefully analyzed by orthogonal partial least square discriminant analysis in papers so as to determine the metabolites that best separated the two response groups and could be predictive of LDL-C response from the statin. What are the implications? Among those most affected by the statin class of drugs were xanthine, 2-hydroxyvaleric acid, succinic acid, stearic acid, and **_fructose_**. Maybe Dr. Robert Lustig needs to upgrade his theories on sugar as an addictive toxin? Might it be something else behind a surface understanding? Yes, it is. The mitochondriac perspective is quite different.

That is why statins are not wise in anyone with defects in the urea or TCA cycle. The most common cause of a slowed kinetics is cell membrane damage in the mitochondria not protected by autophagy that allow deuterium to get into the Kreb's bicycle mechanism. I cover that in my May 2018 webinar. You might want to read that Patreon QT#8 blog folks. When you know better you do better. Few ever do.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 26, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Ffrom-mouths-babes-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

By [Matt Maruca](https://www.facebook.com/mmaruca34?hc_ref=ARSp4E6vBZI18S5beI5uXEdBll2FNLyIqD66gRdENxavF1Wgr4z5pDJkjgrvvqI-v74) 

Matt (pictured below) is one of my teenager mitochondriac members at www.jackkruse.com. He is 18 years old and has recovered his wellness using quantum biologic principles. He hails from Philadelphia but he is currently in Los Angeles trying to help some music moguls recover from their night lifestyles.

Do you feel like you need weed, cigarettes, antidepressants, alcohol, Xanax, a , vape, or something else like this to feel good?

•

Morning sunlight is how we naturally turn our brain on and begin to create and secrete our most important hormones and neurotransmitters. If we do not get morning sunlight, we are never fully awake.

•

The key difference between a living body and a dead body, although they share the same exact chemicals, is that in the dead body, there are no electrons flowing through the mitochondria, meaning that there is no ENERGY for breath or blood flow.

•

Where does this energy come from? Hmmm. Is it from food? Where does the energy in food come from? Is it from Oxygen? Where was oxygen created?

•

Food was created by light in photosynthesis, and oxygen was created in the sun. At the core, all of the energy in the universe is electromagnetic, meaning that it's light in nature.

•

Likewise, the energy in our bodies starts as light. So is it really that far-fetched that light could have such a foundational impact on our body, given that it is the difference between being dead and being alive? I wouldn't say so, but it's amazing how this simple idea comes to people at such a shock. Most religions even speak of the body and universe as one of the light, as in Genesis:

•

"In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth. Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was hovering over the waters.

•

And God said, “Let there be light,” and there was light. God saw that the light was good, and he separated the light from the darkness. God called the light “day,” and the darkness he called “night.” And there was evening, and there was morning—the first day."

•

Whether you believe in God or "the universe", these ideas hold true. The big bang also inexplicably occurred with a big flash of (what?).

•

The days I began to stop hiding from the sun were the first days that I ever felt awake.

Matt helping the music elite recapture their lost magic...................

# WHAT WENT DOWN IN VERMONT 2018?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-went-down-vermont-2018-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 4, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-went-down-vermont-2018-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

What else happened in Vermont 2018? 

This paper below destroyed food gurus and microbiome gurus when one of the key authors of the paper, Jeff Leach, spoke on late Saturday. Jeff is a great guy and I enjoyed our conversations. I wish I could say that about all who were there.

My take: Artificial light exposure at night blunts melatonin secretion. This is worse for young children or people who live in cities with a big nightlife and with lots of people who use technology devices for their brain and their gut. It is devastating because now melanopsin is not just in the eye it is in the skin and the skin is by far our largest organ and it controls all the [peripheral clock genes](https://www.sciencealert.com/your-body-has-trillions-of-clocks-in-its-cells) in the human body because of how melanopsin works with the Vitamin A cycle in the brain. This has massive implications for many organ diseases.

Jeff Leach’s research team findings on the Hazda at the equator, recently published in _SCIENCE_ have broken the false narrative of the microbiome gurus.

In Vermont 2018 he reported to the audience that **the Hazda were given processed food, coke, Fanta, and wheat and ANTIBIOTICS and their microbiome was exactly the same as it was 24-48 hours after exposure with direct fecal testing in the field.** He told the audience that this data broke their hypothesis that food really was the main driver of mitochondrial diversity. When I mentioned to him that night did he know why the microbiome remained constant, he had no answer. He said he wanted to know. He said his research team was going to study it. I told I had the answer and that I would give it on stage on Saturday, June 2, 2018, and blow him away and ruin the thesis of Zach Bush MD, who spoke after Jeff did. It appears Dr. Bush had no idea what the implications of Jeff's amazing work at the equator really proved.

**_It proved solar cycles control the microbiome and not food choices._**

The microbiome remains the same in the Hazda because of where they live. At the equator, solar light also has NO VARIATION, and as such, the skin controls all the peripheral clocks in the gut because of the melanopsin mechanism in the skin and subcutaneous fat and eye. that was my topic I was speaking on last at this great event.

Since melanopsin is loosely covalently bound to Vitamin A, any man-made blue light exposure of the skin causes circadian disruption of the peripheral clocks. Since Vitamin A cycles are tightly yoked to Vitamin D production in the skin as Vitamin A drops in the plasma from skin irradiation with the blue light it DIRECTLY limits how much Vitamin D3 can be made. This explains why the VDR exists in the gut and how it affects the VDR receptors in the enterocytes. Without the VDR and D3 complex present in the gut Electron chain transport of the enterocytes could not be slowed. They need to be slowed to enable apoptosis to occur every 24-48 hours. This is why food is immaterial in the damage is caused because those enterocytes are designed to be taken out every few days. It seems Zach forgot the basics he and I learned in medical school. It also means he has no Earthly idea how the gut really operates. This explains why people what he does. I suspected as much before the event, but on Saturday, June 1st, I knew it was accurate for the first time.

Moreover, the man-made blue light exposure on the skin caused alterations in the peripheral clock genes of the enterocytes in those humans. the Hazda rarely face this risk according to Jeff. He lives with them for months at a time and when I mentioned this link he said he would be changing his hypothesis now. With man-made blue light, this means humans lose control of replacing their enterocytes every 24-48 hours as the body normally does. I also reminded him that when the circadian mechanism is intact, the body normally repairs all enterocytes in 24-48 hours no matter the cause of the gut surface insult, proving that the strong solar stimulates strengthened the enterocyte damage by FULL REPLACEMENT from all etiologies. Apoptosis performs this task in the gut. Deuterium in the gut lining helps this effect. Nature expects environmental insults to these cells hence why they are replaced so fast normally. This hypothesis has been mine since 2003. It is also why I have a huge problem with functional medicine and most food gurus. They only believe food controls things when it is now obvious that the sun does. It also explains why humans are the only primate with zonulin that makes the gut more leaky design to viruses that drive genomic change in us using solar light as well. This is why Barry Marshall had to drink H. pylori to infect himself because none of the chimps he was using had zonulin to see the effect himself in their guts. 

I also told the audience that people like Zach Bush, who study the microbiome of people in the USA, would never be capable of seeing, studying, much less understanding this effect because his clinic is in Virginia and his patients do not have tightly coupled mtDNA haplotypes the Hadza do, and they are not wild humans who live close to the equator who expose their skin to the sun with strong UV light. 

Dr. Zach told the audience that he looked forward to debating with me the role of mitochondria and the microbiome and I told Zach and the audience from the stage there was no need to share wine and talk with me. He needed to talk to Jeff Leach and learn why his methodology is badly flawed and have led him to false narratives. For the record, Dr. Zach did not introduce himself to me nor did he speak one word to me in Vermont. I found that hilarious since he tried to call me out from the stage. He got schooled by Jeff's talk because he had no idea about the implications of light on the skin to control the gut clocks. He needs to focus more on how light controls the microbiome AND SO DO YOU!!!! 

Moreover, this is where the other skin opsin comes to play, neuropsin, our UVA light receptor. It is the key opsin in the creation of endogenous light activation of the shortwave UV light mechanism I mentioned in the Vermont talk. UVA light sensation is the key stimulus to the creation of the UV spectrum cells need to operate . They do this by pressurizing deuterium in the blood plasma after having a sustained pile driving pinch by the suns rays from outside in, and the upward rise of blood and subcutaneous fat because of the effect of UVA light on nitric oxide production. 

Jeff and his team have proved one of my predictions again that food cannot alter the microbiome if the sun is strong and builds the circadian mechanism into a fortress. With this new knowledge, no one should buy any probiotics or RESTORE probiotics from anyone including Dr. Bush. Never mind there is not one in vivo study showing RESTORE works, now with the news melanopsin is on the skin/fat it blows all the bullshit memes about food changing the microbiome out of the water.

This is why for years I have told my patients to avoid the meme of probiotics. The shortwave UV light we make is how the blood is kept free of pathogens because prokaryotes and parasites cannot tolerate UV light at all!!!! The same is true for mycotoxins and fungi. The mechanism of shortwave UV production helps you now understand why immunity is wholly related to solar exposure, proper T cell activation in the skin and proper optical signaling in the skin controls the entire immune system body wide including the GUT!!!! That is where the GALT lies. The functional medicine community tries hard to sell the meme it is the gut where most immune diseases begin because they have NO IDEA what they missed in the skin. Effectively they have ZERO SKIN in any game but their own profit lines.

The light on the skin does it and Jeff Leach proved in the Hazda. Instead, they should book trips to the Yucatan peninsula and follow Jeff’s findings in the field on how the sun sculpts the microbiome by controlling the immune system and circadian mechanisms built into the UV spectrum of sunlight. That is how real science is performed. Well done Jeff Leach!!! This was my top moment from Nourish Vermont 2018.

Jeff launched the Human Food Project (non-profit, 501(c)(3)) to blur the line between the science and the general public. He also co-founded American Gut, the world’s largest open-source/crowd-funded microbiome project in the world (also includes British Gut, Asian Gut, and Australian Gut). Jeff is a Visiting Research Fellow within the Department of Twin Research & Genetic Epidemiology at King’s College London. JEFF's talk was my favorite because his field data once again confirmed one of my theory's predictions that the light on the skin and eye control what the microbiome looks like. **IT has ZERO to do with food folks when your redox is built properly by the sun. It was a** Big BOOM in Vermont destroying the food narratives that need to be extinguished. These are the narratives that destroy public confidence.

**CITES:**

http://science.sciencemag.org/content/357/6353/802

# Article: GADOLINIUM TOXICITY A 5G DISEASE?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/gadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2018-06-07T14:53:00.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 495
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# GADOLINIUM TOXICITY A 5G DISEASE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fgadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 7, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fgadolinium-toxicity-5g-diseases-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The dramatic increase in the use of cellular telephones has generated concern about possible negative effects of radiofrequency and microwave signals delivered to the brain. When cell phones are placed against the head it opens the blood-brain barrier to things that should not get in. Moreover, if you are afflicted with 4G and 5G electrosensitivity it also allows you to have a leaky brain and retinal barrier. Blue light can cause this too in the skin because its arterioles are loaded with melanopsin and this opsin is loosely bound to Vitamin A. When Vitamin A drops in the plasma it can cause circadian mismatches that cause the barrier in the retina and brain to also become leaky. Blue light is a form of nnEMF that is less powered than 5G. Both alter mitochondrial redox potentials.

This is usually associated with poor redox potentials in cells. People who are already ill will be afflicted by this. I fully expect this problem to show up in the cities with the first rollouts of 5G. Think NYC, Austin, LA, and Denver/Colorado Springs/Washington DC/ Vegas/ SF, San Diego. Be aware of it. 

Dr. Allan Frey, biophysicist, and engineering psychologist. His work has changed the scientific approach to the subject of radiation and made it an important topic for other scientists. What has he done? It is important to know what the blood-brain barrier (BBB) is. By definition, it is a highly selective semipermeable membrane (meaning it allows certain molecules or ions to pass through it by diffusion) barrier that separates the circulating blood from the brain. He found out that this kind of radiation could break the blood-brain barrier and harm the circulatory system. After long-term exposure, bacteria and toxins could enter the brain environment and affect the functioning of the nerve cells. Frey used a relatively simple method to describe his work.

The circulatory system of rats was injected with a fluorescent dye. As we know, the brain is protected from taking such substances due to the blood-brain barrier so it remained pink-grey while different organs were fluorescing. Then, animals were exposed to microwave radiation, after a few minutes the dye got through the barrier of the brain. It happened because even at low-frequency signals could open the protective barrier. Doctor Allan Frey’s studies were reported in the Annals of the New York Academy of Sciences in 1975. That is how long we have known about it. Gadolinium deposition is another consequence of a blue-lit microwaved environment from an MRI scan. Be aware it can happen from this contrast material because it is a transition metal that interacts with RF and microwaves via its D shell electrons.

Sadly the MRI contrast is retaining in everyone that has it - an absolute risk to be aware of. The consent form has now changed to reflect this.

**CITES**

 https://appliedradiology.com/articles/an-overview-of-gadolinium-deposition-disease

# Can space teach us a tech lesson in medicine?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcan-space-teach-us-tech-lesson-medicine-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 12, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcan-space-teach-us-tech-lesson-medicine-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Humans are built for the physics of Earth and not the physics of other bodies on the solar system. Forcing humans there is like the classic analogy, fitting a square peg into a round hole. Why is this paper interesting to me? When oxygen drops here on Earth, cells have to use glycolysis and the PPP because they cannot use the TCA and urea cycle. They must default to use glycolysis and the PPP. This means that immune function is suboptimal when oxygen levels drop for any reason. That is what the core message of this paper is, but I doubt anyone sees it this way. This is why mitochondrial diseases of aging exist on Earth and why they are ACCELERATED in nnEMF places like SPACE. 

Therefore, this scenario can be made worse with any deficit in AM morning sunlight too. This also occurs in space. NASA does not see these links but you should because there is a deep mitochondriac lesson here. This condition on the Moon mimics what happens to humans on Earth who live predominately indoors under the blue light too. This is also an alien environment for humans this is why humans who live inside out of the air and sunlight have higher rates of skin and lung diseases on Earth too.

It is nice to see the homology in the effect in space humans exist too. I am not so concerned about astronauts, but I am far more concerned about the zoo humans reading this right now who think this paper does not scale down to affect them because they are reading it at night with their eyes and skin exposed to the light that causes the same disease in astronauts in space. You must reject how you continue to live your life on Earth right now divorced from nature.

# Article: THE VERMONT 2018 VIDEO IS NOW LIVE.
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/vermont-2018-video-now-live-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2018-07-03T15:57:27.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 594
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fvermont-2018-video-now-live-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 3, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fvermont-2018-video-now-live-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Why is melanopsin/retinol key to understanding all human disease? In physics, time in itself, absolutely, does not exist; it is always relative to some observer or some object because of how light builds it. Without a clock I say 'I do not know the time’. You do not. This is why evolution built one in the SCN and uses melanopsin to control the peripheral clock genes. The SCN clock must run fast than the melanopsin mechanism to make sense of the chaos around us. 

The implications of this statement are far reaching. Without matter time itself is unknowable. Time is a function of matter; and matter therefore is the clock that makes infinity real. This is why the time crystals in you are coded for DNA. If you ask me, the brain, in fact all neuroectoderm was innovated by evolution to tell time. I think it is the single most important function of the nervous system.

With the human clock, we progress a step farther, in each tick of the clock with solar rays. When the clock is affected by man made blue light our clock becomes defective. Even darkness can destroy our metronome. It needs the power of the sun to operate. In 1988, a cave explorer named Véronique Le Guen volunteered for an extreme experiment: to live alone in an underground cavern in southern France without a clock for one hundred and eleven days, monitored by scientists who wished to study the human body's natural rhythms in the absence of time cues. For a while, she settled into a pattern of thirty hours awake and twenty hours asleep. She described herself as being "psychologically completely out of phase, where I no longer know what my values are or what is my purpose in life."

When she returned to society, her husband later noted, she seemed to have an emptiness inside her that she was unable to fully express. "While I was alone in my cave I was my own judge," she said. "You are your own most severe judge. You must never lie or all is lost. The strongest sentiment I brought out of the cave is that in my life I will never tolerate lying." A little more than a year later, Le Guen swallowed an overdose of barbiturates and lay down in her car in Paris, a suicide at age thirty-three. Society is now afflicted with an opiate and suicide epidemic while it bathes itself in blue light and nnEMF. That is the power of the sun and the untold story of a life lived in darkness.

This video might just change your life. Is it a video that will challenge everything you believe? Yes, I think so. The more time I spend around academics, I note that when a message offends people in positions of power, one often observes unconventional tactics used to demean the work or person, which evade the thorny issues of engaging in the argument. Academia is devolving. The idea that "science is settled" and that opposing views are met with personal attacks & censorship, rather than arguing ideas on their merit, is the antithesis of science.

Never underestimate the ability of others to hide knowledge about disease etiology beneath a carefully curated façade of the illusion of knowledge called "evidenced based settled science". Your experts do not even know these two studies exist much less how they operate in you.

**_Here is the link to the Vermont 2018 talk:_** https://www.patreon.com/posts/nourish-vermont-19729402

# Article: BELIEVING BULLSHIT IS A BLUE LIGHT DISEASE.
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/believing-bullshit-blue-light-disease-jack-kruse/>
**Published:** 2018-07-03T13:07:36.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 355
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fbelieving-bullshit-blue-light-disease-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 3, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fbelieving-bullshit-blue-light-disease-jack-kruse%2F&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

**_The take home:_** CHOOSE THE LIGHT YOU LIVE UNDER WISELY.

We tell ourselves bullshit stories in order to get by and live in this dysfunctional world. This is what we call the narrative fallacy. Our brain can’t help but look at a series of facts — facts that often have incredibly complex cause and effect relationships — without forcing a simple, logical link between them. As a result, we mistakenly assign meaning where there is none. There is a clear danger in doing this. The more our stories diverge away from the reality at hand, the more likely we are to land ourselves in situations that are going to cause some sort of health harm or a behavioral conflict. Evolution, ultimately, doesn’t care for our thoughts and feelings, and it’s not afraid to punish us with health consequences if we refuse to get out of nature's way.

On social media, you can see those people who look for "the sermon" in another reported suicide, for the social or moral lesson in the murder of a group in Chicago. We interpret what we see because of what we believe, as a result, we select the most workable situation for our cognitive bias of the multiple choices. We live entirely, especially if we are writers, by the imposition of a narrative line upon disparate images, by the “ideas” with which we have learned to freeze the shifting phantasmagoria which is our actual experience. This is made easier in a low dopamine state. This is why bullshit pervades modern life.

We all live with an identity, fueled by a stream of memories, that is weaved together to create its own imaginary character, living in its own movie.Except, life isn’t a movie. Treating it like one only leads to undue pain. Man, in his natural habitat is resistant to bullshit. Evolution made us resilient for a reason. We don’t need a bullshit story to weigh us down to live a life society wants us to live........but blue light allows us to believe bullshit. #melanopsinwisdom.

# Article: WHY DO SHIFTWORKERS IN MUSIC KILL THEMSELVES SO OFTEN?

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHY DO SHIFTWORKERS IN MUSIC KILL THEMSELVES SO OFTEN?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-do-shiftworkers-music-kill-themselves-so-often-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 11, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-do-shiftworkers-music-kill-themselves-so-often-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Pictured above is the "former" lead singer of LinkinPark. He recently killed himself. His best friend Chris Cornell formerly the lead singer of Soundgarden did the same. Why is that? Are these two deaths related in some way? Might it be their choices? Might it be their former jobs? Might it be tied to the environment their jobs required of them?

This filmed event was done at the guest house I stayed at the night before my Vermont talk. I was interviewed live in the video for 1.5 hours and I was asked questions about how blue light affected shift workers. 40 or so of my members were in attendance and one of them put this discussion on tape for you all to hear. My videographer told me this was one of the best interviews I have ever done. I'll let you be the judge of this. 

Music deaths are now so commonplace that none of them surprise us. Why is this link present in musicians? Most musicians perform at night under blue light. They use electricity to electrify acoustic instruments, sitting within that power grid and under blue light and wearing sunglasses day and night blocking their eyes from the sun over decades.

On April 14, 1994, the [_Seattle Post-Intelligencer_](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seattle_Post-Intelligencer) reported that Cobain was "high on heroin when he pulled the trigger". The paper reported that the [toxicological](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Toxicological) tests determined that the level of morphine in Cobain's bloodstream was 1.52 milligrams per liter and that there was also evidence of [valium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diazepam) in his blood at 27 years old.

Health is the slowest form of death we create in life and few realize it. Why did Soundgarden's lead singing need the drugs he did? It was due to a lack of the protein POMC in his brain because the solar signals his brain needed never were received. When POMC is lowered, so is dopamine and melatonin. Melanopsin signaling is destroyed in both the eye and skin in musician shift workers. [This alters their attitude and mood](https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-news/kurt-cobains-downward-spiral-the-last-days-of-nirvanas-leader-99797/) chronically too. When dopamine is low in the eye and brain so is melatonin levels in those areas too. This leads to a circadian de-coupling on a massive scale. When you add in another drugs that alters time perception like Ativan/Valium you cause a frequency collapse.

Suicide in this group of people becomes explainable when you see the quantum fabric of nature unfold for a brain slowly being robbed of its redox potential. This is why physicians are now seeing a rising suicide rate too. I mention that in this video podcast too. I loved Cornell's music but we have to get the word out to them that acoustic and not electric music can save them. His best friend picture below was famous for wearing sunglasses indoors during the day. Bennington of LinkinPark killed himself a few months after Chris Cornell. He hung himself after his drinking relapsed. Underneath his iPhone beside him was his bit off fingernails. This is a classic sign of anxiety disorder.

The DJ, born Tim Bergling, killed himself with a shard of broken glass from a liquor bottle, according to sources privy to details about his death who spoke with [TMZ](http://www.tmz.com/2018/05/01/avicii-dj-suicide-glass-cut-bottle-death/). These symptoms all link back to the light he lived under as the picture from my June 2, 2018 Vermont talk on melanopsin shows below. He was 28 when he killed himself.

Modern music and modern light kill when we make it artificially and modulate its frequencies. This induces topologic changes in the charge on our skin that uncouple retinol from melanopsin that lead to a lowering of both melatonin and dopamine. This is how the path to suicide begins. That path is littered with chronic mitochondrial dysfunction that leads to excessive tattooing, drug use, poor sleep, drinking, and behavioral change.

We need to go back to the basics with music. It is based upon a fractal organization to timing too. That timing is linked to the human brain's alpha waves on the EEG. When melanopsin is off so is the alpha wave on EEG's. When the alpha wave goes then we can find problems in others waves that signify a sleep disorder. This sleep disorder always precedes sickness, suicide, and death. Michael Jackson is a perfect example of this dynamic effect below. Sunglasses at night under a massive light show. He also had a melanopsin induces autoimmune skin condition called vitiligo. Vitiligo is improved by full spectrum UV light. This is light he rarely saw as an adult. Jackson died after convincing a physician to use IV diprovan on him to allow him to sleep. He sufered from chronic insomnia for decades. 

The trend continued with Whitney Houston in her life with drugs and poor sleep. How many young people do we need to see die in the same way before we make the links of why this happening? This is why acoustic music can soothe us and why electrified music can cause massive spiking of evoked potentials that lead to addiction, depression, and suicide. Technology in music brings man inside out of the sun and we've created music shows to occur mostly at night when our retinal photoreceptors that provide the light stimulus to make POMC via the eye and in our brain is destroyed. Sunlight creates happiness and keeps us far from moods that lead to a self induced death with pills, opiates, or a rope. The human brain has many waveforms and frequencies cycling at different rates simultaneously. Moreover, many, if not all, contribute to one’s internal experience of time. Consider the death of Heath Ledger after his role as the Joker in Batman. Most of the film was done at night and by all reports his drug and alcohol use expanded while his reality about the role became very warped in delusion. That led to him taking his own life at 28 years old. It does not take very long to see the effect of a broken melanopsin system in humans.

Suicide is linked to a loss of the internal experience of time in the brain because dopamine is missing. nnEMF can cause massive spikes and losses of evoked potentials in the brain because it decouples calcium channels. When dopamine/melatonin are lacking we can perceive and sense the fractal side of nature. In those frozen states humans become able to do things humans normally would not do. Many depressed patients describe their life seems like ‘still photos’ of a flickering vision, like a movie-film which is running too slow on the screen. The ability of the brain to keep all these different frequencies in appropriate relationship and order to one another, smoothing the flow of connecting thoughts and actions, is what dopamine helps facilitate. Photons of light come to Earth and to humans in a timeless state. Our brain gives us the sense of time by coupling light frequencies to build time. Dopamine and melatonin are two gears of that mechanism. These chemicals are the "matter" that nature uses as her levers.

It takes matter in cells to create time using UV light photons. By themselves photons would perceive the world, as frozen. ### Jack Kruse
