Are today's kids really alright these days in a blue-lit/nnEMF world?

It is a question people are beginning to ask because of the rapid change of health of kids. Kids are usually quite healthy but since the advent to the tech boom they appears to be falling apart in ER's, OR's, cancer wards, and in the doctor's office.

Have you ever asked yourself why?

Sleep deprivation disrupts the lives of millions of people every day and has a profound impact on the molecular biology of the brain. These effects begin as changes within a neuron in many places but most critical in the SCN and those with melanopsin. It is also critical at the DNA and RNA level, and result in alterations in neuronal plasticity and dysregulation of many cognitive functions including learning and memory as you've learned over the last 3 days. The epigenome plays a critical role in regulating gene expression in the context of memory storage. HOW? Technology toxicity is the short answer.

**MECHANISM OF HOW IT HAPPENS:** 5-hydroxymethylcytosine (5-hmC), a derivative of 5-methylcytosine (5-mC), is abundant in the brain compared to other organs. Methyl groups have 3H+ on them and they can accept light information from B12 to become programmed, assuming B12 is available and not in limited supply from retinal damage. The rediscovery of 5-hmC in mammals demonstrates that covalent DNA modifications are more dynamic than previously believed. Is the reason why the brain, especially the frontal lobes loaded with H+ on cytosine’s amino acid residues how these cells get more information during morphogenesis? 

A protein called nogging mention in Quantum Biology-7 blog at my website www.jackkruse.com is loaded with deuterium and this protein from bone is used to control brain growth in humans. The deuterium carburetor at UCP2 is critical in controlling the metabolic rate of the mitochondrial matrix. IT ALSO SEEMS TO BE CRITICAL IN SLEEP MEDICINE deep inside the brainstem of humans. 

Noggin has a very interesting protein structure that has been shown to be able to modify human brain growth. I have a sense noggin can only work when it is programmed by the hydrogen in B12 methyl groups that are transferred in the epigenome. It appears that when noggin is defective due to free retinal too much hydrogen in the form of the deuterium isotope affect the helices of RNA and DNA. This appears to negatively impact sleep and free retinal also lowers melatonin levels directly. How much do you know about retinal and how it links to melanopsin in circadian biology?

Did you know Vitamin A ^^^^^^ is the only Vitamin on Earth, when unleashed in tissues releases all the light is absorbed? This is why every human opsin has Vitamin A as a co-factor in biology. Did you know Vitamin B12 does the opposite? It absorbs it all but holds on to its light until it donates 3 hydrogens to proteins.

Did you know blue light exposure ruins your sleep because of vitamin A release in your EYE and your skin........yep......we just found out in December 2017 humans have melanopsin in their skin. Did you know the skin is our largest organ. That means we have a lot of melanopsin and Vitamin A tied up there. How does this link to diseases?

The link between sleep and the epigenome is only beginning to be elucidated, but there is already clear evidence exists that epigenetic alterations occur following sleep deprivation. 

Gene expression is regulated by a variety of processes, including epigenetic mechanisms. Broadly, the term epigenetics refers to adaptations to the genome that do not alter the underlying genetic sequence. Specifically, epigenetic mechanisms control gene expression, and therefore the function of the cell, by modifying chromatin structure and accessibility of the genome (Brown et al., 2012; Espada and Esteller, 2013). There are three principal epigenetic mechanisms: 

1\. DNA methylation and hydroxymethylation

2\. Histone modifications

3\. Non-coding RNAs (Espada and Esteller, 2013). 

The DNA modifications that occur as a consequence of these epigenetic mechanisms form the epigenome, which varies across cells and generations due to the fact that epigenetic modifications are dynamic and sensitive to their ENVIRONMENT. Fetuses appear to be slaves to their parents light choices. This means if Mom and Dad are tech addicted their kid is going to be born with hypermethylated genome too. This is not good. Ask [Scott Kelly](https://www.cnn.com/2018/03/14/health/scott-kelly-dna-nasa-twins-study/index.html) the identical twin astronaut, who returned to Earth after 340 days in the ISS with a massive hyper-methylated genome compared to his twin who stayed on Earth. Those light choices which hypermethylated their genomes to set infants up for poor sleep and future mitochondrial damage. Astronaut Kelly knows his risks of disease is now high. Look at the environment he was in for 340 without any sun or protection of the magnetic field bathing in the solar plasma. His book is quite a read.

Why don't any of you realize your risk of weird diseases are now off the chart too because of your use and abuse of the electromagnetic spectrum?

How do you see the world? .......what is your lens? That colors all your beliefs. The environment dictates outcomes. It is a mitochondriac credo. Does it scale to other parts of life too? You be the judge? I have yet to find one where it does not.

Let me controversial here for a moment before the lesson continues. California and Mississippi is also the state where vaccines are mandatory, the US also has the most (mandatory) vaccines; exemptions are hardly posible. This has driven parents nuts with kids injured by the vaccines according to their beliefs. What they believe is plausible, but it is correct to the Black Swan perspective I am laying out here? You be the judge. Consider this before drawing your response from your ideology.

What happens when you give an immune mediate drug, like a vaccine to a kid who already has a melanopsin problem? Might they react differently than kids did 50 years ago when we gave them fewer injections or when kids played outside without much electro-pollution? Most anti-vaxxers have no idea about melanopsin biology and its link to Vitamin A (retinal) They need too, in my opinion. When a child has pre-existing melanopsin dysfunction, and it is unknown to all, it can ruin how your immune system works. Did you know that? Why? Freed Vitamin A of its weak covalent bond, is the MAIN reason. How much do anti-vaxxers talk about retinal toxicity? Now the new persepctive to consider is this: Is the vaccine the real problem or might it be the retinal damage you should be more concerned with? My members are taught to always worry and repair the melanopsin dysfunction first. Why do I teach them this???? The non-ideologue will ask the proper question next, "What are the physiologic effects of Vitamin A? 

Vitamin A and its metabolites retinal and retinoic acid appear to serve a number of critical roles in physiology, as evidenced by the myriad of disorders that accompany deficiency or excess states. In many cases, precise mechanisms are poorly understood.

**Some of the well-characterized effects of vitamin A include the following:**

Vision: Retinal is a necessary structural component of rhodopsin or visual purple, the light-sensitive pigment within rod and cone cells of the retina. If inadequate quantities of vitamin A are present, vision is impaired. All opsins in humans ARE BOUND with a loose covalent bond to retinal a form of Vitamin A.

**Resistance to infectious disease:** In almost every infectious disease studied, vitamin A deficiency has been shown **_to increase the frequency and severity of the disease_**. The anti-vaxxers might want to read that a FEW TIMES.

Several large trials with malnourished children have demonstrated dramatic reductions in mortality from diseases such as measles by the simple and inexpensive procedure of providing vitamin A supplementation. This "anti-infective" effect is undoubtedly complex, but is due, in part, to the necessity for vitamin A in normal immune responses in T-regulator cells that use B12 and folate as a co-factor. Additionally, many infections are associated with inflammatory reactions that lead to reduced synthesis of **_retinol-binding protein_** and thus, reduced circulating levels of retinol (Vitamin A).

**Epithelial cell "integrity":** Many epithelial cells appear to require vitamin A for proper differentiation and maintenance. The most important one is the gut lining. Is this why so many vaccine injury families talk about gut issues with their kids after the injection is given? Is this what is really behind the "leaky gut". The Black swan mitochondriac says, YEP. It turns out, a lack of vitamin A leads to dysfunction of many epithelia - the skin becomes keratinized and scaly, and mucus secretion is suppressed too. It seems likely that many of these effects are due to impaired transcriptional regulation due to deficits in retinoic acid signaling. that signaling is linked to the RXR, VDR receptors that are linked to DHA content in the cell membrane. If you read the first paragraph of my Brain-Gut 5 blog post from years ago you might have known that.

**Bone remodeling:** Normal functioning of osteoblasts and osteoclasts is dependent upon vitamin A. Is this why a spinal neurosurgeon might have been clued in early one 15 years ago that too many young people had bad bones and low Vitamin D at the same time? Yep. Did you know Vitamin D and Vitamin A have to be yoked to the circadian mechanism to protect each other from toxicity from each other? SERIOUS Jack? Yep.

**Reproduction:** Is this why the world seems like they need infertility doctors too to have kids these days? YEP. If nature is telling you, you are infertile, might it be Mother Nature's way of telling you the light environment around you is no good to reproduce? Funny that is how trees decide to grow in an orchard. Why do they follow the rules and why don't humans? Oh........humans have a quantum computer in their heads that allow them to make choices that break nature's laws, like photosynthesis huh? YEP. Normal levels of vitamin A are required for sperm production, reflecting a requirement for vitamin A by spermatogenic epithelial (Sertoli) cells. Similarly, normal reproductive cycles in females require the adequate availability of vitamin A too. Are you feeling me yet?

**HERE IS WHERE THE RUBBER MEETS THE ROAD:**

B12 is the only Vitamin that appears to absorb visible light and does not re-emit it easily until it gets involved with other proteins involved in methylation. Vitamin A, when free destroys photoreceptors. In humans, B12 acts like a photoreceptor for DNA and RNA. This alters the epigenetic expression of adults and adults who make babies who are now born with full fledged melanopsin dysfunction. It appears, to this Black Swan, that the isotopic make up of hydrogen in the methyl groups B12 transfers is pretty damn important to proper optical functioning in cells and it is linked to how evolution changes tissues by changing epigenetic programming using deuterium to change growth and metabolism in the mitochondrial matrix. It is also critical to sleep in the hippocampus of babies. This is why kids today cannot sleep well and they get hurt more frequently. Ask you Dad if college kids or 22 years in the NFL used to tear their ACL or get concussions as frequently as they do in the last 20 years when technology is the national pastime in the USA? If you want to blame vaccines........be my guest. I have better ideas to research. My time on the planet is short and I don't like wasting time.

For example, increased DNA methylation in the brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) gene has been associated with early-life environmental toxin exposure that leads to hypermethylation (blue/nnEMF). This happens in the brain and blood of mice, and in human umbilical cord blood samples (Kundakovic et al., 2015). Further, just the methylation of a single base within the spindle and kinetochore associated complex subunit 2 (SKA2) gene has been proposed as a biomarker for suicidal behavior in children and young adults, with replication in brain and blood samples (Guintivano et al., 2014). **TIME TO WAKE UP TO WHAT YOU TECH ADDICTION IS REALLY DOING TO YOUR SPECIES.** It is not worth those video download speeds.

I told about this mechanism in the October 2018 webinar just released two weeks ago when 5G went live in Los Angeles.

**SUMMARY:**

The predictions I made 5 years ago about blue light and nnEMF exposure will now be tested on humans. If you live in California, especially LA, pay attention to the news now in your local area when kids start getting weird infectious diseases. In many places it has already started as the links below show. The CDC is already reporting weird infectious diseases in 22 states now. Are you surprised? Why do I warn you about this now? In most population centers the FCC has allowed the switch to be flipped on. It is time for the black swans out there among you to pay deep attention to the world around you now to learn the lessons you need to survive well.

I think the first people who will know something is amiss in our environments are ER physicians and ICU nurses and hospitalist doctors who begin to see infections in patients that drugs cannot solve. See retinal infections are not caused by the virus, bug, or fungus or mold........it is cause by a disabled immune system. That is why every single astronaut since Neil Armstrong comes home from space with these things in their blood plasma and confuses the shit out of NASA. It does not confuse me, in the least. I expect it, as a black swan.

Infections caused by Vitamin A dysfunction from melanopsin dysfunction will be called drug-resistant cases by the media and health care practitioners.........it won't be that the drug or the vaccine does not work or got you ill......it will because the mechanism of action is light-based in retinal to destroy all photoreceptors in comes in contact with and the antibiotic cannot stop the release of retinol from melanopsin fast enough in the skin due to how 5G interacts with the skin's topology. Just watch and see if I am correct now. One last point.......heme is the most important photoreceptor in man. It is found in your cytochromes and this is why sepsis and vaccine injury often confuse clinicians........the presentation is acute colony mitochondrial failure in the person afflicted.

Another "plausible" fingerprint of nnEMF collateral damage is a recent outbreak of acute flaccid myelitis (AFM) throught the USA since 2014.

It is a polio-like disease, for those who don't know. Many ID docs have been complaining that polio-like diseases seem to be making a comeback.......they usually find out it is linked to other more obscure infectious agents. This is what the CPC patreon series has been telling you to brace for because of the new findings that melanopsin is now been found in our skin and subcutaneous fat. AFM is linked to enteroviruses and probably activated/promoted by environmental toxins like nnEMF. Hypervitaminosis effects of Vitamin A on the immune system are well known and published in medicine but nobody is linking the stimulus to the effect in environments known to cause hypermethylation and destruction of B12. Infectious diseases will spike in places where nnEMF is toxic. When this occurs the retinol will cause collateral B12 damage by lowering it, because it is the key photoreceptor for optical signaling of the epigenome of humans.

In children, this will lead to developmental delay in neurons, mental illness, weird brainstem tumors, anemia and many gut complaints that mimic a leaky brush border. DNA methylation is an epigenetic mechanism that has been implicated in the pathogenesis of chronic inflammatory diseases as well as malignancies, by regulating the differentiation, apoptosis, proliferation, and activation of different cell types. This is achieved through alteration of gene expression and regulation of cellular phenotype. We know that phenotype links to mtDNA damage from Doug Wallace's work, if you are a mitochondriac. I know most of you aren't. You should change that.

Now we have the data to link melanopsin dysfunction to free retinol which is a direct cell toxin for neurons. A tsunami is coming and no seems to see this asteroid headed for mankind. At least the dinosaurs saw their asteroid coming at them in the sky. The FCC and Elon Musk seems to have found how to hide the asteroid in your technology gear.

Lesson over.

Life is a sequential motion picture of light rays dancing through our optical windows in tissues. It is a very dynamic process driven by hydrated protein antennae that act as resonant light levers for action sending and receiving information constantly to attune the system and build a fidelity to the signals it senses. # WHY ARE KIDS NOW MELATONIN JUNKIES?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-kids-now-melatonin-junkies-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Nov 4, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-kids-now-melatonin-junkies-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Do you know kids are differentially more affected by nnEMF and this leads to many mental and sleep problems present in our blue-lit world because their brains are not myelinated? Do not conflate the two issues because that fact tells you it is the nnEMF doing it. Kids are more sensitive to EMF because of this one simple fact.

Consider this point folks.....What is critical to a plant to grow? Sunlight and water. Being oblivious to both is like a scientist asking why a plant will not grow in the wrong kind of light......at the wrong latitude......Would a cactus ever grow in the Arctic circle?

See you got that analogy quickly.............why don't you really understand what the US federal government NTP study on cell phone radiation means for your family?

Sometimes research is only difficult because they don’t know what they don’t know. This is the basis of the Dunning Kruger effect I often speak about. As a result, researchers ask the WRONG questions, set up poor methodology, because of what they do not know. This can lead clinicians to order the wrong tests and clinicians keep looking under the wrong stones to find answers to very common problems in our present world. This is what functional medicine does with methylation and depression. It turns out methylation is altered by ambient light frequencies and nnEMF and not your SNP or SAP on your genetic printout. These epigenetic marks are just software marks that light uses to run our hardware, which is the nuclear DNA genome. It turns out the mtDNA is what places these epigenetic marks on the DNA using the mitochondrial redox potential to create the signal via free radicals.

To answer this question precisely, mental health professionals and scientists must ask better questions by stepping outside of its normal line of questioning and think about what blue lit technology screens, depression and lack of sleep all have in common: the use of light. Blue light and nnEMF cause destruction of photoreceptors like [MELATONIN](https://www.theguardian.com/society/2018/nov/02/rise-in-melatonin-use-to-help-children-sleep-leads-to-safety-warning?fbclid=IwAR30oAaP7p_5T8t35HgGAkE5DV6RQPNQkv7-r2h5HCWgV_tcAjbyiAARPU4) and this destroys our sleep and leads to mental illness. The freed Vitamin A from our blue light detector, melanopsin is what causes the destruction. it turns out every cytochrome in our mitochondria also has a photoreceptor that is destroyed and this increases the risk of disease as our ability to make energy is further compromised in the developing brain. Children are more at risk for this because their brain is poorly insulated until 25 years old because their brains are vastly under myelinated.

The frontal lobes where most mental illness begins is the last part of the neocortex to myelinate. This is why young people are acquiring mental illness at massive rates now in the blue-lit microwaved world of technology. Moreover, how this light varies from sunlight that plants and brains need to develop properly. technology screens introduce a very alien spectrum of 5700 K (solar noon) 24/7 to the eyes and brains in very high doses. This light affects the central retinal pathways which connect the retina to the SCN, pituitary, and brain via POMC release just by shining the fake light directly into the eye which then has its effect on the brain and mood and mental status. This pathway end in the leptin regions of the hypothalamus.

When this area is hypermethylated by retinal damage (Vit A) it spreads into the brainstem via the arteries because they contain melanopsin too.

This destroys the major sleep region called the ascending reticular formation. These ruins sleep in many ways, depending on where the damage occurs in humans. Sleep is regulated by the light hormone [MELATONIN.](https://www.theguardian.com/society/2018/nov/02/rise-in-melatonin-use-to-help-children-sleep-leads-to-safety-warning?fbclid=IwAR30oAaP7p_5T8t35HgGAkE5DV6RQPNQkv7-r2h5HCWgV_tcAjbyiAARPU4) Everyone knows this now. Vitamin A release from melanopsin dysfunction DESTROYS melatonin. Anyone see a link here why kids are getting ill at alarming rates now?

**DO I HAVE TO SPELL IT OUT?**

Depression is influenced by proteins made from POMC in our eye and from the large neurotransmitters which are made from aromatic amino acids that are specifically regulated by certain frequencies in solar light. It should be blatantly obvious to anyone, but it is not. The technology companies know exactly what they are doing. This is why google, facebook, apple, and many others have patents on the blue light emitting screens. With kids now addicted to technology is no shock how children mental ability, moods, and diseases are manifesting today. Is this the reason why record numbers of kids are now being placed on melatonin? YES. Click the link below.

So what is the proof this is ongoing? Why are so many parents an clinicians using melatonin in their kids? If they knew it would thin their retina and lead to early neurodegeneration do you think they would stop and remove the iPhone or iPad from the kid instead?

# HOW WILL COFFEE AND 5G CONSPIRE TO HARM YOU?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-coffee-5g-conspire-harm-you-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 6, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-coffee-5g-conspire-harm-you-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

How does a screen destroy the human gut?

Being "alive" continues to take on new meaning.

The body is an "electrical system" as well as the biochemical one we always discuss.

Resting state networks in the brain are related to electrical activity generated in the body. Few people see how the two are quantum connected to the sun

If the body is electric, do you think being over exposed to artificial electrical fields could create a problem???

Think about the non-linear effect of cell phones, indoor lighting, TV screens and computers

The brain-gut connection is not just linked to the electrical energy, it is linked by information contained on the electrons and protons in both organs. Mitochondria organize those "bits" into an order found in a cell's free radical system. So.......how does the gut react to the order the sun uses to make food? Here is where it gets really interesting for the mitochondriac: Let us use coffee as the food in question. What programs information into the electrons and protons in coffee? The sun’s photons do this via photosynthesis. 

It is as if the photons of sunlight are a wireless paintbrush for these electrons and protons in C02 and water before they become coffee. Remember coffee is a plant food that is made from photosynthesis from thin air. C02 & water with sunlight = coffee.  In this way, the black swan begins to understand that sunlight actually paints the electrons and protons in C02 and water and creates a masterpiece of order we know as the food coffee. 

Our gut has to respond to this masterpiece creation if we decide to drink it.  Therefore, the sun’s light must contain information in its photons that create a bean of coffee from thin air. It sounds unbelievable but that is precisely what happens in nature. It is this way, nature uses information in sunlight to create an order in life. Food is one small example of this "creative order". Information always creates order. This 'order' affects the gut.  

**_What does thermodynamic theory say about this situation between the brain and gut and the sun?_**

Heat loss creates disorder. Information and heat transfer are two sides of the same coin in biology, deeply related but their meanings very different. Mitochondria in the guts cells are ‘Maxwell demons’ that capture the information of electrons and protons found in our coffee bean, while not allowing the energy they hold to become thermalized in a cell. This occurs at the same time. This means cells are a type of Maxwell demon who mimic a Turing machine (computer) using electrons and protons as Claude Shannon’s bits (Bell Labs binary code) were used in early computers to carry information. 

The paper below talks about how the DC electric current is modified by our mitochondria to create a new signal that works between two organs. BOLD is a form of cellular Morse code which allows bidirectional communication in a non-linear way using a form of light. Remember, electricity is a form of light plasma. Morse’s code was how man used electrical pulses to code information in a telegraph, wasn't it? The link is the same in terms of communication according to the information theory that Claude Shannon penned. This is exactly what the brain-gut axis does with its DC electrical connection mentioned above. When you realize it, it makes the paper mundane, because its collateral effects are staggering. 

The big point made early in this post is this:  we might be underappreciating how nnEMF and blue light interfere with the biologic version of Morse code that is operationally used between the gut and brain. Since kids brains and guts are both underdeveloped and more sensitive to nnEMF and blue light what might the screen be doing to the gut and brain? If you work in the IT world you might now see why your gut is a problem. It might be because of your light choices. Electropollution is a very real possible cause of how this axis is demolished by modern life.  

Claude Shannon, of Bell Labs in the 1960s, built a theory of how binary numbers would fit into information theory to create a digital reality using just 0 and 1. The 0 & 1 = an electron & a proton in mitochondria. Today we are all addicted to this digital alphabet via technology. That addiction is disconnecting our gut from our brain and we do not realize it is a light-mediated process. Food is nothing but a barcode of solar information of electrons and protons. A mitochondrion uses the two subatomic particles to represent its “ biologic bits” instead of numbers in life binary code. That is what a Black Swan gets from this paper.........What did you get?

I'M PREPARING MY TALK NOW FOR LOS ANGELES TYPES TODAY. I will be speaking to many of Ms. Fisher's friends in the audience.

WHAT IS THE TITLE OF THE TALK?

WHAT HAPPENS WHEN 5G GOES LIVE IN LOS ANGELES?

IT ALREADY HAS, WHAT DOES IT MEAN FOR YOU RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW?

If you travel a lot you better pay attention. The start of the disease is not important, but when they decided to put WiFI inside a metal tube with 250 people inside is a big deal and when they got to 3 G and 4G this is when illness showed up because heteroplasmy rates in mitochondria ramped up in flight attendants. I actually spoke to a Delta union about this and warned them it was coming in the next few years.......and now American is feeling the effect of non-linear aspects of light by seeing medical costs rise. The power density of the network is the key missing link for the airline industry. 5G is going to kill people quickly in a plane. See CARIE FISHER as our canary in the coal mine from her situation in 2017 and for what is coming soon 24/7 for us all.

Her lifestyle and job as a shift worker under blue light and nnEMF for decades gave her a low heteroplasmy rate. Heteroplasmy rates rise as our ability to generate heat in the mitochondria DECLINE.

The hotter an engine can run the more efficient it is. This is why a jet engine is more efficient than the one in your car.........but nothing man has ever built matches the efficiency of the mitochondrial matrix heat engine.

What atom is in the matrix? H+ = hydrogen in the protium isotopic form. It heats up faster than its other isotopes of hydrogen and it makes perfect thermodynamic sense why nature chose it over deuterium to run our colony of hydrogen heat engines.

Carnot showed us a few hundred years ago how a hydrogen heat engine like mitochondria really operates. He showed that the best way to increase the efficiency of a heat engine was to increase the difference in the temperature from the heat source (matrix) inside the engine and the exterior surroundings.

Fisher's life as a shift working actor decreased the colony of mitochondria in her to make heat. As it got worse in her retinohypothalamic tract she could not make the 6 chemicals that come from POMC. One of them is beta-endorphin. When you do not make enough of this because your hydrogen heat engine runs cooler.........you begin to have to use exogenous drugs to offset the inability to make this chemical from the lack of heat your colony can create. As she lived, her heteroplasmy rate lowered further with her drug use. Another chemical made from POMC is alpha MSH. This controls appetite and your skin color. It controls how much melanin is in your skin to absorb sunlight well or poorly. Carrie was white as ghost almost her entire life. As her hydrogen heat engines failed alpha MSH crashed and she became leptin resistant and got obese. There is a deep lesson here for those not ASLEEP because of what they learned in their flawed pasts.

We need solar exposure to capture UV light to turn it into heat using hydrogen in the matrix as its power converter. All aromatic amino acids are designed to capture sunlight with the rings.

This is why thyroid hormone is made from tyrosine and tyrosine is loaded with photons traps for UV light of AM sunlight. AM sunlight is critical in gaining health reversals because it turns your colony of mitochondria into hydrogen heat engines ONCE again.

As heat generation capability drops, less energy is made to do the physiologic work of making chemicals pictured above in our cells which they have to rely on to operate properly.

Frequent flyers will soon be wise to buy term insurance once the transition to 5G is met. In December 2018 we are at this point. Next weekend I will be bringing this story to Los Angeles to many of Ms. Fisher friends and co-workers. I expect sudden deaths, heart attacks, psychotic breaks, and blood clots to become commonplace on frequent flyers, stewardess, and pilots. Any shift working business traveler better know the real reason why Ms. Fisher had the life she did. It was all caused by how the AC power grid, blue light, and nnEMF conspired to decrease the amount of heat her colony of mitochondria made and it leads to chronic leptin resistance.

The AC power grid, with blue light nnEMF exposure (2G-5G) day or night, degrades your heat engines = HETEROPLASMY RATE. How does the cascade appear to the clinician? Melanopsin dysfunction = causes melatonin to vanish = leptin resistance = mitochondriac and melanopsin wisdom and proves ‘your’ food gurus continued downward spiral of reliability persists. They have no idea how your hydrogen heat engines operate.

Black Swan clinicians do.

More sun = more melatonin = less chance of leptin resistance. More time spent within the AC power grid, = more tech use = more screen time = more blue light = 2g-5G EXPOSURE = your colony of hydrogen heat engines cannot generate heat = sickness comes faster and death comes sooner.

JUST ASK Ms. FISHER if Uncle Jack is wrong. Be careful who your experts are. Hire the right people......not the popular ones.

# Article: YOUR RESOLUTION SHOULD BE TO SHATTER THE "ILLUSION OF KNOWLEDGE"
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/your-resolution-should-shatter-illusion-knowledge-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2018-12-21T12:13:53.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 345
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fyour-resolution-should-shatter-illusion-knowledge-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 21, 2018

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fyour-resolution-should-shatter-illusion-knowledge-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

It has often been said that the greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance; it is the illusion of knowledge. Do you believe it? If not, why not? How do you know you're afflicted with this viral infection. Why does a Black Swan mentor tell his tribe constantly a half-truth always leads to a full lie? Knowing a concept wrongly is more dangerous than skipping a concept when you are searching for wisdom. The illusion of knowledge is just like drinking too much wine with your beliefs. Never get drunk with your own dogma. This idea is simply stating that ignoring may not harm you as much as partial or incomplete knowledge may do.

Today this idea is harming millions in the nutrition world and in medicine and few realize it. They are inebriated with many false beliefs. Some people out there truly believe think they can help others with their incomplete knowledge but the reality is they are only creating deeper problems than a firm solution. This is the deep problem with the illusion of knowledge.

You better be careful out there in the world of online gurus. Who helps "pack your parachute" may not be the wise choice. My cognitive bias is 100% toward nature's wisdom. She is the only lady I will dance with now.

I believe most of today's version of "parachute packers" cease to look for further information when they are arrogant enough to believe that have all they need already. My advice is simple. At the end of every year, I write down and document my beliefs. Then I try to toss out the things that are no longer solidly supported. When you develop a habit of updating your knowledge or facts openly, it becomes a vaccine against the "illusion of knowledge". This idea may help you at some point in your life. Rather than being completely ignorant, about the negative connotations of knowledge, if you ignore everything, then the world will ignore you.

**JACK'S REFLECTIONS OF 2018:** One of my members, a tech insider, was right when he chastized me that I waited too long to get the clinical data on 5G to my members and audience on Patreon and at my website. He warned me at last years member event in 2017 in Mexico on the beach the world was behind the the 8 ball of what is coming............I spent all of 2018 trying to make it right for my audience. Last week I learned I was dead wrong in Los Angeles and Shri was right.

**I WON'T GET FOOLED AGAIN** in 2019. Today's gift for you all is because I am trying to right that wrong. I recently gave a talk in Los Angeles which is now a 5G city and tried to the warn the people in the room what was coming at them like an asteroid. They seemed oblivious to it.

I realized I might have gotten to them too late on December 14, 2018. The 5G switch already flipped in LA. So today I am sharing this data with you.

Do what you want with this but the message needs to get out what we are doing to ourselves. Merry Christsmas and to all a good night. I apologize that I was not more diligent on your behalf. I will learn from this error in calculation. **_Wounds create our wisdom._**

**#5G #RISK #mitochondriacwisdom**

# Article: 2019 MISSION STATEMENT
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/2019-mission-statement-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2019-01-08T18:12:37.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1198
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2F2019-mission-statement-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jan 8, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2F2019-mission-statement-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The MISSION STATEMENT OF THE KRUSE LONGEVITY CENTER ……………

Many have informed me they wanted to be a charter member of my Center and we've gotten into a little back and forth about what the Farm was all about and what its mission really was.

I decided to open my December Q & A of 2018 and tell my members more of the details linked to this new project so you can understand it and me before you ask to join us at KLC. To become a member you must listen to the opening of that Q & A. It is mission critical. The center will focus on them first and foremost because they have had skin in the game with me longest.

The social problems within healthcare are manifesting at an exponential rate for humans, yet leaders continue to think, plan, manage, coordinate and deliver at a linear rate. These leaders, and many others like them, don’t have the skills or framework to work differently.

I experienced this first hand in Los Angeles in mid-December 2018 during a talk I gave.

The Kruse Longevity Center was built to teach its members to think differently and gain results few think is possible.

I think the Farm will become a thought incubator for Black swans that leads to actions that move your needle.

HOW AND WHY DID I BECOME A BLACK SWAN?

It was an accident that happened in the Central Park Zoo as a kid.

I was an in-betweener. I was born in the 1960s when medicine was in its heyday – It was a Marcus Welby institution back then, however, the idea of this paradigm of health – was already in its death spiral back then. I was too naive to know this. When I finished college I thought medicine was on the cusp of the new dawn because of increasing medical technology. I thought I’d have new tools to do things to rebuild humans. I thought we might even have molecular tools to affect their genome. I knew I wanted to be part of this by 1985.

I remember seeing surgeons on 5th ave in NYC, in their sharply attired handcrafted suits, cradling their doctor bags, eyeing their patients in Manhattan with a mixture of excitement and fear as they made house calls to the “rich sick”.

I saw this via my eyes. My eyes were built by an environment that was profoundly defective. NYC was built around urban planning that removed humans from their natural habitat. As a poor kid growing up in the richest most progressive city in the world, it gave me the chance to see the two sides of the coin of progress as a kid. This experience helped craft my perceptions as I headed into my dental/medical career.

I remember seeing doctors being chauffered in armored limos, falling in the potholes of the city streets to tend to the rich in their downward spiral. They were like rockstars delivering personal concerts for healing.

I remember running, laughing, to join a big march in Central Park, not knowing who was marching, or why. But mostly I remember seeing elephants in the Central Park Zoo pen adjacent to these gatherings. I remember going there many more times when no meetings were going on because what my eyes saw made me curious.

I remember seeing zookeepers training smaller elephants in the pen as I just observed from afar. They kept them in a large pen just off 5th ave where the rich looked down from their penthouses. That was quite a juxtaposition to see a wild African giant adjacent to the richest people in the world as a boy.

One day while I was in one such penthouse, the pen was dirty, so they took the small elephants out and tethered it by its leg via small chain to a tree. I was pretty shocked they left the elephants there all day in the cold winter by a flimsy chain. I thought the bunch of elephants would rip the trees out of the soil and try to go inside because they were cold. I thought that because this is what I would have done. These animals were not ready for an NYC winter. They were African elephants, after all!

One time I asked the zookeepers why the elephants stood there and did not rip the trees out. He told me that when the elephants were babies they were tied up this way at a time of their life when they could not pull the tree from the soil, and they learned it was fruitless to try. So they stopped trying to escape. I was stunned. He went on to say that, this learned helplessness carries over to the adult animals and that is why the zookeepers had no concern these massive mammals would rip the trees from the soil. I was stunned to learn this lesson and that evening, I watched the zookeepers untie the herd of elephants and put it back in the cleaned pen.

This left an indelible mark on my mind as I walked through museums on 5th Ave as a kid. I looked at the ground where the elephants walked in around the trees and poles they were teethered to see a visible circle of worn out soil that had marked the outer limits of their world.

This is when I thought about my own life as a poor kid growing up in the richest city in the world. I began to realize I had a lot in common with those elephants being trained.

I came from having nothing much as a kid. The elephants suffered from the same fate in NYC. I soon realized that, for me, and not the elephant, this was really a gift; I realized I that I had nothing to lose if I just began to do something new by trying to do something about my own condition.

The elephants did not have this ability in their brain to allow it to think this way, but I knew I did. As a kid, I learned how to live on very little. Living poor in NYC motivated me to run as fast as I could do something better for my future.

I realized 15 years ago, like 40-year-old neurosurgeon I was, I was back in the same predicament as African elephants were. My brain and mind were no longer my own. They were tethered to my medicine mindset given to me by my education. I was a slave to my beliefs.

I was intellectually impoverished, unable to cure myself, so how I could really help anyone else if I kept doing the same things over and over. I knew I had to think differently if I wanted a different result. This is when my life changed.

This is when the I first began to think about building a virtual private practice and hospital. It has now morphed into what I hope Kruse Longevity Center to be.

Find out more below on how and why we do what we do...............

**CITES:**

https://www.patreon.com/posts/23842939
939

# Can cold help kids offset their blue light and nnEMF risks from technology abuse?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcan-cold-help-kids-offset-blue-light-nnemf-risks-from-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 8, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcan-cold-help-kids-offset-blue-light-nnemf-risks-from-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

It takes a tribe of us to raise a modern human.

Many do not realie children are at higher risk for nnEMF damaged because their brains remain undermyelinated until humans reach 25 years old.

So if you are a teacher and know your kids are being irradiated by blue light, WiFI, and all the other kids electronic devices what could you do to help them?

You could put them in nature, even if it is cold.

This thread on my forum is an eye opener for parents who have kids struggling with mental health from school technology abuse. [HYPERLINK](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/does-screen-time-suicide-risk-in-kids.23022/)

This teacher is a modern day hero for kids everywhere. Listen to her [here](https://www.cbc.ca/listen/shows/the-morning-edition-sask/episode/15675254). The greatest lesson of how to use Cold thermogenesis comes from another hero of mine named Jeremy Thomley of Mohawksteelco.com who uses CT to help limit the inflammation in his body from cystic fibrosis to stay alive. (see pic below)

JT said, " I studied Jackʼs Cold Thermogenesis Protocol and the breathing techniques until I could melt all the ice with my body heat. Soon I forgot about inflammation or being sick or any other reasons I thought I needed to get me in there. I started looking forward to it, I crave it."

He went on, " Sitting in the cold ice is your time to defragment your hard drive: it becomes a place where time slows and your ability to think slows. In fact, it is a time to not think - I think this is why Jack is so peaceful in the cold water.

You will struggle at first holding on to what you think is the real you: your schedule, your stress, your name, your life, your relationships. The cold will take it all from you. You are left with this empty pack that is so used to carrying troubles, doubt, cravings, hunger... nothing... its all gone. Cold erases the memory of many painful things because it causes you to focus on what matters most at that moment: SURVIVAL. It takes practice to surrender to this. Jack says he loves chaos and now I understand why he loves CT. CT is all about chaos, mental and biologic and otherwise. Some days when I come out I eventually question if I had a good session. The question feels objective like a scientist instead of personal like Iʼve wasted my time or somebody lied to me. Youʼll notice yourself fine-tuning the circumstances that occurred in your CT experience. Jack says most of the sparks of insight happen when he exits the cold and enters the sun/fire. In my case, the darkness was very important in my battle for my breath. CT forces me to realize how important my breath is when the air touches my lungs to bring me intuition."

CITES:

https://www.msn.com/en-ca/weather/topstories/we-get-soft-why-a-regina-teacher-says-kids-need-to-embrace-the-cold-not-escape-it/ar-BBUr6Gm?ocid=spartanntp

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 12, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flow-voltage-jack-los-angeles-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Here is a new Friday podcast out in time for French Quarter Fest! What were some of my thoughts as I did this podcast? What was reverberating in my head in LA? I wanted to make an impact and help save Luke and Aaron who live out there by transferring some knowledge. Low voltage Jack was in touch with his inner guru that night. 

1\. Trust that everything happens for a reason, even when you're not wise enough to see it.

2\. Great things happen when you distance yourself from all the negative people.

3\. I frequently think about packing up all my things and moving somewhere else and starting a new life.

4\. I was thinking of blowing up my own life back in December 2018 and I just did it four months later. 

5\. The struggle you're in today is developing the strength you need for tomorrow for 5G mitigation

6\. There comes a time when you have to choose between turning the page and closing the book. Never be afraid of doing either. 

7\. Once you've made the decision to move on, don't look back. You will never find your future in the rearview.

8\. If someone doesn't appreciate your presence, make them appreciate your absence.

9\. Respect is earned. Honesty is appreciated. Trust is gained. Loyalty is returned.

10\. Not all people in your life are meant to stay. The world is full of nice people. If you can't find one, be one today.

Here is the podcast below

https://alignpodcast.com/podcast/dr-jack-kruse-round-table-ii-bioelectricity-of-movement-re-balancing-your-neurochemistry-ep-220/

# Article: HOW DO LEPTIN AND MELANOPSIN WORK?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-do-leptin-melanopsin-work-jack-kruse>
**Published:** 2019-04-24T14:51:01.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1108
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# HOW DO LEPTIN AND MELANOPSIN WORK?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-leptin-melanopsin-work-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 24, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-do-leptin-melanopsin-work-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Graeme asked me recently a great question on my forum. When a Black Swan askes great questions they tend to get way better answers than they expect.

He asked,

"Hi Jack,

You have taught us an awful lot about what can go wrong with Melanopsin funtion in the modern world. I understand the story of Melanopsin dysfunction, but I feel I need to learn more about how Melanopsin is designed to work in an ideal world (pre nnEMFs) especially in the skin and subcutaneous fat.

Please could you give me a quick run-through of the process.

My thinking is that it is there as a light receptor for blue light from the sun to act as circadian timing mechanism for the peripheral clocks and also to link with Leptin using light.

Does the blue in sunlight also break the weak covalent bond to release free retinal?  

If so, is this ok because the process is quantized and/or because red light is also present in the sun.

Is it supposed to be a cyclic process?

Is it ok because sunlight is unpolarised? 

I have searched all your blogs and talks and haven't find anything related to just how Melanopsin in the skin is supposed to work.

Thank you"

My answer was thus:

Light waves have many ways to transfer energy and information to and fro in cells and tissues. It turns out how they do it is way more complex then we can imagine. Color is one way they communicate complex information. In physical molecules like melanopsin and leptin, the information can be carried directly in an energy message. It also can be carried solely as an information message in the quantum spin state of electrons, protons, or in photon spin. 

In cells, the chemical coupling is not a linear phenomenon. This is why you are confused about it. Many times in chemical coupling information transfer is associated with a massive loss of energy because the second law of thermodynamics requires this action to allow the cells to remain far from equilibrium. Energy loss in living systems always seems to be in heat or red light wavelengths. This is well understood in the classic thermodynamic theory of the second law with respect to entropy. But we are more complex than this simple linear equation from Boltzmann because we can store energy and information because cells are dissipative structures that use many queer novelties within quantum thermodynamic theory. 

When massive energy is lost in chemical coupling the small amount of residual energy left in the chemical bond is capable of limiting information quanta that are used as a stimulus or signal in the cell build data networks or intelligence. In this way, you begin to see the organization of the system is far more important than the energy quanta that Wallace focuses on.  That is the story of the [Quantum Thermodynamics series](https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-1-quanta-17884591) I am laying out on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/DrJackKruse). It underpins how leptin and melanopsin really are doing their dance with the hypothalamus to get the proper energy balance signal from the fat mass and gut to the brain. 

Blue and red light energy and information quanta are critical in this photonic signaling pathway. Retinol carries a complementary color to blue so it limits the information and energy in the blue light. This is why vitamin A coupling to the melanopsin is so critical and so misunderstood in obesity research. 

If you remember in Mae Wan Ho's books she talked about McClare and how it ties to his work on bioenergetics. You might have missed how it ties to this thread. He found that color is critical in how electromagnetic waves to transfer information compared to physical systems like that of the hormone system, drugs, or neurotransmitters, or the second messenger system of cAMP. This is why fundamentally the paradigm of functional medicine is an abject joke from a teleologic perspective to the Black Swan and none of them realize it. They do not know who Ho or McClare is or what their work found. If they did they would never push pills or supplements. Uncle Jack read their work years ago and realized the implications of frequencies color and power. The electromagnetic force, of which the photon is the force carrier, tells us that light has unlimited range and power from an energy and information standpoint. Therefore, it is the DOMINANT perspective to follow with regards to energy and information. The physics of organisms is way more foundational than its biology. He found color was hundreds of time more efficient and powerful in information transfer in human cells. 

Light ability to diffuse in a cells matrix occurs at astronomical speeds because of Fermat's law. The physical couplers that biology and functional medicine are spellbound by only operate at diffusable speeds of a centimeter per second. This speed limit cannot explain what life can do........in the living or experimental state. That alone should tell the wise that focus in on the physical couplers of biochemicals is a waste of time. This is why few understand how melanopsin and leptin are doing what they are with the arcuate nucleus in the brain stem. Uncle Jack sees life way differently. A cell is not a vacuum, so it does not travel at 186, 000 mph. Its speed barrier is limited and controlled by the chromophores that are coded for by mtDNA and the nuclear genome to control the speed of light in cells. This is what controls information and energy transfer. This is the mechanism of how leptin and melanopsin operate way below your ability to sense or see it.......much less understand it.

**WHAT IS THE TAKE HOME?**

 Mitochondria provide the energy and information for your body to work.  

If mitochondria don't work, you end tired 24/7. This is what fibromyalgia is.  

Blue light damages their DNA and lowers your melatonin level because vitamin A destroys it.......and this uncouples the photonic controls in energy and information transfer and leads to disease because the quantum thermodynamics is altered.

This is why the physical couplers of hormones are not foundational ^^^^^. Light controls this at way deeper level, Graeme. The slide lays the thunderboom.  

Be good to your mitochondria and they'll be good to you  #melanopsinwisdom [#](https://twitter.com/hashtag/health?src=hash)bluelight hazard [#chronicfatigue](https://twitter.com/hashtag/chronicfatigue?src=hash).

This picture below is a simple cartoon of the complex answer above.

When you know better, you do better, Graeme. Now you do know better how melanopsin and leptin operate in you. Membership matters at www.jackkruse.com.

Love,

Uncle Jack.

**Author:** Jack Kruse

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# IS MARRIAGE OBSOLETE? WHAT ABOUT REMARRIAGE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmarriage-obsolete-what-remarriage-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 12, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmarriage-obsolete-what-remarriage-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Relationships are the deepest type of friendship one can have. It affects our health in a major too. Few people seem to understand that effect in terms of TIME. What happens when that person leaves our circle of 6? What happens when trust evaporates for whatever reason? Divorce isn't a cure for a disease, it's a surgical operation that contains many hidden risks for the patients involved. It is very much like a fire exit in a home. When a house is burning, it doesn’t matter who set the fire to those inside the inferno. If there is no fire exit present, everyone remaining in the house will sustain burns or smoke inhalation.

Few really have thought over the risks benefits and alternatives to this surgical procedure. This was a pretty interesting article here with some mind-numbing stats that should give any divorced person a lot to think over in their life.

Is a relationship split really such a tragedy? Might the real tragedy be remaining in an unhappy union, teaching your kids the wrong things about life and love?

I've never seen anyone die from divorce. In a split up, .....you're never dead—your life is dormant from passion.

The Black Swan take?

We don’t miss our spouse with a split, we do miss who we thought they were.

From my own research on this topic, I have found some people think that it’s "holding on" that makes one strong; the reality of the data says that often times it’s letting go that builds your strength quickest.

**CITES**

https://medium.com/moments-of-passion/is-marriage-obsolete-78bb54b082d7

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHAT SHOULD FILL YOUR 2020 INBOX?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-should-fill-you-2020-inbox-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 5, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-should-fill-you-2020-inbox-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Did you waste more time in 2019 because you were waiting for the perfect time to do something?

Change that tension in 2020. You might have delayed in 2019, but your time on this planet will not wait around for you.

The topic or situation of the procrastination is immaterial.

The key is not waiting for the right time. The key is ACTION. Just making a tiny change — be it good or bad — can guide our life to a very different destination. This is what all of biology is based on too. A small stimulus in a cell leads to massive amplification in tissues and systems in our bodies. We just never get how non-linear stimuli work in nature because of our educational and societal myopia.

Consider the following: 

 If a pilot leaving from LAX adjusts the heading just 3.5 degrees south, you will land in Washington, D.C., instead of New York. Such a small change is barely noticeable at takeoff — the nose of the airplane moves just a few feet — but when magnified across the entire United States, you end up hundreds of miles apart…......and in the wrong city.

This idea argues for the power of trying to be just 1% better every day. When will you realize the smallest changes in your life can change your life. Go see the sunrise to get your 1% today.

**SUMMARY**

Time is an equal opportunity employer for all of us. Each human being has exactly the same number of hours and minutes every day. The wealthy can't buy more time. Scientists can't invent new minutes. Technologic progress cannot create your time either. They will try to get you hooked believing they can. And remember, you can't save time to spend it on another day as you would do with money. Time is unique and it is the most valuable asset you wasted in 2019. Stop it now. Even with this reality, time is amazingly fair and forgiving. No matter how much time you've wasted in the past, you still have an entire year of tomorrow's in 2020 to improve your 1%.

When will you begin?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Flooks-like-nasa-waking-up-some-my-ideas-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 18, 2019

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flooks-like-nasa-waking-up-some-my-ideas-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

NASA waking up to the magic of water........I wonder when the public will wake up to its wonder in 5G cities to help augment sickness from loss of redox power????..... I wrote about Lars Onsager years ago.

What is life?

Life begins where the environment first meets you. This happens on the surface of a cell’s membrane adjacent to the cytosols water buried deep from the water made by mitochondria.

Life begins by creating wireless power transmitters in our surface membranes that work by collecting magnetic resonance and electric induction from our environment. This is how life becomes supercharged photonically. The technologic problem using this method for evolution is that these transmitters have poor range to share their information. The reason is because of the inverse square law says that the intensity of electromagnetic oscillations varies inversely to the distance of the emitting source. Water solves this problem. The further away our skin is worse we can transmit this energy. So how did evolution fix this? She built cell membranes that could absorb mechanical vibrations adjacent to water to magnify the signals. They don’t suffer from this limitation. In fact, when you harness vibrations and couple it to a piezoelectric transducer (collagen) you can amplify weak signals. Piezoelectric and flexoelectric transducers convert mechanical energy into DC electric current. This ability is amplified, if DHA is present in your membranes. The only membrane humans have no DHA on is the inner mitochondrial membrane. Sunlight, like sound, creates vibration in atoms in the air and in cell membranes and is fully able to transfer energy and information of these oscillations. This makes your skin and cell membranes a universal wireless charging system and water is the capacitor for the solar charge. That system is fed by the electric and magnetic fields of photons from the sun. Light excites electrons that are designed to fall to the ground state in some proteins in some locations to program these quantum machines to operate far from equilibrium as Onsanger predicted. Photons are released from electrons after they are energized by the sun then fall back to the ground state by giving off a photon to our tissues. DHA is the lipid that does this most effectively in 650 years of evolution since the Cambrian explosion. Welcome to the party NASA!!!!!

It is sunlight, in this cell water that drives biochemical flux, and not ATP. This is one of the biggest errors modern science has made and it appears via the CITES below we are slowly waking up to this reality.

There are about 100,000 chemical reactions happening in every cell each second. The chemical reaction can only happen if the molecule which is reacting, is excited by a photon. Once the photon has excited an electron, it returns to the field of play in a cell and light is given off to the protein structure to power it and program it. This electron is added to the cell in its ground state but it can be delocalized for use once again in the cell. fundamentally, this is what mitochondria do. They recycle electrons and protons to harvest their energy to keep a cell far from equilibrium. Water helps facilitate this energy transfer to build life. This is why the biochemical and enzymatic flux is so fast because more energy becomes available for more reactions because the speed of light even in a cell is superfast.

All mammalian life evolved in an ocean of light oscillations. Since we can only see and hear a very small bandwidth of wavelengths we are blind and deaf to most of the magic that happens all around us. They occupying other wavelengths at small scales and your cell membranes do sense them. For example, if you don’t believe oscillations are capable of transferring energy, you should know that ultrasound oscillations are silent and highly energetic. They can be used to heal bones by themselves. I know because I use it to do this in my neurosurgery clinic.

Life begins at the cell membrane level but it needs water to operate. The light that programs electrons are also critical in how life operates. It turns out the visible spectrum of sunlight is how all proteins were selected by evolution. They all operate between 250-780nm light. That is the light of terrestrial sunlight.

The environment meets our cells at the cell membrane. In a cell, collagen is a biological nanowire that forms a tensegrity structural skeleton that links the cell membrane to the nucleus. It is flexoelectric and piezoelectric, and so are our cell membranes. Water makes up 99% of the molecules in a cell because it is a small-sized molecule. Water is the battery of life. It is a repository for electromagnetic solar radiation. Water interacts most with the infrared (IR) part of the electromagnetic spectrum of our sun. Sunlight is 42% IR-A light. Once infrared (IR) light hits the water it shrinks while it increases its exclusion zone (EZ). As the EZ gets grows throughout the cell it squeezes mitochondria down in size while creating large voltages inside cells naturally. Water breaks down to a positive and negative charge when it just touches a hydrophilic substance. Most proteins can carry a negative charge and many are hydrophilic. Cell water also has a net negative charge in cells.

All these things in a cell touch the cell membrane at some point to make communication and transfer energy. The cell uses these large electric charges to control the hydrogen bonds in water inside and outside the cell to amplify signals in their cell membranes. This makes cell membranes very sensitive to electromagnetic fields from the environment. In fact, if the cell membrane is un-myelinated like your skin is, the cell becomes more sensitive to electromagnetic vibrations and can act as an antenna for the cell. The stronger the electric voltage on the membrane, the stronger the antenna is to sense a magnetic field of the Earth. Theses are the givens in life’s thermodynamic quantum puzzle. _It all begins with the cell membrane and things that happen at the submolecular layer._

All living organisms are made up predominantly of dipolar molecules and dielectric molecules that are packed densely together and are extremely dynamic in their relationships with one another. They represent special solid-state systems were electromechanical and viscoelastic forces constantly interact to alter sizes and shape to control energy flows in a system that is metastable of far from equilibrium. This is why mitochondria change their size and shape as their energy efficiency changes. Under these conditions, energy from the oxidation of foods, the sun’s light, and the vibrations of the Earth’s motion could ‘pump’ up light energy in the system, resulting in collective modes of vibration to become trapped in cell membranes like a giant capacitor for light energy.

The key for life is ramping up this stored energy to create a collection of subatomic particles that become coherent so that at night time when the matter in us is it's most condensed we can align all those oscillations and waves to act in phase and create massive energy flows that create the spark of life in the condensed matter in us. This is precisely what a laser does to matter.

I believe the brain is 100% tied to the quantum magic of coherent light acting upon the condensed matter in neurons to do things only life is capable of. The cell membranes of the neocortex of the human and the ones in the mitochondria are critical. Where else does this happen? In the nuclear membrane that houses nucleic acids. The energies arising from cellular oxidation and phosphorylation programs in the matrix that create free radicals and can be retained or stored in the system by the excitation of the giant dipolar molecules in cells such as proteins and nucleic acids. People forget all free radicals have one unpair electron. That is critical to how the epigenetic program works to operate the DNA hardware in the nucleus. It explains why DNA only codes for proteins. Those proteins must work with visible light frequencies to perform certain thermodynamic tasks in a cell at the speed of light in water made in our cells. Today’s blog is about cell membranes and water. Our cellular membranes typically have an enormous electrical field of some 107 V/m across them.

**_So how do I see it happening?_**

The [Brain Gut 2 blog post](https://jackkruse.com/brain-gut-2-viral-marketing/) introduced you to how eukaryotes have used viral elements to innovate solutions out of the thin air using the vibrations and oscillation that dance all around us. Viruses are all made by sun’s light while swimming in the high dielectric constant of liquid water, fed by billions of years of infrared light by hydrothermal jets at the bottom of the oceans. All this went on the top layers of the ocean, while full visible light from the sun-baked the top layers with a myriad of light frequencies. _These interactions slowly but steadily innovated novel chemicals, proteins, and lipids, that began to use these different frequencies using quantum mechanisms and they mixed in the ancient seas over billions of years. That soup was the building blocks of cells._ Viruses are not considered ‘alive’, but they formed the shells of what would later innovate life and allows it to tell time. Those shells later became cell membranes. That time is called circadian time. It gave biology its arrow of time. It was created by the collision of sunlight and water in a cell.

The thermodynamic world has to touch the quantum world in order to animate itself. The backbone of this operation is how electrons and protons interact fundamentally is how that spark of life happens. Autocatalysis leads to RNA like molecules which were the first [Quibit molecules](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qubit) capable of proton tunneling using tautomers. RNA ribosome proteins became encapsulated with a viral vesicle and particle created out of the thin air of the day in the earth’s past much like the wood of a tree is created from carbon dioxide losing oxygen to make the biomass of a tree. This created a proto-cell. The remnant of inanimate life remains today in viral particles. The other remnant is present in our DNA as retrotransposons.

We still use part of our viral history to innovate life from the primordial elements within us using light even to this very day. This link below was no shock to me. Sunlight drives proton motive flow in tubes. We learned this in experiments done by Gerald Pollack in Nafion tubes submerged in water illuminated by light. In space, this solar exposure doesn’t occur so flow should stop and clotting should begin. We see the same effect in humans on Earth who live 99% indoors under blue light and have to be placed on blood thinners. This should tell us the effect is not due to gravitation but to changes in the electromagnetic force buried in light affecting water in our blood plasma and in cells. Below are the new space dangers found by NASA in astronaut blood.......check it out. NASA is finally catching up with Uncle Jack.

TODAY'S PSA: The technology industry's lie can and has traveled globally way around the world while the truth about its use is putting on its shoes in science. Nature's recipe of facts and laws do not cease to exist because they are ignored by the tech industry.

Why do people not understand why technology is killing us? Is it as simple as saying the more technology we use the less oxygen our cells can process? The answer is yes. Technology use breads hypoxia in a human mitochondrion. Contained in this epic new blog is that answer of exactly how it occurs.

The modern world is a poor seedbed for clear thinking because of the collateral effects of tech abuse. Those of us who live in towns and cities are bombarded on a daily basis with information that seeks to warp the value judgments we make.

The whole point of technology marketing as "human progress" is to make us irrational and dumb us down to control us. It is that simple. That truth is tough for most to swallow.

Above all, don't lie to yourself about the dangers of technology abuse. The man who lies to himself and listens to his own lie comes to a point that he cannot distinguish the truth within him, or around him, and so loses all respect for himself and for others.

This blog ties the electromagnetic layer of light to the biochemical layer. We can’t see the chemistry of life but we can see it’s frequency imprints through the colors of nature. Our retina, however, cannot resolve most colors of the electromagnetic spectrum of light so we are designed to be blinded to many parts of the spectrum we should not sense. There is deep wisdom here from nature. Why do we continue to screw with her? Our ego and cognitive bias amaze me.

The truth is rarely pure and never simple. The ultimate test of your knowledge is your capacity to transfer it to another. This blog is my best shot to date yet.  [https://www.patreon.com/posts/34479169](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.patreon.com%2Fposts%2F34479169%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR2M1QBqzwlbbXh9UxrsCQeUI0WlyAeSxM-bWxSol4PK2lOG98BHotNNGbg&h=AT3LJlE2tedRa9k-lZmA2lMmhY1vdIxnJ8lbjmhqNeYjVws4cxEBHKht_dNxUpArhMoptaAdVePo7mN08f4eq4xoD2-FaHkhY34IPhg2EACA6RtW_pw0I08Nhdq3axItCF_gjhYhkbyayPzf_oiBVvpTAPIR7AwlLWOI6pZyOk5Cb2fcPw)
