# HOW DID POMC SCULPT PRIMATES?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-did-pomc-sculpt-primates-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 21, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-did-pomc-sculpt-primates-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

New blog out for the Kruse for Dummies event coming up this Wednesday.  

During the Pliocene epoch climate became cooler and drier, and seasonal, similar to modern climate.

The global average temperature in the mid-Pliocene (3.3 mya – 3 mya) was 2-3°C higher than today, global sea level 25 m higher and Northern hemisphere ice sheet ephemeral before the onset of extensive glaciation over Greenland that occurred in the late Pliocene around 3 Ma. The formation of an Arctic ice cap is signaled by an abrupt shift in oxygen isotope ratios and ice-rafted cobbles in the North Atlantic and North Pacific ocean beds. Mid-latitude glaciation was probably underway before the end of the epoch. The global cooling that occurred during the Pliocene may have spurred on the disappearance of forests and the spread of grasslands and savannas. What did our ancestors do?  

This represents a 30,000 foot view of what was going on in the Earth’s environment. The micro climate of the East African Rift is where we found the ideal environment to lead to homo speciation, in my view.

To get why humans ‘randomly’ came from apes we need to look at the cradle of man when the ape spine was radically changed to Australopithecus afarensis (Lucy) who walked on two feet. Up until very recently most bone collectors believed the brain co evolved with the rest of the skeletal data in unison. That changed once we found Lucy and Ardi. Ardi destroyed the Savannah hypothesis but you’d never know it by reading the bone collectors literature. Bipedalism came before encephalization and by a substantial time margin too. Bone collectors have focused on the pelvis evolution a lot in their literature over the past 150 years. I always thought that was a mistake because with Lucy skeleton because we knew we walked before we got a big brain. So letting go of the pelvis fixation issues would have made more sense to me. I decided to look at the spine and the feet first because they have done nothing to figure out why we are walking on two feet looking at the pelvis. I think the pelvic changes are all to do with the later development of the brain. I know a little something about the brain and spine in my business. So I changed my view point to feet where they connect to the Earth and humans developed their real super power, eccrine sweat glands on their feet and hands. This gave hominids another way to capture energy to change the skeleton using the binary code of hydrogen on the periodic table. Afterall, from this perspective, bipedal creatures had to walk on them first. I realized that bone collectors have always stayed away from the the mystery of transitional feet because they do not have many to study in museums. 

You would have thought that would make them go to examine the spine in a new light, but they did not. They were fascinated by the pelvis and this got them into trouble in their formation of theories in my view. This is how you make big errors in assumption. It all started with Raymond Dart, and the skull he found, and has gone down hill from there. 

So I asked a different question to myself. Why do humans have swety feet and what is so special about grounding to humans. How did this fit in with the physics of the Earth and sun 4 million years ago? Why was the spine and then the pelvis transformed first and not the skull? My perspective as a spine surgeon made me look at ‘their problem’ with a new set of glasses from a new mountain range. The physics of organisms is the answer. Humans do something radical with hydrogen. Eccrine sweat glands collect deuterium in sweat on our surface to cool it for the benefit of wide ban gapped semiconductors like melanin on the skin of these transitional primates.  

Protium (H+) is a spin-½ subatomic particle and is therefore a fermion because of this characteristic. Other fermions include neutrons, electrons. Deuterium is different and has a nuclear spin number of +1. This makes it a boson. This makes it radically different than H+ and allows for hydrogen to be the ideal choice for creation of a binary code to run photosynthesis and mitochondrial respiration.  

Placing deuterium in certain spots of the notochord and somites could easily change the skeleton easily by placing deuterium in a few key genes. I think this is how it happened.  

The difference in spin gives deuterium new charateristics in how it reacts in various environments and in atomic pathways common in cells that vary with light & temperature environments on Earth.

Grounding allowed primates/hominids to collect MORE FERMIONS without light. It used sunlight indirectly and added sweat glands to our feet to capture this new found energy/information source. 

Fermions are governed by Pauli's exclusion principle, where no two particles can have the same quantum number. However, bosons like deuterium and photons, are not bound by exclusion and multiple particles can occupy the same energy state. This fundamental difference in 1H and 2H manifests in many physical properties. Integer spin particles like deuterium follow Bose-Einstein statistics while fermions with half integer spins follow Fermi-Dirac statistics. Wave functions that describe multiple fermions must be antisymmetric with respect to swapping particles, while boson wave functions are symmetric.  

Because bosons are indistinguishable and can occupy the same state, collections of bosons behave very differently than fermions at colder temperatures. This is why deuterium collects at higher levels in our blood and not in deeper tissues. In this tissue it remains close to the surface to sense both light and temperature variations. Those environments allow deuterium to act differently as those variables change. Deuterium is rare in matrix water by design. As bosons that are cooled and relaxed to the lowest energy state can exhibit phenomena like superfluidity and superconductivity. These are energy states biology does not yet know exists in mammals.

https://www.patreon.com/posts/quantum-43-pomcs-83220030

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 28, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Falways-redox-never-detox-first-jack-kruse%2F&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The first ever Kruse for Dummies lecture distilled it down. H+ stripped of an electron becomes a liquid metal like state of hydrogen that mimics what is found in the core of Jupiter. Deuterium is the heavier isotope of hydrogen. It has double the atomic mass. This means the energy to move it by the E=mc^2 equation is a massive cost to cells so they have been built to handle it in our blood and to eliminate the excess in our skin sweat and gut via circadian controlled mechanisms.

When those systems are destroyed by your tech abuse then melanin is your last defense before disease becomes your reality. Melanin absorbs all heavy metal to eliminate them. This is why most city pigeons have black feathers. They put the heavy metal pollutants from the air in their feathers to eliminate them and grow new plumage to replace them. Mammals use the POMC gene similarly but that gene needs UV light stimulus to create melanin from alpha MSH. Today human mammals sun is from screens and tech gear that ruin melanin production so this last system is atrophic or down regulated. This is why some healthy foods can be toxins and why meat from the wrong latitude can fatten your liver. This lesson was made simple to understand in KFD course one where I used the Jacquard loom punch card to teach you about the binary code of mitochondria = H+ versus Deuterium fractionation. Boom! It was followed by five hour Q & A.

IMPLICATIONS OF THE COURSE?

We live by a small trickle of electricity from the sun. The green of our garden, the algae in our water, the trees, grasses and herbs on our lands are the transforming agents that harvest the sun’s light via the process of photosynthesis. This controls the binary code of life. When we consume these foods, this stored sun energy is released into our bodies as electrons; it is then transformed into ATP, adenosine triphosphate, the biological energy necessary for all cellular function.

Biochemists do not understand charge transfer at all. It is not written in their language of pathways. Charge is a conserved quantum mechanical quality in particles like electrons & protons.

The universe is governed by four fundamental forces.  But when it comes to understanding nature at almost any level larger than an atomic nucleus and smaller than a planet, only one of them really matters: the Coulomb interaction.

The charge (q or Q) plays the same role in the electrostatic case that the mass (m or M) plays in the case of the gravity. The key for the 'mitochondriac' to realize is that size causes gravity to lose its attractive power in cells.  The smaller the scale the less powerful gravity become.  Conversely, as scale decreases in nature electrostatic force become very strong.  This is why water is confined to small scales in cells in carbon nanotubes and around the cristae.  It is done to negate the effect of gravity and maximize the electrostatic charge that increases massively as scale is shrunk.  This is what happens in mitochondria which are organelles in your cell.  Some cells have 3-10,000 of them.  Electrostatics are capable of generating massive forces when this situation is allowed by nature.  It is one of the more novel and counterintuitive aspects life uses to dance on the ledge of the second law of thermodynamics.

Sunlight affects the spinning head of the ATPase.  If the size of the protons that runs the spinning head is substantiall larger because of a change in mass or viscosity it will effect the spin rate of the ATPase and the amount of ATP made.  Previous work assumed that ATP synthase, the smallest known rotary motor in nature, operates at 100% efficiency. Calculations which arrive to this result assume that the water viscosity inside mitochondria is constant and corresponds to that of bulk water.   Bulk water is more like deuterium depleted water because it does not have a lot of deuterium in it.  When deuterium makes up a large portion of water not enought ATP can be made because of the viscosity change due to the isotopes of hydrogen. Mass affects bond lengths in chemistry so the charge separation of water in a cell with deuterium is much higher.  This would massively effect hydrogen bonding in bio-chemical reactions.   Hydrogen without any neutron is protium and life likes this isotope. Hydrogen with one neutron is deuterium.  Since a neutron weighs just a bit more than a proton, deuterium is slightly more than twice as heavy as protium. Protium is a hydrogen proton with its electron. Welcome to biophysics 101.

How does light effect charge in plants and animals? The effect of porphyrins answers this question (pic above). Plants (Mg porphyrins) and animals (Fe porphyrins) use nitrogen based cages in chloroplasts and hemoglobin in different cells to make electric charge from sunlight.

What does this mean to a mitochondriac? Where there is matter (deuterium), there is a specific geometry. H+ confers a different geometry or morphogenesis. This geometry ties to the size and shape of things and size and shape correlate to the thermodynamics possible in a cell. Where geometry ceases to exists, gravity vanishes and we find an abundance of light. This is why at small scales gravity has a neglibile effect in physics. Where there is light and matter we see time manifest in cells. Photons are bosons that are normally timeless. Deuterium is a boson that speeds up time.  H+ is a fermion. The implications are incalculable for cells.

Forest Fires = dry ionosphere = no water to transfer charges from the sun to cells = lack of longevity for mammals as trees die = no oxygen = low NAD+ = melanin degradation in animals. The recipe is everywhere if you look for it.

The universe is governed by [four fundamental forces](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fundamental_interaction?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). But when it comes to understanding nature at almost any level larger than an atomic nucleus and smaller than a planet, only one of them really matters: the Coulomb interaction.

COULOMB'S LAW: gravity and EMF forces in a cell:

There is a mathematical parallel between gravity and electrostatics. The force equations for both forces are similar, so the behavior of interacting masses is similar to that of interacting charges, and similar analysis methods can be used to compare them. The main difference is that gravitational forces are always attractive, while electrostatic forces can be attractive or repulsive based upon charge.

### Charge is a conserved quantum mechanical quality in particles like protons. (H+ & D isotopes)

The charge (q or Q) plays the same role in the electrostatic case that the mass (m or M) plays in the case of the gravity. The key for the 'mitochondriac' to realize is that size causes gravity to lose its attractive power in cells. The smaller the scale the less powerful gravity become. Conversely, as scale decreases electrostatic force become very strong. This is why water is confined to small scales in cells in carbon nanotubes and around the cristae. It is done to negate the effect of gravity and maximize the electrostatic charge that increases massively as scale is shrunk. This is what happens in mitochondria which are organelles in your cell. Some cells have 3-10,000 of them. Electrostatics are capable of generating massive forces when this situation is allowed by nature. It is one of the more novel and counterintuitive aspects life uses to dance on the ledge of the second law of thermodynamics.

This also explains why electric fields are prominent on sunny days and gravitational effects during the day are lowered than they are at night when sunlight is not present to charge atoms in water. This is why circadian biology is fundamental to biology. Sunlight can alter charges and night time balances the charge separation. Charge is a quantized property in nature. It is all related to the quantized effect of charge on things in nature. The force exerted by one charge ‘q’, on another charge Q is given by Coulomb's law. This law clearly shows us that forces between two electrically-charged objects can be extremely large.

The structure of mass of deuterium determines the frequency of light it can resonate and this frequency dictates structure of plasmoid instabilities and the type of light that will work with it and what frequencies won’t. It also determines how the ATPase will work when there is an isotopic variation. Heavy water and the human ATPase are like oil and water. They do not mix.

ATP unfolds proteins and withdraws electrons. Water + proteins = building the base fab plant in cells to create wide band gapped solution for life. The SCN simulates the physics of the environment and then choses the best pathways to use biochemically to build a life that can survive this simulation. The sun creates that water in mitochondria with CO2 to refed the plants to make us oxygen and we the matrix creates the time crystal the SCN uses to perform the simulation. That is human biology 101.

The electric charge developed by each protein then directly effects the charge to mass ratio in cells. Charge affects thermodynamics of any system because of its relationship to size, shape and density in anything with mass. Deuterium water is less capable of generating energy from the ATPase because of its higher mass. This makes the water more viscous and less flowable in our systems. Heavy water ruins the kinetics of biochemical pathways via this kinetic isotope effect. This is a real problem in diseases like autism where dueterium collection slows down sensory processing due to the broken circadian controls of the eye clock in the SCN. This began with the sperm and egg the autist came from. Steve Jobs marketing did a number on modern humans and [few of them know it.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Frss%2Ecom%2Fpodcasts%2Flivinginthematrix%2F958614%2F&urlhash=jnwW&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) So when heavy water replaces water in the extracellular and cytosolic space, light is less effective at making coherent domains (think EZ).

This means the capacitor function in the cell that coherent domains in water can form is limited with deuterium. If this liquid crystalline battery cannot generate as much energy in animals and plants it will directly affect their longevity? It seems obvious but no one seems to know why DDW extends longevity in all these cancers in all mammals including mice and humans in the video linked below in the link. All covered here 7 years ago. [https://www.patreon.com/posts/14768134](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2Fposts%2F14768134&urlhash=j-4u&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

# MODERN TECH BUILDS BETA MALES. HOW?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmodern-tech-builds-beta-males-how-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 2, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmodern-tech-builds-beta-males-how-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

To convert cholesterol to Testosterone you need high enough T3 and Vitamin A to create the transfer. Ultimately what is going on this reaction below the chemistry level is the transfer of light energy on protons to facilitate the creation of a light ferry boat in the testosterone molecule to affect tissues. T3 is part of the aromatic amino acid system and Vitamin A is the major signal in the brain and skin of the state of the non visual photoreceptors, neuropsin, melanopsin, cholesterol, and Vitamin D. See the picture below on the top line to understand where T3 is coming from. How do these things all operate in you?

So anytime cellular stress is high (high HS CRP or POMC light stress), it also forces all the hormone backbone substrate called pregnenolone to be shunted to cortisol production. This is called pregnenolone steal syndrome. What exactly does this mean, Doc? DHEA, Androstenedione, Vitamin D, testosterone, estrogen, and aldosterone production all fall dramatically. These are all of the hormones that are made from a common precursor, cholesterol and vitamin A.

All alien light cause a light stress response in humans.

What are the signs to look for? Low T, low vitamin D levels with high LDL cholesterol high blood glucose, insulin levels and altered peripheral blood smear. This can happen even when your eating well when your Triglycerides are below 100.

When Vitamin D and A cycles are altered you know you have a skin and brain issue linked to a circadian mismatch. When this occurs, it down-regulates T regulator cells of the immune system, and it will decrease bone metabolism as well since vitamin D is a cofactor in bone metabolism. Since DHEA and androstenedione are lowered, too, the sex steroids are also lowered because they are made from DHEA and Andro. In younger humans, this leads to early andropause, low libido, and early onset perimenopause anytime stress is present. When this occurs in older humans, like postmenopausal women, it destroys libido and electrolyte balance (low aldosterone and vassopressin effects) and causes osteopenia and osteoporosis. Younger females lose control of fecundity, oocyte maturation, and get amenorrhea. Evolution does not favor these activities when your stress hormone is high by light stress. It favors survival over these other activities. [This observation was mind shattering to my practice when I realized it via POMC biology. In men, longevity is tied to their optimized testosterone levels.](http://www.nature.com/ijo/journal/v27/n7/fig_tab/0802292f1.html?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

The high cortisol also directly affects the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis. T3 nd T4 are made from aromatic amino acids. Cortisol from ACTH directly blocks 5′ deiodinase enzyme that converts T4 to T3 (this occurs in the liver). Cortisol Releasing Hormone (CRH) (seen elevated in high cortisol production states) directly blocks TSH at the hypothalamus. The implication is huge because Thyroid Stimulating Hormone (TSH) and T3, the active thyroid hormone, are inhibited quickly in this process. Immediately, any excess T4 is then shunted to reverse T3. Reverse T3 is a COMPETITIVE inhibitor to T3, the active thyroid hormone. This basically turns off the thyroid! (You’re welcome ladies.)

This is a biological switch was needed by evolution to shut metabolism down in starvation mode. This occurs in starvation mode or in anorexia. Once T3 is turned off, no fat burning can occur at the muscles with UCP3. Remember, UCP3 activation requires T4, T3, and Leptin to be working well. With high cortisol from ACTH signaling, it cannot. Shutting off these things could be good biologically if you’re badly starving or if you’re morbidly obese. Light stress can bring it on in anyone. CRH normally directly inhibits TSH. This is why TSH is a horrible marker for thyroid status. If you do not know the cortisol status, you can infer zero information from a thyroid panel. Labs are a waste of time here. This is reason number one for many thyroid misdiagnoses. The sad part is that most endocrinologists seem to have forgotten this vital fact. The biophysics of the system hinder biochemical diagnosis. It is the source of most patient frustrations with their thyroid condition.

CRH directly blocks secretion of Growth Hormone secretion as well. This means you get sarcopenia and osteopenia together! Low GH levels (IGF1) increase your body fat, decrease your lean muscle mass and increase your osteopenia to a great degree. Body fat is created to help the neocortex survive. Most people think this is a bad thing. It is not. Human babies use their subcutaneous fat to create water to repair and mature their neocortex.

In adult light stress, it also causes skeletal muscle and cardiac muscle to fail and decreases the stroke volume. Working out to hypertrophy muscles in a light stressed environment is a prescription for early death. Sarcopenia is the result of low IGF1 or GH level, and is a harbinger of ensuing death, especially with respect to the heart. There is now excellent data to support the use of GH and testosterone for cardiac health in aging because of these effects. High cortisol comes from light stress. The causes of stress in humans are: psychological, traumatic, infectious, allergic, electromagnetic (EMF), xenobiotic and geopathic, as well as Leptin resistance and dysbiosis.

Today's Kruse Longevity Center's factoid about pregnenolone steal syndrome and low testosterone in men: How does low Testosterone affect the male neocortex and pituitary gland?

Can it work the same when you we live under an alien sun of manfactured light? Blue light and nnEMF in the 4G-and 5G range destroy our cortisol cycle (via POMC) and eventually lead to a flat lined hormone panel. This is all mediated via the retinohypothalamic tract and POMC neurons.

Do you know what depersonalization or derealization looks like as a mental side effect of low testosterone?

This picture above describes what it feels like. It is a dissociative cognitive state of the neocortex. It is one of the most common things we are seeing in patients who live in 5G cities over the last 5 years. HOW CHARGED PARTICLES TRANSFER THE SUN'S ENERGY DIFFERENTLY

Normally most people know about electrons off loading their light payload because of the photoelectric effect. Protons do it differently. The emission UV light from deuterium does not work like it does in excited electrons when they fall back to the ground state and give off a light photon to their environment. That process in electrons is called atomic emission, where excited electrons emit radiation. Instead, deuterium uses an unusual molecular emission process, where radiative decay of excited states in molecular deuterium, causes the effect the UV light emission from a cell. That light is needed to make testosterone from cholesterol.

SUMMARY

In the central nervous system, the function of retinoic acid, the active metabolite of vitamin A, is best understood from its action in guiding embryonic development in the brain, specifically the neocortex; as development comes to completion at term, retinoic acid signaling declines in the fetus. Alterations in retinoic acid during pregnancy, however, has marked effects on the development of the neocortex in humans. It controls feminization of masculinazation of the nervous system. This does not end with a fetus. The effect happens in the adult form. The neocortex is the part of the surface of the brain where most of the functions that separate us from chimps and other animals are located. This has big implications for a disease like depersonalization or gender identity disorder.

HDL cholesterol has more electrons and when it is sulfated it is more water soluable and can be trnsferred in blood without SHBG or LDL particles. Melanin is always upregulated when testosterone is optimized. Why? Melanin is linked to the Vitamin A cycle and the retinoic acid cycle above. Melanin increases BDNF and neurotropins in the brain. These chemicals act with retinoic acid in the human cortex. When sunlight is deficient melanin is lost and the patient looks pale and becomes a beta male.

As a result Vitamin D levels also usually are quite low. A decrease in neurotrophins and defective calcium homeostasis leaves the nerve vulnerable to toxins. This is exacerbated by elevated HBA1c and hyperglycemia, and blue light stress of ACTH. As a result, a deficiency of vitamin D impairs nociceptor function, worsens nerve damage, and lowers the pain threshold. This is how a lack of sunlight increase your pain threshold too.

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 3, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdecentralized-marketing-101-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

What do I sell? I sell information filtered through my brain to give you a perspective few ever see. I take what I observe in Nature and make sense of it for the public. Essentially, you are paying to rent my brain for a period of time to understand what the simulated physics of your environment is and why you are not kicking ass and taking names 24/7.  

This is not for the fain of heart, but it is powerful movie. When you clearly explain how you will solve your customer's problem and make their life better, you invite them into a GREAT story of their own building. This creates a huge tidal wave of excitement.

And since great marketing is just an exercise in memorization, it's your job to repeat that great story over and over again. That is why I focus on light, water, and magnetism. When you get off on an tangent I smack you back to reality with a sharp tongue. I have no concern of how you perceive this. I only care about your results.  

We don't create for the audience we create for ourselves. Leaders take you where you want to go. A great leader takes people where they don't necessarily want to go, but they ought be. My friend Rick Rubin gets it. When will you? All of this interview are good but pearls are spoken at 12:14 by Rick right at the end. Listen for the lesson here.

[VIDEO](https://youtube.com/watch?v=EUbUn9FnrME&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

When Rick wrote this in his book and I read it I brought it to his attention immediately when I handed the book back to him with all my comments I wrote on every page before our podcast together. I told him he and I, both native New Yorkers have always operated on this same wavelength. He works in a creative space and many believe I do not. I realized 20 years ago medicine is more art than science. In the centralize world humans have created, few understand that medicine is really part science and part art. Very few in healthcare realize this today. They are all prescribing AI algorithms for diseases that just enrich the paradigm institutuions in power. None of them give a disease reversal by design. If they did cure diseases they would have no more customers to wallet biopsy.

For the first 40 yrs of my life I dedicated my brain to the science of medicine. For the last 20 years I have integrated the art of medicine to my mix. I create for myself because I learned that what I learned in the first 40 years was a shell of understanding of the human condition. I realized in that 18 months of disbelief that being doctor was more about the art and less about the science. I also learned that people will not change until they come to their edge. Their precipuce. This is when they evolve.

I listen for what a patient wants because this usually tells me why they got it. Ultimately, I do not care what the patient wants. I want to give them what they need to get well. Patients have no earthly idea what is getting them sick in the modern world. When they find out they are all in disbelief as I was 20 years ago. I know to expect that, because I went through it myself. More often than not it is choices they are making around light. They never see it until I show them in their own life. He does the same thing with music. 

Dr. Andrew Huberman asked me in Malibu after my podcast with he and Rick if there was something about NYC that makes Rick and I different from him. I think he thought that there was some secret fountain in Central Park we all drink from. There is not. Moreover, I do not think it is NYC per say. I think it is our process of thinking that is different. I do think NYC sculpts that for many. I think people who grow up in NYC realize that you must drive your life process and it must be about you first and foremost. This is very different than the California mindset of inclusion and diversity. Those things should come after the creative process is innovated.  This offends many in 2023, but people from NYC born sixty years ago could care less about modern narratives and ideology.

They only way they should come before is if the artists/MD thinks that it is critical to the process at hand. In my own world, diversity/inclusion has never been high on my differential diagnosis until COVID. That made it the outlier and it made total sense why, I felt that way. COVID was not a decentralized process at all. It was 100% centralized in all aspects. 

Steinbeck said it best, "We search for something that will seem like truth to us; we search for understanding; we search for that principle which keys us deeply into the pattern of all life; we search for the relations of things, one to another."

When you find it, you amplify it. I think this is what Rick and I have in common. We're amplifiers. I hope this message resonates with you. If it doesn't, I do not care because it is how I feel the truth will be found by the masses.

MOTHER NATURE'S LAWS ARE MORE EXPLICIT ON THE TOPIC

Here is why sunscreen makes no sense ever. It breaks the laws of Nature. Let's use MS as a proxy for this lesson since they all lack sunlight and are temperature insensitive.  

Redox potential = how much net negative charge a cell contains. Sunlight creates this net negative charge using UV/IR light & melanin. You must have your skin in the game to make it work best. Is there another way to do it when the seasonal strength of sunlight is weaker or your live at higher latitudes?

Yes, cold temperatures allow you to absorb more sunlight when UV light is absent. The circadian clock is entrained to both because of the data Carnot found. Mammals who live at high latitudes use this in winter to augment energy production from heat, but it must be augmented with ketosis, low food intake, and tight circadian feedback control to operate well.

Multiple sclerosis (MS) is a human disease of a loss of the interactive circadian controller of sunlight in your SCN to operate cytochrome 1 and NAD+ recycling as well as in the functioning of the AQA 4 gates of the nervous system. Water is not flowing properly in the brain and this changes the temperature game.

Most MS patients don't tolerate heat or cold or sunlight. This creates the false belief being outside is somehow something to avoid in centralized institutions. The reality is going out in the sun and cold is the Rx for a reversal. Food plays little to no role in this disease because their photoreceptors (melanin) in the cytochromes of the mitochondria of the AQA 4 gates are destroyed and need mitophagy and apoptosis to clean up this quantum mess.

Do you know why MS patients have this cold light intolerance?? The redox potential determines how much light power is buried in coherent domains of water in a cell. The more coherent domains the higher the dielectric constant of water becomes. This makes MITOCHONDRIA a more effective heat engine by Carnot's rules. Mitochondria make a special type of water that can bury a massive amount of light in its structure. Without this water, sunlight becomes impotent. This is why all MS patients have high BUN/creat ratios and low vitamin D levels as proxies that their heat engines are defective.

To make use of the temperature change from your interior to the exterior you need a decent colony of mitochondria that are operational. People with MS do not have this. This mimics was sunscreen does the skin. MS people and those who use sunscreen lower their Vitamin D by blocking tyrosinase from their behaviors. The method is different but the results to the colony of mitochondria ARE IDENTICAL.

Their mitochondrial colony does a POOR job of making heat/water. Even though most who get MS tend to have uncoupled haplotypes. The reason for this is because they have lived so long indoors, under the influence of controlled temperatures from the power grid, while under chronic blue light/nnEMF exposure of the eyes and skin, their colony of mitochondria developed atrophic matrix incapable of working to make heat or water as nature built them too. They also have atrophied their skin melanin sheets. This is what sunscreens do too on an acute basis. MS patients do it on a chronic basis.

The disease manifests from their POOR environmental temperature and light choices in their modern environments. Wild mammals at high latitudes do not have this luxury. They live within nature as she prescribes.

Penguins and polar bears eat tons of DHA from seafood loaded with electrons in pi-electron clouds to capture the sun's light even though it is poor at the pole and increase their redox potential in cells and allow them to swim in freezing cold water because their mitochondria is capable of generating MASSIVE amounts of heat even though the sun is not strong at high latitudes. He showed that the best way to increase the efficiency of a heat engine was to increase the difference in the temperature from the heat source (matrix) inside the engine and the exterior surroundings. This is the basis of the mammalian dive reflex too.

This corresponds to when technology spending skyrocketed in the USA and the world wide web was built out. What else about suicides should alarm you now? An estimated 1 million people worldwide die by suicide every year. It is estimated that global annual suicide fatalities could rise to over 1.5 million by 2020. Globally, suicide ranks among the TOP THREE leading causes of death among those aged 15–44 years. Attempted suicides are up to 20 times more frequent than completed ones. Here is another eye opener for all the leftists who want to blame guns for shootings: In most countries, the incidence of suicides is higher than the incidence of intentional homicides. More people suicide than dies of war and murder COMBINED. Why don't we ban bad brains who cannot think well? Well, the answer is our tech giants and economy need these obedient idiots to persist. Depression, either unipolar or as part of bipolar disorder, is an especially common cause of suicide according to GLOBAL epidemiology. Note this is not Jack's opinion, he just happens to read the data other miss as they upgrade their phones and use Amazon daily. Substance abuse, severe physical disease or infirmity are also TOP recognized causes of self-killing. Shocker to no mitochondriac. So when some rocket scientist tells you there are no plausible links my advice to you is to cut that person from your networks fast.

The Matrix is a system, folks. You are part of its design and most of you have no idea you are an active player in this blueprint. That system is our collective enemy on many levels. This just highlights a few today on my page. But when you're inside, you look around, what do you see? Businessmen, teachers, lawyers, carpenters. The very minds of the people we are trying to save. Only in a world built around Newton where time is absolute is cause and effect real. Since 1905, Einstein's has proven time is relative and this mean everything is about probability and correlation is REALITY.

From Forbes magazine: According to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, health care expenditures accounted for 17.8% of the U.S. gross domestic product in 2015. There are a variety of factors that contribute to the increased cost and varying opinions on how resources should be allocated to account for the cost gap. To determine how to regain control of costs, one must first identify what expenditures are moving the needle. Technological advances over the last several decades have been rising at a monumental rate and have served the industry very well. Has it served doctors, nurses, or patients? Substance abuse and severe physical disease or infirmity are also recognized as causes. The Eastern Europe and East Asia regions have the highest suicide rate worldwide. These areas have the highest installed base of mobile phone users with blue light screens. In fact, both areas already have 5G operational. Estonia, South Korea, and Japan lead the way there. This means you need the super bright light of the sun when you get up in the morning. I will always push you hard toward AM sunlight because it is best. Nothing replaces its effectiveness.

Get outside multiple times during the day for circadian rhythm reinforcing and melatonin-building sunlight breaks. Turn off or block all artificial light at night by wearing blue light-blocking glasses as recommended by this physician.

SUMMARY

Migraines are due to the ambient light present in your environment. It is mediated through Muller cells in the retina.

I built my Leptin Rx around the idea that artificial light through the eye’s central retinal pathways affected the hypothalamic neurons that control many vegetative functions in man. In fact, Aponte found that artificial light via the eye stimulates pro-opiomelanocortin (POMC), and agouti-related peptide (AGRP) neurons acutely regulate feeding behavior. Aponte found that AGRP-induced hyperphagia is independent of melanocortin signaling. This told us light alone could cause obesity. Now we have similar data developing on migraines: These headaches result from a stroboscopic effect via the Muller cells into the hypothalamic pathways of the brain and decreased current in DHA and CSF superconductors. The stroboscopic effect occurs when a flashing light source illuminates a moving object. This effect, created by the flickering of the surrounding light, is harmful to the vision and causes discomfort, visual fatigue, and headaches. Fluorescent & LED are the lights associated with this effect most.

Researchers used H2 15O (radioactive water) to measure regional cerebral blood flow as a surrogate marker for neuronal activation.

They found that compared with baseline scans, there was activation in several key areas, including the hypothalamus, an area involved in low-level regulation of sleep, appetite, mood, and fluid balance. "It seems likely that the hypothalamus is pivotal in the onset of migraine

Bright days, dark nights always. No exceptions.

### Jack Kruse

Published Aug 4, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-leave-tech-become-vaccine-king-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Bill Gates of Big Tech left and became a vaccine King who is now buying up farmland and trying to block the sun.  

Sunlight is 43% IR-A light. So what is Gates up to really?  

The antioxidant catalase is the most abundant and effective enzyme to break down H2O2 in our blood plasma. IR-A light increases catalase formation in our blood. Blocking the sun would decrease catalase.  

Implications? 

What heme protein in your blood controls ROS levels as a defense? CATALASE. So Gates's goal it appears is to massive increase ROS in humans.  

Why did Gates become a vaccine King before he wanted to block the sun?  

Higher ROS levels are also linked to higher levels of viral infection and replication. His vaccine monopoly becomes so popular he becomes a fiat TRILLIONAIRE.  

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

How To Support Your Body’s Natural Immune Response To…

Ime Ntekpere 7 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-support-your-bodys-natural-immune-response-ime-ntekpere)

[

Learning from the best: the essential ingredients for…

Luc Debruyne 9 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/learning-from-best-essential-ingredients-innovation-luc-debruyne)

[

Small yet giant steps in the Vaccine World!

Rajaram Santhanam 4 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/small-yet-giant-steps-vaccine-world-rajaram-santhanam)

Researchers have tested the use of stabilized catalase to regulate the level of ROS in virally infected cells. ROS are oxygen metabolites that are potent oxidants, mostly generated by the electron transport chain in the mitochondria and cytochrome P450, but also via oxidase enzymes found in many cells, especially endothelium and phagocytes.

Typically, the process of ROS generation begins with superoxide anions, which being unstable are rapidly converted to H2O2 or hydrogen peroxide, via superoxide dismutase (SOD3). H202 is known to cause feedback regulation of some of the dehydrogenases on the respiratory chain.

H202 may be converted to oxygen and water through the enzyme catalase, to HOCl via myeloperoxidase (MPO), or to water through glutathione/glutathione peroxidase complex (GSH/GPX).

Whenever antioxidant enzymes are deficient, or if ROS are produced in excessive amounts, H2O2 may accumulate in the tissues, causing oxidative protein damage and producing more ROS. Thus, it is important to get rid of this chemical when it is present in large amounts.

The ROS is part of the body’s weaponry against infections, and also an essential part of the body’s signaling mechanism. Its generation is essential to recruiting leukocytes to wounds, to modulate the immune response. Thus, it is needful to mitigate the excessive production of ROS rather than suppress them altogether. This could also restore immune function to normal.

The antioxidant catalase is the most abundant and effective enzyme to break down H2O2 in our blood plasma. It is commonly found in the liver, red cells, and the alveolar cells of the lung. It is able to decompose 107 molecules of H2O2 within a second. However, the problem is that this enzyme is highly unstable to topologic effects induced by altered environments. Those environments have been enriched by FCC policy around the use of nnEMF in communications.  

This is PART of the plan ongoing. Share it. Wake up your neighbor.

Embrace the suck the life.

Life has a tension between comfort and discomfort. Discomfort affords us the perspective to ask [better questions about our current assumptions](https://www.linkedin.com/advice/0/how-can-questioning-assumptions-improve-your-d0rsc?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). In my opinion, discomfort emerges from our minds when our choices are suppressing our true identity.

A great way to poison a human is to remove any hardship or struggle from his life. One of the most essential things for any leader is [never letting anyone else define who you are](https://www.linkedin.com/advice/0/how-can-leaders-recognize-address-conflicts-9jmee?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) and what you choose. Being unconventional does not mean the idea of a mito-hack cannot work. Unconventional means the prescription has not made it into conventional textbooks. This is what quantum biology is and the recent melanopsin data show us; you better pay deep attention to Black Swan mitochondriacs as your environment is made unfavorable by the trends of modern human networking.

Darwin gave us the false meme that life is about the survival of the fittest and that competition is critical to success. It is not. Why do I say this? It is about the survival of the wisest. Unless you know the epigenetic code, which is our software program that runs the genes, which are the hardware in cells, the gene of DNA has no fundamental meaning. That has made Darwin and Watson Crick's perspective meaningless for us and for medicine. This paradigm of "genomic belief" has been utterly toxic for success with illness.

The most important thing in understanding life's cipher is hearing what isn't being said aloud. It is analogous to what we've found in genetics. Ignoring the genes and paying attention to the junk is where the rainbow really lies. Nature never gives up her secrets easily. We must learn to ignore the noise genes create in professional science and focus on the junk DNA.

The same is true with talk. Words we use are not as critical in human communication as we believe. Just as it is the silent part of the genome that runs our DNA, in language, it is the things not said in words, but present between words that are critical. They hold the key to successful understanding in life. The art of [reading between the lines](https://www.linkedin.com/advice/0/how-do-you-use-context-clues-infer-authors-tone?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) is the quest of the wise mitochondriac. Always pay attention to the pauses, the nonverbal chatter, and the movement that occurs between words to understand what is really going on.

Learning is like the fuel that moves the electrons of your body toward a destination of success. Learning requires an ear that listens and an intellect that is aware and has the [patience to endure mistakes](https://www.linkedin.com/advice/0/your-remote-team-member-made-mistake-project-8zsmc?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). Errors are the growing pains of wisdom. The invariable mark of wisdom in you is when you see the possible in the improbable and the miraculous in the common. Wisdom is not built by time and does not comes not from age, but from education, learning, and thinking.

**Author:** Jack Kruse

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Aug 12, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fdelete-alan-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Spending just two consecutive hours on a digital device can cause eyestrain and fatigue. Natural blue light versus artificial blue light. 

Light stress alters our expectations via our endogenous melanin/dopamine axis.  

Expectations place limits and boundary's upon us and this is why I abhor them. I want total freedom to move adapt and soar. You should allow yourself to leave any story you don’t find or see yourself in. You should allow yourself to leave any story you don’t love yourself in. You should allow yourself to leave any city that has dimmed your light instead of illuminating your filament. You should allow yourself to pack all your bags and start over somewhere else that is best for your health and where you are able to redefine the meaning of your life. You should allow yourself to let toxic family and friends go. You should allow yourself to surround yourself with love, positivity, optimism, and people who encourage and nurture your heart, soul, and mind. You should allow yourself to pick the kind of energy you need in your life. Our chief need is to want someone who will inspire us to be what we know we could be. Become that person by discarding expectations that limit you. Turn off ALAN = turn off social media.

Blue light is actually everywhere. When outside, light from the sun travels through the atmosphere. The shorter, high energy blue wavelengths collide with the air molecules causing blue light to scatter everywhere. This is what makes the sky look blue. In its natural form, your body uses blue light from the sun to regulate your natural sleep and wake cycles. This is known as your circadian rhythm. Blue light also helps boost alertness, heighten reaction times, elevate moods, and increase the feeling of well being. Artificial sources of blue light include electronic devices such as cell phones and laptop computers, as well as energy-efficient fluorescent bulbs and LED lights.

Why should we be concerned about blue light exposure?

Blue light waves are the among the shortest, highest energy wavelengths in the visible light spectrum. Because they are shorter, these "Blue" or High Energy Visible (HEV) wavelengths flicker more easily than longer, weaker wavelengths. This kind of flickering creates a glare that can reduce visual contrast and affect sharpness and clarity. 

This flickering and glaring may be one of the reasons for eyestrain, headaches, physical and mental fatigue caused by many hours sitting in front of a computer screen or other electronic device.

People have no idea that the little phone they hold is their personal Titanic or asteroid...........

A cell is more valuable model to physics than CERN is. I wonder when they will realize it?

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fphysics-cookware-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

On May 1st 2015, more than 200 scientists worldwide expressed concern about highly fluorinated chemicals - commonly found in non-stick cookware and food packaging. Fluorinated chemicals effect water chemistry of things within that cooking utensil. The higher the temperature the more fluoride is liberated into the foods and affect the water within the foods. Water has a high dielectric constant. It is 78 in bulk water, to be exact, Why is that critical? How much do you know about semiconductor integrated circuits? In a typical network in an integrated circuit, each network will include at least one driver, which must contain a source or drain diffusion and at least one receiver. This set up will consist of a gate electrode over a thin gate dielectric (look for a view of a MOS transistor on line if you’re unsure of this to get a visual.) DNA only codes for semiconductive proteins.

What did that all just mean? Did I just describe what a cytochrome 1 really does in your mitochondria for you? Yes I did. Fluoride shorts cytochrome semiconductors NADH/NAD+ out. This is relevant because capacitance (ability to store charge) is directly proportional to dielectric constant of a capacitor. Remember things containing fluoride capture electrons and do not let them move & this destroys the dielectric constant in water in foods. This lowers the size of the coherent domains in water in your cells. Smaller CD = fewer electrons = fewer optical transmissions = altered biochemical responses = phenotype change. HOW?

The higher the dielectric constant is in mitochondrial water production, the more charge can be stored so the higher battery function it has and the less ATP you need to generate. This means you need less food. When water is charge separated into a coherent domain the dielectric constant rises to 78 from 160. This creates massive amounts of electrons that can delocalize and move once coherence occurs in a semiconductive lattice. This makes coherent domain water the ultimate place to store the charges that the sun’s light deliver’s to Earth.

Are you beginning to see why Chaplin, Preparta, and Del Guidice’s work on water is pretty important yet? Cells are designed to hold massive amounts of negative charge because of the coherent domains in water's hydrogen bonding network is built from UV/IR light. Melanin & DHA capture and move the sun's charges. This light excites electrons at the same time to expand the size of the coherent domains to make it more probable that the organism can remain quantum coherent below the cell level. This makes a cell a dissipative structure that remains far from equilibrium.

This is why DHA & melanin is the critical part of the antenna complex in cell membranes in mammals.

In the ubiquitination series, I showed you a loss of cell signaling in cytochrome 1, means redox becomes reduced at cytochrome 1 and lowers superoxide burst and affects cardiolipin release. Cardiolipin release changes the size and shape of mitochondria indicating a redox shift has occured. This tells us ultraweak biophoton emission and oxygen consumption has changed metabolically indicating to us a redox shift in metaobolism has occured. This changes the phenotype of the organism by altering the electronic state of the tertiary and quaternary bends in semiconductive proteins. All phenotype change is posttranslational telling us again genes are the the key to decentralized medicine. The light emission is that determines the fine two confirmations.

What are the implications of losing this pulsed superoxide in a zip code of mitochondria? You lose the ability to collect and move electrons in the brain’s neurons using DHA. This means the mitochondria in these neurons cannot harvest those electrons of their excited light energy. One of the most interesting features of electrons is their spin and how they change in mitochondria. All free radicals made in mitochondria have unpair electrons. When an electron is bound to a semiconductor like cytochrome 1 and its electron spins are paired, it loses its spin and magnetism and like photons, only acts like a particle and cannot act as a wave. When electrons are bound to a semiconductor they can only act like a particle and not as a wave. This means cytochromes accept the kinetic energy of the electron and begin to vibrate. Most people do not know about these non linear states found in a semiconducting electric currents because they do not understand the physics of organisms.

This queer electric feature is very useful to life in mitochondria. In this way, none of the stored light energy in an electron in a cells lattice can be thermalized. This means that an excited or ground state electron that is paired in mitochondria, cannot generate any heat if it is stored in our tissues in this way. The surrounding water also helps quench this response. If that DDW water made in a mitochondria is missing this alters phenotype as well. When the electron is not paired a free radical is made and light photons are liberated from the excited electron. As a result, your O2 levels drop in your mitochondria and pseudohypoxia is the result. This is when NAD+ drops. This marks and increase in heteroplasmy which alters phenotype. Do not forget in cell membranes DHA and water meet everywhere in the brain next to that CSF lake. There is a deep reason for this. This is how an antenna works in the human brain. This is how electrons are transferred from an outside source to inside repository for signaling.

# WHY WAS BANNING INCANDESCENTS UNWISE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-banning-incandescents-unwise-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 7, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-banning-incandescents-unwise-jack-kruse&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

On the [Tetragrammaton podcast](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oK9_j6fa2P4&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block), I did in May, I told Mr. Rick Rubin and Dr. Andrew Huberman that blue light controls sexual dimorphism in humans. Unfortunately, this hit the editing floor in the podcast.

Retinoic acid is Vitamin A. Humans require retinoic acid (RA) for many developmental processes. We can synthesize RA through the metabolic breakdown of retinol (see picture below). RA is needed for signaling and transcriptional regulation for ocular, cardiac, pancreatic, and testicular development processes. RA can influence transcription by binding with receptor proteins to help regulate the transcription of certain genes important for these developmental processes in [both sexes.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Encbi%2Enlm%2Enih%2Egov%2Fpmc%2Farticles%2FPMC6633611%2F&urlhash=4EVz&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

It is being reported in other studies like the one cited below. The etiology is the liberation from melanopsin by blue light in our light bulbs and screens, and that freed Vitamin A causes changes in neurons in the hypothalamus to change the sexuality or alter their changes in puberty. Technology can cause this via the light on screens. The next few slides from my talks over the last 15 years show you the story.

I have written about the biophysical details on [Patreon](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2FDrJackKruse&urlhash=RlWm&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block). This change in puberty also explains why young adults afflicted by these issues are at much higher risk for developing vasovagal symptoms or POTS. See the picture from the blog below. Puberty in humans is initiated by hormonal changes in the adolescent body that trigger physical and behavioral changes to reach adult maturation. As these changes occur, some adolescents experience concerning pubertal symptoms associated with autonomic nervous system dysfunction (ANS). This is more prominent in tech abusers or those who live under extreme indoor lights (LED).

Thiamine is Vitamin B1. B1 is a water-soluble, sulfur-containing vitamin. Thiamine is an essential nutrient that is a cofactor for several enzymes, mostly with mitochondrial localization. Some thiamine-dependent enzymes are involved in energy metabolism and biosynthesis of nucleic acids, whereas others are part of the antioxidant machinery. The brain, ovaries and testis are highly vulnerable to thiamine deficiency during puberty due to its heavy reliance on mitochondrial ATP production during the growth spurt. Thiamine storage is decreased by technology abuse and the use of coffee, tea, and alcohol.

Thiamine deficiency is more evident during rapid growth with an unmyelinated brain. This is why POTS is exploding in humans from puberty through young adulthood.

Thiamine deficiency contributes to several conditions spanning from mild neurological and psychiatric symptoms (confusion, reduced memory, and sleep disturbances) to severe encephalopathy, ataxia, POTS, dysautonomia, congestive heart failure, muscle atrophy, and even death.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Sex‑Specific Longevity Therapy: The Oxytocin + A5i…

Hybrid Performance Group 5 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/sexspecific-longevity-therapy-oxytocin-a5i-controversy-sc2oe)

[

Spotlight on Keto Research: January 23rd 2026

Keto-Mojo 3 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/spotlight-keto-research-january-23rd-2026-ketomojo-avhye)

[

🏛️ The First 1,000 Days: A Physician-Architect’s…

Dr.Ramakrishna Reddy Pydala 1 month ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/first-1000-days-physician-architects-guide-integrity-pydala-lop1c)

Vasovagal syncope (VVS) and [Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome (POTS)](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epatreon%2Ecom%2Fposts%2F33360360&urlhash=okr6&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) are common disorders of the ANS associated with puberty that are related to orthostatic intolerance and share similar symptoms. Young females have decreased orthostatic tolerance and a higher incidence of VVS and POTS than young males. As puberty is linked to changes in specific sex and non-sex hormones, and hormonal therapy sometimes improves orthostatic symptoms in female VVS patients, pubertal hormones likely play a role in the increased susceptibility of young females to autonomic dysfunction.

These findings are linked to the light that the last two generations have been forced to live under by narratives around energy being pushed by government decree. It is also being sculpted by [Obama's phase](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epolitifact%2Ecom%2Ftruth-o-meter%2Fpromises%2Fobameter%2Fpromise%2F492%2Fphase-out-incandescent-light-bulbs%2F&urlhash=RnH5&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)\-[out of incandescent lights](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epolitifact%2Ecom%2Ftruth-o-meter%2Fpromises%2Fobameter%2Fpromise%2F492%2Fphase-out-incandescent-light-bulbs%2F&urlhash=RnH5&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) in 2009 for LED replacement. Biden's, Obama's VP in 2009, [enacted the total ban.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ecnbc%2Ecom%2F2023%2F08%2F02%2Fbiden-rule-banning-incandescent-light-bulbs-now-fully-in-effect%2Ehtml%23%3A%7E%3Atext%3DA%2520rule%2520requiring%2520the%2520minimum%2Ceffect%2520by%2520January%25201%252C%25202017%2E&urlhash=xPg-&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) This began this August.

This was being done to the best of energy savings. This false narrative is not based on decentralized biological risks to children. My website and blog aim to review the key hormonal changes associated with female puberty, their effects on the ANS, and their potential role in predisposing some adolescent females to cardiovascular autonomic dysfunctions such as VVS and POTS.

Melanin biology is strongly protective of autonomic dysfunction and changes in sexual dimorphic changes that are possible in children. Increases in pubertal hormones such as estrogen, thyroid, growth hormone, insulin, and insulin-like growth factor-1 promote vasodilatation and decrease blood volume. This can lead to relative dehydration signaling in the baroreceptors of the circulatory system. This may be exacerbated by higher levels of progesterone, which suppresses catecholamine secretion and sympathetic outflow.

People forget that melanin destruction alters the production of norepinephrine, epinephrine, and dopamine. All of these are key catecholamine chemicals in the ANS of humans. The picture above shows you these direct links. Abnormal heart rate increases in POTS patients may be exacerbated by pubertal increases in leptin, insulin, and thyroid hormones acting to increase sympathetic nervous system activity and/or catecholamine levels.

SUMMARY

Given the coincidental timing of female pubertal hormone surges and adolescent onset of VVS and POTS in young women, coupled with the known roles of these hormones in modulating cardiovascular homeostasis, it is likely that female pubertal hormones play a role in predisposing females to VVS and POTS during puberty. This is how decentralized medicine SHOULD be allowed to operate inside the USA. Further research into the government mandates of our light environment is necessary to confirm the effects of female pubertal hormones on autonomic function and their role in pubertal autonomic disorders such as VVS and POTS. This is needed to inform the treatment and management of these debilitating disorders.

### Jack Kruse

Published Oct 28, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhigh-latitude-living-101-jack-kruse-mz3te&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

WHY DOES my recent @owensheasby PODCAST MATTER DEEPLY TO THOSE WHO REMAIN IN THE DARK ON QUANTUM BIOLOGY? If you consider the mass-energy equivalence relationship, E= mc^2 you might be led to this conclusion. However, what this equation really tells us is that matter is not conserved in Nature. It is a shocking because it tells us that mass can be converted to energy. It does say how but Nature allows for it. In other words, E=mc^2 tells us something deep about mass that has huge implications for biology. That's why it's useful to the mitochondriac. However the concept that everything is just energy gets us nowhere in terms of understanding our world. It is essentially a statement of existence. The fact that the universe exists and is full of energy is an empirical fact. It is not explained by the concept of energy. Similarly, the laws of physics are ultimately empirical, and they are also not explained by energy. Energy is essentially an accounting tool that helps us solve problems. This is what leptin is in biology. Melanin however, is a lot like Noether's theorem and what it says about Einstein's relativity. It tells us a lot about the mass in the system and how much light can be absorbed into the system. The physics is given in the nature and character of the fundamental forces that describe how things interact. Life is basically about electricity and magnetism that come from light in a system. Think about the tests done by your centralized doctor in the form of an EKG, EEG, and an EMG. All show the electrical and magnetic potential of our organ systems. Anything and everything electrical stems from the phenomena of charge. No one seems to have a clue why this relationship in nature exists, but physics tells us it is true. Atoms are made up of 3 parts: Protons have a positive charge, neutrons are neutral, and electrons have a negative charge. Here is the interesting part: Electrons have the equal and opposite charge of protons, but an electrons atomic mass is 1/1836th that of a proton. This is a huge difference in mass. Thusly, charge of these particles is the main variable with respect to their atomic mass. Atomic mass links to the thermodynamics and energy needed in the system because mass determines the size and shape in protein lattices. The charge of the lattice is determined by the protons and electrons in the system. Electrons delocalize most often because they are not encumbered by the mass as protons are. This points out why deuterium is a problem in mitochondrial biology. The mass of the lattice determines the how the speed of light can travel in our tissues. It also determines the frequency of light emitted. This is the basis of how a semiconductor emits light = LED. The speed of light is variable in a substance when it becomes encumbered by electrons. This is why size and shape alter the thermodynamics of things made up of electrons and protons. Light only interacts with electrons via the photoelectric effect. Thusly, electrons are exicted and powered up by light. Light instantaneously interacts with matter to create the fastest pathway through tissues. This directly links tissues to Fermat’s principle. Light does not interact with protons or neutrons and has to go around them. This increases the distance that light must travel and it creates tiny delay's in tissues at the quantum level. Just because the distance increases does not mean the path is longer in all cases. That small delay creates a signal that denotes biologic time in a cell. That delay is observed in the telomere length of a cell. What moves atoms or things made up of atoms? Light is capable of this fundamental task and nothing else can. How light is captured and travels in our tissues is how time manifests in biology = melanin biology. The general theory of relativity states that in particular, the curvature of spacetime is directly related to the energy and momentum of whatever matter and radiation are present. Einstein's general theory of relativity can be summed up in just 12 words: Space-time tells matter how to move; matter tells space-time how to curve. This also implies that light energy responds to the action of matter

# Article: CENTRALIZED SCIENCE IS WISING UP TO THE EFFECTS OF LIGHT IN CELLS
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/centralized-science-wising-up-effects-light-cells-jack-kruse-izkef>

**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 633
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fcentralized-science-wising-up-effects-light-cells-jack-kruse-izkef&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 5, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcentralized-science-wising-up-effects-light-cells-jack-kruse-izkef&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Centralized science is getting closer to understanding my biophysical stance on decentralized medicine. Acenes consist of benzene molecules—rings made of carbon and hydrogen—fused together in a linear fashion. Because they are rich in sharable electrons and can efficiently transport an electric charge, they have been used as semiconductors and field-effect transistors. These transistors can use an electric field to control the flow of current in a semiconductor.

Recent work has shown that acenes in which some of the carbon atoms are replaced, or "doped," with boron and nitrogen have even more helpful electronic properties. However, like traditional acenes, these molecules are unstable when exposed to air or light. I hope they soon realize that all the critical chromophores in man use photon traps of benzene in their chemical structure but in short form and not in a polymer length.

[In](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Flength%2EIn&urlhash=fXoe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) a lab, acenes must be synthesized within a sealed container called a glovebox to protect them from air exposure (02), which can lead to their breaking down. The longer the acenes polymer length is, the more susceptible they are to unwanted reactions initiated by oxygen, water, or light. This limits their use. But now researchers have found how to manipulate them to create all colors in the visible spectrum. Nature's photon traps already figured out how to do this. The color of light emitted by an acene is determined by its length, but as the molecules become longer, they also become less stable, which is why Nature rejected them in cells. Not only that photonics/electronics manufacturers have shunned them for the same reason, which has hindered their widespread use in light-emitting applications. Note the picture below where all the beneze ring photon traps are used in cells.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Engineering Human Biology

Norman Jacknis 10 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/engineering-human-biology-norman-jacknis)

[

Soliton´s Scientific Saturday: LIBS the future of…

Soliton Laser- und Messtechnik GmbH 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/solitons-scientific-saturday-libs-future-elemental-analysis-rijze)

[

Light Year Ahead: MIT's Cell-Capturing 'Tractor Beam

Frankie Sholes 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/light-year-ahead-mits-cell-capturing-tractor-beam-sholes-lion--t4d5c)

[In](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapplications%2EIn&urlhash=QI2k&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) a study published last year, they used this ligand to stabilize borafluorenium ions, organic compounds that can emit different colors of light in response to temperature changes. For this study, Gilliard and his co-authors developed a new synthesis that allowed them to add carbodicarbenes to acenes that are also doped with boron and nitrogen. With the addition of the new ligand, the acenes became positively charged, which improved their stability and also gave them unique electronic properties. Using this approach, the researchers created acenes that produce different colors depending on their length and the types of chemical groups attached to the carbodicarbene. Until now, most of the boron, nitrogen-doped acenes that had been synthesized could emit only BLUE light.

[Red](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Flight%2ERed&urlhash=XEQ-&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) emission is crucial for wide-ranging applications, including biological applications like imaging. This highlights why melanopsin is so prominent in the human brain because a lot of human tissue emits blue light due to the creation of endogenous biophotons to mitochondrial metabolism. This is why exogenous blue light is so dangerous. It alters cellular communications at the base level of information transfer. Moreover, this explains why it's difficult to use blue fluorescent probes for imaging, which is one of the many reasons why people are looking for red emitters.

One last point must be made: Organic light-emitting diodes are lighter and more flexible than traditional LEDs, produce brighter images, and consume less power. This tells us that organic LEDs might have different failure patterns than LEDs traditionally made with CMOS technology. My discussion with an aerospace engineer last night in El Salvador stimulated this idea. I've been thinking about the implications all night.

This is why this paper matters to the Black Swan Mitochondriac.

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhere-chronic-diseases-begin-jack-kruse-eqcke&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Dec 26, 2023

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhere-chronic-diseases-begin-jack-kruse-eqcke&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

WHAT IS THE BAZAN EFFECT AND WHY IS IT IMPORTANT TO A QUANTUM CLINICIAN? Dr. Bazan is a neuroscientist whose work influenced me while I was a resident at LSU and long before I had a quantum perspective 30 years.

He was the first person I can recall in my training that was able to link clinical diseases to the RPE in the retina by discovering something called the Bazan effect today. He was initially studying what effect seizures and lack of blood flow had on the CNS. He found when the brain is stressed for any reason neurons release two types of essential fatty acids, namely omega 6 and omega 3. Their names are arachidonic acid (AA) and docosahexaenoic acid (DHA).

These are essential FFA’s because the body has a poor capacity to make them endogenously. Arachidonic acid is found ubiquitously all over the body in all cell lines but DHA goes mainly to the retina and brain. Both become critical parts of the cell membrane EMF antenna in cells that work in wireless fashion using various non-linear aspects of the electromagnetic spectrum. The release of both of these fats created major questions for science 30 years ago. Bazan found that the release of AA and DHA occurred very rapidly. This speed was initially felt to be a post-mortem or a pathologic side effect of a stimulus.

His lab also raised the question of whether the event was related to normal physiologic function. He used electroshock experiments to figure out the truth. He found once the EMF was used to create the electroshock that once the fatty acids were released they RETURNED to the cell membranes by two pathways. He found the release was a REVERSIBLE event and this told him that the release of AA and DHA to EMF’s was tied to physiologic function.

This set the stage for his lab to find the key links between seizures and neurodegenerative diseases. When blue light hits the central retinal pathways, vitamin A is liberated and DHA is turned to an aldehyde form and this creates the destruction cascade that Dr. Bazan discovered. This means the more tech abuse you allow the more seafood your body requires to run the SCN and the habenular nucleus.

This is why modern chronic diseases (SCN damage) and mental disorders (habenular nucleus damage) are exploding now. This is the basis for these occurances. AA is a precursor molecule for all the prostaglandins and many other important mediators that were eventually discovered by Bengt Samuelson at the Karolinska Institute. Because these mediators all have 20 carbons they are called eicosanoids.

SUMMARY

In 2003 and 2004 he linked these mediators to diseases of the eye and brain via the discovery of neuroprotectin D1 (NPD1) which is the FIRST MESSENGER or mediator of DHA metabolism. He found that neuroprotectin D1 is intimately involved in electroshocks, seizures, and in ischemia of the retina and brain disorders. NPD1 functions to protect neurons from metabolic, photolytic, and EMF damage. NPD1 comes from DHA which has 22 carbons so it comes from a family of chemicals called docosanoids. He gave me the basic science and I put it all together.

Light and latitude explain these disease related to neuroectodermal loss of melanin.

Photosynthesis controls the ENTIRE FOOD web. This means the sun and circadian biology are behind every biochemical action. This is 100,000 of these reactions per second in a cell and light frequencies control of them with ease. This is exactly how your iphone has all the information in the world in your hand. THIS IS AXIOMATIC in decentralized science and medicine. It is not in centralized medicine or science. You need to be aware of their myopia.

The human body is programmed by light, good or bad light mind you. What you choose to live under gives you the results you get.

Melanin does a lot more than you've been taught to believe

Hard core proof that this is the case? Did you know breast milk has a higher AM cortisol level which corresponds dawn's light to help wake the baby up at the right time and it has higher in melatonin levels in the dark when the sun is absent to put the baby asleep. Centralized corporate formulations can't possibly replicate this because centralized science keeps subtracting light information from foods they create. Food gurus & biochemists make the exact same errors.
