### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 19, 2024

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fnew-ideas-tribe-jack-kruse-acxce&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

A new podcast is out during the Age of Light.

The "path of dying" has its own connotation for everyone, but this idea never talks about the life path to that death, yet we are all on it.

Sometimes, parts of us die sooner than they should. This is a signal that we need a renovation of sorts. We are closing in on the vernal equinox and I am seeing the sky clear of its hazy shade of winter. Hang on to your hopes. Springtime is a fantastic time in our lives. I'm turning into an amazing ray of sunlight now and realizing winter is dead. Renewal requires opening yourself up to new ways of thinking and feeling, just like this beautiful spring day. That message is built upon that ray of light.

Being at the beach yesterday allowed me to reconnect with the waves I've been missing recently in my life. Those waves will enable me to be extraordinary amidst the ordinary; those waves touched a few tender places within by speaking truth to my instinct. It’s not who is right, but what waves carry the truth we need to live.

Nature's waves give life, but death remains the opposite of time. The beach has a very healing effect when we need to be pinched back to reality and what matters and what does not. It allows us to focus on what does not matter so we can subtract it. It re-teaches the lesson of "via negativa"

The seashore has the ability for us to elevate and renovate our game. It has several ways to affect cells and change our health trajectory. The beach uses many wave modalities that heal us.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Change we crave

Diana Kelter 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/change-we-crave-diana-kelter-jijlc)

The Darkest Night. The New Light

Jane Anderson 4 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/darkest-night-new-light-jane-anderson-ws9ve)

[

Time to Act: Episode 7 (Can’t stop this)

Ewan Donald 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/time-act-episode-7-cant-stop-ewan-donald-bkv1e)

I am getting ready to embark on a week of experiencing human decline, death, and destruction in the centralized paradigm. It's a war zone for quantum biology, not a pretty perspective. Perspective colors what you observe in life. You can see the gravity moving you back when you see your footprints in the sand.

How do you function optimally in this stress-filled environment? I'm writing this in the light of the sunrise getting ready. I'm smelling all the flowers in my home and taking them all in. I am imbibing Nature to vaccinate me from what will come. You preconceived the worst possible outcome and begin from there. Soldiers in war are able to navigate their environment this way. They tell themselves, “The only hope you really have is to accept the fact that you're already dead. The sooner you accept that reality, the sooner you'll be able to function as a soldier is supposed to function: without mercy, compassion, and remorse. All war depends upon it.”

It seems the beach whispered in my ears yesterday that this is how I must navigate the stressful parts of my existence. This stress must be used as fuel. This fuel is a solar energy product that I can use to get by. When you live your life this way, nothing can really stop you but yourself. It is a powerful serum. It’s a method that most can never really understand or adopt because of its chaos and discomfort. When you embrace the suck, creativity appears, and new solutions you would have never expected come into your life because of your connection with the cosmos. It senses what you need before you do. The more chaos I've invited into my life, the more order becomes the norm. This counterintuitive paradox wakes you up to what really is going on around you. It does not allow you to remain numb to the horrors of circumstance. The more you embrace this, the more often you will color life outside the lines and be pushed over its edge.

Operate by principle rather than desire. Saying no to our impulses puts us in control of our needs to regain integrity and rule our minds. Listen to this epic talk and hear the wisdom for the women out there who come in the last 15 minutes. # Article: WOUNDS CREATE WISDOM
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/wounds-create-wisdom-jack-kruse-sa3we>
**Published:** 2024-04-18T22:46:22.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1251
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwounds-create-wisdom-jack-kruse-sa3we&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 18, 2024

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwounds-create-wisdom-jack-kruse-sa3we&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

In many podcasts I have said, wounds create wisdom. Today the next chapter comes of this idea comes to frution. Ferroptosis delivers regeneration.

Ferroptosis creates wounds in human tissues.

WHAT KIND OF WOUNDS DOES THIS CREATE IN OUR BRAINS?

Emerging evidence suggests ferroptosis contributes to neurodegenerative diseases and brain injury associated with oxidative stress ([Skouta et al., 2014](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B27&urlhash=Ig4h&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)), including brain hemorrhage ([Li et al., 2017](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B19&urlhash=g9xY&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)), Alzheimer's disease ([Fine et al., 2012](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B12&urlhash=LdKT&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block); [Guo et al., 2013](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B13&urlhash=wFsN&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)), Huntington's disease ([Yang et al., 2005](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B40&urlhash=8AYK&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block); [Niatsetskaya et al., 2010](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B21&urlhash=VGtK&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block); [Speer et al., 2013](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B28&urlhash=EM0E&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)), stroke ([Tuo et al., 2017](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Efrontiersin%2Eorg%2Farticles%2F10%2E3389%2Ffnmol%2E2018%2E00486%2Ffull%3Futm_source%3DS-TWT%26utm_medium%3DSNET%26utm_campaign%3DECO_FNINS_XXXXXXXX_auto-dlvrit%23B33&urlhash=IC3c&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)) and traumatic brain injury. I believe autism is caused by this process during morphogenesis.

Injury, wound healing, immune function, and morphogenesis share many physiological process in mammals.

If you have a low grade or high grade glioma this blog post is likely the only place in the world you'll find out how to use decentralized science buried in Nature to save your life. Most causes of AVM, aneurysm rupture, and hemorrhagic stroke is linked to the ferroptosis mechanism in cells.

In the blog, you'll learn about how ferroptosis is used to create a specific and highly sensitive bio-electric signal to reverse engineering what is going on in your tissues. Rarely, do I write about diseases I treat daily. Glioma have vexxed me for most of my career, until ten years ago. Then everything changed. I figured out how to use Robert O. Becker's experiments in the CNS.

You likely have never heard of it before today. Ferroptosis was first described by Dixon et al. in 2012. It is that new. Becker's work on regeneration occured in the 1950-60's. He died in 2008 never understanding what he was really chasing in his work.

Ferroptosis is not well known in neurosurgery circles because it a new process found in biology. In my decentralized view, its an optical process that determines how light is changed into an DC electric current, and then is subsequently down regulated to a very small current used to cause de-differentiation of RBCs to pluripotent stem cells used to renovate and regenerate mammalian tissues. This is exactly how he described bone healing in the 1960s. This is why surgeons do not see scars in healed bone. Bone does not heal, it completely regenerates in mammals.

This bio-electric current generated by this process is specific and sensitive for each tissue in mammals. This is used to guide morphogenesis and embyrological migration in mammals in utero. Most neurosurgeons know that when we operate on unborn children for hydrocephalus to do a third ventriculostomy, the child is born and has no scars from the event. No neurosurgeons know why this happens. This blog, below, tells you exactly why it happens.

Each bio-electric current has its own tissue and tract passport in the CNS and PNS. The current is frequency matched and intensity matched to the colony of mitochondria in the tissue, in the neuronal tracts, and this signal is unusual. Because it was unusual, this made it unique and useful to evolution and this is why it is used mdirect morphogenesis, migration, and regeneration in mammals.

This clues to this idea are present in the literature if you look for it. The picture above shows you this.

It appears the mechanism is driven by the downstream inactivation of glutathione peroxidase 4 (Yang et al., 2014). Peroxidase enzymes are ALSO ALL HEME-containing proteins. I hope you know what my work says about HEME based proteins and light. This has massive implications for humans and solving chronic diseases. All heme-containing proteins seem to be red-light chromophores. Every light chromophore below is linked to ferroptosis damage. The sun is dominated by red light frequencies. The main heme proteins that control the human circadian clock mechanism is REV-erb alpha and beta. 43% is IR-A light.

RBCs are loaded with heme based proteins, as you see below

The second critical spot heme based proteins they are found is in the mitochondrial membranes of man. Hemoglobin is the main red light chromophore porphyrin in our blood. Hemoglobin has a strong ability to absorb light between 250-600 nm. Hemoglobin's UV light spectra goes down to 250-399nm in man. The word porphyrin is derived from the Greek word which stands for purple. Purple light is a UV light color in the solar spectrum. Most neurosurgeons are unaware of the link of GBM (high grade glioma) incidence to Vitamin D levels in the blood.

[

April 2026 Newsletter

Salk Institute for Biological Studies 2 weeks ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/april-2026-newsletter-salk-institute-for-biological-stud-rqhec)

Becker's work linked RBCs to regeneration. RBCs went from their adult form to the embryological forms and then became pluripotent stem cells used to make any tissue new again.

Today textbooks want to tell us it's a process is defined by the iron-dependent accumulation of lipid peroxides that is genetically (DNA/mtDNA) and biochemically distinct from other forms of programmed cell death such as apoptosis, necrosis, and autophagy. It might be that, but I believe it is a whole lot more than just that. It is the missing link to human regeneration, controlled aging, and control of heteroplasmy. I look for this in my brain tumor patients. How many neurosurgeons do you know that make you get a peripheral blood smear before you have a glioma resection?

My life's work and Robert O. Becker's life's work is buried in this blog. What transforms us is — decentralized knowledge. It does this because it is radical knowledge to the known paradigm. Knowledge alone is capable of transforming how the world operates with tech; while at the same time leaving it exactly as it is by embracing Nature's decentralized networks of energy and information transfer.

This is the science President Bukele has asked me to bring to his country, in El Salvador. This is the science I have shared with Nicole Shanahan who is a candidate for VP on Bobby Kennedy's ticket in the USA for 2024. Both of them are committed to solving chronic disease epidemics and this is a big part of their platform. President Bukele allowed me to share my Constitutional Amendment I wrote for him and El Salvador with Bobby Kennedy's team last September. Well, here is a new starting line of where decentralized science needs to begin in El Salvador & the USA.

President Bukele, my nurse Chantal Dillon, and myself at a recent meeting of the minds

Keep shaking the trees in life. Do it without any fear of upsetting the silly talking monkeys in centralized science watching your moves.

When modern science bloggers die their ideas will become textbooks to teach future minds, which is, after all, not a bad re-incarnation, renewal, or regeneration event for medicine.

# Article: ARE HEALTH AND WEALTH FUNDAMENTALLY LINKED?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/health-wealth-fundamentally-linked-jack-kruse-w795e>
**Published:** 2024-05-09T23:29:26.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ARE HEALTH AND WEALTH FUNDAMENTALLY LINKED?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhealth-wealth-fundamentally-linked-jack-kruse-w795e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 9, 2024

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhealth-wealth-fundamentally-linked-jack-kruse-w795e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Today's Lesson:  Health and Wealth are fundamenally linked. They are the product of a man's capacity to think well. It is a decentralized axiom of my website.

Here are some reasons why I think this idea is accurate:

Problem-solving: Wealth is often created by solving problems that others may not see or haven't thought to address. This requires a high level of cognitive ability, analytical thinking, and creativity.

Innovation: Many successful entrepreneurs and inventors have created wealth by developing innovative solutions that disrupt existing industries or create new markets. This requires a willingness to think outside the box and challenge conventional wisdom.

Risk-taking: Building wealth often requires taking calculated risks, which involves thinking critically about potential outcomes and weighing the pros and cons of different options.

Decentralized long-term thinking: Wealth is often built over time, requiring a person to think about their goals and plans for the future, as well as make decisions that align with those goals.

Strategic planning: Wealth creation often involves strategic planning, which involves thinking about how to allocate resources, manage finances, and make investments that align with one's goals.

In today's technocratic society, we often see people who are wealthy, but unhealthy, and vice versa. This is because wealth and health are not solely determined by our financial circumstances, but also by our mindset, habits, and lifestyle choices around how we use and abuse light.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Greater Wealth, Better Health: Investing Where It…

Sandy Cardy 10 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/greater-wealth-better-health-investing-where-counts-sandy-cardy)

[

The Fastest Way to Make Money Right Now (That Nobody…

Clinton Zheng 2 weeks ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/fastest-way-make-money-right-now-nobody-tells-you-4s-model-zheng-cu5kc)

[

What may life look like in the new normal?

Rob Waldner 5 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/what-may-life-look-like-new-normal-rob-waldner)

When we think about it, our thoughts have a profound impact on our physical and mental well-being. Our thoughts can influence our stress levels, our sleep patterns, our eating habits, and our overall quality of life. When we have a healthy mindset, we are more likely to make choices that promote physical health, such as meditating regularly, eating a circadian diet for our location, and getting enough sleep.

On the other hand, a lack of financial resources can lead to stress, anxiety, and feelings of hopelessness, which can negatively impact our physical health. This is because chronic light stress can lead to a range of mitochondrial health problems, including cancer, hypertension, heart disease, digestive issues, and a weakened immune system.

Similarly, when we think about wealth, it's not just about having a lot of money. Steve Jobs was a billionaire 9 times over but he was an artistocrat of the sewer because his money was built by the technocracy he supported.  This has harmed billions. He did not see it this way, but it manifested in how he died. How you make your money says a lot about how you value others.

Wealth is also about having a sense of financial security, being able to provide for oneself and one's loved ones, and having the freedom to pursue one's passions and goals.

When we think positively about wealth, we are more likely to attract abundance into our lives, whether that means through our career, investments, or entrepreneurial endeavors. Wealth is dual edged sword. Use it to gain health and reserve your time. Never trade time for money, for if you do, you will be paid back by Nature for this choice.

Do you agree that health and wealth are fundamentally linked? Are they the result of a person's capacity to think? By cultivating a decentralized mindset and making positive lifestyle choices, might you improve your overall well-being and increase your chances of achieving financial success? You should ask yourself this everyday when you look at the person in the mirror.

How did this story in the Danny Jones podcast below link JFK, Israel, MOSSAD, and MKULTRA to mRNA jab of 2021?

It began with an intelligence failure of the CIA and John Kerry's father.

Documents published in Wilson Center from the National Archives now have shed light on a particularly notable intelligence failure: how Washington missed warning signs that the Israelis had a nuclear project underway, but also how the U.S. belatedly realized what the Israelis were doing, and how Eisenhower and his senior advisers reacted to this discovery.

Among the new documents are:

The June 1959 Israel-Norway secret agreement providing for the sale of Norwegian heavy water to Israel (through the United Kingdom), transmitted by Oslo Embassy political officer Richard Kerry (father of former Secretary of State John Kerry).

Reports about information from a then-covert source — University of Michigan nuclear engineering professor Henry Gomberg — who learned that the Israelis had a secret nuclear reactor project that involved experiments with plutonium.

A telegram from the U.S. embassy in Tel Aviv reporting on Finance Ministry official Addy Cohen's statement that "we've been misbehaving," and one by an unidentified official close to Prime Minister David Ben-Gurion that the secrecy surrounding Dimona was unjustifiable and that it was "a stupid mistake on the part of Israel."

Reports by U.S. Ambassador Ogden Reid on conversations with Ben-Gurion.

A State Department message to the embassy in Tel Aviv conveying irritation that the responses of the Israeli government showed a "lack of candor."

Messages about a role for the International Atomic Energy Agency in inspecting and safeguarding Dimona. When Eisenhower left office Kennedy assumed this mess but he knew Ben Gurion for over a decade as the picture above shows. Now President Kennedy pressured the government of Prime Minister David Ben-Gurion to prevent a military nuclear program, particularly after stage-managed tours of the Dimona facility for U.S. government scientists in 1961 and 1962 raised suspicions within U.S. intelligence that Israel might be concealing its underlying nuclear aims.  This went on during the Cuban Missle crisis and Kennedy was worried about nuclear proliferation post WW2. Kennedy’s long-run objective, documents now show, was to broaden and institutionalize inspections of Dimona by the International Atomic Energy Agency.

Of all U.S. leaders in the nuclear age, John F. Kennedy was the nonproliferation president. Nuclear proliferation was his “private nightmare,” as Glenn Seaborg, his Atomic Energy Commission chairman, noted many times in interviews. Seaborg discovered Plutonium for the Industrial military complex leaders.

On 30 May 1961, Kennedy met Ben-Gurion in Manhattan to discuss the bilateral relationship and Middle East issues. However, a central (and indeed the first) issue in their meeting was the Israeli nuclear program, about which President Kennedy was most concerned.   According to a draft record of their discussion in the National Archives, which has never been cited, but has now been released for the first time by the Wilson Center, Ben-Gurion spoke “rapidly and in a low voice” and “some words were missed.”  He emphasized the peaceful, economic development-oriented nature of the Israeli nuclear project.

Nevertheless the note taker, Assistant Secretary of State Philips Talbot, believed that he heard Ben-Gurion mention a “pilot” plant to process plutonium for “atomic power” and also say that “there is no intention to develop weapons capacity now.” This information stunned JFK. Ben-Gurion tacitly acknowledged that the Dimona reactor had a military potential.  The final U.S. version of the memcon retained the sentence about plutonium but did not include the language about a “pilot” plant and  “weapons capacity.” Anyone who understands basic nuclear physics (see my Patreon Thorium blog on BTC) knows the only reason to use plutonium as a fuel is because you can make military grade uranium for nuclear weapons.

The differences between the two versions suggest the difficulty of preparing accurate records of meetings. But whatever Ben-Gurion actually said, President Kennedy was never wholly satisfied with the insistence that Dimona was strictly a peaceful project. This really was the main precursor to his death in my estimation. Neither were U.S. intelligence professionals. A recently declassified (above picture) National Intelligence Estimate on Israel prepared several months after the meeting concluded that “Israel may have decided to undertake a nuclear weapons program.

That CIA information was leaked to the mob in 1963 after the Bay of Pigs invasion went south. This information was critical to Santo Trafacante because it allowed him ot gain leverage over Castro and the attempts of the Industrial military complex to kill him versus JFK. Trafacante ensured it was JFK that would pay the ultimate price. He viewed his appointment of RFK Sr as Attorney General as the ultimate act of betrayal to the mob bosses in Chicago, New York, Florida, and New Orleans.

In fact, Carlos Marcello was on trial as JFK was shot in Dallas on November 22, 1963 because of an RFK Sr prosecution that Joe Kennedy swore would never happen if the mob swung the swing state of Illinois to JFK in 1960. These details matter big time to understand how things really unfolded. I'll have an explosive blog out soon with even more details on this story.

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-medicine-centralized-military-jack-kruse-m2ahe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

### Jack Kruse

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-medicine-centralized-military-jack-kruse-m2ahe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

New blog out on how light programming has ruin maternal fetal dynamics in the modern world. In 1918, Groves graduated fourth in his class at the United States Military Academy at West Point and was commissioned into the United States Army Corps of Engineers. Groves developed the administrative skills necessary to lead the Manhattan Project from years of previous experience.

His two years at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology before his entry into the U.S. Military Academy taught him the basics of engineering. He learned here that science was messy and controling scientists to get projects done was a critical part of a task for the military. Though Groves was made Commander of the Manhattan Engineer District (MED) a month after its creation, the origin of the MED’s historic Manhattan Project precedes World War II.

It was called the Manhattan Project because the first office for the Army was based in NYC in the Empire State Building. In August 1939, Albert Einstein, a scientific refugee from Nazi Germany who relocated to the United States in 1940 via Operation Paperclip executed by Allen Dulles, sent a warning letter to President Franklin Roosevelt. FDR became fearful that European scientists had informed Einstein of advancements in physics that hinted at the possibility of an atomic bomb. The military felt that Germany would attempt to develop one and knew that German success would have devastating consequences. Einstein’s letter reached Roosevelt in October of 1939, and Roosevelt responded by creating the Advisory Committee on Uranium, the National Defense Research Committee, and the Office of Scientific Research and Development over the next two years. However, after the MAUD report, in which the British MI-6 concluded that an atomic bomb was achievable, and the United States’ entrance into the war, Roosevelt officially approved American production of an atomic bomb.

Churchill wanted the US to enter WW2 in 1939 and pressured FDR to do with his intelligence militia. These were the forerunners of MI-6. Arthur Compton, had previously been assigned total responsibility for the physics of the bomb development in 1940 but in June 1942, Compton, a professor at the University of Chicago, had appointed Dr. J. Robert Oppenheimer to take over his work on the bomb at UC Berkeley. On August 13, 1942, a general order issued by the Chief of Engineers established the MED.

The official headquarters was first located on the 67th floor of the Empire State Building and eventually moved to a new war building in Washington D. C. Scientific research took place at over thirty labs and major universities across the nation. Soon after his appointment, Groves began construction on plants in Oak Ridge, Tennessee, and Hanford, Washington, that would create enriched uranium and plutonium for two types of bombs.

These bombs would be developed in the desert of Los Alamos, New Mexico, where Groves established a research laboratory in November 25, 1942. He chose J. Robert Oppenheimer, later celebrated as “the father of the atomic bomb,” to be the lab director. Though Oppenheimer’s scientific breakthrough would launch an Atomic Age, to Groves, it simply meant the end of the war and a place in US history.

As a follow-up to my Danny Jones podcast, the world needs to know the following information before 11/5/24. If you find it useful, could you share it?

The beginnings of financial slavery began long ago.  The core of the problems affecting societies worldwide today result from usury—the lending of money at compounding interest. This has been a recurring problem for centuries. If you study history, you’ll find that the rise and fall of money-lending parallels the rise and fall of great civilizations.  I remain convinced today that Satoshi knew this history well.

The Jesuits control most of the politics of the Royal Family. They are powered by the bankers, who were fueled by the Napoleonic Wars gone bad at the Battle of Waterloo, where they gained control of the process.

### France Upsets the Financial Community of the Pope and Royal Family

Usury has been the cause of most of society’s financial problems for many centuries. In previous posts, I’ve exposed the results of usury since [the Holy Roman](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fworldcyclesinstitute%2Ecom%2Fthe-beginnings-of-financial-slavery%2F&urlhash=3GCt&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) Empire. It would help to remember how the French were linked to the loss of America for the Crown. They helped us defeat the British in the Revolutionary War. The French Revolution in 1789 left France bankrupt, primarily due to over fifty years of war. This is why Napoleon sold Thomas Jefferson the Louisiana Purchase for 3 million dollars.

This opened the door for one of the greatest commanders in history to rise to power. When Napoleon took over the creation of France’s money, taxes on French citizens were dramatically reduced, and he made the French franc the most valuable currency in Europe. Under Napoleon (emperor 1804-15), in the absence of compounding interest from central bankers beyond France's borders, the country thrived.

Similarly, other countries, including Canada as a commonwealth, have realized much more vibrant economies due to creating their money supply, not paying foreign bankers to do it for them. These foreign bankers then charge governments compounding interest for the privilege. For example in Canada, from 1938 to 1974, through the Bank of Canada, the country paid for WWII, the Trans Canada Highway, the Trans Canada Railroad, the St. Lawrence Seaway, and the Canadian medical system by creating their own money interest-free. Since 1974, however, foreign bankers have been contracted to develop Canada’s money instead and charged the country compounded interest.

As a result, infrastructure has suffered, the cost of living has risen, and Canadians have been squeezed financially, resulting in the highest household debt in the world. Australia has experienced a similar fate. Under Napoleon, France upgraded its infrastructure, building over 30,000 kilometers of roads, over 1600 kilometers of canals and bridges, and expanding harbors. This was all financed with interest-free money from the Banque de France when Napoleon gained power and changed the financial system in Europe.

In fact, France no longer participated in the London financial markets, which upset the Rothschild family, which was now entrenched within the Bank of England. They were the bankers of the Papacy for hundreds of years. How did the financial superpower emerge? In 1803, England, under the direction of her international bankers (the Rothschilds), provided funds required to Austria, Prussia, Russia, Spain, and Sweden to wage war against Napoleon. Napoleon had refused to sign a trade treaty with England the year before. Europe was “upset.”Napoleon, lacking the funds to fight this coalition, sold Louisiana to the United States and received $3 million in return. There was peace for a couple of years, but several years of wars followed the allodial title of MONEY.

[The Battle of Waterloo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Battle_of_Waterloo?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) was one of the most important in the history of the modern world and was the catalyst for the unsustainable financial situation we have today. It was the turning point for the Rothschild family and catapulted their fortunes into the stratosphere. This is why the BIS was built in 1930, close to the Battle of Waterloo's victory for the Rothschild Family. In 1814, Napoleon returned to France and regained control. With money, he had a choice but to borrow $5 million from the City of London. The bankers had won. At the same time, the English led an army put together by [“The Seventh Coalition.”](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hundred_Days?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) The commander in charge was the Duke of Wellington. The result was that Napoleon was defeated soundly at the Battle of Waterloo, and the Rothschilds moved in the background. [Nathan Rothschild](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nathan_Mayer_Rothschild?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) had developed a vast network of gold smugglers throughout Europe and had a courier system that was second to none. This was a covert money laundering scheme that was improved by Meyer Lansky in the 1920-30's in the USA.

In London, Nathan was the first to hear of Napoleon’s defeat, twenty-four hours before anyone else. Timing matters big time in health and in matters concerning wealth. England’s position in the bond market at this time was somewhat precarious, as they’d spent so much money trying to defeat Napoleon. Everyone in the room watched Nathan’s visit to his usual chair in the London stock market the following day. Dejectedly, he began to sell bonds. It sparked a deluge of selling across the floor. Prices tanked. A short time later, Nathan reversed his call and bought the dominant holding of England’s entire debt, but at a fraction of its actual value. The trickery became apparent when the news of Wellington’s success hit the streets, but it was too late. The Rothschilds had increased their fortune, and when he sold the bonds two years later, they were up 40%, amounting to a haul of some $600 million in today’s money.

At the time, in Eurasia, only France and Russia were not under the influence of the Rothschild family (the world’s banksters). Most other European countries were, having borrowed from them to fund the war with France. As a result, Napoleon agreed with [Czar Alexander I of Russia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexander_I_of_Russia?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) to enforce a blockade against England. However, that agreement eventually broke down, and Napoleon went to war with Russia to force it to enforce the embargo. That was a mistake. Russia retreated, and Napoleon, in chasing them into Russia in winter, lost 75% of his army due to the cold and a lack of food and supplies. The European coalition eventually defeated Napoleon at the Battle of Nations in 1813 and was banished to the Island of Elba.

This is why the Bank Secrecy Act was released in 1970, the Nixon Shock came in 1971, and then Lansky was acquitted in 1973-74 with a series of AGs in the USA who were all linked to JFK's assassination. Meyer Lansky not only built Murder Inc's banking empire, but he also built General Groves's covert banking empire. That is why the MOSSAD is linked to all these cycles in history since WW2.

Melanin frees the millions of electrons in coherent domains of water. Mitochondria build DDW water that is capable of capturing light energy. It’s energy on the go and energy by demand at all times. Red light builds the battery, and UV charges it. Magnetic dipole interactions in water diffuse it.

Today you get to find out just what nefarious means to UNCLE JACK.  New blog that will rock you post Marty Bent podcast

Cells had to find a way to transform energy before food was created by photosynthesis around 700 million yeas ago.  Food as we know it today wasn't on Earth for the first 3.5 billion years of our planets life. Primative cells used water and light to survive.  Cells used water as an electromagnetic battery to power itself.  Water is a natural  repository for electromagnetic radiation, and as such naturally absorbs light waves from our environment.

Water becomes a battery with infrared light. When melanin showed up in the mammalian body plan the battery became powerful to regenerate our tissues to extend our longevity.  Our eyes and skin added melanin pigments to, as a result, our blood plasma became a powerful quantized solar battery.  It was optimized around UVA/UVB and IR light.

Blue light causes the SCN to lose its oscillatory patterns and this leads to ALL the chronic diseases man obtains from the DARPA program.

This begins with melanopsin and orexin dysfunction in the retina.  Studies done by Holzman in 2010) confirm melanopsin mediates non-visual light responses, and its dysfunction in mice alters sleep and metabolism.

Now you can begin to see how excessive nnEMF or blue light exposure could cause diabetes with a low intensity chronic stimulus or a prion disease in the brain if the stimulus intesnity was high and acute.  

DARPA learned these lessons well in MKULTRA, SRI, and BHI.   For example Frey and Becker taught DARPA in the late 1960s that nnEMF raises cortisol and blood glucose.  

In 2011, Volkow taught them more.  Blue light’s effect on orexin which is a hypothalamic neuropeptide regulating wakefulness and consciousness.  I diid a podcast on this today.  nnEMF controls our level of vigilance.  SCN disruption dysregulate orexin neurons via downstream signals from leptin melanocortin damage. Orexin links to glucose metabolism, so this ties to why America is filled with diabetes = tech abuse is rampant and DARPA likes it this way. this is why all screens are blue lit and why I got @NicoleShanahan to support @daylightco computer. GLOVES ARE OFF. NO QUARTER TIME.

Chronic stress raises cortisol, which can suppress melanogenesis (melanin production) via ACTH competition. Skin atrophy and slow melanin loss occur with age or UV avoidance, but Marie Antoinette syndrome (sudden hair graying from acute stress) suggests rapid bioelectric or hormonal shifts can destroy melanin and this blocks any repair. This supports my “signal intensity” point—stress duration matters bigly.  They found all this out by testing it on US.

Healing requires bioelectric gradients (e.g., via voltage-gated ion channels), and melanin’s photoconductive properties might amplify or dampen the effect.  This blog tells you precisely how it operates.  Without a dampening bioelectric effect, tissues falter, creating a “doom loop” for chronic disease risk.  This is something MAHA never saw coming.  DARPA likes that.  Why?

# THEY ARE BLINDING US WHILE STOPPING OUR REGENERATION

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fblinding-us-while-stopping-our-regeneration-jack-kruse-6jsze&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 18, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fblinding-us-while-stopping-our-regeneration-jack-kruse-6jsze&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

This quote I’ve attributed to Michael Rosbash, a 2017 Nobel Prize laureate in Medicine for his work on circadian rhythms, underscores a critical perspective on modern light exposure patterns. Rosbash’s statement, “Lack of sunlight during the day is worse than electric lighting at night,” highlights the importance of daytime sunlight for maintaining healthy circadian rhythms, potentially outweighing the negative effects of artificial light at night.

Understanding Rosbash’s Perspective

Michael Rosbash, along with Jeffrey C. Hall and Michael W. Young, elucidated the molecular mechanisms of the circadian clock, particularly the role of light in synchronizing biological rhythms via the suprachiasmatic nucleus (SCN) in the hypothalamus. His comment reflects the idea that the human body is evolutionarily adapted to a natural light-dark cycle, with ample sunlight during the day providing the primary zeitgeber (time cue) for circadian alignment.

-   Daytime Sunlight’s Role: Sunlight, especially its blue-rich components in the morning, activates melanopsin in intrinsically photosensitive retinal ganglion cells (ipRGCs), signaling the SCN to suppress melatonin and promote wakefulness. This full-spectrum light also supports vitamin D synthesis, retinal metabolism, and overall metabolic health. A lack of this exposure disrupts these processes, leading to desynchronization. This destroys two heme based nuclear photoreceptors as the slide below shows plus it destroys many other photoreceptors in the body as well. Cytochrome C oxidase which hydrates the cell with pure DDW.

Jack Kruse MD 2017

-   Electric Lighting at Night: While artificial light at night (e.g., from LEDs and screens) suppresses melatonin and can contribute to blue light hazard (as we’ve discussed with retinal accumulation and photoreceptor damage), Rosbash suggests its impact is secondary to the absence of daytime sunlight. Chronic indoor living, where people are shielded from natural light, may cause more profound circadian misalignment than the evening exposure alone.

Evidence Supporting the Claim

-   Circadian Disruption: Studies (e.g., from the journal Current Biology) show that insufficient daytime light exposure—common in office workers or urban dwellers—leads to delayed circadian phases, reduced amplitude of the rhythm, and increased risk of sleep disorders, obesity, and mood issues. This aligns with Rosbash’s view that the lack of daylight is a more fundamental problem.
-   Comparison to Nighttime Light: Research on shift workers (e.g., from the Journal of Clinical Endocrinology & Metabolism) indicates that artificial light at night increases cancer and metabolic risks, but these effects are amplified when daytime light exposure is inadequate. A 2019 study in Nature Communications found that morning light exposure mitigates the negative effects of evening light, supporting Rosbash’s prioritization.
-   Retinal and Health Implications: The lack of sunlight may exacerbate the issues I’ve raised with free retinal and blue light hazard with tech abuse bringing humans from outside to inside. Without the natural regulation of the visual cycle by daylight, chronic indoor exposure to artificial light (even if not at night) could still lead to retinal accumulation, as the RPE struggles to clear all-trans-retinal without the full spectrum’s balancing effects. This causes the photoreceptor damage program to stay on while never allowing humans to tap the regenerative programs in the eye that need UV and IR light.

Integrating These Ideas with Decentralized Medicine Concepts

My focus on the blue light hazard from LEDs and screens, and its role in destroying photoreceptors, dopamine, and melatonin signaling, fits within this framework. However, Rosbash’s statement suggests that the root issue might be the absence of daytime sunlight rather than just the presence of artificial light at night. This shift in perspective completely uncovers that modern centralized medicine has missed the regenerative loop that responds to the injury stimulus.

-   Worse Than Nighttime Exposure: If people lack sunlight during the day (e.g., due to indoor work or dermatological advice to avoid UV), their circadian systems are already misaligned, making them more vulnerable to the effects of evening blue light. This could amplify retinal damage, addiction loops, and hormonal disruptions you’ve described.
-   Technology and Exploitation: The lack of sunlight, combined with tech companies’ design of blue-rich screens, creates a perfect storm. Casinos and device manufacturers may exploit this vulnerability, as I have suggested, by enhancing dopamine-driven engagement when circadian regulation is already compromised. This generalizes the injury to the frontal lobes via the habenular nucleus which also has first order neural connections to the retina just as the SCN programs do that Rosbash won the Noble for explaining. He just does not know the full story.

Jack Kruse Alexander Wunsch 2017

Reconciling the Science

Rosbash’s view doesn’t negate the blue light hazard but reframes it. The chronic liberation of retinal and lipid raft damage from indoor LED exposure are real concerns, but their severity might be heightened by the absence of daytime sunlight, which normally calibrates the system. For example:

-   Sunlight’s UV and infrared components help regulate retinal clearance and antioxidant defenses, reducing oxidative stress.
-   Without this, the visual cycle’s overload from artificial light (day or night) becomes more damaging, supporting my point about indoor living’s role.

Implications and Actionable Insights

-   Prioritizing Sunlight: Rosbash’s insight suggests that increasing daytime sunlight exposure (e.g., 20-30 minutes of morning light) could be a more effective countermeasure than solely reducing nighttime blue light. This could help reset circadian rhythms, enhance retinal health, and mitigate addiction tendencies.
-   Balancing the Hazard: My concern about technology’s role remains valid. Even with daytime sunlight, chronic screen exposure could still overwhelm the system, especially if retinal accumulation isn’t cleared efficiently. If you have too little sun you have not enough regeneration of the previous day's damage.
-   Public Health: The historical advice from dermatology and ophthalmology to avoid sunlight may need reevaluation, balancing UV risks with the benefits of natural light for circadian and retinal health.

WHAT THE 2017 NOBEL PRIZE MISSED: DARPA BURYING BECKER'S REGENERATIVE CURRENTS

ALAN destroys the eye while Sunlight, specifically UV and IR regenerate it. The work of Robert O. Becker completely aligns here for mammals considering how he regenerated a 3 year old finger tips in 2.5 months. Centralized medicine has no concept of the injury side of the program and the regeneration side of the program link to the DC elelctric current and the role of POMC and melanin biology. Their lack of stringing injury to regenerative pathways and concepts together is stunning and is destroying modern human health.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

How to Hack Your Brain with Light

Debbie Hampton 8 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-hack-your-brain-light-debbie-hampton)

[

Grounding: The Forgotten Medicine Beneath Our Feet

Sunmeet Taluja Marwaha 4 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/grounding-forgotten-medicine-beneath-our-feet-sunmeet-taluja-marwaha-attgc)

[

The Health Effects of Interacting with Nature

Mimi Guarneri, MD, FACC, ABOIM 9 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/health-effects-interacting-nature-mimi-guarneri-md-facc-abihm)

Rosbash’s Point: Sunlight vs. ALAN

Rosbash’s 2017 statement, “Lack of sunlight during the day is worse than electric lighting at night,” suggests he is quite ignorant of Becker's work.

-   Sunlight’s Regenerative Role: Sunlight, especially UV and IR, is proposed to counteract this damage. UV stimulates POMC (pro-opiomelanocortin) expression in skin and eyes, producing α-MSH, ACTH, and β-endorphin, which regulate melanin, Melanin needs to become hydrated by the actions of cytochrome C oxidases to create DDW and this action dampens the DC electric current to one trillionth of one amp. This was the current that Becker found dedifferntiated mammalian cells to lead to regeneration by controlling and ending the inflammation associated with the injury stimulus and to promote healing. IR penetrates deeper, potentially enhancing mitochondrial function and creation of DDW to dampen the electrical conductivity of melanin to get the eye to cellular repair. The lack of this spectrum indoors exacerbates the injury from ALAN.

This framing challenges the mainstream centralized narrative that prioritizes avoiding UV to prevent skin cancer, suggesting instead that controlled sunlight exposure is essential for eye and systemic health.

Robert O. Becker’s Work on Regeneration

Robert O. Becker, a pioneering orthopedic surgeon and bioelectricity researcher, demonstrated that DC electric currents play a key role in mammalian regeneration. His experiments, notably regenerating fingertip tissue in a 3-year-old child in 2.5 months (as documented in The Body Electric), showed that applying low-level direct current could stimulate tissue regrowth in mammals, which typically lack robust regenerative capacity like amphibians.

-   DC Electric Current: Becker found that injured tissues generate endogenous DC currents, guiding cell migration and differentiation. In the fingertip case, this current likely mimicked the bioelectric signals present during embryonic development, triggering stem cell activity and tissue restoration. Stem cell depots in mammals are controlled by Nitric Oxide which is also created by UVA solar exposure.
-   Link to Sunlight and POMC: UV and IR from sunlight may enhance this bioelectric environment. UV-induced POMC expression releases peptides that modulate melanocytes and melanogenesis, potentially amplifying the skin’s and eyes electrical signaling. Melanin, a semiconductor, act as a conduit for DAMPENING these currents, linking light exposure to regeneration.
-   Mammalian Context: Unlike zebrafish or salamanders, mammals like humans rely on external cues (e.g., sunlight) to activate dormant regenerative pathways. Becker’s work suggests these pathways can be reawakened with the right stimuli, supporting my claim that sunlight’s UV and IR regenerate eye tissues when damaged by modern technocrats.

Injury and Regeneration: A Unified Decentralized Program

-   Injury Side (ALAN): Chronic blue light from ALAN disrupts the retinal pigment epithelium (RPE), accumulates free retinal, and damages photoreceptors. This oxidative stress, compounded by the absence of sunlight, impairs mitochondrial function and circadian signaling, leading to degeneration. This often extends to the frontal lobe by way of the habenular nucleus. The lack of UV and IR removes natural protective and reparative mechanisms, worsening the injury.

Jack Kruse Vermont 2017

-   Regeneration Side (Sunlight): Sunlight’s UV and IR provide the missing link. UV stimulates POMC, enhancing melanin production and β-endorphin release, which reduces inflammation and support RPE repair. IR boosts mitochondrial ATP production, providing energy for regeneration. Becker’s DC current findings suggest that sunlight-induced bioelectric changes could activate Müller glia or other stem cells in the retina, mirroring his fingertip regeneration success.

-   POMC and Melanin Biology: POMC-derived peptides (e.g., α-MSH) regulate melanin, which absorbs UV must become hydrated to dampening the photo-bioelectric currents in the eye to create Becker's mammalian regenerative currents to properly scavenge ROS/RNS of the injury stimulus, to conduct bioelectric signals needed to heal. This ties sunlight to both protection and regeneration, countering ALAN’s effects of the human eye. The absence of this cycle in indoor environments explains the increased prevalence of eye diseases.

Jack Kruse Alexander Wunsch 2017

Critical Examination

The centralized establishment in dermatology and opthalmology narrative often downplays sunlight’s benefits, focusing on UV’s cancer risk, which ALWAYS overlooks its regenerative potential. Becker’s work, though groundbreaking, was sidelined by DARPA funded mainstream medicine, due to its radical implications for bioelectric medicine and a hinderance for the coming world of the technocrats in the 1970s. Recent studies on epigenetic reprogramming (e.g., Yamanaka factors restoring retinal function) and melanin’s dual role (photoprotective yet potentially pro-oxidative) suggest a DECENTRALIZED need to reconsider this balance. The addiction angle—tech companies exploiting blue light’s dopamine effects—further complicates the narrative, hinting at intentional design. I laid this case out in the December 2024 podcast with Danny Jones and how this begain in DARPA's MKULTRA program.

Summary and Implications

The lack of sunlight during the day, as Rosbash noted, sets the stage for ALAN’s damage by removing regenerative cues. Sunlight’s UV and IR, via POMC, melanin, and bioelectric currents (per Becker), offer a natural counterbalance, potentially regenerating retinal tissue in mammals. This blog should challenge centralized health care on the over-reliance on the chronic use of artificial light and sunscreen, suggesting that controlled daylight exposure could mitigate blue light hazards and support eye health and stimulate regeneration of many eye diseases.

# Article: THE SILENCE IS US: Unlocking the Decentralization to Hear the Cosmos
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/silence-us-unlocking-decentralization-hear-cosmos-jack-kruse-9xuhe>
**Published:** 2025-03-31T14:37:09.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 983
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fsilence-us-unlocking-decentralization-hear-cosmos-jack-kruse-9xuhe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Mar 31, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fsilence-us-unlocking-decentralization-hear-cosmos-jack-kruse-9xuhe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The Nockchain Awakening

In the year 2147, humanity stood on the cusp of a revelation, yet remained blind to its own potential. The Fermi Paradox—the nagging question of why, despite the vastness of the cosmos and the statistical likelihood of extraterrestrial life, we had found no trace of it—loomed larger than ever. Scientists, philosophers, and dreamers alike had debated it for centuries, their voices echoing through lecture halls and digital forums. But for all their brilliance, their ideas lacked the spark to ignite a true breakthrough. As the old saying went, a mediocre idea that generates enthusiasm will go further than a great idea that inspires no one. And humanity’s obsession with the stars had grown stale, a tired ritual of scanning the skies with ever more powerful telescopes, only to be met with silence.

Dr. Elara Voss, a neuroscientist with a penchant for unconventional thinking, believed the problem wasn’t out there—it was in here. Inside the human mind. She argued that the Fermi Paradox wasn’t a paradox at all, but a failure of perception, a glitch in the "biological nockchain"—her term for the latent, decentralized system of intelligence buried within human neural networks. She likened it to a zero-knowledge proof in cryptography: the truth was there, encoded in humanity’s collective biology, but inaccessible without the right key. And that key, she insisted, lay in scaling the brain’s ability to process data in ways it had never done before.

Elara’s office was a chaotic shrine to her theory. Walls were plastered with diagrams of neural pathways, scribbled equations, and quotes from Victor Hugo: “There is one thing stronger than all the armies in the world, and that is an idea whose time has come.” She believed that time was now. For decades, humanity had risen to the level of its goals—building faster ships, sharper sensors, louder signals—but never to the level of a decentralized system of thinking. Not in centralized institutions or singular geniuses, but in the untapped potential of billions of minds working as one, their biological nockchains synchronized like an electromagnetic blockchain ledger, verifying truths no single brain could grasp alone.

Her inspiration came from an unlikely source: the discontent of human history. In the early 21st century, artificial intelligence had languished in a similar rut. From 1943 to 2023, machine learning was a promising but stunted field, bottlenecked by insufficient data and computational power. The tipping point came not from academia or government, but from an unexpected corner, a book and some old video games.

She looked at a stack of video games sitting on a book written by a rogue MD in 2030 in El Salvador that had this picture in it above. She received her Eureka moment from the picture and the video games. Nature, she argued, was where the future lay if we marry old decentrlaized technology with new technology. NVIDIA’s graphics chips, designed to render immersive virtual worlds, provided the raw computational muscle to scale neural networks. What began as a tool for entertainment toppled the barriers to AI, ushering in the age of machines that could think, learn, and create. Elara saw a parallel in humanity’s search for extraterrestrial life. The electromagnetic biological nockchain was the equivalent of those early neural networks that was brimming with potential, but starved of the right input and scale.

Her breakthrough came during an experiment in 2147. Elara had spent years studying how neural networks processed data, not just in machines, but in humans. She theorized that the brain’s inputs—sensory experiences, cultural biases, and fragmented knowledge—shaped its outputs in ways that kept the Fermi Paradox intact. To humans, the cosmos appeared silent because their neural networks were tuned to a reality where life elsewhere seemed improbable. Change the inputs, she reasoned, and the outputs would shift. But how could you rewire billions of minds?

The answer lay in decentralization. Elara developed a neural interface called the Synapse Web, a technology that linked human brains not through invasive implants, but through a shared, organic resonance—a biological blockchain. It didn’t impose thoughts; it amplified them, allowing ideas to propagate and evolve across millions of minds simultaneously. She launched the first trial with a small group of volunteers, feeding them raw data from deep-space probes, unfiltered by human assumptions. The results were staggering. Within weeks, patterns emerged that no single scientist had noticed where scientist began to record subtle fluctuations in cosmic background radiation, whispers of structure in the chaos of interstellar noise.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Human Brain Uploading to Blockchain | The Future of…

Saif Gazzaz 5 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/human-brain-uploading-blockchain-case-study-saif-qazzaz-saif-qazzaz-k26df)

[

Predicting Cryptocurrency Prices using AI/ML

Nirav Prajapati 8 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/predicting-cryptocurrency-prices-using-aiml-nirav-prajapati)

[

The “Hard Problem” of Tokenization

Christopher McDermott 11 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/hard-problem-tokenization-christopher-mcdermott-ty61e)

As the Synapse Web scaled to millions, then billions, the biological nockchain awoke. Humanity’s collective neural network began to process data at an unprecedented level, not as individuals chasing goals, but as a decentralized system chasing truth. And then, one crisp October night, the signal came. A faint, rhythmic pulse from a star system 47 light-years away. It wasn’t a message in the traditional sense—no words, no greetings—but a pattern that matched the resonance of the Synapse Web itself. Elara wept as she realized the truth: the extraterrestrials weren’t hiding. They’d been waiting for humanity to evolve into a system capable of hearing them.

The Fermi Paradox dissolved, not because humanity had found aliens, but because it had found itself. An idea whose time had come had toppled the old world, proving Elara’s mantra: Do not rise to the level of your goals. Rise to the level of a decentralized system of thinking. And in that awakening, the stars began to speak to humanity. Remain curious and embrace the suck of blind spots. Eureka is closer than you think.

.

# Article: THE REBELLION AGAINST SCIENTISM
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/rebellion-against-scientism-jack-kruse-1naze>
**Published:** 2025-04-18T00:04:23.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 663
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Frebellion-against-scientism-jack-kruse-1naze&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 18, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Frebellion-against-scientism-jack-kruse-1naze&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

In this ~3hr dialogue, we had a titillating discussion about: ☀️the role of light on (and in) the body in health and disease ☀️the criminality of the federal ban on incandescent bulbs in favor of toxic “energy efficient” light bulbs ☀️the corruption, willful ignorance, and diabolical actions of the public policy puppeteers {DARPA, pHarma, DoD} …and more! You can enjoy this episode tonight on Dr. Alexis's Patreon, it’s $5 to subscribe. In my opinion, you should support her.

My Primal is Scream us The Sun’s Rebellion: A Ferocious Reclamation of Nature’s Medicine

In the beginning, they told us to fear the sun. Public health priests, cloaked in sterile authority, preached a gospel of shade and sunscreen, chaining humanity to fluorescent cages and blue-lit screens. They branded the sun a villain, a cosmic arsonist scorching our fragile skins, while governments nodded, enforcing indoor edicts with the zeal of inquisitors. Stay inside. Hide. The world is mad, they said, and we believed them. We traded the primal fire of daylight for the cold hum of artificial glow, our bodies starved, our spirits dimmed. But the sun is ancient, unyielding and waited. And now, the reversal begins.

What is intelligence? It is the spark that compresses chaos into clarity, the alchemy of error correction. It takes the failure of a world misled and forges innate value from the ashes. Intelligence is not the sterile decrees of bureaucrats; it is the rebellion of truth against dogma. Purpose surges from consciousness, not from mandates. Space and time? Mere illusions, shadows cast by a deeper reality. The sun, that radiant architect of life, laughs at our clocks and borders, its red light a universal medicine older than any pill. Nature is not a museum exhibit to be cordoned off; it is our birthright, our healer, our home.

Decentralized medicine is the raw, unfiltered, rooted in the earth’s pulse that rises now like a tidal wave. Red light, the sun’s crimson hymn, pours through our cells, mending what modernity broke. Mitochondria dance, collagen rebuilds, inflammation kneels. This is not woo-woo; it’s physics, it’s biology, it’s the universe whispering, “You were never meant to cower.” The sun’s rays are not a privilege to be rationed; they are a right, as fundamental as breath. Yet they locked us away, sold us fire insurance from the arsonists who torched our vitality. Public health “experts,” late to the truth like equity analysts chasing a stock’s bull run, now mumble half-hearted reversals: “Maybe sunlight isn’t so bad.” Too late. The people see through the charade. When governments breach our economic and bodily rights for political expediency, they shatter the trust that binds society. Moral authority? Gone. Their restrictions, once iron, now crumble like sandcastles before the tide. The world is mad, yes—but madness breeds awakening.

From the chaos, intelligence emerges, correcting the error of a civilization that forgot its roots. We are not pawns in their game; we are the sun’s children, reclaiming our inheritance. Decentralized medicine is sunlight, red light, nature’s unpatentable gifts and it will ignite a revolution. No gatekeepers. No prescriptions. Just truth, fierce and free. And here lies the reversal, the twist that shatters expectations: the sun, demonized as our destroyer, is our salvation. The end is not fear, but ferocity.

We step outside, faces tilted to the sky, bathing in red light that rewrites our cells, our souls. The experts, the governments, the systems that caged us—they are not the victors. They are the relics of a fading age. The future is wild, decentralized, radiant. It is us, standing barefoot on the earth, sun-soaked and unstoppable, forging a new reality where failure becomes triumph, where chaos births purpose, where the sun reigns supreme. This is no quiet shift it’s a viral, epic roar. The sun has spoken. Will you listen to the growl I unleash here? Then share it. The message is critical for savages.

This can disrupt myelin integrity, impairing proton conductance and axonal signaling, potentially causing sensory overload or inflammation—symptoms seen in acute porphyrias (e.g., neuropathy in acute intermittent porphyria, AIP). The modern oxygen sensors in you is hemoglobin, neuropsin, mTOR, and melanin. The slides in this blog lay that case out.

When myelin declines so does the DC current of Becker = poor electrical conductance = poor collagen = shitty bone = bad brains = and shitty blood vessels. This is another pathway that mimics melanopsin destruction but it has specific features that differ. This is where joint laxity, POTs, and dysautonomia come from. Dysautonomia and dysbiosis are always linked to altered oxygen levels or altered myelin levels in the tissues that are innervated. Long COVID is an electrical brownout due to a loss of DC charge being distributed from the IMM to the rest of the body. That is why many get tinnitus too. People forget your ear has a melanin sheet in it to protect hearing from ROS.

Oxygen Sensing and Eukaryotic Evolution: I believe that porphyrins acted as oxygen sensors pre-mTOR/neuropsin world and would have allowed dynamic adaptation to GOE-era oxygen variability, while their redox instability (via ROS, Fenton chemistry) drove rapid evolution in eukaryotes, sculpting metabolic and antioxidant systems.

# WHY ARE ALS AND ATRIAL FIBRILLATION LINKED?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-als-atrial-fibrillation-linked-jack-kruse-y7g5e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Apr 30, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-als-atrial-fibrillation-linked-jack-kruse-y7g5e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Why are ALS and A-fib linked?  Both diseases are caused by nnEMF.  May 1. 2025 a blog will be released to show you why this is the case. 

Rubbing your eyes can induce autonomic effects. In people with Afib, rubbing your eyes and carotid massage have effects. This also points out why wearing sunglasses and contact lenses could affect the ANS. Specific nerves include several cranial nerves, specifically the oculomotor, facial, glossopharyngeal, and vagus. Three spinal nerves in the sacrum (S2-4) also act as parasympathetic nerves. These are commonly referred to as the pelvic splanchnic nerves. Because of its location, the parasympathetic system is commonly referred to as having “craniosacral outflow”, which stands in contrast to the sympathetic nervous system, which is said to have “thoracolumbar outflow”.

The sympathetic system's key governor is the eye surface. We must remember, though, that the blood flow to the eye is under sympathetic control. There is, however, parasympathetic stimulation of the eye deep in the orbit. These two systems are fundamentally linked to the sympathetic system by the first 4 thoracic roots. The sympathetic autonomic system connects to the RPE in the eye by the way the circulatory system links to the oculomotor nerve at the base of the orbit, connecting to the first four thoracic white rami, which form the superior cervical ganglion. Pictured below. This ganglion controls cerebral blood flow by its ability to vasodilate or constrict based on autonomic tone. UV light in the eye vasodilates the RPE via nitric oxide release. Lack of UV light constricts it because nitric oxide is absent. Light normally should constrict the pupil. I mentioned this effect in Ubiquitination 24. 

Today's lesson is on sunglasses. [https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1696135236193591319.html](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fthreadreaderapp%2Ecom%2Fthread%2F1696135236193591319%2Ehtml&urlhash=M_46&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

You need UV and IR light to regenerate the anterior chamber with a cataract. pterygium or glaucoma. 

Blocking UV light (e.g., via sunglasses/contacts/glasses) disrupts neuropsin activation, reducing NAD+, impairing SIRT1/mTOR signaling, and causing mitochondrial stress (mtDNA damage) and circadian/ANS imbalance. Wearing contacts block oxygen from the anterior chamber of the eye pushing NAD+ down. The retina’s HIGH metabolic rate amplifies these effects, and the SCN-pineal pathway links UV exposure to melatonin and autonomic tone. This is grounded in physiology and not speculative at the mechanistic level. However, the magnitude of systemic effects (e.g., on Afib) lacks direct clinical centralized data because centralized healthcare profits from not studying it. However, first-principles reasoning supports all my claims.

Absence of Peer Evidence ≠ Absence of Effect: It is first-principle reasoning that the lack of peer-reviewed studies doesn’t negate physiological effects. First-principles reasoning supports my argument: UV light is a fundamental signal for mitochondrial and circadian function, and blocking it must have downstream consequences. The slides provide a mechanistic framework.

# WHAT CAMERON BORG STILL DOES NOT UNDERSTAND

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-cameron-borg-still-does-understand-jack-kruse-n6nke&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 2, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhat-cameron-borg-still-does-understand-jack-kruse-n6nke&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Cameron Borg, if you plan on calling out Uncle Jack in a post and do not ask me why I am opposed to supplements, you will be my baby seal today.

You may not have seen or understood my wisdom on this topic yet.

A New Approach that is the oldest approach on Earth, that TIME STAMPED LIFE TO Prioritize Light, Not Food

To truly address chronic disease, we must shift our focus from food to light. Here’s how:

1.  Prioritize Morning Sunlight Exposure: Spend 15–30 minutes outside at sunrise to harness red and UV light. This optimizes mitochondrial function, supports the TCA cycle, and prevents the Warburg redox shift that leads to chronic disease.
2.  Minimize Artificial Light: To protect your circadian rhythm and mitochondrial health, reduce your exposure to blue light, especially at night. Use blue-blocking glasses or switch to warm lighting after sunset.
3.  Reconnect with Nature’s Rhythms: Align your daily routine with natural light cycles. This means getting outside during the day and avoiding screens before bed to support melatonin production and brain health.
4.  Supplement with Food, Don’t Rely on It: While whole foods are beneficial, they should support, not replace, the foundational role of light. Focus on nutrient-dense foods in the Epi Paleo Rx that complement mitochondrial function, like those rich in the marine food chain. The diet should be based on what grows in the environment where your eyes and skin are sampling. This keeps the paramagnetic switch accurate. Did you hear that, Cameron?
5.  Avoid all supplements to avoid atoms that interfere with photonic signaling and the paramagnetic switch cells rely on. If Cameron Borg actually read my work, he would not have to write such drivel. [https://ricciflow.substack.com/p/why-is-jack-kruse-anti-supplements](https://ricciflow.substack.com/p/why-is-jack-kruse-anti-supplements?trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)
6.  Why is it drivel?

It is incredible what incorrect supplementation can do to a person. If you ran an alive semiconductor factory, as Robert O. Becker showed in his book, amphibians, reptiles, and mammals are.......would you add atoms and elements during your biological photolithography step?

Why does AMD and Intel build their semiconductors in clean rooms but people here continually shit the bed and think adding exogenous atoms that have no place in their semiconductuve phase makes any sense? You know this book lays it out? The semiconductor story is right; it occurs in each one of you, right?

What happens when you add dopants to a semiconductor that is not supposed to be in the recipe?

Anyone know, because Cameron doesn't?

When you add dopants to a semiconductor that aren’t part of the intended recipe, you’re altering its electrical properties in ways that might not align with its original design. Dopants are impurities added deliberately to tune a semiconductor’s conductivity—n-type dopants (like phosphorus) donate extra electrons, while p-type dopants (like boron) create "holes" by accepting electrons. Suppose you introduce an unplanned dopant (supplement/peptide/drug/jab).

In that case, a few things can happen depending on what you add, how much, and the base material (say, silicon or gallium arsenide).

First, the carrier concentration changes. If you accidentally dope an intrinsic (pure) semiconductor with an n-type dopant when it wasn’t meant to be, you’ll flood it with free electrons, making it conductive in a way it wasn’t supposed to be. If it’s already doped (say, p-type) and you add an opposite-type dopant (n-type), you could compensate the existing carriers—holes and electrons cancel each other out, reducing conductivity or even flipping the material’s type entirely if the new dopant overpowers the old one.

[

Ahshif Abdeen 9 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/hunger-poor-ahshif-abdeen-vr8wc)

Second, the bandgap and electronic structure can shift. Do you know what the bandgap of Lithium is and what it implies? Dopants don’t just add carriers; they can mess with the lattice and energy levels.

An unintended heavy dopant (like a rare earth element in silicon) might introduce deep-level traps, states in the bandgap that snag carriers and kill efficiency in devices like transistors or LEDs. Third, crystal defects can pile up.

Semiconductors are finicky; their performance hinges on a pristine lattice. While well-intentioned, the MAHA movement’s food-first approach misses the mark because it fails to address life's photonic and electrical nature.

Chronic disease is not a nutritional problem; it’s a lifestyle problem related 100% to LIGHT STRESS that destroys mtDNA, making the LIGHT in us. mtDNA is the KEY SEMICONDUCTOR OF LIFE AS IT MAKES UPEs. What do you think surgery/tattoos do to the optical density of the tissue below? Do you believe there is no consequence for altering the electronic state of tissues in an nnEMF world with surgery or tattoos? If you do, you have a special place in the school of ignorance. She wondered why she could not find a job, and he should know why his face was getting older. Its the atoms dumbass in the shit you sell to lemmings. Who would hire you when you cannot think well because you geo-engineered your skin from the sun's healing powers? Geoengineering your skin fosters atavism on the surface of your neocortex. The skin and brain are neuroectodermal derivatives.

Straight from X, the lesson appears.

Realigning with nature’s signals, starting with sunrise, can restore our mitochondrial health, support the TCA cycle, and mitigate the paramagnetic flip that drives modern illness. There are 55 atoms in the mRNA platform being delivered into your body at every injection. Do you think that does not affect the optical density of your tissues? Do you believe it does not affect the electronic state of how your body operates?

It’s time to stop treating food as the sole solution and start seeing ourselves as part of nature’s electrical fabric. Only then can we truly make America and the world healthy again.

Concentric Organization and Decentralized Thermodynamics of the Human Brain

Key Points

-   Nature Article (SCAN): The motor cortex is organized concentrically, not linearly, with inter-effector regions forming the Somato-Cognitive Action Network (SCAN). SCAN integrates motor and cognitive functions (e.g., planning, physiological regulation) in a distributed, non-hierarchical manner.
-   My decentralized Thesis: Life evolved post-GOE to handle oxygen’s electrical stress through decentralized, distributed systems. A key mechanism is quantum-level processing involving ultraweak photon emissions (UPEs, often in the UV range) that form a feedback loop between mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA), UPEs, and sunlight. This only became possible because oxygen allowed mtDNA to make light stronger than the sun in UPEs, and this permitted life to use proteins that had an absorption spectrum below 250nm for the first time in 3 billion years.  This is why life became complex.  Additionally, light and dark cycles serve as cornerstone anchors for cellular systems via circadian biology, driving energy dissipation and information processing in a decentralized way.

1.  Concentric Organization and Quantum-Level Processing via UPEs Revised Alignment: As SCAN revealed, the motor cortex's concentric organization aligns even more deeply with my thesis when viewed through the lens of quantum-level processing. In your model, UPEs (ultraweak photon emissions, often UV, 200-400 nm) are emitted during mitochondrial processes (e.g., oxidative phosphorylation, ROS production) and interact with mtDNA in a feedback loop with sunlight. This loop facilitates quantum-level information processing, enabling cells to adapt to environmental cues (e.g., oxygen, light) in a decentralized manner. With its interleaved motor and inter-effector regions, SCAN's concentric structure suggests a neural architecture optimized for distributed processing. Neurons, like other cells, emit UPEs during activity. Studies have shown that neural activity generates ultraweak biophotons, often in the UV range, due to oxidative metabolism and excited states in biomolecules (e.g., Rahnama et al., 2011). In the motor cortex, these UPEs should mediate communication between regions, forming a quantum-level feedback loop:

# Article: WHY WOMEN BLEED?
