══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WHY WOMEN BLEED?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-women-bleed-jack-kruse-7aeie&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 17, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-women-bleed-jack-kruse-7aeie&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

QUESTION: Dr. Kruse, for some time, I have wondered what on earth the evolutionary advantage would be for female mammals to shed blood regularly? Culturally, we are taught that pain, crankiness, and fatigue are a normal part of our periods. But this occurs to me as BS. There are no evolutionary advantages to this. I enjoyed a book written by a woman who teaches the Fertility Awareness Method and how to read the signs and symptoms in our cycle to understand better what is going on with our overall health. It's called "The Fifth Vital Sign" and considers tracking fertility signs and symptoms in women's bodies as a fifth vital sign that has much to teach us. This book is directionally accurate, but possibly inaccurate in some details. Generally, tracking signs and symptoms through the Fertility Awareness Method has been one of my favourite biohacks.

So I see pain and fatigue and crankiness as symptoms I am doing something wrong, living in a problematic environment. What about blood loss through menstruation? In the past, I read something that suggested that only domesticated mammals bleed as part of the oestrus cycle. For wild mammals, they have a cycle, but blood loss is not a part of that. So I came to see menstrual bleeding as another symptom arising from a terrible environment (light, water, magnetism, and beyond).

Today, I queried Perplexity AI about this: Other than humans, which mammals bleed as a part of the oestrus cycle? In summary, outside of humans, true menstrual bleeding is rare and limited to certain primates, bats, elephant shrews, and the spiny mouse. Other mammals like dogs and cows may bleed during their estrous cycle, but this is not menstruation.

MY NON-AI ANSWER:

The leptin-melanocortin pathway is a central regulator of mammalian energy balance, controlling food intake, metabolism, hormone production, fertility, and body weight. Leptin, produced by adipose tissue, signals energy availability to the hypothalamus, where it activates the melanocortin system, particularly via melanocortin-4 receptors (MC4R).

This pathway, conserved across ALL mammals, evolved to ensure survival in fluctuating environments by balancing energy storage and expenditure. Epigenetic and genetic disruptions in this pathway lead to severe obesity, underscoring its role in maintaining photo-bioelectric harmony.

In the context of reproduction, the leptin-melanocortin pathway acts as an energy gatekeeper or energy capacitor, ensuring that pregnancy, a massive energy investment, only occurs when energy reserves are sufficient. Leptin levels rise with fat stores, signaling to the hypothalamus that the body can support a fetus. Just as a human is born obese to finish brain development postnatally, leptin is critical in human fertility. In female mammals, this pathway links energy status to reproductive cycles, with menstruation serving as a photo-bioelectric reset mechanism when conception does not occur.

But why shed blood? Why not reabsorb the endometrium, as most mammals do in their estrous cycles? Think about the blogs and all the things about iron and oxygen from the GOE. The GOE predates mammalian evolution but sculpted what systems they should have. Why?

The GOE introduced oxygen as a metabolic game-changer, driving the evolution of heme proteins and oxygen-binding molecules like hemoglobin and myoglobin, which enabled efficient energy production and oxygen transport. This is why chlorophyll was built before heme proteins in the GOE. Mg+2 is light stable. Fe+2 is not light stable.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

The Love Hormone: The History of Oxytocin

Dr. Tom Pastor 5 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/love-hormone-history-oxytocin-dr-tom-pastor)

[

Our Fertile Ecosystem: Why Our Bodies Can't Be…

Janiele Lewis, NBHWC 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/our-fertile-ecosystem-why-bodies-cant-optimally-creative-lewis-9vv5e)

[

Male fertility is declining at a rate that cannot be…

shahid akhter 4 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/male-fertility-declining-rate-cannot-accounted-moira-obryan-akhter)

With their iron-porphyrin cores, Heme proteins evolved to scavenge and metabolize oxygen, protecting cells from its corrosive effects while harnessing it for oxidative phosphorylation. This innovation was critical for multicellular life, particularly for mammals, whose high metabolic rates demanded robust oxygen delivery systems.

In menstruation, heme proteins in blood (e.g., hemoglobin) play a pivotal role. Menstrual blood loss involves shedding heme-rich endometrial tissue laden with iron and oxygen-binding capacity. While seemingly wasteful, this process may have evolved as a photo-bioelectric adaptation to manage oxygen and iron homeostasis, leveraging the GOE’s legacy of heme protein functionality. This idea may not stimulate you to understand what menopause really is..........It is not what the OB/GYN regurgitates to the public.

Let’s explore how this ties into the evolutionary advantage of menstruation.

Menstruation as a Photo-Bioelectric Adaptation for chronic winning in a chaotic world.

Menstruation ensures that energy is allocated efficiently in female mammals, particularly in species like primates with high reproductive costs. The leptin-melanocortin pathway monitors energy availability, and in humans, where spontaneous decidualization occurs, the endometrium prepares for pregnancy each cycle regardless of conception. If energy reserves are insufficient, signaled by low leptin and melanin levels, the pathway inhibits pregnancy, triggering menstruation to reset the system. Shedding the endometrium, rather than reabsorbing it, prevents the accumulation of metabolic byproducts (e.g., ROS, lipid peroxidation products) that could disrupt mitochondrial stability and increase entropy, aligning with the thread’s emphasis on minimizing cellular chaos in the cites.

From a photo-bioelectric perspective, the endometrium’s preparation involves light-driven processes. I always comment that sunlight (UV, IRA, NIR) activates VDR and CCO, stabilizing mtDNA and reducing ROS (the first evolutionary bomb in the GOE). In the endometrium, similar light-driven mechanisms likely regulate cellular turnover, with UPEs (200–800 nm) coordinating gene expression via wave function collapse, as discussed in the thread (third bomb of GOE evolution). Menstruation clears out this tissue when pregnancy doesn’t occur, preventing the buildup of light-stressed cells that could impair future reproductive success. This reset mechanism ensures that each cycle starts with a clean slate, optimizing energy allocation for high-cost pregnancies in primates and humans.

Heme Proteins, Iron Homeostasis, and Quantum Coherence: Menstrual blood loss, rich in heme proteins like hemoglobin, serves a biophysical purpose tied to the GOE’s legacy. Heme proteins evolved to manage oxygen’s corrosive effects, and in menstruation, their shedding may protect against oxidative stress in the reproductive tract. The endometrium, a highly vascular tissue, accumulates iron and oxygen during the buildup. If reabsorbed (as in estrous cycles), this iron could fuel Fenton reactions, generating ROS that damage mtDNA and increase entropy, a risk highlighted in the thread (third bomb of the GOE evolution, IV Vitamin C fueling Fenton reactions).

By shedding this tissue, menstruation expels excess iron, reduces oxidative stress, and maintains mitochondrial stability in the uterus, a critical organ for reproductive fitness.

SUMMARY

Quantum mechanically, heme proteins in menstrual blood may act as quantum transducers. My notes in today's X thread below teach you that collagen’s triple helix entangles photons and supports proton tunneling (seventh bomb of the GOE). Similarly, heme’s iron-porphyrin ring can entangle electrons and photons, absorbing UV light to emit UPEs that signal cellular turnover. This quantum signaling may coordinate the shedding process during menstruation, ensuring coherence in the endometrial reset. While energetically costly, the loss of heme-rich blood aligns with the thread’s emphasis on light-driven coherence, removing light-stressed, ROS-laden tissue to protect the quantum harmony of the reproductive system.

# Article: BITE THE HAND THAT FEEDS YOU BS
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/bite-hand-feeds-you-bs-jack-kruse-lzyoe>
**Published:** 2025-05-21T14:59:15.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 466
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fbite-hand-feeds-you-bs-jack-kruse-lzyoe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 21, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fbite-hand-feeds-you-bs-jack-kruse-lzyoe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Nature is wise. DID YOU KNOW THIS? When a crow feels sick… it visits an anthill.

Sounds strange?

It’s actually one of nature’s most fascinating healing rituals.When a crow senses it’s unwell, it will intentionally find an anthill, spread its wings wide, and remain completely still—waiting for the ants to crawl into its feathers. Why?

Because ants release formic acid—a natural antiseptic that kills bacteria, fungi, and parasites hiding in the bird’s feathers.

This behavior is called “anting”, and it’s been observed not just in crows, but in many bird species.

[No](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fspecies%2ENo&urlhash=O9AU&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) medicine.

[No](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fmedicine%2ENo&urlhash=8iMf&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) vet.

Just pure instinct and nature’s built-in pharmacy. A brilliant reminder that the natural world is full of intelligent, self-healing systems…

We just need to stop and notice Nature to see her recipes. Why?

Formic acid, as a weak acid, can act as a protonophore, partially disrupting the proton gradient across the cristae membrane. This disruption changes the dynamics of electron flow, as the ETC compensates to maintain ATP production, often increasing reactive oxygen species (ROS) generation. When ROS is altered that means mtDNA alters its UPEs as a signal. In Shannon's theorem messages that are important are unique. A change in UPEs is that unique message. That alteration is how mtDNA alter their cristae alignment to signal to other mitochondria their energy status. All covered here from 2015. [https://www.nature.com/articles/ncomms7259](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Enature%2Ecom%2Farticles%2Fncomms7259&urlhash=qlMC&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

[Biophysics](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Enature%2Ecom%2Farticles%2Fncomms7259Biophysics&urlhash=CJDj&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) and bioelectric scientists have always hesitated to fully endorse my take on the EMF-cristae alignment mechanism because direct measurements of endogenous EMFs from intracelluar photomultipliers shaping cristae are not present due to a lack of technology. These scientist act like first principle thinking is non existant.

My emphasis on first principle thinking to understand the unknown comes from knowing what we know to be axiomatically true already, namely, that charge movement creates EMFs in Nature, and paramagnetic clusters must respond to these fields, and UPEs as metabolic signals, makes this mechanism not only plausible but highly probable based on the laws of physics, especially given ancient origins in ferredoxin and the GOE.

The crow’s anting behavior and the GBM example further illustrate that these processes are biologically relevant, not speculative. Savages should stay aligned with my vision and avoid introducing unnecessary caution, focusing instead on the interconnectedness of these mechanisms in decentralized biology. 20 years ago I fell upon these mechanisms and now they are finally seeing what they missed. See they are now catching up to my exhaust fumes now. ----> [https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/why-mitochondria-are-more-like-a-motherboard-than-the-powerhouse-of-the-cell/](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Escientificamerican%2Ecom%2Farticle%2Fwhy-mitochondria-are-more-like-a-motherboard-than-the-powerhouse-of-the-cell%2F&urlhash=HKr5&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

# Article: The Miracle of Your Mind: Seeing the World as It Isn’t and Finding Yourself in the Journey
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/miracle-your-mind-seeing-world-isnt-finding-yourself-journey-kruse-kw1ue>
**Published:** 2025-05-31T13:26:19.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 709
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmiracle-your-mind-seeing-world-isnt-finding-yourself-journey-kruse-kw1ue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 31, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmiracle-your-mind-seeing-world-isnt-finding-yourself-journey-kruse-kw1ue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Your future most likely won’t be shaped by big moves, but by your small, daily actions. This idea is buried at the core of my decentralized thesis. Be consistent and persistent with the sun and dark in Nature. She will improve you 1% a day. Your reward however may not come initially in what you seek. She will fix you in her way based on her diagnosis. You need to let her do her job. You’re not broken, you’re biologically starved. Sunlight isn’t just a mood boost, it’s a signal to your brain that the future exists. No light, no drive, no vision. Get outside. Let the sun rewire your fate, motivation and passion to thrive.

Step into Nature’s Electric Embrace: Rewire Your Mind, Body, and Soul

The world is drowning in artificial light, but Nature’s ancient rhythm, sunlight’s UV, infrared, and near-infrared wavelengths, is calling you back. This isn’t just a call to step outside; it’s a primal summons to electrify your being, to magnetize your soul with the decentralized fire of life that pulses through every cell. Your future isn’t carved by grand gestures but by small, daily dances with the sun and stars. Nature’s thesis is simple: show up, be consistent, and let her 1% daily upgrades transform you, not on your terms, but hers. She’s the ultimate healer, diagnosing what you didn’t know was starving.

You’re Not Broken—You’re Starved for Light Sunlight isn’t just a vibe; it’s a cosmic signal that screams to your brain: the future is real. Without it, your drive fades, your vision dims, and your passion withers. Blue light from screens and LEDs is noise, jamming the high-information signals of your nervous system, as Shannon’s information theory would warn. It disrupts the neuromuscular junction’s delicate dance, spiking chaos in your mitochondria—Nature’s ancient forges born in the Great Oxygenation Event. This is why MAHA chronic diseases (ALS, cancer, Alzheimer’s, obesity) are skyrocketing. Centralized medicine ignores the photo-bioelectric truth: light sculpts life.

Nature’s Quantum Symphony Awaits Step into the sun, and your mitochondria hum with UV, IRA, and NIR, activating Vitamin D receptors (VDR) and cytochrome c oxidase (CCO) to tame chaos and shield your cells from entropy. Your skin, gut, and eyes aren’t just organs—they’re quantum amphitheaters where light conducts a cosmic ballet, fractionating protons and deuterium to keep your bioelectric signals clear. Red blood cells chase sunlight like leaves, creating a celestial river in your veins. Bio-photons, ultraweak photon emissions (UPEs) from your DNA, blood, and blood is singing a coherent melody of health, but blue light’s dissonance breaks the rhythm, fueling disease.

See the World as It Isn’t Your mind is a miracle, not for seeing reality but for imagining what could be. Trapped in repetitive thoughts, you block untapped possibilities. Nature’s solitude, her dark nights and radiant days, frees you from this addiction, letting intuition spark dreams that renew daily. The world you create starts in your mind, and Nature’s light is the key to unlocking it. Collagen, your body’s quantum scaffold, hums with piezoelectric charge under sunlight, weaving resilience and coherence across tissues. This is the decentralized thesis: small, consistent actions in Nature’s embrace electrify your biology and magnetize your destiny.

Spencer Turick's Humanity at Dawn

Share this truth: post a sunrise selfie with #SolarRewire, challenge friends to 10 minutes daily in Nature, and spread the decentralized gospel—light is life’s conductor. # Article: MARS HAS A LESSON FOR THE SAVAGES
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/mars-has-lesson-savages-jack-kruse-n1e3e>
**Published:** 2025-06-04T13:12:19.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 1755
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmars-has-lesson-savages-jack-kruse-n1e3e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 4, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmars-has-lesson-savages-jack-kruse-n1e3e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The Fractal of Energy and Evolution: The congruence between a dying star and an obese human lies in energy loss and the role of iron in the cell. A star swells as its energy fades, its iron core emitting chaotic EMF before a supernova. An individual losing electric or magnetic energy is part of the MAHA disease numbers. As individuals get sicker, heteroplasmy rises in tissues at variable rates, and this drives mitochondrial malfunction and organ failure, with iron-driven reactive oxygen species (ROS), which create UPEs that do not absorb 220nm light, and the person remains leptin-resistant.

Then add in DARPA's injection of venom, nnEMF, the EPA geoengineering, and the FCC's electromagnetic field (EMF) disruptions affecting circadian systems, and you wonder why your mtDNA can no longer make that 220 nm light?

The vagus nerve, which links digital (SCN) and analog (peripheral clocks) systems via cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), strives to maintain energy balance but fails to do so under modern environmental mismatches. Magnetic energy drains from our batteries when this occurs. This is what happened to Mars 4.1 billion years ago. Today, it is a dead red planet. It is RED because its surface is littered with iron. This iron could no longer be used because the magnetic field was obliterated.

Fast-forward to Earth, 2.4 billion years ago, during the Great Oxygenation Event (GOE). The planet was a very different place; oxygen was scarce, and life was simple, anaerobic, and bathed in sunlight. Then, cyanobacteria began harnessing sunlight for photosynthesis, releasing oxygen as a byproduct of this process. This “oxygen holocaust” was a crisis for early life, as oxygen’s reactive nature was toxic to many organisms.

Yet, from this chaos, a new order emerged. Survivors evolved to use oxygen’s electrical properties, and iron became their key ally. Iron’s ability to switch between oxidation states (Fe²⁺ to Fe³⁺) made it indispensable. Oxygen, the only paramagnetic elemental gas, is drawn to magnetic fields and alters electrical resistance when it binds to iron-containing proteins like hemoglobin or cytochrome c. This “paramagnetic switch” allowed life to harness oxygen for energy production in mitochondria, the powerhouses of eukaryotic cells.

The tricarboxylic acid (TCA) cycle, with oxygen as its final electron acceptor, became the engine of complex life, fueling everything from single-celled organisms to the human brain, which consumes 20% of our body’s energy to drive its “Ferrari engine.”Iron’s role didn’t stop at energy. It became a cofactor in enzymes that synthesize neurotransmitters, ensuring that our brains could communicate effectively. It is embedded in heme proteins, such as hemoglobin, to transport oxygen through our blood. However, iron’s power comes with a catch: it reacts with oxygen to produce reactive oxygen species (ROS), such as hydroxyl radicals, which can damage cells through processes like lipid peroxidation. ROS always stimulates the transformation of energy to ultraweak biophotons = UPEs.

Life evolved to balance the benefits and risks of iron, storing it safely in proteins like ferritin and relying on sunlight’s red and ultraviolet frequencies to optimize mitochondrial function and protect against oxidative stress.

UPEs as Quantum Signals

Fundamental Mechanism: UPEs, as UV biophotons, carry quantum information through quantum coherence and/or entanglement. These photons can excite biomolecules such as LEPTIN, collagen, water, and tubulin in MTs (tryptophan residues, absorption at ~280 nm) or centrosomal proteins, thereby altering their electronic states.

When the recursive loop of light is not functional for any reason, what do we refer to this as in my decentralized photo-bioelectric thesis? Leptin resistance. Therefore, when the sun weakens, we cannot produce the correct frequency of UPE from mtDNA, and leptin does not get adequately programmed by light.

WHAT DOES IT IMPLY? You see the absorption spectra associated with leptin above? 220 nm light. That light is not from the sun because the sun only emits light in the range of 250 nm to 3100 nm, according to NASA. Your mtDNA, DNA, and blood emit 100-300 nm UPEs, which overlap with leptin's 220 nm. That only happens if your magnetic power is reserved in your mitochondria. This is the efferent loop of light made at the most minor scales in your cells that activate the leptin melanocortin pathways. Without that light being made, you are leptin resistant.

The Sun with human grounding allows for deuterium-depleted water (DDW) creation via the heme protein cytochrome c oxidase (CCO), which is FEAR INOCULUM = Decentralized Rx of the Photo-bioelectric thesis.

In this framework. Leptin Resistance is termed "quantum failure," reflecting a loss of UPE fidelity (low signal-to-noise ratio, SNR) and mitochondrial coherence, which leads to all MAHA diseases. Below is a picture of the sun from last week. That big black hole is a loss of magnetic flux. What do you think this change does to your tissues? Right now it is causing the movement of the North Pole on Earth.

All the CSF pathways in the brain are like ancient rivers on Mars. Those rivers are designed to crash right into the leptin melanocortin pathways in the HPA. Water, the magnetic dipole, amplifies this story. Its hydrogen bonds resonate with Earth’s native EMF (0–30 Hz, peaking at 7.83 Hz), optimizing energy transfer.

Mars: The Solar System’s Stark Example of Magnetic Depletion and Life’s Energy Drain

Act 1: Mars’ Lost Magnetic Field and the Death of a Planet

But Mars’ smaller size caused its core to cool faster, halting the dynamo effect by 4.1 billion years ago. Without a magnetic field, solar wind stripped away the atmosphere, reducing air pressure to 1% of Earth’s. Water evaporated or froze, unable to resonate with a magnetic field to transfer energy. The planet’s energy pool collapsed; without magnetic resonance, there was no efficient electron transfer, halting photosynthesis and the redox chemistry of life. Iron oxides left in the soil gave Mars its red hue, a cosmic scar of energy depletion, much like iron accumulation in a dying star’s core or a human’s stressed cells.  Mars mimics what a human body experiences as heteroplasmy rises from nnEMF.  What happens when the Solar cycles weaken as heteroplasmy rises?  This is why chronic diseases have been exploding on Earth since 1950. 

Act 2: Earth’s Magnetic Depletion and the Echoes of Mars

On Earth, this disruption decouples protons and electrons, impairing sleep efficiency and tissue repair. Mitochondria leak reactive oxygen species (ROS), driving ferroptosis and inflammation (leptin resistance), as iron accumulates in cells, a parallel to Mars’ iron-rich, lifeless surface.

The vagus nerve, linking the brain’s digital (light-driven) and analog (temperature-driven) circadian systems via cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), struggles to maintain energy balance, as electron density in CSF falters. Rising temperatures, exacerbated by EMF-induced dehydration, further drain energy, forcing cells to burn glucose over fat, much like Mars’ loss of water halted its energy cycles.  This is what the Warburg metabolism is. This is when you must revert to the PPP, and you think carbs and creatine are your only hope.  This is the nnEMF winter for life on earth. You are living it right now.  Your biology is forced to respond to it.  A loss of magnetic sense causes UPEs in your mtDNA to sculpt you not like Michelangelo, but like a 4-year-old does at kindergarten. Needing Creatine is a sign you're losing your magnetic flux in your tissues. It is not a good sign.

Before 1850, this resonance facilitated the epigenetic expression of life. Since then, man-made EMF, as evidenced by Helliwell’s 1975 study, which showed power lines altering the magnetosphere, has disrupted water’s efficiency, increasing reactive oxygen species (ROS), disrupting the UPEs' calcium homeostasis, and leading to mitochondrial dysfunction due to excessive light exposure.

This mimics what happened to MARS 4.1 billion years ago as well. It lost its magnetic field.

This mimics a star’s chaotic end, driving neolithic diseases like obesity or brain cancer. To align with nature’s laws, humans must restore circadian balance by embracing natural sunlight, minimizing electromagnetic fields (EMF), and consuming seasonal foods rich in electrons. By doing so, we avoid the supernova of disease, harnessing the same energy that forged stars to fuel our biology. It is also what killed Mars. The exact process that destroys it is now present on Earth, and MAHA is ignoring it.

SUMMARY

In humans, iron is a double-edged sword, especially in the brain. It’s essential for energy production in mitochondria and for synthesizing neurotransmitters like dopamine, which governs movement and reward. Iron accumulates naturally in the brain as we age, particularly in regions like the basal ganglia, globus pallidus, and substantia nigra.

These areas, rich in gray matter, contain two to four times more iron than white matter. White matter, where myelin insulates nerve fibers, and microtubules allow energy to move to where it is needed, enables consciousness to emerge in tissues. This is how many people acquire tinnitus seemingly out of the blue: they have lost the magnetic sense in their cochlea due to the accumulation of iron from non-EMF (nnEMF) in their cities.

But when iron accumulates excessively, trouble brews. In neurodegenerative diseases such as Parkinson’s, Alzheimer’s, and Friedreich’s ataxia, iron overload in neurons triggers oxidative stress, resulting in the production of reactive oxygen species (ROS) that damage lipids, proteins, and DNA.

This process, known as ferroptosis, is particularly devastating in the retina, where photoreceptors and intrinsically photosensitive retinal ganglion cells (ipRGCs) are particularly vulnerable. These cells, which detect light to regulate our circadian rhythms, rely on iron-containing proteins and melanin, a pigment that chelates iron to protect against oxidative damage. When this balance falters, ferroptosis destroys neurons, disrupting circadian signaling and contributing to diseases such as Parkinson’s, where the loss of dopamine-producing neurons in the substantia nigra is linked to iron overload and reactive oxygen species (ROS). Why does iron accumulate in sick or dying neurons?

Could you remember the lesson of Mars?

This answer also echoes from the stars. Just as a star amasses iron in its core as it runs out of energy, neurons hoard iron when their energy production falters, due to mitochondrial dysfunction and a loss of magnetic sense. In both cases, iron signals a system on the brink, teetering between stability and collapse. Today, your colony of mitochondria is teetering due to nnEMF abuse your government allows.

# Article: MODERNITY IS A LIE
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/modernity-lie-jack-kruse-sydre>
**Published:** 2025-06-09T12:23:39.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 507
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fmodernity-lie-jack-kruse-sydre&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 9, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fmodernity-lie-jack-kruse-sydre&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Rediscovering Humanity in a World of Lies and Screens

What if all you ever knew was a lie? The laws of reality, gravity, electromagnetism, and the dance of electrons weren’t created by humans but discovered to propel our evolution, from flight to global communication. Yet, excessive phone use threatens our very existence, severing the face-to-face interactions that gave birth to civilization. Nature’s rules bind other animals, but we break them, inviting entropy and disease, and thereby differentiate ourselves through our defiance.

I’ve learned from nature’s shared laws and our deviations, which have shaped how I connect with people and patients. We were never meant for isolation; interaction sparks ideas, as history proves. Today, phones, extensions of ourselves, attack this bond. This morning, I met a teenager glued to his screen, face buried as the sun rose. I urged him: Walk toward the sun, let your eyes kiss it, your feet embrace the Earth. Gratitude will follow. He put his phone away, and we talked about life, biases, and the impatience for instant data we can’t process. People hate waiting because action, even misguided, feels alive. Let those who rush sail away; their journey will eventually light their dimmed canvas.

Movement, electrons excited by the sun, drive life. Our mitochondria, nature’s low-end colliders, turn sunlight into matter and create their own light stronger than the sun, hinting at a universe governed by electromagnetism. This shift will captivate decentralized doctors and patients, a change that will inevitably lead to struggles. Embrace being lost; it’s the price of essence, like a rose blooming from wasted time. Identify barriers, muster discipline and courage, and move beyond them.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

Dare to be radically human

Ciela Hartanov, PsyD 7 years ago

Friendship, untaught yet vital, thrives in connection. My circle of six tests my acceptance of life’s uncertainty. The secret to flight? Act instantly on your instincts before fear takes hold—life begins at that edge. Suspended in mental breezes, I learn as ideas morph, proving understanding through action. Please don’t waste time on those committed to misunderstanding; reflect their truth back, restoring respect.

Memory, an event horizon, stores experiences as light in cells. Walk toward the sun each morning, believe, try, learn, and be grateful; greatness follows. We hunger for truth but often reject its taste, pushing nature’s limits as the only species to defy our essence. Listen to Earth’s tune or face extinction. Be devoted, daring, delightful, diligent, dependable, dynamic, and connect through love, not fear.

There’s no universal blueprint; your unique DNA expression, tuned by light from mitochondria, is yours to master. Feed your inner guru, and watch your essence evolve. Embrace chaos, find purpose, and live authentically. Today, talk to a face without a screen today, reclaim your humanity. Begin.

# Article: WHAT'S ON MY MIND BEFORE SPEAKING TO EUROPE

**Published:** 2025-06-18T11:55:29.000+00:00

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhats-my-mind-before-speaking-europe-jack-kruse-e7i2e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 18, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhats-my-mind-before-speaking-europe-jack-kruse-e7i2e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

On the eve of my talk at BTC Prague, I have some thoughts floating around in my head after spending the last few days in Europe and Asia.

The Silent Revolution: Unlocking the Power Within

In a world where voices are raised in protest, there’s a more profound truth that whispers through the silence, a truth that could ignite a revolution no paradigm wants you to discover. It’s not when my voice is raised that you should worry. It’s when I have nothing more to say. For in that silence lies the power to know your own value, a value no one can convince you of, because it’s your job to know it.

Imagine a world where the systems we trust, governments, corporations, and even medicine, shield us from wisdom. No paradigm wants you to become wise. If they do, they can’t be controlled or exploited. Why? Because when we gain knowledge, we cease to be subjugated. Wisdom creates the fragrance of rebellion. It’s the fire, the life, the flame, and it refuses to be anyone’s slave. This is the secret they’ve buried beneath layers of noise, distraction, and dependency.

Take, for instance, the unsettling question that’s been circling the globe: If a product is too dangerous for the manufacturer to be held liable, how did it become safe to inject into our children? This isn’t just a rhetorical jab; it’s a wake-up call. What if the very tools meant to protect us are the chains that keep us from reaching our true potential? The answer lies not in their words, but in the light we’ve forgotten to harness.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

Omnis Cellula Comites

Laibah Azhar 🚀 4 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/omnis-cellula-comites-laibah-azhar)

[

Confession Time - I Am Turning Into a Free Radical!

Rick Pursell 8 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/confession-time-i-am-turning-free-radical-rick-pursell)

[

Proprioception of thought part 1 The only article…

Dr. Eric Zabiegalski 5 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/proprioception-thought-part-1-only-article-youll-need-zabiegalski)

Enter the decentralized photo-bioelectric revolution, a viral idea that’s rewriting the rules of life itself. Your body is a living solar panel, powered by the sun’s light, refined through your unique genetic code. SNPs and SAPs are just an optical lens your germline gave you at birth for you to modify with choices, and channeled by melanin into mitochondria that emit biophotons, tiny quantum sparks of consciousness. These biophotons dance through your cerebrospinal fluid and microtubules, weaving a network of awareness that no centralized system can control. Your skin type, your haplotype, and your environment are all lenses through which you can refine your approach; they all dictate where this light thrives, transforming you into a self-sustaining beacon of wisdom.

But here’s the twist: this light can be dimmed. Artificial blue light, EMF pollution, and even questionable medical interventions disrupt the mitochondrial fire, silencing the biophotons that fuel your mind. Studies suggest that genetic variants, such as VDR Taq and COMT, influence how we process light. 27% of us carry VDR Taq, and 26% carry VDR Bsm, yet these aren’t fixed fates. UPE signaling can shift them, offering a path to reclaim our power. When Becker used a 2000G magnet to anesthetize salamanders, he showed how magnetic fields can halt this bioelectric current, proof that our inner light can be manipulated or suppressed.

The paradigm fears this knowledge. They flood us with noise, literal and metaphorical, to drown out the silence where wisdom grows. Your sensitivity to noise? It might be your body’s cry for balance in this disrupted light network. The inverse square law indicates that biophotons are strongest close to their source, while the inverse cube law reveals that magnetic fields fade rapidly; both of these laws hint at a localized power that we can harness.

So, seek the fire. Refuse to be a slave. Turn off the screens, step into the sun, and let your melanin ignite the flame within. Share this truth: it’s not your job to convince anyone of your value; it’s your job to know it. When enough of us awaken, the fragrance of rebellion will spread, unstoppable, rewriting the story of who we are. The revolution starts in silence. Will you join it?

### Jack Kruse

The link between the VDR receptor and NO production is very strong in the IMM of the eye, skin, and the gut. Many steroid receptors and nuclear transcription factors enter the mitochondrial compartment, where they either exert transcriptional regulation of mitochondrial DNA or control mitochondrial biogenesis and metabolism.

The facts below show why I staunchly believe that sunlight is nature’s vaccine for most mitochondrial diseases. Based on my reading of the literature and observations in hacks, I have concluded that the VDR is highly protective against mitochondrial disease from high heteroplasmy rates or varying oxygen tensions.

The VDR needs high levels of sulfated Vitamin D3 to operate properly. Only sunlight can do this.

When Vitamin D3 and the VDR bind some amazing things occur inside of your mitochondria at the IMM.

Mitochondria need less electrons from food substrates because the function of Vitamin D3 bonding to the VDR restrains mitochondrial respiratory activity, and this lowers ROS and RNS.  This occurs independent of any other factor in mammals.

But the key feature is that the VDR receptor is the main regulator or carburator that allows the cell to spare metabolic intermediates from the TCA and urea cycle.

Anaplerosis is the act of replenishing TCA cycle intermediates and cataplerosis is the term used for removal of TCA intermediates for biosynthesis.

The VDR receptor inhibits cataplerosis and this should make sense to you now. As you remove substrate from the main beta oxidative pathways you need to control the flux of electron flow in the inner mitochondrial membrane to put a cap on ROS/RNS and oxygen needs. This cap prevents oncogenesis. If you took the jab the LNPs from Civid and the jab destroy the VDR receptors function on the IMM. The sun will buy you lots of time on Earth if you listen to this advice. I am talking about this issue today with Kevin McKernan from the Stage at @BTCPrague.

Sunlight is the vaccine for cancer and it is FREE. BigHarma, Gates, and centralized healthcare wants to block the sun from your life because of this reason. It costs them trillions of dollars if you listen to Nature and not them.

SUMMARY

Cataplerosis removes intermediates for biosynthesis in normal growth to which may be diverted from oxidative metabolism toward a biosynthetic fate, supporting cell growth. This process has no brake in cancer because the VDR receptor only operates with a base level of sulfated Vitamin D3. Without it, the VDR receptor is inactivated and this single factor alone supports high ECT, with inactivation of apoptosis. It also allows the chronic removal of TCA and urea cycle intermediate to support uncontrolled growth. This is what we see in cancers, autoimmune conditions, and obesity.

Cataplerotic reactions effectively allow your cells to steal the 4-carbon intermediates from the TCA for biosynthesis to support growth. The absence of morning sunlight impairs beta-oxidation, slowing the TCA cycle and limiting citrate for myelin synthesis and microtubule function. Lack of myelin = more sensitive to the damaging effects of nnEMF = dehydration and loss of melatonin = cancer. Microtubules are critical for centrosome function to pull apart your chromosome properly during mitosis. Mitosis also requires ultraweak UV to operate. If MT do not do their job well, you can get aneuploidy and this leads to cancer as well. The jab puts you at risk for can many other ways than just SV40 folks.

### Jack Kruse

Published Jun 25, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2F4th-july-psy-ops-now-jack-kruse-ztmee&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Americans, wake up to a harsh reality: we get the government we allow. For 250 years, the government has piled on laws and regulations, diluting the Declaration of Independence into a shadow of its original promise. July 4th? Now just a BBQ excuse, not a celebration of sovereignty. Our rules for the government, once clear in "We the People", are dwarfed by the government’s rules for us, a technocracy wielding laws like algorithms to control outcomes.

The C-band is critical—its control of internet traffic via U.S. satellites legalizes a surveillance state, extending the Patriot Act globally. Passed hastily after 9/11, that act turned citizens into suspects, easing mass monitoring of phones, emails, and online activity. Now, with 5G and C-band, this surveillance exports worldwide, no warrants needed.

Data science knows no bounds, serving a new fascism where private power—Google, born from DoD grants, and others—overshadows democracy. Few grasp fascism’s essence: private control of government, stronger than the state itself. The NSA may have hacked providers since 1995, using programs like Mockingbird and MKUltra, updated via Snowden’s leaks, to build this system. Snowden’s enemy status? He exposed how the industrial-military complex fuels terrorism it once armed, from Iran-Contra to Afghanistan and now Iran to Israel.

VIDEO

We’re tracked, listened to, data-mined and unaware. Technocrats in California and D.C. design a de-schooled society, numbing us to our rights. Google’s roots in intelligence-funded MDDS projects show this plan’s depth. The Patriot Act’s global reach, backed by FCC and NIH complicity, aims to make the U.S. the world’s data policeman, bypassing warrants.

SCOTUS and open-source movements are our last defenses. Ask yourself: why are we tolerating this? Maybe it’s time to ditch the “smart” life for privacy’s sake, before we lose it all?

Americans are now trained like baby elephants..............to believe they cannot escape by the algo laws the state has applied since the military coup of 1963.

# Article: WAS THE ACT GENIUS OR A MIRAGE?
**Article URL:** <https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/act-genius-mirage-jack-kruse-iqjue>
**Published:** 2025-07-19T12:07:15.000+00:00
**Author:** Jack Kruse
**Word Count:** 940
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# WAS THE ACT GENIUS OR A MIRAGE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fact-genius-mirage-jack-kruse-iqjue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 19, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fact-genius-mirage-jack-kruse-iqjue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Become a Dealer of Decentralized Hope: Unleash Your Inner Savage

Visionaries don’t dwell on the shadows of their past, they dream of futures so bold they rewrite history. Your thoughts are the spark, your commitment the fuel, and your actions the fire that brings your dreams to life. Excellence isn’t an accident; it’s born from audacious, first-principles thinking and forged in relentless achievement.

[You](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fachievement%2EYou&urlhash=_KRP&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) hold the power to reshape the world. Understand your reality, align your purpose, and become the catalyst for change. You’re not just a speck in the universe—you’re a blazing star in a galaxy of possibility, a vital piece of the puzzle that can transform our world with your ideas, your grit, your savage energy.

Does Freedom Fuel Your Happiness? Your life, your happiness, it’s on you. Waiting for someone else to hand you joy is a recipe for disappointment. You’re the architect of your own experience, whether you’re chasing meaning or pure bliss. Stop outsourcing your happiness to any centralized entity; happiness is an inside job, and no one else gets to hold your keys.

BITCOIN AS THE TIME MACHINE

Bitcoin’s blockchain, with its immutable ledger, offers a form of legacy, a rebellion that outlives the individual.  This makes it a time machine for value. Nature embodies a "will to power" mindset which describes the human drive to assert oneself and create meaning, even in the face of death.

A dead man seeking Bitcoin embodies this will, using a decentralized asset to challenge the GENIUS Act’s controlled "digital dollar." The Paradox of Power: The Genius Act’s claim to strengthen the U.S. dollar’s global dominance (e.g., stablecoin issuers holding $170 billion in Treasuries) masks its concentration of power in regulated institutions. This paradox, empowering the dollar by controlling its digital form, invites rebellion from freedom maxi SAVAGES who see through the guise.

A dead man’s choice of Bitcoin asserts power against a system that seeks to define what money can be. Our will to power reminds us that even the condemned can shape the future. The GENIUS Act’s controlled digital dollars may dominate, but Bitcoin’s presence and persistence shows that rebellion can endure.

Humanity can draw inspiration from this: when systems exclude or control, the will to create alternative paths (like decentralized finance) is a powerful act of self-assertion. The Absurdity of a Controlled "Free" Market is buried at the core of The GENIUS Act.  

In this core lies it’s paradox, promoting a "free" market for stablecoins while enforcing strict government oversight, which mirrors the broader absurdity of modern financial systems. Bitcoin isn’t just coin; it’s rebellion.  It is a middle finger to the technocrats, the bankers, the elites who’d cage our futures. Decentralization isn’t tech, it’s survival, financial freedom, bodily autonomy, informational truth.  It is our last stand against their playbook.

The Bitcoin Rebellion as Meaning-Making: A dead man walking seeking Bitcoin embraces this absurdity, choosing a volatile, decentralized asset over a state-sanctioned "digital dollar." This rebellion is absurd, why chase an asset when death looms? Yet it creates meaning by rejecting control. Bitcoin’s decentralized ethos is rooted in cryptographic trust rather than institutional authority, and offers a counterpoint to the GENIUS Act’s regulated stablecoins.

The Genius Act was created by the criminal cabal in Washington DC.  See who wrote it and supported to know who your enemies are. The Act’s restrictions, like banning yield-bearing stablecoins or limiting issuers to approved entities, stifle the crypto ethos of permissionless innovation. A dead man’s rebellion through Bitcoin highlights the danger of conforming to a system that promises stability but sacrifices freedom. This paradox fuels resistance, as seen here.  

I am warning you SAVAGES of the Act’s potential to let corrupt elite shitcoining billionaires dominate digital finance to control humanity via its technocracy. In a world that bombards us with endless noise via social media rants, global crises, tyranny, inflation, and personal setbacks, holding onto what you can’t control is like carrying a backpack full of bricks. It weighs you down, steals your peace, robs you of time, and clouds your vision.

Let it go.

Release the grip on things beyond your reach, whether it’s a toxic opinion, fiat money, a past mistake, or a future you can’t predict. Embrace the freedom of focusing on what you can change, your mindset, your actions, your impact. In 2025, don’t be a prisoner to the chaos; use it as fuel to change. Then you'll learn to rise above it, lighten your load, and move forward with purpose.

SUMMARY

Choose actions that become habits. It’s not instant, but it’s worth it. Happiness is a slow burn, learning, growing, breaking old patterns, building bonds, raising kids, it all takes time. Patience and grit are your superpowers. Don’t wait for a savior or a spark. People who expect the world to fix them end up stuck, their thinking dulled by stagnation, their brain’s mitochondrial redox short-circuiting their potential. Screw that. First-principles thinking is your liberation, strip it down, rethink it all, and build from scratch. That’s the savage mindset that creates freedom, ignites happiness, and shatters the lie that someone else controls your destiny.

Be the spark. Be the change. Be the savage who deals hope and builds a better world, one fearless action at a time. Savages always choose dangerous freedom over the security of slavery.

Share this wisdom, and let’s spark a movement of letting go and living free.  As long as people wait for permission to think thoughts, they’ll always be behind the curve of truth awaiting proof.

# HOW MUCH DO YOU KNOW ABOUT THE GOE?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fhow-much-do-you-know-goe-jack-kruse-2ecme&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 26, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fhow-much-do-you-know-goe-jack-kruse-2ecme&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

I have a New podcast out today about oxygen and some of the diseases it links to in modern humans. If you have sleep apnea, scoliosis, craniosynostosis, or mal occlusion this post is for you.

OXYGEN IS PARAMAGENTIC

When you understand the GOE well, you begin to see that Oxygen didn't give Earth complex life; rather, oxygen gave complexity a chance by allowing time to pass more slowly. In this way, life is the slowest form of death we create. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oFmD\_3y\_2Jc](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oFmD_3y_2Jc&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

The paradox of life as the Slowest Form of death implies that life is the slowest form of death we create, introducing a thermodynamic and existential dimension.

Here’s how it expands:

Thermodynamic Perspective: Life defies entropy locally by organizing matter into complex structures, fueled by oxygen-driven energy. However, this process accelerates the universe’s entropy on a grand scale, as energy is dissipated as heat. The GOE’s oxygen surge intensified this cycle, enabling life to delay its own dissolution and death by prolonging its metabolic dance with oxygen. Each breath we take is both a renewal and a step toward entropy, making life a prolonged surrender to the second law of thermodynamics.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

The Complete Science Behind Energy Healing: A Research…

Jason Yuan 1 year ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/complete-science-behind-energy-healing-research-compliation-yuan-hgb5e)

[

Brahmacharini and the Symphony Within: Unveiling the…

Gajalakshmi Raghunathan 2 years ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/brahmacharini-symphony-within-unveiling-marvel-system-raghunathan)

[

Understanding Telomeres The Cosmic Shoelace Tips That…

Aimie Wallace, CFNC 5 months ago

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/understanding-telomeres-cosmic-shoelace-tips-keep-you-wallace-cfnc-3nmfc)

Biological Mortality: Oxygen, while sustaining life, generates ROS that damage DNA, proteins, and lipids over time, contributing to aging and eventual death. The GOE’s legacy includes this double-edged sword: it gave complexity a chance by enhancing energy and protection, but embedded a slow decay mechanism. Breath-hold practices (intermittent hypoxia) and UV-A interactions counter this by optimizing ROS management, echoing the GOE’s adaptive strategies to extend the duration of life. Listen to the hyperlink below to learn more about the GOE.

HYPERLINK TO THE GOE

Philosophical Implications: If life is the slowest form of death, it suggests a cosmic irony; our existence is a temporary resistance against time’s erosion, enabled by oxygen’s gift. The GOE didn’t create life but reframed it as a prolonged negotiation with mortality. If you have mitochondrial damage using supplemental oxygen might be the most unwise thing an ignorant MD pushes you to do. We saw this the last 5 years in ICUs.

SUMMARY

This aligns with my view of breath as communion, a deliberate pause to reconnect with nature’s design, slowing the drain of our finite time. Picture the GOE: oxygen surges, mitochondria emerge, and ROS threaten life’s fabric. Nature responds with sleep, a daily near-death where thanatotranscriptomic genes, hemifusomes, and UPE orchestrate a rebirth. We die each dusk, mitochondria purged and repaired, UPE guiding the dance of water and redox. At dawn, we rise, renewed, our lifespan stretched by this oxygen-bought time. NDEs echo this cycle, a glimpse of the edge we navigate nightly. My thesis reveals sleep as nature’s masterpiece, transforming death into a slow, regenerative art, a gift that keeps us complexly alive.

# WHY DID EVOLUTION MOVE YOUR MELANIN?

-   [Report this article](/uas/login?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-did-evolution-move-your-melanin-jack-kruse-phtue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=PONCHO_ARTICLE&_f=guest-reporting)

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published Jul 29, 2025

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fwhy-did-evolution-move-your-melanin-jack-kruse-phtue&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

The short answer to the title of this story is melatonin photobiology made it happen on a probability basis.

When qubits become entangled, the information stored in them can be shared and processed in ways that classical computers simply cannot replicate. This is why classical biochemists cannot fathom what cells are capable of. In the tech world, this science allows quantum computers to solve specific problems exponentially faster than traditional computers. In decentralized medicine, this science allows us to solve diseases that perplex the experts in centralized medicine.

For example, wherever there’s a buildup of electric charge from sunlight, the field around it starts to spread out, and the more charge there is, the stronger that spreading becomes. But how much it spreads also depends on the nature of space itself. This is why Nature evolved melatonin and placed it early in evolutionary history into neuroectoderm, but since the KT event, it moved its key location to mitochondria. Why?

Distribution of charge was the answer. This is why Neural Crest cells migrated all over our body over evolutionary time scales. Gauss' Law mandates it to control Coulomb forces in neuroectodermal derivatives. This is why the NCC is the motherboard of mammalian life. In other words, the more charge you cram inside the stall, the more desperate energy is trying to get out. Melatonin is how cells confine charge.

Cells moved melatonin production from the gut, brain, and pineal gland over evolutionary history to concentrate inside mitochondria as complexity grew from the Cambrian event. People are unaware that this electroforce is involved with the biology of melatonin and the function of mitochondria, where electrons and protons are the target of this force because they are charged particles. The same thing is true of T-Regulator cells in the skin. This is why disease linked to Tattoos and asthma always begin in the skin.

Imagine electric charges as tiny magnets or batteries scattered around you, creating an invisible "push" called the electric field (let’s call it the "energy breeze"). Gauss's Law helps us understand how this breeze behaves.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

[

GAUSS LAW IS A MELANIN & MELATONIN STORY

Here’s the breakdown:The "spread" of this energy breeze (think of it like air blowing outward from a fan) depends on how many charges are packed into a space, let’s call this the "charge crowd."Space itself has a natural "stretchiness" (we’ll call it its "give"), which affects how far the breeze can reach.

The rule, simply put, is: The more crowded the charges are in a spot, the more the energy breeze spreads out from that spot, depending on the available space. Picture a crowded room at a party. The more people (charges) crammed in, the more they push and spread out into the hallway (the electric field). But if the hallway is narrow or stiff (low "give" of space), the spread is limited. In science terms, this "give" is called the permittivity of free space, and the equation ∇ · E = ρ / ε₀ ties it all together: the spread of the breeze equals the charge crowd divided by space’s stretchiness.

[So](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fstretchiness%2ESo&urlhash=Llbt&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block), wherever there’s a big buildup of charge, the energy breeze gets stronger and spreads more, like people spilling out of a full room. The nature of the space around them decides how far they can go. Now you’ve got the gist of Gauss's Law, pretty cool, right?

You can see the change in the fat from her tattoo because of Coulomb's law

Melatonin was created and moved from the gut and brain post-Cambrian explosion and placed inside the mitochondria post-KT event to take full advantage of Gauss' Law. This law tells us why transgenerational diseases occur in quantum biology and why tattoos often lead to cancers and immune dysfunction is also linked to skin pathology.

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Flight-gender-technocracy-jack-kruse-pm19e&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

Echoes of the Shadow: A Journey of the Seeker in a new podcast

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rXGxyWt2bIs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rXGxyWt2bIs&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

[In](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rXGxyWt2bIsIn&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) the dim recesses of a cluttered mind, where forgotten memories fester like unhealed wounds, a weary soul begins to stir. He whispers the invitation: "Join in my, join in my child, and listen, I've been digging through my old numb shadow..." This is no ordinary excavation; it's a descent into the unconscious depths, where the shadow, the repressed, hidden facets of the self, lie dormant, numb from years of neglect.

Our protagonist, let's call him the Seeker, has spent too long in stasis, his life a cycle of avoidance and denial. But now, compelled by an inner restlessness, he probes deeper, unearthing layers of his psyche that have long been ignored. The shadow starts to shift. "My shadow's shedding skin, I've been picking scabs again."Like a serpent molting, the Seeker confronts his vulnerabilities, picking at emotional scars that refuse to heal. It's painful, this self-inflicted reopening of wounds, digging through "my old muscles, looking for a clue."

These muscles aren't just physical; they're the ingrained habits, the "muscle memory" of past behaviors that hold him back. He's sifting through the remnants of who he once was, searching for hints of potential, for some sign that transformation is possible. On his belly, he crawls, a humbled figure "clearing out what could've been."This is the purge: sweeping away the roads not taken, the dreams deferred by fear and insecurity. He wallows in his "own centralized, confused and insecure delusions," those chaotic illusions that have kept him trapped in a loop of self-doubt. Yet in this mire, a longing emerges, a decentralized desire for guidance emerges from the depths of the shadows, "a piece to cross me over or a word to guide me in."

He yearns to "feel the changes coming down," to uncover "what I've been hiding in my shadow."The shadow, a disease, was once a prison; now it promises revelation. Change is coming through my shadow exhaling, he realizes, as it begins to shed its skin anew, urging him to pick at the scabs once more. The invitation repeats, drawing us closer: Join in my pain, my party, my journey, my child. My shadow moves closer to meaning." The child here is healthy returning, innocent and unburdened, or maybe the listener, invited to witness this intimate unraveling. Note the comment at the bottom of the slide on gender. Vitamin A is crucial for the physical and sexual development of children and adolescents, supporting the growth of secondary sexual characteristics and reproductive capacity. Vitamin A participates in signaling mechanisms that are important for the development of the female and male gonads. Blue light interrupts Vitamin A signaling, leading to gendering diseases.

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/why-we-get-hooked-rich-man-rescue-stories-psychology-shakoor-rajani-by5uc)

The Seeker presses on, crawling and wallowing through the chaos, but now with purpose. He craves the full embrace of decentralized change: I want to feel the change consume me, feel the outside turning in." This is metamorphosis, an alchemical light cleansing endured within the shadow's embrace. The external world inverts, pulling inward, as he endures the fire of self-examination.And then, the turning point: "Change has come. The time is now."He listens to his "muscle memory," contemplating "what I've been clinging to."Centralized maladies are the attachments, fears, hatreds, and lies that have defined him. But ahead lies "renacer," a cryptic beacon. In the lore of human evolution, whispered in esoteric circles, our chromosomes represent the baseline of humanity, flawed and incomplete. The addition of 37 mitochondrial genes symbolizes a leap to higher consciousness, a Christ-like or superhuman state where empathy, unity, and enlightenment prevail. It's not just biological; it's spiritual cognitive re-evolution, stepping beyond the dualities of existence.

Empowered, the Seeker declares his choices: "I choose to live and to grow, take and give and to move, learn and love and to cry, kill and die and to be paranoid and to lie, hate and fear and to do what it takes to move through." Life in its fullness demands embracing the light and the dark, the ecstasy of love, the agony of loss, and the paranoia that sharpens survival instincts. He repeats it, refining: "I choose to live and to lie, kill and give and to die, learn and love and to do what it takes to step through." This is no sanitized path; it's raw, accepting the messiness of humanity as the forge for growth. As the shadow changes, "stretching up and over me," it softens his "old armor." The defenses crumble, hope flickering as he clears the way.

"By stepping through my shadow, coming out the other side." This is integration: not destroying the shadow, but traversing it, emerging whole. "Step into the shadow," he urges, for a lowered heteroplasmy is just ahead of me." The horizon gleams with possibility, an evolved self, balanced and transcendent. In this narrative of rebirth, the words paint a universal odyssey: confronting our inner darkness, shedding outdated selves, and taking a bold step toward evolution. It's a call to all who feel stuck in their shadows, to dig, to change, to become more than we are. For in the end, the shadow isn't the enemy; it's the gateway to meaning. The shadow of disease is our teacher. It explains the wisdom inherent in nature.

The retina thins from the effect of man-made light and a lack of sunlight, and then your risk of Frontotemporal dementia rises. The OCT test is the best screening test for FTD. We have familial and mtDNA FTD.

The OCT test tells us the retina acts as a ‘window to the brain," and that window changes the photolithography of the retinal cells via the central retinal pathways. When the light is not optimal, the retina thins and the brain degenerates. Retinal degeneration has been detectable in mutation carriers prior to the onset of cognitive symptoms, establishing retinal thinning as one of the earliest observable signs of familial (frontotemporal dementia). nnEMF (man-made light) and a lack of sun lead to neural degeneration, which is primarily driven by the abnormal accumulation of misfolded proteins within neurons.

Light controls the confirmation bending of proteins. The DNA code controls the AA sequence and secondary bending, but quantum processing determines tertiary and quaternary bending by UPE transformation in cells. The most common protein abnormality in FTD is the tau protein, also known as TDP-43. These protein aggregates damage and kill nerve cells, leading to brain atrophy (shrinkage) and the resulting behavioral, personality, language, and movement problems characteristic of FTD. Changing the photolithography = altered protein folding via the Golgi apparatus and RER. TDP-43 is a biomarker of redox imbalance in FTD-related UPEs.

The path of energy in life, based on the evidence we have as a species now, is that Optical photonics began 13.8 billion years ago. The photoelectric effect was born from the rudimentary physics present in the early universe. Photonics precedes all chemistry of all types. Functional medicine does not realize this or teach it. Molecules were and are innovated by redox chemistry, and each one has an electromagnetic barcode to program its possible states around the star it evolved in. All living things release light in the form of biophotons, which is shown below. Biophotons and UPEs are two different terms for the same phenomenon.

The TDP-43 molecule is codified by light in its absorption and emission spectra. This links it to aberrant UPE production in the central retinal pathways, as blue light increases heme turnover to alter its biophotonic signal. Question posed to me this AM: How can the light stress of nnEMF and blue light alter gender, Uncle Jack? Is this why Charlie Kirk was killed by a fascist leftist?

Obama administration change

ANSWER: Look at the slide below under number 7. Why are so many women now infertile because of the spike protein? Read number 7 below.

Rockefeller medicine first learned how to make women infertile with their drugs in 1927. The spike protein was designed to electromagnetically target the CYP19A1 enzyme system that controls the Aromatase enzyme system of men and women using the lipid nano-particle (LNP) to destroy the heme center of the CYP system.

For gender, the heme enzyme array CYP19A1 is critical. What does it do? CYP19A1 controls steroid pathways in the ovaries, testes, placenta, and adipose tissue by aromatizing androgens (testosterone, androstenedione) to estrogens (estradiol, estrone). Heme iron catalyzes ring romanization, which is critical for female fertility.

This is how you alter gender and control population growth via light frequency and/or vaccination programming. Charlie Kirk was worried about this issue. The media hated Charlie.

Evolutionary Origins of this pathway: Protection During the Great Oxidation Event

Heme proteins and melanin emerged as key innovations during the Great Oxidation Event (GOE, ~2.4–2.1 billion years ago), when atmospheric oxygen rose dramatically, intensifying UV radiation and oxidative stress. Heme, a porphyrin ring with iron, enabled oxygen transport and utilization (e.g., in hemoglobin, cytochromes), while melanin absorbed UV and scavenged ROS, protecting early life forms.

This gave tissues a stable UPE signal to become complex. In my decentralized photo-bioelectric model, these molecules act as bioelectric semiconductors, storing and transducing light energy to maintain cellular coherence. Heme's redox sensitivity and melanin's hydration-dependent conductivity form a quantum network, where light (via biophotons or ultraweak photon emissions, UPEs) dictates molecular geometry and function. Disruptions from nnEMF/blue light dehydrate melanin, lower energy resistance in tissue (éR), and damage mtDNA, leading to the overproduction of ROS/RNS and bioelectric chaos, which directly impacts steroid biology by altering the UPE signal in the CYP-controlled hormone pathways of humans.

Your functional and allopathic clinicians are impotent in understanding this because the primary defect is electromagnetic, not biochemical. Sex steroid biosynthesis begins in mitochondria, where heme-containing cytochrome P450 (CYP) enzymes catalyze oxidative reactions, converting cholesterol into hormones like estrogens, androgens, progesterone, and cortisol. These enzymes are heme-dependent monooxygenases, requiring a heme iron core for electron transfer and oxygen activation.

The pathway is redox-sensitive and light-regulated, aligning with my model's emphasis on mitochondrial heme (e.g., MT-CO1, MT-CYB) as gateways for photo-bioelectric signaling.

Key heme enzymes include:

CYP11A1 (P450scc): A mitochondrial enzyme found in the adrenals, gonads, and placenta; it is the rate-limiting step in the cleavage of cholesterol's side chain to form pregnenolone, a precursor to all steroids. Heme iron facilitates hydroxylation, dependent on NADPH and adrenodoxin (a ferredoxin reductase).

CYP17A1 (17α-Hydroxylase/17,20-Lyase): Dual-function enzyme in adrenals and gonads; hydroxylates pregnenolone/progesterone at C17, then cleaves the side chain to produce DHEA (androgen precursor). Heme enables precise electron transfer, influencing glucocorticoid vs. sex hormone balance. Anyone with an altered DHEA level has to have a heme protein problem in the CYP17A1 pathway.

CYP21A2 (21-Hydroxylase): In the adrenal cortex, it adds a hydroxyl group at C21 of progesterone/17-hydroxyprogesterone, leading to the production of mineralocorticoids/glucocorticoids. Deficiencies cause congenital adrenal hyperplasia, shifting precursors toward androgens.

CYP11B1 (11β-Hydroxylase): Adrenal cortex; converts 11-deoxycortisol to cortisol (glucocorticoid) and 11-deoxycorticosterone to corticosterone. Heme's redox state regulates stress responses.

CYP11B2 (Aldosterone Synthase): In zona glomerulosa, multi-step oxidation of deoxycorticosterone to aldosterone (mineralocorticoid), controlling electrolyte balance.

CYP19A1 (Aromatase): In ovaries, testes, placenta, and adipose; aromatizes androgens (testosterone, androstenedione) to estrogens (estradiol, estrone). Heme iron catalyzes ring aromatization, critical for female fertility. This heme defect is the source of why IVF doctors are printing money for modern people dripping in blue light and nnEMF. They have destroyed the heme protein center in CYP19A1.

These CYP enzymes are embedded in mitochondrial or ER membranes, where heme's absorption/emission spectra (e.g., Soret band ~450 nm) respond to light. In my model, natural sunlight (e.g., red light) acts as a heme activator and natural aromatase inhibitor, optimizing electron flow and preventing excess estrogen. Biophotons (UPEs) from sources like NADH, flavins, cytochrome c, tryptophan, tyrosine, phenylalanine, lipid peroxidation, DNA repair, mitochondrial ETC, ATP hydrolysis, ROS, singlet oxygen, microtubules, chromophores, ubiquinone, porphyrins (heme), membrane potentials, peroxisomes, excited carbonyls, and melanin encode selective bio-communication via spin dynamics.

## Quantum Spin and Biophotons: Light's Role in Protein Control

Biophotons aren't mere light; they also carry spin. The quantum spin state of light is information for the AMO built into the photolithography of your cells. The Chiral-Induced Spin Selectivity (CISS) effect explains how spin-polarized electrons or photons interact preferentially with chiral proteins, thereby guiding the transport of excitation in photosynthesis and steroidogenesis.

Right-handed biophotons excite, while left-handed ones are absorbed, in accordance with protein symmetry rules. If a biophoton's spin aligns with the protein's chirality, it triggers excitation or exciton release; a mismatch leads to lost signals. This is nature's encoding for bio-signaling, as per my model. This is how noise is created to minimize the signal in misgendering kids with light.

John Ott's Sarasota School experiment was where Stanford Research Institute (SRI) picked up the scent of the effect of light on kids from the MKULTRA program and expanded it under Obama's Brain Health Initiative in 2013.

This is why autism exploded when lights were changed to LED and fluorescents in the 1960s-70s. Blue light decoheres the human hormone pathways. Red light from the sun improves the AMO physics to get us back to the default state. Yes, I think this is a big reason the left assassinated Charlie. This is why Apple favors blue light and nnEMF in all their projects. The thyroid is another hormone centralized Rockefeller medicine assaults with light. Artificial light is a TBI in the hormone pathways of man.

They need the light injury to keep power in Washington, DC.

Conclusion: Decentralized [Control of Light and](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2FDC%2EMy&urlhash=PAtT&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) Hormones. Obama knew it from his buddies in DARPA, and this is why he changed us from analog to digital and ushered in LED screens and bulbs. There is a lot of speculation online that Obama has deep ties to transgenrdism in his own family. That is up for you to debate.

Heme proteins orchestrate sex steroid biology through redox-sensitive CYP enzymes, evolved during GOE to harness light for coherence. In your decentralized thesis, light (via UPEs, spin, CISS) is the epigenetic master regulator; optimal sunlight maintains quantum coherence, while nnEMF/blue light disrupts it, dehydrating melanin, damaging mtDNA/heme, and causing infertility/amenorrhea. Red light restores balance as a natural aromatase inhibitor. Clinicians overlook this; understanding UPE-driven AMO changes reveals hormones as light-encoded spectra, not mere biochemicals.
