The human Lagrangian story unfurling in the blogs right now also highlights why centralized science use of mice and rats is myopic for human disease models. In the biological sciences, physics is not yet our vision, so even with eye's wide open, the mind remains closed to possibilities and this opened the door to pain being your teacher in the "Rockeller gulag."

My Human Lagrangian Unified Field Theory just redrew the entire Standard Model infographic for biology.

One minimal equation never taught to medical students is the key to understanding human life, where ℒ = T − V where T is kinetic energy flux (rapid turnover, deuterium-tolerant short-circuits) and V is the potential landscape of magnetic coherence and impedance matching.

The symmetry group you choose determines the universe you get. Centralized Rockefeller medicine deliberately chose the rodent symmetry group, a nocturnal, high-frequency, short-range, deuterium-tolerant U(1)-like abelian short-circuit universe.

Humans evolved under the full diurnal, broadband-EM, long-range, coherence-maximizing SU(2)×U(1) + melanin-Higgs symmetry-breaking universe. The boundary conditions (1G, 21% O₂) look the same on paper, but the optimization is polar opposite. That single symmetry mismatch is why 90+% of rodent-derived therapies fail in humans.

They moved the goalposts 110 years ago with Flexner's Report, and humanity has been paying the entropy tax ever since.

One cannot see with eyes wide open and the blind optically opaque with superfluous data.The Lagrangian I just dropped in your lap is pure elegance..... that glowing ℒ = T − V, the action integral S = ∫ℒ d⁴x, and the fork in the road: “Choose your symmetry.” U(1) gives us clean, abelian light. SU(3) locks quarks in eternal confinement. SU(2)×U(1) + Higgs symmetry breaking hands us mass and the weak force.

One minimal equation, three symmetry choices, three different universes.

The infographic screams the lesson: the symmetry group you choose determines which universe you get.

HOW THEY STOLE YOUR TIME

In photo-bio-energetics, the equivalent minimal action is the free-energy functional minimized across melanin-metal-photon interactions. Here T is the kinetic term of electron tunneling rates, V is the redox-potential landscape tuned by ligand environments and photonic charging. The “symmetry group” is the set of ligand-field symmetries around d-shell transition metals (Fe, Cu, Mo, Mn) while they are chelated inside melanin scaffolds. Light absorbed by melanin excites electrons, charges the metal “battery,” shifts its oxidation state, alters E°, and breaks symmetry......exactly like the Higgs mechanism in the diagram.

That symmetry breaking propagates allosterically, reroutes metabolic flux (TCA → glycolysis, urea cycle tuning), and decides whether the cell lives in an aerobic or anaerobic “universe.”Centralized science picked the wrong symmetry group when it standardized on mice and rats.

Why ALL Rodent Models Are Myopic — The Symmetry Mismatch Is Literal

Standard laboratory rodents (and most wild strains) do not accumulate significant neuromelanin in catecholaminergic neurons the way humans do with age. In humans, neuromelanin granules in the substantia nigra pars compacta (SNpc) and locus coeruleus chelate Fe, Cu, and other metals, participate in ultra-weak photon emission (UPE) signaling, and act as the exact “battery” storage sites we have been discussing. Rodents lack this spontaneous pigmentation; Parkinson’s disease is essentially a human condition in that respect.

That is not a minor detail, it is a fundamental symmetry difference in the biological Lagrangian. Without the melanin-metal transducer, the rodent system cannot replicate the photonic charging, ligand-tuned E° shifts, or ROS/UPE feedback loops that define human redox homeostasis and neurodegeneration.

[To](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fneurodegeneration%2ETo&urlhash=WoVt&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) fix this, researchers now have to engineer “humanized” rodents by overexpressing human tyrosinase (hTyr) just to induce neuromelanin accumulation. Only then do the models start to recapitulate age-dependent dopaminergic loss, α-synuclein misfolding, and neuroinflammation that humans experience naturally.

The fact that the Rockefeller dynasty of PhDs had to retrofit human melanin machinery into rodents proves the original symmetry choice was invalid.Add the circadian and photonic mismatch: mice are nocturnal, their fur blocks broadband solar spectrum, their retinal photoreception and skin optics are nothing like ours, and common albino strains (used in thousands of studies) have zero melanin at all.

Their metabolic “universe” is governed by a different symmetry group. When you run a drug trial in that universe and then translate to humans, you are comparing apples to a completely different force-carrying particle table.

Rockefeller medicine knew this a long time ago and moved the goalpost for their benefit. It has destroyed humanity.

My human Lagrangian "Unified Field Theory" of the Human Motor sees their nefarious behavior clearly.

25 years ago I moved the goalposts from "Biochemistry" to Network Physics in my brain and the output for my patients has been life changing.

Centralized science is "myopic" because it treats a mouse (a nocturnal, low-light, high-frequency rodent) as a functional proxy for a human (a diurnal, high-UV, low-frequency, large-brained primate).

Their Boundary Conditions are the same (1G gravity, 21% Oxygen), but their Lagrangian Optimization is polar opposite. A mouse allocates energy to rapid kinetic turnover (T); a human allocates it to high-gain magnetic coherence (V).

1\. The Death of the "Mouse Model"

A mouse is a "Short-Circuit" specialist. It can handle high deuterium loads because its network nodes are physically close and its "timing" is high-speed/low-resolution.The Human Problem: We are "High-Resolution/Long-Range." Our nodes (Gut-to-Brainstem) are separated by a transverse mesocolon and a vagus highway.Impedance Matching: In a human, if the pancreas/bicarb exhaust (Node: Clearance) doesn't match the impedance of the thalamus (Node: Central Integration), the "comms" fail. A mouse doesn't have enough "network length" to experience the Lagrangian Shock that causes MS, TSC, or Jordan Peterson’s GABAergic collapse.

2\. Resistance vs. Transfer Probability

I’ve defined the Quantum Tunneling of health. The Barrier: When deuterium (D+) and the 55 undeclared elements accumulate due to Rockefeller Dynasty practices, they raise the Barrier Height (Resistance) between nodes to destroy them. This is how endogenous melanin is destroy by centralized medicine to cause modern disease holocausts

Local Activity (The "Alien UPE"): As I've noted in other threads here on my website forum, a node (like an overclocked Complex IV) can still fire wildly, but because the impedance is mismatched (electrical resistance), so that energy cannot propagate. It becomes "Incoherent Heat" (inflammation). The "Alien UPE" is the photonic "scream" of a node that is disconnected from the network. Ultra-weak photon emission is not mystical either; it is real chemiluminescence from oxidative metabolism that spikes precisely when network coupling fails (ischemia-reperfusion, inflammation, mitochondrial uncoupling).

3\. From "Energy Input" to "Network Coupling"

It is no longer about how much "fuel" (food/light) you put in; it is about the Coherence of the wire.

Fuel quantity from food become irrelevant if the wire is mismatched. Melanin’s paramagnetic semiconductor properties tune the d-orbital states of bound metals in real time, exactly as my early “battery charger” hypothesis laid out in the Leptin Rx 25 yrs ago. It matches the 3.25× magnetic moment of protium (H+) across the trandermal MITF-AMPAR loop that connects the skin to the brain so information travels without decoherence.

Melanin began on Earth as an Archean Era Coupler: Melanin isn't just a "battery"; it is the Impedance Matcher. It uses its chiral, chelating, and paramagnetic properties to "tune" the nodes so that the 3.25x nuclear magnetic moment of protium can carry information across the transdermal MITF-AMPAR loop without losing signal to the "heavy" deuterium mass.

he 40 Hz “M” tone is the network synchronizer — the biological carrier wave. Gamma entrainment at 40 Hz (via light or sound) restores long-range coherence, reduces pathological proteins, preserves synaptic plasticity, and couples distant nodes. This is not alternative or functional medicine woo sold here on LinkedIn too often; MIT and multiple labs have shown it in human-relevant models. My Crater Protocols (IV methylene blue + red light + bicarbonate) is the practical implementation of this science: MB bypasses blocked ETC complexes while redox-cycling, red light photonically recharges melanin-metal batteries, and bicarbonate tunes pH/E° for optimal ligand symmetry. This clears all the dielectric mirrors in the brain restoring human physiology as the Lagragian requires.

4\. The "Rhino" Network Victory

The rhino horn is pure low-impedance hardware: keratin matrix loaded with melanin + calcium deposits that provide UV shielding and structural strength. No big brain required, just the melanized keratin couples the entire organism to Earth’s magnetic ground with near-perfect impedance match. Humans moved the hardware inside (encephalization) and became a software-defined network. That upgrade gave us abstract thought, but made us infinitely fragile to EMI, GLP-1 agonists (which disrupt vagal coherence), and gadolinium (which poisons paramagnetic sites). Disease is now network opacity; health is network transparency.

My Decentralized Conclusion:

Health is Network Transparency. Disease is Network Opacity. My customized "Crater Protocol" (IV MB, Red Light, Bicarb) is a System-Wide De-Fragg. I'm clearing the "nodes" of isotopic sludge so the Standard Model of the human can finally achieve Superconductive Coherence.

Rockefeller medicine is a 51% wrench attack on humanity to induce TIME THEFT.

My protocols are now designed to clear isotopic sludge so protium can tunnel again. I'm restoring superconductive coherence in a Rockefeller universe that was deliberately engineered to run on friction. Rockefeller medicine is the ultimate 51% attack, inducing time theft by forcing every human node to waste energy on incoherent heat instead of coherent work.

My 25-year pivot from biochemistry to network physics didn’t just change patient outcomes; it reopened the correct symmetry group.

Eyes wide open, mind no longer closed.

The Lagrangian is clean again: ℒ = T − V

Treatment must match the human symmetry group.

The universe you get is the one where light charges the metals,

melanin matches the impedance,

and disease becomes preventable network maintenance

instead of inevitable entropy extraction.

This is decentralized medicine with the CORRECT physics applied.

THIS IS WHERE MY ART DESTROYS THEIR SCIENCE.

Dog: 2.0 - carnivore Wolf: 2.0 - carnivore

Vulture: 1.0 - obligate scavenger

Hyena: 1.5 - bone-crushing scavenger We didn't evolve as herbivores who occasionally ate protein and fat.

We evolved as scavengers who moved up the food chain. That pH 1.5 isn't designed to digest salad. It's designed to kill the botulism in a three-day-old oysters or a carcass.

In the context of evolutionary biology and metabolic efficiency, Sama's data on stomach pH (1.5) highlights a significant physiological adaptation.

While conventional medicine focuses on digestion, my decentrlaized hypothesis about the bicarbonate (bicarb) loop as a "deuterium exhaust" suggests that humans have a uniquely powerful mechanism for managing hydrogen isotopes compared to other species.

My decentralized synthesis connects the "guardian" function of p53 to the extreme acidity of the human stomach, revealing a decentralized system designed to maintain "light" hydrogen (protium) over "heavy" hydrogen (deuterium).

The Bicarb Loop as a Deuterium Exhaust

In biophysics, the production of stomach acid (HCl) is half of a much larger cycle. For every proton (+) pumped into the stomach to reach a pH of 1.5, a bicarbonate molecule (HCO3−) is released into the bloodstream. This is known as the "alkaline tide."

The Glucagon Exhaust located on Chromosome 2: Glucagon, the hormone of the fasted/scavenger state, stimulates the pancreas to release this bicarbonate into the duodenum to neutralize the acid.

Isotope Selection: The carbonic anhydrase enzymes that drive this loop are highly sensitive to the Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE). They preferentially move protium (1) over deuterium (2).

The "Heavy" Sink: By pumping massive amounts of D+ into the stomach, humans effectively "trap" deuterium in the gastric juice or exhaust it through the breath (as 2) and urine.

A pH of 1.5 indicates a much more aggressive "pumping" mechanism than that of a Lion (2.0) or a Gorilla (4.5), making the human "deuterium exhaust" one of the most efficient in the mammal kingdom.

The p53 Connection: Protecting the Pump This is where Sama Hoole lost the plot. High acidity is metabolically expensive and "electrically hot." The cells of the stomach lining (parietal cells) have some of the highest mitochondrial densities in the body to power this pH 1.5 gradient.

The Guardian’s Role: p53 (the "guardian of the genome") is required to monitor the DNA of these high-turnover cells. If deuterium (the "grit") leaks into the mitochondrial Cytochrome C Oxidase (CCO), the "pump" fails.

Antenna Gain: As we discussed, humans have a high-gain "skin antenna." This solar energy fuels the p53-mediated repair and the metabolic pathways needed to maintain the bicarb loop.

Evolutionary Scavenging vs. Modern Addiction

The pH of 1.5 confirms we evolved as high-trophic scavengers. Scavenging provided access to bone marrow and brains, tissues that are naturally deuterium-depleted by the previous animal's own bicarb loops.

The Modern Failure: Modern humans eat "deuterium-heavy" processed foods and live in low-UV environments.

The Collapse: When solar light is missing, the "p53 guardian" cannot optimally power the "bicarb exhaust." Deuterium builds up, the stomach pH rises (becoming less acidic/more like a herbivore), and the "inertial drag" in the brain and CSF increases. Sleep fails because glylymphatic drainage cannot overcome the massive KIE in the brain at the circumventricular organs.Note the picture below lifted from an influencers in the food space has no idea that glylympahtic drainage is designed to remove deuterium from the brain/CSF during sleep. This is why you never see the word deuterium in the slide.

The Addiction Loop begins to modern technology: This "heavy" state of the deuterium inertial drag in CSF is sensed by the brain as a loss of the human Lagrangian (the path of least action).

To compensate for the sluggishness of a "deuterated" antenna, we reach for alcohol or opiates, food or supplement substances that provide an artificial, crude electrical "kick" to a system that can no longer "ignite" its own internal solar-driven pump.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

The Solar-Endorphin Link: When ultraviolet (UV) radiation hits the skin, it damages the DNA of keratinocytes (skin cells) HORMETICALLY. In this context, hormesis refers to the "Goldilocks" effect: low doses of UV radiation cause enough DNA damage to trigger p53 as a repair and survival signal without being immediately lethal. By framing it this way, you bridge the gap between classical genetics and biophysics. Here is how that lesson ties together:

The "Guardian" as an Electrical Buffer: Picard's idea of eR

While mainstream biology views p53 primarily through the lens of [transcribing repair genes](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmedlineplus%2Egov%2Fgenetics%2Fgene%2Ftp53%2F&urlhash=zJLh&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block), my perspective highlights its role in managing energy flow.

Melanin, CCO, and HydrationIn this model, hydration isn't just about water; it's about the structured water (exclusion zone) that forms around biological membranes.

CCO (Complex IV) is the final step in the electron transport chain where oxygen is reduced to water. This "metabolic water" is deuterium depleted and is essential for the hydration of the DNA and the melanin surrounding it.

If a mammal lacks sun, it lacks the stimulus for this entire POMC/p53/CCO cascade. This becomes really important in the proteins that make the gastric pH 1.5 in humans.

Melanin’s chirality is the fundamental "key" that allows it to act as the primary spin-filter for the body’s electromagnetic software. If we treat the body as a quantum system, Melanin isn’t just a pigment; it is a Chiral Organic Semiconductor that mediates the relationship between light and mass (deuterium).

The KIE ruins bending. Only hydrated melanin controls the flow where deuterium can roam in tissues to control optical signaling. The Elephant’s Trunk: A Case Study in Electrical Precision

To control 100,000 muscles with zero bone structure, the elephant requires near-perfect electrical signaling.A brain that large generates massive "electrical heat." This is why you all have disease. And you hire CENTRALIZED clinicians, PhD's, and infuencers to ignorant to realize it.

SUMMARY

The Human Bicarb Loop controlled by glucagon gene on Chromosome 2 is a Deuterium Exhaust pipe. In biophysics, the production of stomach acid (HCl) is half of a much larger cycle. For every proton (𝐻+) pumped into the stomach to reach a pH of 1.5, a bicarbonate molecule (𝐻𝐶𝑂−3) is released into the bloodstream. This is known as the "alkaline tide."

The Glucagon Exhaust: Glucagon, the hormone of the fasted/scavenger state, stimulates the pancreas to release this bicarbonate into the duodenum to neutralize the acid.

Isotope Selection: The carbonic anhydrase enzymes that drive this loop are highly sensitive to the Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE). They preferentially move protium (H+)

The "Heavy" Sink: By pumping massive amounts of Deuterium into gastric juice guarrantees it will be flushed by the pancreas's carbonic anhydrase system if the beta cells are controlled by the RPE-SCN which is also tied to the POMC gene on Chromosome 2.

The p53 Connection: Protecting the Pump

We turned our skin into a solar panel for the brain's MITF-AMPAR system that controls the glucagon exhaust system. What is the key Sama missed in his story of gut pH? Solar energy fuels the [p53-mediated repair](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpmc%2Encbi%2Enlm%2Enih%2Egov%2Farticles%2FPMC2982174%2F&urlhash=85Nb&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) and the metabolic pathways needed to maintain the bicarb loop.

Evolutionary Scavenging vs. Modern Addiction

The pH of 1.5 confirms we evolved as high-trophic scavengers. Scavenging provided access to bone marrow and brains, tissues that are naturally deuterium-depleted by the previous animal's own bicarb loops.

The Modern Failure: Modern humans eat "deuterium-heavy" processed foods and live in low-UV indoor environments with lights that make it worse. This ruins the gut pH and the glucagon exhaust pipe further fueling DISEASES.

The Great Oxygenation Event (GOE) marked the Transition to "Optical Clarity"as the oxygen rose and terrestrial light was trimmed to the visible spectrum as the ozone reduced the quantum yield of the sun. During this time, the magnetosphere also changed on Earth sculpting life in ways most do not realize.

The rise of oxygen wasn't just a change in breathing; it was a Cleanup Operation where isotopic fractionation became sophisticated.

Sequestering the Noise: Oxygen turned the "Dirty" Iron into Banded Iron Formations (rocks), effectively "cleaning" the oceans. Liberating the Hardware: Oxygenation made Copper (Cu) and Manganese (Mn) bioavailable. These are the "Clean" metals required for Cytochrome C Oxidase (the sensor) and Mn-SOD (the buffer).

The Nitrogen-Free Innovation: Life evolved Retinoic Acid (Vitamin A) and Vitamin D. These are pure hydrocarbon "Golden" ligands (C,H,O). By excluding Nitrogen, they became optically clear, allowing them to travel through the cell without "quenching" the Ultra-weak Photon Emissions (UPEs).

Vitamin D also employs a nitrogen free template for the skin. RAR does it for the brain in the developing MITF-AMPAR system

3\. The ROR "Quantum Tuning Fork" Collapse The RORs (ROR, alpha, beta, gamma) are the descendants of the RAR lineage, evolved to be the "Nitrogen-Free Sensors" of the cell's internal light field.

The Function: They listen and fine tune to the UPE "Clock Signal" to coordinate the circadian rhythm. The circadian mechanism became critical in making animals more costly in time than energy as the light spectrum spectrum dropped. The Toxic Aldehyde: This retinol is oxidized into Retinaldehyde, a highly reactive electrophile.

The Short-Circuit: Unlike the "clean" Retinoic Acid, Retinaldehyde is "noisy." It forms Schiff bases and alters the Dielectric Constant of the mitochondrial water. It effectively "blinds" the ROR tuning fork in the brain. This change in dielectric power of water is critical in isotopic fractionation between blood and tissues as evolution evolves over the last 600 million years by slowly changing and adapting the Archean method of isotopic fractionation using sound and mechanical unlocking of the lattice to quantum vortexing in the CSF and blood. Vitamin A importance seems to rise as the ventricular system resonance changes in animals over this time. We can see this in how mammals changed their CSF pathways in their nervous systems as these changes happen on Earth to use vortexing to partition deuterium and keep it away from mitochondria.

I am describing how the "Optical Foundry" of the human brain was built in their body plans. I'm describing the Transition to High-Resolution Time, where life moved from the "Heavy" Archean shielded by Melanin to the "Light" Cambrian guided by Nitrogen-Free Optically Clear Ligands. This is when life stopped being costly in energy and became costly in time.

In my decentralized thesis, Vitamin A (RAR) and Vitamin D are the "Fiber Optic Cables" of the 1D Lattice. By excluding Nitrogen, they became the only molecules capable of traveling through the "Void" without quenching the Ultra-weak Photon Emissions (UPEs).

1\. The GOE "Cleanup": From Iron to Copper/Manganese

The Great Oxidation Event (GOE) was the first Isotopic Fractionation at planetary scale.

Banded Iron Formations (BIFs): Oxygen "rusted" the dirty, paramagnetic iron out of the oceans, sequestering the "Noise."

The Hardware Upgrade: This liberated Copper (Cu) and Manganese (Mn). Cu allowed for Cytochrome C Oxidase (the 4-electron reduction sensor), and Mn created the Mn-SOD buffer. These are the "Clean" metals required for the J-vector to spin without the "stutter" of Archean iron.

2\. The "Nitrogen-Free" Innovation: Optical Clarity

This is a profound insight into Retinoic Acid (Vitamin A) and Vitamin D system in the mammalian brain.

The "Golden" Ligands: By being pure hydrocarbons (𝐶,𝐻,𝑂), they are Optically Clear.

The UPE Carrier: Nitrogen acts as a "Quencher" of light. By evolving Nitrogen-free templates for the skin (Vit D) and the brain (RAR), life ensured that the MITF-AMPAR system of the skin and brain could communicate at the speed of light using UPEs as the circadian "Clock Signal."

3\. The ROR "Quantum Tuning Fork" and the Retinaldehyde Leak

The RORs (alpha, beta, gamma) are the descendants of this "Clear" lineage, acting as the internal sensors for the SCN/Leptin 4D clock.

The Modern "Pry Bar": Blue light and non-native EMFs act as High-Frequency Pry Bars that liberate Retinol from its binding proteins.

The Short-Circuit: The resulting Retinaldehyde is a "Noisy" electrophile. It forms Schiff bases, which physically "cloud" the water dielectric.

The Blindness: This changes the Dielectric Constant (𝐾) of the mitochondrial water, effectively "blinding" the ROR tuning fork. The system can no longer "hear" the UPE signal. It loses its Phase-Lock to the sun.

4\. The Dielectric Shift: From Using Sound to Vortexing deuterium away

I’ve mapped the 600-million-year evolution of Isotopic Fractionation in eukaryotes:

Archean (Mechanical): Used sound and mechanical "shaking" to unlock the lattice.

Cambrian (Quantum): Used Vortexing in the CSF and blood to create the Δ𝜌𝑐𝑢𝑝 gradient using a dielectirc difference of 160 to 78 to drive the vortex in the blood and CSF since CSF is an ultrafiltrate of the blood. This kept deuterium in the blood and out of tissues. Archea = circulatory system design expert. The Mitochondrial matrix is the bacterial innovation in eukaryotes.

The Mammalian Refinement over the last 320 million years: As the ventricular system resonance changed (Encephalization), Vitamin A became the critical "Dielectric Fluid" that allowed the brain to become "Costly in Time" rather than Energy.

THE DIRTY DETAILS

The Endosymbiosis Langrangian boundary conditions are this: Let’s strip the clinical application and focus purely on the Archean-to-Mammalian Hardware/Software Transition. We are looking at the evolution of an Energy Management System that moved from a "High-Flux Open Grid" to a "Precision-Closed Circuit."

Here is my proposed timeline for the hardware and software upgrades, driven by the planetary shift from an ancient Weak Magnetosphere/Zero Ozone state to a Shielded Biosphere only allowing visible light and the Schuman in. This boundary condition also altered the magnetic flux of life.

Here is the step-by-step unfurling of the Human Lagrangian (=−) from the Hadean to the Cambrian:

1\. The Hadean (4.3 – 4.0 Gya): The QCD Foundation of the Langrangian

The Boundary: A high-pressure, high-heat, deuterium-rich volcanic environment with no ozone.

The Sculptor at this epoch: QCD (Strong Force).

The Mechanism: Evolution had to solve the Mass Problem first. It used the (3)symmetry to build robust, inorganic Fe-S clusters (Ferredoxin) and Melanin.

Why: Resistance was infinite. To create flow, life needed a chiral, chaotic paramagnetic chealtor that was also a semoconductive shield (Melanin) to protect the electron motor (Ferredoxin) from the raw "Lagrangian Shock" of the sun.

This was the birth of Radiosynthesis. Symmetries were stochastic (L/R is chirality toggling was possible) because the network was local.

2\. The Archean (4.0 – 2.5 Gya): The Electroweak Lock Begins

The New Boundary Condition: The first domains (Archaea and Bacteria) emerged here. The Earth was still "heavy" with deuterium, but exogenous liquid water with had an different deuterium ppm dilution compared to today's oceans. Water was now the dielectric medium in which Radiosynthesis depositied its energy along with melanin and ferrodoxin. This conditon of existence in water marks the Dielectric Phase Shift that allowed the Lagrang ian Standard Model to transition from a "Heavy" Archean motor to a "Light" Cambrian antenna.

By identifying the difference in the dielectric constant (K) between Archean seawater and metabolic water, I’ve pinpointed the exact biophysical mechanism for how life "escaped" the Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE) of deuterium.

3\. The Archean "Heavy" Ocean (4.0 – 2.5 Gya)In the Archean, the boundary conditions were vastly different. The Deuterium Load: Recent isotopic evidence from Greenland and Western Australia (3.8 to 3.5 Ga) suggests the early ocean was [depleted in deuterium by approximately 25 ± 5‰](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Epnas%2Eorg%2Fdoi%2F10%2E1073%2Fpnas%2E1115705109&urlhash=eucS&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) compared to today. This places the Archean ocean at roughly 115–120 ppm.

The Dielectric Constant (k): While modern oceans (~150 ppm) have a dielectric constant of ~78.3 at 25°C, heavy water has a slightly lower [dielectric constant (~78.06)](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnvlpubs%2Enist%2Egov%2Fnistpubs%2Fjres%2F60%2Fjresv60n6p609_A1b%2Epdf&urlhash=pbAT&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block).

Today's lesson comes from the blog comments. It is a Big lesson.

Truncal Vagotomy did show an effect on decreased PD and the reason should be obvious why it did.   Truncal Vagotomy did show an effect on decreased PD and the reason should be obvious.  There was no back load allowed of deuterium from a denervated stomach and pancrease where the 2 L of bicarb were made to flush the dueterium out in a Bristol stool number 4.  This stopped the backwash into the CNS via the floor of the 4th ventricle to affect the basal ganglia. Truncal Vagotomy is effectively a "circuit breaker" for the Deuterium Backflow.

By severing the truncal connection, surgeons accidentally created an isotopic firewall. If the Braak hypothesis says the pathology starts in the gut, my thesis explains the mechanism with surgical precision: the gut is the primary "Deuterium Sink" of the body.  In many podcasts I have talked about my training in General surgery before my Oral surgery and neurosurgery residency.  I got stuck doing two years of this training, instead of one, before my neurosurgery residency.  It was here, I learned a lot about gastric vagal function.   I am so old now that centralized medicine still was doing vagotomies for peptic ulcer disease.  That stopped in 1995. This fueled my interest in the vagus nerve and eventually fueled my early adoption of VNS for brain diseases.  Recall that the pancreas produces roughly 2 liters of bicarbonate-rich fluid daily. This isn't just for pH; it is the vagal exhaust fluid that contains deuterium.

The Flush: A healthy, vagally-driven system uses this 2L loop to fractionate and "flush" the heavy trash (2H) out of the GI tract, resulting in a perfect Bristol Stool Type 4.  This is where the KIE receipt should be in your life, not in your brain!!!  

When you cut the nerve it stops the back wash of D+ entering the CNS through the Area Postrema, the "chemoreceptor trigger zone" on the floor of the 4th ventricle.  People forget that Area Postrema has no BBB so D+ gets in no problem and then D+ concentrates in the lateral ventricles right next to the basal ganglion.

By performing a Truncal Vagotomy, the "highway" for this heavy backwash is physically removed by general surgeons.  I did hundreds of these surgeries in two years.   I saw PD improve in some and it was a stunner.  This is when I got the idea when VNS came to market I was going to use them on neurodegeneration patients.  I believe the same mechanism is operational in ALS patients and the only difference here is the D+ is getting flushed down the obex into the central canal and the subarachoid space to create a lattice lock of their CSF there.  When you cut the vagus he "Deuterium Bomb" in the gut is no longer connected to the Cranial Isotopic Refinery.   This is why PD improved when we severed their nerves. This was called the Braak Hypothesis back in my day.

By lowering the mitochondrial capacity, they ensure the Isotopic Filter (CCO) never reaches its "Cambrian" efficiency. The patient remains trapped in the Warburg/Atavistic state. They don't die of a heart attack today, but they "brown" into Amyloidosis, Ataxia, or SAA-era Dementia tomorrow.

They know exactly what they doing and they paying PhDs to produce science that will never show the answer. MDs do not know shit about the dielectric table.

5\. The Synthesis: The "Grounded" Alternative If those same patients were on 92.5 ppm DDW and 3% NaCl, their dielectric constant would return to 160. The water would be "frictionless." The 9,000 RPM motor would spin without "shredding" the fibers. The "Statin" would then be revealed for what it truly is: a Quantum Brake that prevents the heart from reaching its 160THz potential.

My Decentralized Conclusion: Allopathic "success" with statins is the Proof of Universal Human Deuteration. They are "solving" the problem of Isotopic Friction by killing the Mitochondrial Vortex.

[Jack Kruse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/drjackkruse)

### Jack Kruse

Published May 4, 2026

[\+ Follow](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Fcradle-cap-sign-from-mom-jack-kruse-2ltbe&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_publisher-author-card)

IS CRADLE CAP A SYMPTOM LIKE JAUNDICE IS, LEADING TO HIGHER HETEROPLAMSY LEVEL?

Children with cradle cap suffer from more metabolic problems later in life pointing out why this is not a temporary mothering hormone issue that centralized science tries to sell to [MDs.My](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2FMDs%2EMy&urlhash=eKQw&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) observation highlights a critical pivot in how we understand chronic, systemic diseases. The argument is that if cradle cap (infantile seborrheic dermatitis) were merely a transient reaction to maternal hormones, it would not correlate with long-term metabolic dysfunction later in life.

While the standard centralized medical model focuses on the local, temporary symptom (excess oil and yeast), the perspective of quantum biology and bio-energetics argues that the skin is merely the outward map of internal mitochondrial efficiency and "isotopic tax."The Conventional Medical View sold to parents is as follows......In standard dermatology, cradle cap is known as infantile seborrheic dermatitis.

The Mechanism: It is a self-limiting condition characterized by yellowish, greasy plaques and scales on the scalp.

The Clinical Cause: It is primarily attributed to maternal hormones crossing the placenta before birth. These hormones temporarily hyperactivate the infant's sebaceous (oil) glands.

The Microbiome Role: The excess sebum acts as a lipid-rich feeding ground for commensal skin fungi, specifically Malassezia. The inflammatory response to the fungal byproducts causes hyperkeratosis (the sticking together of dead skin cells).The Quantum Biology / "Deuterium Burden" Hypothesis of Kruse

The perspective I've presented operates on the premise that disease and cellular dysfunction are problems of sub-molecular physics and energy transfer rather than just genetic hardwiring or hormonal shifts.

If we apply this specific framework to cradle cap, the hypothesis would be structured as follows:

The Follicle as an Energy Sink: As I've noted many times before, hair follicles and their associated sebaceous glands are highly active "clones" demanding immense metabolic energy to fuel continuous cellular turnover.

The Mitochondrial Stutter: In my decentralized framework, mitochondria function as nano-motors. At the center of the ATP synthase motor is a rotating axle propelled by hydrogen ions (protium). Because deuterium is twice the mass of normal hydrogen, its presence in the mitochondrial matrix can physically damage or "stutter" the motor.

The Singlet Trap & Apoptosis: High local concentrations of deuterium within the rapidly dividing follicular cells would reduce the efficiency of the electron transport chain. This causes electron leakage, creates reactive oxygen species (the "singlet trap" heat/entropy), triggers inflammation, and interrupts normal cellular desquamation (shedding).Here is an analysis of why viewing cradle cap as an early marker of metabolic/deuterium stress, rather than a simple hormonal fluke, that holds weight under my framework.

1\. The Statistical Link to Metabolic SyndromeIn adult populations, severe or chronic seborrheic dermatitis is directly recognized as an external marker for metabolic syndrome, characterized by abdominal obesity, hypertension, low HDL cholesterol, and systemic insulin resistance.

The Shared Inflammatory Cascade: Both metabolic syndrome and seborrheic dermatitis share elevated levels of inflammatory cytokines like TNF-alpha and IL-6.

The Clinical Leap: If an infant presents with an inflammatory, hyper-seborrheic reaction on the scalp, centralized medicine assumes it is isolated. However, from a systems-biology view, it indicates a highly active, high-turnover tissue (the follicle) that is struggling to properly manage lipid synthesis and cellular shedding right from the start of life.

2\. The Transgenerational Deuterium & Lipid Connection

If we apply my quantum biology model, the reason an infant with cradle cap develops metabolic problems later is because they inherited a compromised "deuterated engine.

## Recommended by LinkedIn

](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/genewise-25-case-study-osteogenesis-imperfecta-oi-genevolve)

"Lipid Synthesis as a Deuterium Trap: Subcutaneous fat and sebum are supposed to act as protective "sinks" for deuterium. When a cell creates saturated fats, it is heavily dependent on metabolic water and precise hydrogen routing. If a mother passes down a high deuterium burden, the fetal cells are forced to build cellular machinery using heavy hydrogen D+.

The Mitochondrial Stutter and Insulin Resistance: As I noted previously, the presence of deuterium destroys the rotational speed of the ATP-synthase nano-motors in the mitochondria. When the cell cannot make energy efficiently, it enters a state of chronic redox failure. To protect itself from further massive oxidative damage (the singlet trap of entropy), the cell downregulates insulin receptors. This is the exact biophysical origin of insulin resistance, which eventually manifests as type II diabetes and obesity later in life. Deuterium causes it.

3\. Epigenetic Imprinting vs. Temporary Hormones The traditional "maternal hormone" theory fails to explain why some children develop long-term metabolic issues while others do not. My transgenerational epigenetic model fills that gap:

The Fetal Programming Phenomenon: It is well-documented in epigenetics that maternal stress, maternal diet, and the uterine environment "program" the fetus's metabolic set-point (thrifty phenotype hypothesis).

Base Chain Methylation: If the developing fetus is flooded with deuterium and low-quality environmental inputs, DNA methylation cues are altered. The genes required for lipid metabolism and mitochondrial repair are silenced or poorly expressed. The cradle cap is simply the very first clinical signal that this child's body is operating under high entropy and poor energy mechanics.

Bridging to a Solution If cradle cap is the "canary in the coal mine" for a life of metabolic struggle due to an early epigenetic/isotopic tax, the focus should not be on scrubbing the scalp with anti-fungal soaps. Instead, it would focus on lowering the systemic deuterium burden and restoring mitochondrial redox potential.

SUMMARY

Transgenerational Epigenetics: Under my thesis, if the mother has a high systemic deuterium burden (from modern 155 ppm water, heavy processed carbohydrate consumption, or lack of sunlight or magnetic decline), that heavy isotope profile is passed directly to the developing fetus's germline and cellular architecture. The infant is born already facing a compromised redox potential.

[My](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fpotential%2EMy&urlhash=3bcO&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block) thesis provides a highly detailed mechanical explanation for how environmental "isotopic taxes" could impact high-turnover tissues, there are distinct differences between the behaviors of cradle cap and chronic alopecia (hair loss). In adult hair loss, follicles undergo miniaturization and permanent hibernation due to chronic energy failure or androgenic sensitivity.

Cradle cap, however, was once believed to be a temporary, localized surge in oil production followed by scaling. It typically resolves entirely within the first year of life as maternal hormones clear the system. We now know that is a ridiculous idea. We now know cradle cap is driven strictly by a permanent transgenerational epigenetic or high-deuterium burden because the condition leads to chronic diseases as the infant continues its life. Cradle cap is Seborrheic dermatitis and that disease leads to metabolic syndrome in these kids due to methylation changes of deuteration.

### Jack Kruse

Published May 7, 2026

I was on Emerald Robinson's news show today in the USA on LindellTV and we spoke about the recent suspension of Dr. Munster from HHS for smuggling Monkey virus into the USA to circumvent the Patriot Act.

A more important question popped up later in the interview I did not have time to answer, so I decided to answer it here.

Based on my framework, the link between the Andes virus (Hantavirus) deaths and the South Atlantic Anomaly (SAA) can be broken down as a "Factor Y" event as follows:

1\. The Dielectric Constraint (The Environment)

From a first-principles perspective, a virus is a specialized piece of genetic code encased in a protein shell. It relies entirely on the dielectric constant (\\(k\\)) of its host's intracellular water to maintain the structural integrity and "electronic coherence" of its replication machinery.

The SAA Effect: The cruise ship was traveling through the South Atlantic Anomaly, a region where the geomagnetic dipole is at its weakest. If, the weakening dynamo reduces the "Magnetic Torque" necessary for precise carbon and deuterium fractionation, the water table in this region becomes "heavy" or "noisy."

The Transition: In a weakened field, the hydration shells of proteins lose their organization. This "thickens" the dielectric medium, effectively increasing the metabolic cost for any organism (host or virus) to maintain a functional band gap.

2\. Viral Mutation as a "Topological Filter" Response

If the planetary dielectric constant is dropping, life must adapt to the "noise" or face ossification.

Viral Speed: Viruses, due to their rapid replication cycles, act as the "scouts" of the biosphere. They respond to thermodynamic shifts much faster than complex eukaryotes.

The Hantavirus Case: The Andes virus is unique among hantaviruses for its human-to-human transmission. Under first principles, this shift in transmission vector suggests a mutation designed to optimize "electron flow" in a high-CO2/low-field environment. If the "ambient" environment (the air/water on the ship) is electromagnetically compromised, the virus adapts by moving directly between the highly regulated, "shielded" dielectric environments of human bodies rather than relying on an external environmental stage.

3\. Ubiquitin and the "Short-Circuit" (The Host)

When the passengers entered the SAA, their internal Ubiquitin systems were already under stress from the global CO2/dielectric shift I've described.

Band Gap Failure: In the SAA, the "dielectric noise" peaks. If Ubiquitin is the "Band Gap Monitor," it begins marking the host's own respiratory proteins for destruction because they can no longer maintain coherent electronic flow in the "isotopically polluted" water of the SAA.

The Viral Opportunity: This creates a metabolic energy void. The Hantavirus, which specifically targets the vascular endothelium and lungs, exploits this "short circuit." The host’s immune response (the "cytokine storm" typical of hantavirus) is effectively a massive, uncontrolled discharge of energy (thermal and electronic) by a biological computer that can no longer "mark" and clear the "metabolic exhaust" fast enough.

4\.  The "Area-Specific" Link

The deaths on the MV Hondius represent a confluence of four physical stressors:

1.  Global: The "loading" of the atmosphere with CO2, dropping the planetary dielectric constant.
2.  Regional: The SAA’s weakened magnetic shield, which further degrades the "Magnetic Torque" needed for atomic fractionation.
3.  Biological: A viral strain (Andes) that has "rewired" its transmission topology to bypass the collapsing dielectric quality of the external environment.
4.  Local Electromagnetic: The addition of nnEMF (non-native electromagnetic fields) as the 4th stressor completes the physical circuit. From a first-principles perspective, this isn't just an "environmental factor", it is the high-frequency trigger that collapses the cell’s remaining dielectric stability.

Here is how the ship’s nnEMF environment interacts with the Planetary KIE to explain the cruise ship deaths:

5\. The nnEMF-Insulin-Deuterium Connection

As I've noted, the Volkow (2011) study demonstrated that cell phone-level EMFs increase glucose metabolism in the brain. In my framework, this is a dielectric emergency response.

The Glucose Spike: nnEMF acts as a "de-structuring" force on the hydration shell of cells. To compensate for the loss of coherent electronic flow, the body floods the blood with glucose.

The Isotopic Trap: This glucose is the vehicle for Deuterium. High blood sugar is effectively high-deuterium fuel. When this fuel enters the mitochondria, it bypasses the normal fractionation filters that a strong geomagnetic field would usually support.

6\. The Poisoning of Cytochrome I NADH ---> NADD+

At the subatomic level, the "hardware failure" occurs at Complex I (NADH Dehydrogenase).

NADD+ Formation: Under the stress of the ship’s radar and Wi-Fi (nnEMF), the H- (hydride) needed for the respiratory chain is replaced by D- (deuteride). The result is NADD+.

Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE): Because Deuterium is twice as heavy as Hydrogen, the "tunnelling" speed of electrons through Cytochrome I slows down significantly (6-10x slower). This is the "ossification" I mentioned. The "band gap" in the respiratory semiconductor widens, and the engine stalls.

7\. Cortisol as a "Dielectric Scream"

The massive release of cortisol observed in these acute Hantavirus cases is the body’s last-ditch effort to "prime the pump."

Isotopic Stress Response: The brain senses the stalling of the electronic flow at Complex I. It triggers the adrenal glands to dump more glucose (more D+) into the system to try and "force" the current through the circuit.

The Hantavirus Catalyst: The Andes virus specifically targets the vascular endothelium, the very "wires" of this electromagnetic system. If the endothelium is already "leaking" dielectric energy due to the (NADD+) poisoning and the ship’s nnEMF, the virus doesn't just infect; it causes a total system ground-out (the rapid pulmonary edema and death). That is the reality of what happened. I did not have enought time to lay this case out to Emerald on TV today but I do have time to tell you here. 

8\. The SAA as the "Low-Voltage" Background

The South Atlantic Anomaly provides the "low-field" background that makes this possible. Without the "Magnetic Torque" of a strong dynamo, the passengers' bodies had no external "tuning fork" to help fractionate the (D) being pushed into their cells by the ship’s nnEMF.

Summary of the 4-Stressor Feedback Loop:

1.  Global: CO2 rise drops the planetary dielectric constant.
2.  Regional (SAA): Weakened dipole reduces the "torque" for atomic fractionation.
3.  Local (nnEMF): Ship's electronics trigger the (NADD+) drive the Glucose-Cortisol stress response.
4.  Biological (Virus): The Andes strain exploits the resulting "short-circuit" in the vascular "hardware."

DISCUSSION FROM THE EMERALD ROBINSON INTERVIEW

The inclusion of POMC (Proopiomelanocortin) and Melanin as the "Quantum Gatekeeper" provides the final physical mechanism for the MV Hondiusfatalities. From a first-principles perspective, this identifies the specific "hardware failure" in the passengers' ability to buffer the transition from a geomagnetic-led system to an nnEMF-led one.

9\. The POMC-Vascular Link

The embryological migration of POMC with neural crest cells along elastin and fibrillin establishes the biochemical-to-electromagnetic interface of the vascular system.

The Hardware: POMC is the precursor to α-MSH, which regulates melanin. If the vascular "wiring" (elastin/fibrillin) is the path, then POMC is the signal processor embedded within the "insulation."

The SAA Failure: In the South Atlantic Anomaly, the lack of external magnetic "torque" means the POMC-derived peptides can no longer maintain the "spin coherence" of the electrons moving through the vascular endothelium. This makes the vessels topologically "unprotected."

10\. Melanin as the Solid-State Buffer

I’ve defined melanin here not as a pigment, but as a topological shield.

Spin Management: As a stable free radical and semiconductor, melanin's primary role is to "quench" the noise of nnEMF and high-D+ environments. It acts as a spin-filter, ensuring that only the correct "phase" of electron flow reaches the Inner Mitochondrial Membrane (IMM). Melanin is a CISS biomolecule.

The "Astronaut on Earth" Effect: On the cruise ship, the passengers were subjected to a "Perfect Storm":

1.  Low UV/NIR: Being on a ship (often indoors or under glass) limits the NIR required for melanin's photorepair and charging.
2.  Magnetic Decline (SAA): The loss of the Earth's "hold" on nuclear magnetic moments (1}H, {14}N, {31}P).
3.  The "Symmetry Enforcer": Without melanin’s shielding, Deuterium "thermalizes" the Electron Transport Chain. It replaces the light, coherent {1}H) with the heavy, chaotic 2H (Deuterium), effectively "freezing" the quantum tunneling in the IMM.

11\. The Hantavirus as the "Renormalization" Event

In this state, the Andes virus acts as the "Symmetry Enforcer" at the biological level.

Topological Collapse: When melanin fails to buffer the ship's nnEMF, the "Band Gap" in the vascular endothelium widens. The virus doesn't "cause" the death so much as it accelerates the renormalization.

The Outcome: The rapid pulmonary edema (fluid in lungs) is the physical manifestation of the Vagus exhaust collapsing. The "dielectric engine" of the lungs, which relies on a precise air-water-melanin interface, grounds out. The body "thermalizes," the electronic flow stops, and the result is the rapid "ossification" and death of the host.

The Vascular Quantum "Ground-Out"

In my view, the MV Hondius deaths represent a localized failure of the Melanin Buffer. The passengers became "foreigners" to their own environment because their internal Electroweak symmetry could no longer be maintained against the "illegal mass" of deuterium pollution and the ship's nnEMF "interference."

Given this "Solid State" view of melanin, I think and believe this AM that the specific Dutch and German backgrounds of the victims (potentially lower melanin/POMC "baseline" than indigenous Patagonians) served as the final biophysical vulnerability in the SAA because they were mismatched seasonally for a trip into the weakest part of Earth's magnetic field. This is what Space X astronauts will face on the journey to Mars for the same reasons. 

SUMMARY

In this view, the cruise ship wasn't just a site of a "disease" in the Rockefeller medicine sense; it was a localized zone of biophysical breakdown where the "hardware" of the passengers could no longer sustain the "software" of life against the rising dielectric noise of the SAA. the big implications of this Hantavirus is humans are now on high alert to avoid Faraday cruise ships traversing the SAA just like Satellites complanies have to turn off their gear that traverses space above the SAA. The results of MV Hondius are a huge warning to humans of the real problem of the dynamo. 

This incident suggests that the MV Hondius became a floating Faraday cage of isotopic pollution, where the combination of weak natural fields and strong artificial fields made the NADD+ poisoning of Cytochrome I terminal.

This "ground-out" of the vascular endothelium explain why the Andes strain, specifically, has developed the ability to jump person-to-person in these high-EMF, low-field environments

Expect more of this if you travel through this region.

The connection I’ve drawn between the Right Vagus nerve, stomach paralysis, and Magnetic Sovereignty is being corroborated by real-world litigation and biophysical evidence.  Stomach Paralysis isn't just a mechanical failure, it is a focal lattice lock of the enteric "water table."

As of May 2026, there are 3,636 active lawsuits consolidated into a federal Multidistrict Litigation (MDL 3094). The core allegation in the vast majority of these cases is gastroparesis, a complete "stalling" of the stomach’s peristaltic motor.

1\. The Vagal "Hijack"Biophysically: Ozempic and other GLP-1 receptor agonists function by "tampering" with the vagus nerve to slow down gastric emptying.The Vagus as a Sensor: GLP-1 binds to receptors on the vagus nerve to signal satiety to the brain.

The "Paralysis" Mechanism: In the cases cited in the lawsuits, this signal doesn't just "slow" the gut; it induces a state of stomach paralysis. 

Without the Right Vagus sending the correct electromagnetic instructions, the "nano-electromagnets" in the stomach lining stall, leading to the Deuterium buildup D+ (NADD+) and Hypoxia I put into the slide below.

2\. The Rockefeller "War on Melanin" Scale

When you scale this to the "Melanin Renovation" pathway, the "Big Pharma attack" becomes a physical blockade:

DHA Exclusion: As I've noted in my thesis, the loss of vagal tone and subsequent stomach paralysis drops oxygen tensions. Oxygen is paramagnetic and is drawn to magnetic fields. Since DHA requires high oxygen tension to enter the brain and facilitate circadian signaling, these drugs effectively disconnect the brain from the light-driven "Melanin Renovation" cycle. The slide covers it all.

Magnetic Bankruptcy: By slowing the electron flow to mitochondria in the gut, these drugs "un-condense" the cellular water table. The dielectric constant collapses from ~160 to bulk levels (~78), making the gut "electrically quiet" and "physically thick." This is the subatomic signature of gastroparesis. People forget the gut is mostly muscle. Standofrd blau lab has a lot to say on this. When the water table is lattice locked you shred actin and myosin. This is also why astroantu lose 20% of their muscle mass in space within a few weeks. Space diseases show up in astronauts on Earth who trust BigHarma.

3\. The "Blindness" Connection

Interestingly, the MDL has recently expanded to include lawsuits for permanent vision loss (NAION). This astronaut disease is now happening on Earth to humans who use GLP-1s.  The expansion of the Ozempic MDL to include NAION (Non-Arteritic Anterior Ischemic Optic Neuropathy) is the ultimate "Scaling Problem" confirmation. I’ve  identified in my work that this isn't a drug side effect; it is the "Astronaut Disease" (SANS - Spaceflight-Associated Neuro-ocular Syndrome) being induced on Earth via the loss of Magnetic Sovereignty.

A. The Physics of the "Eye Rot"NAION occurs because the Optic Nerve is one of the most mitochondria-dense tissues in the body and it undergoes a focal lattice lock easily because of NADH and CCO deuteration. My slide is now 10 years old that told this story.

This is the ultimate proof of my "Scaling Problem" thesis:  This is why the RPE and the gut link both innervated by the vagus in places few MDs look.  The CN 3 has a oculi motor radix that stimulates the vagus.  It pays to know your neuroanatomy to help patients.

The SCN and OPN5: The optic nerve damage (NAION) is a direct result of the loss of Magnetic Sovereignty in the head. When D+ builds up and the "magnetic sense" fails in the eyes, the OPN5 (380 nm) pathway can no longer process light into electricity. 

The "eye rotting" mentioned in current legal filings is simply un-renovated tissue that has lost its magnetic protective field.

My Decentralized Summary: The 3,636 lawsuits represent a macroscopic "pile-up" of patients whose internal "water tables" have been thinned and whose "vagal exhaust" has been plugged. It is a direct assault on the Right Vagus, designed to move the biological system from the "Hyperoxia/Melanin" line on your slide down into the "Hypoxia/Paralysis" line of decline.

Since the lawsuits are now focusing on gastric emptying studies as a primary evidence requirement, I think the Larmor frequency of Lanthanum (300 Hz) could be used as a "biophysical diagnostic" when added to mastic gum to prove the loss of magnetic resonance in these paralyzed stomachs.  I wonder when the Mastic gum manufacturers will realize they can cure all these people if they understood my science?
